name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: From a blue-collar family to the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Chip in to keep Ed’s leadership in the U.S. Senate.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2642%2E4032634%2E-hmUcA)
---
We need real fighters in Congress right now. Democracy is under attack, our economy is rigged against working families, and the climate crisis is an existential threat. The people of Massachusetts and across America deserve a progressive champion who knows how to get things done in the Senate. [**My partner and friend Ed Markey is up for re-election, and it’s critical we keep his leadership and voice in the Senate. Will you make a contribution that will be split between my campaign and his so Ed can keep fighting for working families in Massachusetts and across America?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3142?t=8&akid=2642%2E4032634%2E-hmUcA)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3142?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2642%2E4032634%2E-hmUcA)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3142?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2642%2E4032634%2E-hmUcA)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3142?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2642%2E4032634%2E-hmUcA)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3142?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2642%2E4032634%2E-hmUcA)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3142?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2642%2E4032634%2E-hmUcA)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3142?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2642%2E4032634%2E-hmUcA)
---

---
When Steward Health Care went bankrupt as its CEO vacationed on yachts, it was Ed Markey who demanded they come before Congress to hold them accountable. When the Trump administration reversed America’s leadership on climate change, it was Ed Markey who fought back — securing billions of dollars for clean energy and creating thousands of jobs in Massachusetts. It’s his law that expanded treatment and gives hope to those struggling with opioid addiction. It’s his law that funded the national effort to cure Alzheimer’s. It’s his law that helped to identify the best solutions to prevent gun violence. It’s his law that made Juneteenth a national holiday. Ed has never forgotten what it’s like to come from a blue-collar family. He knows we don’t need more billionaires trying to call the shots in Washington. He stands up for a government that doesn’t just work for the giant corporations or the billionaire class — but that works for you. Ed has the fight, the experience, and the vision to meet the moment we’re in. He’s my partner, my friend, and a force to be reckoned with in Washington. [**If you can, please split a donation of $28 or whatever makes sense to you. Ed Markey has always had my back, and I know he’ll have yours.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3142?amount=28&t=14&akid=2642%2E4032634%2E-hmUcA) Thanks for being part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3142?t=12&akid=2642%2E4032634%2E-hmUcA)
---

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: A vital service that supports our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Seriously, folks -- Privatizing the USPS doesn't help Americans, it will harm rural communities all over the country, and it will remove a vital public service from our everyday lives. In addition, it'll destroy a safe, secure, and widely-used method of voting that is critical for those rural communities, for the disabled, and for our senior citizens.
We won't let them get away with this, but to fight back we need resources. RUSH $25 or more right now to protect mail-in voting, defend the USPS, and fight for the public services we need most >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=091425_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
WaPo - Opinion: A frantic warning from 100 leading experts: Our democracy is in grave danger [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=091425_2&amount=25]
We’ll keep this short, Team: those experts are right.
The attacks of the last few years in our state legislatures across the country targeting the right to vote, especially minority communities, are an assault on our democracy.
Now Trump, Musk, DOGE, and the MAGA movement want to privatize our postal service and harm mail-in voting , which has helped millions of Americans vote -- not just in the pandemic, but going back to the states that adopted the widespread practice in the early 90's.
“ Our entire democracy is now at risk ,” they wrote. “ History will judge what we do at this moment. ”
With so much at stake now -- not just with voting rights -- we've got to push our efforts to fight back into overdrive ASAP.
Team, none of this happens without everyone doing their share. Fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the destruction of our government, save our democracy, and protect the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=091425_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091425_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091425_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091425_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091425_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091425_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091425_2&amount=35]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091425_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091425_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: This message is different.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115220246/569604117/-530215862?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.14_OTS-Jon-Ossoff-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_NC-AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjUwODE5Ny1jYzkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MYMqT5lQPJcA0ERbTSSXpL6_UC_8hs1D8qimyu9q_Yg=)
Normally when I write you I like it to be different from most of the political emails you get. I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration and the surreal experience of working in the Senate at this singular and disturbing moment in American history. This email is different. It's more direct. I am reaching out this morning with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close. Here's why: Right now, Trump's MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record. **It is not normal for the GOP to be up on the airwaves and online with this kind of blitz this far out from the election. It's because they know Georgia is key. They know I'm strong. And they need to knock me down.** _Will we let them?_ We knew these ads were coming. But we're facing more outside spending, earlier than we had expected — which means we're going to have to ramp up our fundraising in order to respond and set the record straight. We will speak up. And we _will_ win. But I can't do it alone. I really need your help right now. **[_Can I count on you to split a contribution to my reelection campaign and Off the Sidelines today before our mid-month fundraising deadline? Thanks in advance._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115220247/569604118/2127676424?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.14_OTS-Jon-Ossoff-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_NC-AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjUwODE5Ny1jYzkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MYMqT5lQPJcA0ERbTSSXpL6_UC_8hs1D8qimyu9q_Yg=)** | | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115220248/569604119/2127676424?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.14_OTS-Jon-Ossoff-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_NC-AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjUwODE5Ny1jYzkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MYMqT5lQPJcA0ERbTSSXpL6_UC_8hs1D8qimyu9q_Yg=)

Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,

Jon Ossoff

name: John James
subject: I have two words to tell you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Patriot, I want to start with two words: **thank you.** Your support means more to me than you know. Without patriots like you, I wouldn’t even have the chance to run this race, much less fight to win it. _Let me share something personal._ I grew up in Detroit, the son of parents who came from the Jim Crow South to make their American Dream possible here in Michigan. My father started a trucking company from nothing, and my parents taught me that faith, family, and hard work matter more than anything else.
---
[](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=293a70e94c7a430a982ed60bafc4146a&_e=fIrZTijCpiYotsQpso6Hxqu7ymPpquet8FIMM09w-GVYTID0OyF-jkiO7uoFycB9ZGPySrXVIkcAAQcobZ2y3SbCMNnkmEVYkjHMHGt4cVipIq9lIV7biWf1IQULKheb3KCSaKfh8UUhxMJEMbBdKXYkPPn6CxtwXBpkqIxNpVtIJJSEluJ_SzR88mHj8aQAiwXUdKzZT44TE9lEjx_MoXZ9qJVx201zXXJR6znYQDtu6oAE2TKIytNUQz47pewm4w2_9v4AVoQrAJRL3S-MpNVTIGJU5lYOtsqDh3EIqqKsGBvjm-elzxwsg1fH1qEwKPKXnus6c8POXJ6Vte0vyHezhQs7E6Ezb-lGfxM0L4PZwkYMNfzKtE7NPrUrQeJqmgJZyzae7c_IO2J54YNnlJ9A1XTwoKo6jQftJ3im1UE%3D)
---
That’s why I went to West Point. That’s why I chose to fly Apache helicopters into combat. And that’s why, after serving in Iraq, I came home determined to create jobs and give back to the community that raised me. I’ve spent my whole life in the fight. Whether it was in uniform overseas, building a business here at home, or defending our values on the campaign trail.
---

clean_body: | | | Patriot, I want to start with two words: thank you. Your support means more to me than you know. Without patriots like you, I wouldn’t even have the chance to run this race, much less fight to win it. Let me share something personal. I grew up in Detroit, the son of parents who came from the Jim Crow South to make their American Dream possible here in Michigan. My father started a trucking company from nothing, and my parents taught me that faith, family, and hard work matter more than anything else. That’s why I went to West Point. That’s why I chose to fly Apache helicopters into combat. And that’s why, after serving in Iraq, I came home determined to create jobs and give back to the community that raised me. I’ve spent my whole life in the fight. Whether it was in uniform overseas, building a business here at home, or defending our values on the campaign trail. This race is no different. The media has tried to write me off from day one. The Left is pouring millions into Michigan. And too many weak Republicans would rather cave than fight. But here’s the truth: Michigan is the deciding ground for America’s future. If we win here, we can secure the America First agenda. If we lose, the Left will lock down this country for years to come. Patriot, I won’t quit. But I can’t do it alone. That’s why I’m asking: will you add your name to my supporter list before the books close this month? From the cockpit of an Apache helicopter to this moment, I’ve always relied on my co-pilots. Today, I’m asking you to fly with me. For faith, for family, for freedom. — John James | | Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312 | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for MI Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: Erika Kirk
subject: My cries will echo around the world like a battle cry.
body:
And I will never stop speaking his name.
We will never surrender. Ever.

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bc1411e07889407092dabcfcafce4246&_e=jvJQmX7kJz5zdfpL34kHTJz5JhakB3WetXMY1F5I9VSa0v6fKcyYxhfS3a9Xn1chcGLMCg12WtQWBYOs9KG25qcdRmaJAVj18W9A3oB8fP34yYgbuXu7x_LlOmHD7BQS_Chvw2m8L8kj0kQzoZ0f10HHeL5ySWnwVoZDJvAuFFY26k7Ridyg48bu2tWhAOf5xJ104zZzS4bBV1CWfLJSg4Y9X6uDgR_tqzccZ-EnZus_gkMwnFuk6TsP4b2pSTNG-grWX1rLJbpa3FnzeoMxZ7RnBTRTGCxZJZlsLMqacf1zxFWIBv_tjqPQ9hlXZilbqSr6kCUnFN1UDaVp6Bli-u1ZMEmwYwPr4LolD7zVeKaXDfQd9CeNwgA2uOi5pujfpZ0mcXDWIF2N69Pq1NwfynDwfP6khFNvtqIqIB9GZt-qeoqxNq3yBz2U8GZKeavnEWP7NHFy85uOMsyonan6kgqV1QdWBegvNxfv0WUomgA_8WsHYvQIba9yP5oEsaIpxENDtouedFBomAQo44-qsSSIKCYhcsS1ZKPmWqHU3uky13xHtORyxOtx1dim2hUbTSF3UOeNcCSfWDNRgY_37jl0D9OehjYqkiNbiPODphDXo6X0BbZR-A1Fp5TXOyWD19JkbO4rGyC4d5qq5QNtFU12UuyaJmAxHgW8qU9LCiAcu18oDNX7JBNGr-4HevDaJdzYjoMACRD1PYLu2eccag%3D%3D)
---
Peter, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. ** They didn't just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... ****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bc1411e07889407092dabcfcafce4246&_e=jvJQmX7kJz5zdfpL34kHTJz5JhakB3WetXMY1F5I9VSa0v6fKcyYxhfS3a9Xn1chcGLMCg12WtQWBYOs9KG25qcdRmaJAVj18W9A3oB8fP34yYgbuXu7x_LlOmHD7BQS_Chvw2m8L8kj0kQzoZ0f10HHeL5ySWnwVoZDJvAuFFY26k7Ridyg48bu2tWhAOf5xJ104zZzS4bBV1CWfLJSg4Y9X6uDgR_tqzccZ-EnZus_gkMwnFuk6TsP4b2pSTNGeB3YTYVTpdn08FO60QQoyV4JhEVw_7Ysj614Sv9z-jegHk_QSGRXCREz8SJphzQBQJ61adaGqGwuDlJeC714CiTaSVukiznw_gYtrchUbm5SJyl9ZNFl74LtqQMO6kxDY6hOCAP5IEw4xoGu789eI2JVRnEQhhf66-NqxxleXFHc5lY9rHKSYvvbuhiM0ZyKy0G95DOm2iBAAEKN8u0wMEJg1HGV7MQLucT8kzcXRxbyn-3w6U76N-0O4j9dYJur2SFgbAswBhGl-L_Uu1k_UXumc5ZN7FYPF7OWAw0iBnGdY7ahwZGvgzG-izzoc-myBCzwmrdta2XhBbeyItIiYQENtif_Fy7r4_FRFkI1yZ_80kX_XPQjqA_OLI1ubqVutopGeRFwX7obuuGGJhLQruLnOlYHNYqRXwOtV-dnFcFgdxQdctiojG52L_MyNhsezo0Mdu7hOK4-c6twAr1PyQ%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bc1411e07889407092dabcfcafce4246&_e=jvJQmX7kJz5zdfpL34kHTJz5JhakB3WetXMY1F5I9VSa0v6fKcyYxhfS3a9Xn1chcGLMCg12WtQWBYOs9KG25qcdRmaJAVj18W9A3oB8fP34yYgbuXu7x_LlOmHD7BQS_Chvw2m8L8kj0kQzoZ0f10HHeL5ySWnwVoZDJvAuFFY26k7Ridyg48bu2tWhAOf5xJ104zZzS4bBV1CWfLJSg4Y9X6uDgR_tqzccZ-EnZus_gkMwnFuk6TsP4b2pSTNGQ_clkdtIkc_Xru5oB9QUoAx8MpABNBsOFzwvzudhml1PDChxbWupJyDSOPSc9a_jTIS5_9fVk15AhnUy_7h9SvrkmvcCrEL4Q8KU6jsKJzXXz6aJvoc_L_Um8Zj0XR5Od1RAT7ZdbvRSN9Lm6TNlJtv_PNW5er-XRCThomkthhnyNXT7SRY4pVOBTcHkEFvdT6bSBr5pzeyJ7wXA5m0fjFXMX7e-HIG0APt8zivhYyU6o-1IZOdzDR_-GpwfvA0xColbbuONynkB8ieLeB0CNPsrhZgMiVx-8K5ec6HpU9tWSXAJeWpm5evKENOFI1njeM52Cm3xnk0NB8_VGpD8XwL_vECL_mHr94cINZm0eBlPRT22ERM4olStsz_X0kynvVn_L9f2Mc_4cq7WLB0s8b1Ak6G16OKVrhGKCdHh3NYlpjGyGzhyWWX5Nj6pONRpJoxK6spCiK5wz1xlhXV-_w%3D%3D)

Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bc1411e07889407092dabcfcafce4246&_e=jvJQmX7kJz5zdfpL34kHTJz5JhakB3WetXMY1F5I9VSa0v6fKcyYxhfS3a9Xn1chcGLMCg12WtQWBYOs9KG25qcdRmaJAVj18W9A3oB8fP34yYgbuXu7x_LlOmHD7BQS_Chvw2m8L8kj0kQzoZ0f10HHeL5ySWnwVoZDJvAuFFY26k7Ridyg48bu2tWhAOf5xJ104zZzS4bBV1CWfLJSg4Y9X6uDgR_tqzccZ-EnZus_gkMwnFuk6TsP4b2pSTNGZ7EPoR6wulDAdT2AFEsIWNJSpAHhf3VLtcQzCwzeeRROh2VAkTAN_KEuDaULGuL1SjOdP7QxZy3wV8hMF1KAhYSqAkD5fvkFahO-Oh5tcfDETN3av6isv-lTCpFSkP9ADR-7fNNyMXx0kIDaJbq7KPOH-gWeZOS0NJuYTlC0rJ6giENcMOlB61Esb7NM7TC_9FaZueARFFbCYemwKwiEd4BUWFcsZAaFC33rSKVhkNu6HgO9vrDEK2tnUzPTJ0Lm8Mc1Z_i5ROj6aPuVCVbbnUFZF7khQydGk9DMjTm4en3igrFzaf9E-BRaL3Fo4t-S_W9vYW11jmCIwKyhaJanGYsKWd4CgBS5VhORicpC8v107aPEFjZSNmCi206jN5aWutYlSJd_m7PfOhRVq-mx-pI8V81rXGr3C8AFqjwEeX2WSIM6z8jJlvqH6P427hCj-oWNBWwAH067W9LT3tYzwA%3D%3D)
---
Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bc1411e07889407092dabcfcafce4246&_e=jvJQmX7kJz5zdfpL34kHTJz5JhakB3WetXMY1F5I9VSa0v6fKcyYxhfS3a9Xn1chcGLMCg12WtQWBYOs9KG25qcdRmaJAVj18W9A3oB8fP34yYgbuXu7x_LlOmHD7BQS_Chvw2m8L8kj0kQzoZ0f10HHeL5ySWnwVoZDJvAuFFY26k7Ridyg48bu2tWhAOf5xJ104zZzS4bBV1CWfLJSg4Y9X6uDgR_tqzccZ-EnZus_gkMwnFuk6TsP4b2pSTNGxmlc7pWri8d6ksKi2JOY_JkDWi7G4O0E_0iAc7vNzcXakUzkIrkgQyHQUekZOOnvoOIkB1zzsqb4FuFvwNaXH8-jSCOpPgg3WZ5Vl2-8bCWABQOvG0a02p3bB53AjX1CiP4Y2W_jbbiHcBAJZiavBtNUBZHUo4TfM8QT1ZhxRlLiQQ29u6fXDUo9vLFO7itUj3q1Q2J6j-t1uRaD7jsTIPD_gDwcsNFmN679u8B1Ij5KWmwpEWpAwGstkLdeUp5JFkwf3ykf_dOkmAOi1LHe-mFi8I3Rhg7gAKp938eZAs2JM9BIUVf7rfTLCSRpKUKeDiVh3zv9dDKZAB5bZ9DNmLtJRzbfc6t_LTU7nlnyqM49KjNOJgBkSN_uzip_8uEvhRxHEkxRuXChfa-g6dwp152Igl9wFRvMGH0w4AbAwf1HKbfezah4YIS_k-quhY5KY3LvVnlhcAN3SNVf72vioA%3D%3D)
---
**P.S.** Charlie always said: _" Never surrender."_ He built something bigger than himself -- and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie's vision die...

clean_body: And I will never stop speaking his name. We will never surrender. Ever. | | | Peter, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, I need you to listen closely... Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. They didn't just try to silence a man... They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED. Not just across this country...But in me . They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die. I refuse to let that happen. And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life. Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie, Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family P.S. Charlie always said: " Never surrender." He built something bigger than himself -- and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie's vision die... 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Erika Kirk
subject: My cries will echo around the world like a battle cry
body:
I want to thank you for loving my husband.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvt610phouse65n75pkgio11hd323f92j071fem8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjj60ob2c1h2bs)
---
Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. ** They didn't just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... ****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf2apus9b56a091c09o9dsriui8gp3223lr519v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjj60ob2c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk9a4fd2st9vil2ous9p5jhqtelmnh0fjpg6i6a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjj60ob2c1h2bs)
---
Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbe5jfgmkrqhqkvlgc531um4con4kgpvnt3i3v4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjj60ob2c1h2bs)
---
Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlvmm5oa7di8pq1occgk0o232ml4qpgv004uuvqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjj60ob2c1h2bs)
---
**P.S.** Charlie always said: _" Never surrender."_ He built something bigger than himself -- and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie's vision die...
---

**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu3inro17j1jvhdjfr8ahrh5joj6qkqcll2dks30_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjj60ob2c1h2bs)

clean_body: I want to thank you for loving my husband. | | | Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, I need you to listen closely... Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. They didn't just try to silence a man... They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED. Not just across this country...But in me . They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die. I refuse to let that happen. And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life. Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie, Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family P.S. Charlie always said: " Never surrender." He built something bigger than himself -- and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie's vision die... 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# Monday, September 15, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1821, Central American nations (Costa Rica, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, and Nicaragua) [declared independence from Spain](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtygzAQAL8GOhg9EFiFijTunDYlc6DDXCwkz-lij_8-4_xCuq12Z_brMl-AEuXrJxwYZCtzxmdNKII834hv9UYpIVdhyPUOLBl5nY0yrlO-026OQOk1D20MG6JB22LQk5u8VZOz7R4ijItZwLhF-2kZvB5OK472hBOcrB91S-FtU147rZRzth_9ChuOXvm4LQZNMyiMJIX770JZdtzSqzyQ-7UcbQq7yL029qMx58acd6pS-NVXAcH-Wh6NOa_lJwsT1jdjFobUwYFMK-Ruw4gMQiW3HOL9SSlRHadmUNcDKP1F5F9nHsH8BgAA__-9R3o5). Today, we're spotlighting a cozy roundup of [pumpkin recipes](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGnwRsW4IDDwNDFW7p2tLC5xLe-NhaQRO7TV-krdD86n_R_3cabR8L9_uk3cDWmcYdXIagV8rhiXsuKRJBLzX4vh891hzyPSijNheVSj8EjneOlCS4CKOgacLLXve1Er7tmcaaTU4jmGkUEEzxYKbXtJiGNCZOK1wbd-01YqaUQWnetsbOPYKywIU4KFLsICFhTbr8T7nWBSGd6Qm7ntDXkllqPwroPpgamBsJaCZb0KDDh3ZMvq38PmRreDFODsEwNc_o5-fHYjhV3PvkVCo9-Q0IovFQk4uUFPvPpbJe6UZNdOF5IhMX07CLum0f68-u_oj2d-g0AAP__tUWC9w) families can't get enough of. What flavor or dish instantly makes you think of fall? Hit reply and share your favorite with us! **Editor 's Note: **Our Sunday coverage of the _Unite the Kingdom_ march in London, organized by conservative activist Tommy Robinson, initially cited a turnout of about 110,000, as reported by multiple outlets. The _BBC_ is now [estimating](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFyhCAUANDTYLcMfERCQZHGbtOmZFj4KBHFAbLO3j6TXCEXeMX7vNu7Szkdy4fb0fRY7IFXy9g7VrulurUt5Yy19eqOdrraD6zeAgN5Y_rGpQ0u5Zcdh2AiIqAY0HAllRZMSTGsBmPQ8DYqEScugwqK8wkggBZKexAwJPOrMc0lZ0xKQSftXcRJMx3iAxDIyDCkXir9KunoK8b8Kk-s1Jd9yGbt_WxEvBOYCczXddHHw1Nf6PdGYD5rWarbd2wE5syYVMsqhmrCeaWcU5sUGdmyu5T_uP6vg6eBnwAAAP__Q-1vlA) as many as 150,000. Several of our readers have since pointed out that aerial and street-level footage appears to show a crowd even larger than those figures. We weren't on the ground and can't independently confirm a precise number, but you can [review the footage yourself here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFywjAQQNHTyB3Mam1Z3kJFGnekTekR9goUyxYjLRBunyFXSPuLV_yv03TyMcX98uk3dhLytPOzJhbhMq2xrHWNKXGpUvxeb77IzmWeENAcgA7aTIuP6TV1zeICM3LbsNPWWGrBmra5urOZwxl0oDDgjF6Tx8VaM9jZ88DBNNG9NSBtNIAx7bGn2QfuCWgJZ2RUHfASJZfjd467XDmkV35wOc55a5K7ityqaj8UjgrHn3dVOHLK-3avq8Kxipd7VThq6i0A0YBDN5C2VuumuOX2jCnF2lvVwWXzMf3B8q8bD4e_AQAA___vwHIm). Imagine owning a piece of the $1.3T vacation home market. Today's sponsor, [Pacaso](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMuumzAQhp_G7EC-YIwXXlQ6yi7ddmlNzRCmMQbZJlHeviKN-gJn-_-f5vL9uvorUKR0-wkrujpvPuGzRKwVs79Tvpc7xYi51Ayp7JBrwhy85FK33LZC-wkovnzfTG5GlKgadMJoYxU3WjWLC6PhEkbRo0ZlbB8sGCFFHwSIQQ3YkDuncSu04Fxr1Q02wIyD5Xaaf0uUrOc4Ud1y92ejVBec42t7YO7CtjbRLbXuhakfTF6YvFB6YKndDgHKdhJnrC5HXX3ZjhyQqS9cgSKTwxmuONGxMvW1A03t58Gy0P7pA6w70C29if-lGHmrtPL_FByJKnjBjR6V4iO3TXbT_qQYqQyG9fx2LnyfW7_l-OHk3wAAAP__ZQ2QiA)--backed by top investors and created by a former Zillow executive--is opening the door for everyday investors to buy in. Even our own _Flyover_ founder has invested. But time is short--this opportunity closes soon.

## Utah Gov. Reveals Details on Kirk Assassin
Utah Gov. Spencer [Cox revealed new details](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL_u2yAURp8Gb0T4YuwyMKRq2dKlQ0eLH752aPhjXUisvH3lvELnTzr6zvlzm28uxJC3Xy6haWuZMx41YmtI8yPQoz5CjEi1kct1d9Qykp9BgOJC817NiwvxPQ_dYlZEQNmh6Sc1aSkmJbu76QehhfvmvZZOexiH0U8T4Ci9GgCk74I5aUL3qhdCKXkZtXcrjlroZf0CBDYIXEIrdPlbQm53XOO7vJAuvqQumntre2XyysAysMdxXFLN58bAYubPysB6CgkZ2A0zkosMbC1P8lj56cjrs-7oG6_8o7lhXpA4lZKSa8jddne18eTe_Av5A9-8FZ5KC6-T6Yhfr_3taX8KJm3xYWHyx_czKR71N9LekVn2I8QY6jixQWzJhfg53_6r-MvAvwAAAP__YxeXlA) Sunday about Charlie Kirk's suspected killer, Tyler Robinson, particularly noting that Robinson's roommate, who is transgender (a male who identifies as female), has become a person of interest and was Robinson's "romantic partner." Robinson contacted his roommate after the shooting [with details on the whereabouts](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFu7CAYBODT4A4L_zawFBSvcbevTWlh_GPIYlgBWWdvHzlXSD3SN5r5uC93E2JI-39zoG4uLwnPGrE1LMsjlEd9hBix1FZMqk9TWsJiF2DAKVN04MtmQnwvU7dphwg4dqgHyaUameRj5_UNBZeTcFyw1fAbrtsATpjVKDnCYGUX9KUxNfCBMc7HXihrHArF1OZWQCATwy20XPrPHFLz6OI7v7D0Nh9d1L61ZyXjPwIzgfk8z96m1V4hgfmiCcxMEZiHicBsvSkxIL220epzbiHt9KsZT_f8ojZ_0963I3ZFb88zxBiqkGRi-2FC_G1sf7rppeEnAAD__0w1e6E) of the hidden murder weapon. Gov. Cox said the roommate is "incredibly cooperative" with investigators and was "aghast" at the shooting. Cox also said that Robinson was active in the "deep, dark internet [...] culture" and posted in at least one group after the shooting. One radical left group in Utah, in which Robinson may have participated, deleted its social media profile in the wake of the shooting. Meanwhile, Turning Point USA, co-founded by Kirk, announced that his [memorial](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb8GOiNjMCyFizR0mzYlGuzxY_IGG9kGsvn6iPzC1lc6uuf8-lw-gZjC6yfsaIqPS8A7M5aCaXlTeuc3MWPKJUHIB6QSMNlFSaWFnESrFwfEX0tfO-MRFXY1mnbU49TJUXf1ZlB5-PC99a7v_DBpidB_eO_X1lnbtrom89Dk1OpWSq27ZpgseBwmOTm_KlRVL9FRian5HSmUDT1_xQtTY-Nes9lKOXLV_ajUXKn5vu_Gxz-PxbNXaj5zpeZypkDhJY6HIM4MAkKIZ7CYxQ4504XiOFcmK3bcYyJgkTFdZFHYDRITiieHgER_YwDhYywrMItcwNG518m44yZmysNY9fK1A_H_h-VbWS-j_gUAAP__eOKS0g) has been set for Sunday, Sept. 21, at State Farm Stadium in Glendale, Arizona. The stadium has a capacity of 63,400. Turning Point USA invited people to come celebrate the life of an American legend.
## Russian Drone Breaches Romanian Airspace
Romania, a NATO member, reported [Russian drones](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGumzAQRb_G7BwZOw6PBYu0Fbt000pdosEeXqYxNhpPgvL3Ff2Ftz7S1T3nz226ASXKnz9hxUGWMmXca0IR5OlB_KgPSgm5CkOuG7Bk5DBZY702vW79FIHSezo3cVgQLboGh7bzXe9M511zH-zs2o829h_93M5L5_xirDfgAOLi7AUaGo4107e-NcZ7d7r0ARa89KaPy2zRqrPBSFL49LdQljsu6V1eyKdQ1iYNd5GtKndVdlR23Pf9tNZ8MGVHzPpZlR0PqQMWTlHZkcsKmUDPGMqKVVcMJUedQYoO5ZmF31qKjigYRPOzVoKsI5eMmrImqRqI6wYBlR2B9fXa3l6_v6NyYwkUlfvx7WiKe_2FvDU8xG2nlKheOnU2nytQ-v9evpT8Ndh_AQAA___HSZjJ) entering its airspace on Saturday, less than a week after Poland announced the same violation. The Romanian defense ministry said a Russian drone was detected while fighter jets monitored a Russian attack on Ukraine near Romania's northern border. The ministry added that the drone didn't fly over a populated area and didn't pose an imminent threat. As NATO allies call for sanctions against Russia for the airspace breaches, [President Trump said he was "ready](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOpDAURE9jMiNjY1gCB71akfUmG2yI3Pan-dPGRvanGW4_Yq4wSSUlPVW9__fpbjFgfP61Kxia0xThKAGIIE8vzK_ywhAgF8o2ls1mipDdJIXUXAy80ZO3GM6prbyZASSoCkzT635QoteqWozX0krRaa1a2zvonOi7X72yTs-Dbp2r0Fw0MTS6EUJrVXeDszN0gxj8_JAgWSvAI6VcfySMtMAczvSGXLu0VsEsRFth6sbkyOR4HEe9lnh1TI4Q-WdgcrxOMTkmWiAzOVLe141nsP7klHix0RGmyPNeClqOM4-W0hWYYuGF0sYf-4nxyZEKT3gxbea3W3PfdyCmxuTQM_Xn96USjvIP8lZl47cDQ8DS9awVz9Vi-B5NPzL9NvIrAAD__1C6lY4)" to do so if member nations stop buying Russian oil. Meanwhile, Romanian allies, including Poland, are shoring up defenses in response to Russian actions. Ukrainian President [Zelensky called the situation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp8Gb1iYHzsMDJUqSx3StaN1DdcJCQYLrhLl7av0FTp_0qdzzs95OUNMMV--YUdHW1kyPltCIqzLPdZ7u8eUsDaqkNsBlTJWv0ghDReWD2YJENNr0V1wG6JE1aEbJjNZJSajuquD8aS1CjpYP4WTmbQRSm1TGILXq7Khi-79JuxgBiGMUf1oPWw4WmHDtkqUTAsMkUrtbyVmuuKWXuWBtfdl75K7Eh2NqQ8mZyZnWP3boL-U98zk_JUJawaKJUNicj5Kghx4LTvkCLz5CvuakN-QGs9AhUNKERuv6EsNPOOTyblRqS-m5hiY-hykMWaw8tRVF45nTCm2cWJaXHaI6Q-L_tXy4eRvAAAA__9QWonf) "an obvious expansion of the war by Russia." Russian officials have yet to respond to the Romanian report.
## Map: Christmas Costs by State Income
A new study shows how early the average household in each state would need to start [saving for a typical Christmas](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO5CAURE9jZ1iAwV4Cgk066003tH7Dp80YYwu-jPr2I88VJqugVKr3_j-XJ8QU8_sf7GgpHEvGVhMSYVm2WLa6xZSwVCqQ6wmFMha3SC4144YJvXiI6bOo3tuAKHHs0YpZz2bksx771fI_wk9Ge8PHSWuB3ghUQc9KuPByTvbR3mvcCC0413ocJuMg4GS48eElUXaKo490lOHriJlWDOlzXFgGd-x9sivRWbvxbycfnXy01oYboSFud6GTjx1OVvBCSJWtR2MIJX0YgltZJSBkGdHXOxdiFa6Y38ytJVbaoTIppFBq7ov1Z4spxTrNneLvHWL6eUC_0nZZ-R0AAP__uGCDsA), and in many cases, it's _over a year in advance_. The analysis defined a "typical Christmas" as $902 in holiday spending per person, covering gifts, food, travel, and festivities. Based on median income and expenses, only a few high-income states like California and Virginia could save that much in four months. Households in places like Indiana, Alabama, and Kentucky would need multiple years, or may never have enough disposable income to cover the cost. Experts warn that last-minute spending often leads to high-interest debt that lingers well past December. Editor 's Note: Our Sunday coverage of the Unite the Kingdom march in London, organized by conservative activist Tommy Robinson, initially cited a turnout of about 110,000, as reported by multiple outlets. The BBC is now as many as 150,000. Several of our readers have since pointed out that aerial and street-level footage appears to show a crowd even larger than those figures. We weren't on the ground and can't independently confirm a precise number, but you can . Imagine owning a piece of the $1.3T vacation home market. Today's sponsor, by top investors and created by a former Zillow executive--is opening the door for everyday investors to buy in. Even our own Flyover founder has invested. But time is short--this opportunity closes soon. | Utah Gov. Reveals Details on Kirk Assassin Utah Gov. Spencer Sunday about Charlie Kirk's suspected killer, Tyler Robinson, particularly noting that Robinson's roommate, who is transgender (a male who identifies as female), has become a person of interest and was Robinson's "romantic partner." Robinson contacted his roommate after the shooting of the hidden murder weapon. Gov. Cox said the roommate is "incredibly cooperative" with investigators and was "aghast" at the shooting. Cox also said that Robinson was active in the "deep, dark internet [...] culture" and posted in at least one group after the shooting. One radical left group in Utah, in which Robinson may have participated, deleted its social media profile in the wake of the shooting. Meanwhile, Turning Point USA, co-founded by Kirk, announced that his has been set for Sunday, Sept. 21, at State Farm Stadium in Glendale, Arizona. The stadium has a capacity of 63,400. Turning Point USA invited people to come celebrate the life of an American legend. Russian Drone Breaches Romanian Airspace Romania, a NATO member, reported entering its airspace on Saturday, less than a week after Poland announced the same violation. The Romanian defense ministry said a Russian drone was detected while fighter jets monitored a Russian attack on Ukraine near Romania's northern border. The ministry added that the drone didn't fly over a populated area and didn't pose an imminent threat. As NATO allies call for sanctions against Russia for the airspace breaches, " to do so if member nations stop buying Russian oil. Meanwhile, Romanian allies, including Poland, are shoring up defenses in response to Russian actions. Ukrainian President "an obvious expansion of the war by Russia." Russian officials have yet to respond to the Romanian report. Map: Christmas Costs by State Income A new study shows how early the average household in each state would need to start , and in many cases, it's over a year in advance. The analysis defined a "typical Christmas" as $902 in holiday spending per person, covering gifts, food, travel, and festivities. Based on median income and expenses, only a few high-income states like California and Virginia could save that much in four months. Households in places like Indiana, Alabama, and Kentucky would need multiple years, or may never have enough disposable income to cover the cost. Experts warn that last-minute spending often leads to high-interest debt that lingers well past December. Find your . Discover the that’s shocking experts and freeing lives. to learn how you can try it at home today. | Beyond Borders is brought to you by: ➤U.S. and Chinese officials met in Madrid to ease trade tensions, debate TikTok’s looming U.S. ban, and confront pressure over China’s purchases of Russian oil, with any major breakthroughs likely delayed until a potential Trump–Xi summit later this year. () ➤ The final stage of Spain’s Vuelta cycling race was cut short Sunday after anti-Israel protesters blocked the route in Madrid, clashing with police and forcing organizers to cancel the podium ceremony. () ➤ The family of Virginia Giuffre, Jeffrey Epstein’s most prominent victim, says Lord Peter Mandelson should never have been appointed U.K. ambassador to the U.S. because of his ties to Epstein. Mandelson was fired last week after leaked emails revealed he sent supportive messages to Epstein during his 2008 trial, despite insisting he believed Epstein was innocent at the time. The spectacle closed out the Vatican’s Grace for the World concert, capping a two-day summit on global fraternity attended by world leaders and artists. () ➤ A one-of-a-kind home made from embalming fluid bottles is up for sale in Cheyenne, Wyoming, listed at $299,900. Known locally as the Crystal Castle , the 766-square-foot cabin was hand-built in the 1960s by mortician John Widholm using tens of thousands of square glass bottles. name: Shannon Taylor
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Hi Peter, I’m Shannon Taylor, and I have some exciting news. I’m officially running for Congress to represent Virginia’s First Congressional District. My mission has always been to keep our communities safe without compromising on our freedoms. I’ve served as a prosecutor for nearly 30 years and have never backed down from a tough fight.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T392491f4-c465-43b2-9ce0-3755c40daae5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40a44d8b-10fb-4b8e-94a1-d3881018734f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, I’m Shannon Taylor, and I have some exciting news. I’m officially running for Congress to represent Virginia’s First Congressional District. [Will you chip in now and become a Founding Donor to my campaign?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc2d6538-a0aa-4978-8c65-99790e218d87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) My mission has always been to keep our communities safe without compromising on our freedoms. I’ve served as a prosecutor for nearly 30 years and have never backed down from a tough fight. But Peter, in the last year, we’ve seen growing threats from political extremists who put ideology over common sense and seem hell-bent on undermining our freedoms and weakening our institutions. We’re seeing an unprecedented shift away from the rule of law because of leaders who believe they are above it. Our leaders in Congress are not fighting for us. They are letting partisan politics get in the way of keeping our communities safe, lowering healthcare costs, and making sure everyone can put food on the table. It’s time for a change. I’m entering this race with the experience of winning both cases and elections. I’m the only candidate who’s proven I can win tough races by bringing together Democrats, Independents, and even some Republicans, and the only one with a record of successfully prosecuting hundreds of cases. In Washington, I promise to defend the law and stand up for working Virginians like I’ve done for years as a public servant. But this election will be a close race, and I will need you by my side to win. [Will you split a donation of $5 or more right now between me and Blue Amp Action to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in VA-01, and help build a government that actually serves the people it represents?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T857ba4ef-3c22-4234-b0c3-08a5abfd7cf2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T863058d5-60cd-4c25-a9cd-308a460434f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc39a4772-f540-41d8-865c-077d054b30d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1fffcc47-a94f-4efe-b7f1-fcc3644bac2b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Thanks, Peter. With you on my team I know we can win. Shannon Taylor
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---

---
| | | | |
---

---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250915_taylor-launch_b1_f1_s1_c1_warmup_rs-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf56c3040-f682-40bf-b18c-c842353cdb6f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Investigating Teachers, Cowboys Play 1,000th Game, and Storm-Chasing Pastor
body:
The Texas Education Agency (TEA) is investigating public school teachers who have posted or shared "reprehensible and inappropriate content" following the Wednesday assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbvOnDAQhZ_GdKx8ATYUFJFW2_1pU6LBHsNI2Eb2sBeePiLaKEXKtOcbndE38_Nr_AJaKc4_IODAL5_GiM-yIjPmkeIDC9MMTHFmBLtgLjY9p1FL3dayr1U7OqD1PTaVGybpelXhoK7ttTeN7PpqGbDxzsDkr67xTafUpKDtwXlo3SSVbCsazjLZq1apM7iA7_GbVqpvwTgrr6KR6IhTvvCCjC8ofn2nB-aLTaFah4V5K8J8F_ou9N1ThGhx2o_j5ELfQ4r4rkN6YKltKmxT_QY8hLnvHMaS9mxRmBsv-Omt_XQI3Z00oKM9CHPbgFz99zR1Lp8JxnzynP4EFsIGNEdhbv9uFroDN-e0b-SEucE-74U_rMqD2560rlS6U3oOQOtvR_6_zzwG_SsAAP__sKWpgQ) | |
# Monday, September 15, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1946, actor [Tommy Lee Jones](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOqzAQheGngQ40NnESFy5uQ3G12WqlLdFgT2AkY0f2KIS3X2VfYfuj70j_9226IUdOyydu5OR1z1OivUYSoTJxelIVXlA4LULoVyrV532eNGjTge2UmQJyPKZTG9wMwaqWnLqYix1OcLbt6obrOSirVPABwCJ6Y2E2g72Cn2FQumX3xsAqoxQoMD3eLV21UtbgEDxcmhNQYMmll5WEXljv8chPKr3PWxvdKvKozfCv0WOjx33f-7mwYErs8T1p9DhzXgo-1qPR41fetqP7IOr-50S1LS48do6R6_l9tWzI8VeWv_V4Ov0TAAD__z_AdQE) was born in San Saba. He is best known for playing gritty characters like U.S. Marshal Samuel Gerard in _The Fugitive_ (1993), Harvey Dent in _Batman Forever_ (1995), and Sheriff Ed Tom Bell in _No Country for Old Men_ (2007). The Dallas Cowboys played their 1,000th regular-season game yesterday, [beating](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8Guo1sB4e4oEhDl2tPugYteAHrjI3sTQxvf-Je4e9GGmn0zff7PbzReReWX7hRx8cch0Ale2KmNLjwpcxuQXZhYcJppZSnWMZBCaVBGJB6sOj8OTS17UZhjaypk61uzb0RD1OvHTVtq59PjaaR0zgR2unemLGdn3JqRytq111jwkgtpZBC33A29FRSGo13O4m2agRZxzHdeCWmA_Psz_ildJviVvtuZd5zdX9Vqq9UX0q5bTlcXaV6CvDJlerzHhNfIcy-Ur0Gxr-EBc8Mc4obXKfimWFxGDiDYyiYAzDsiZhPGD8MFr3HDAm9d5TBBVjjRhB3CpQq1WOC10u-j-Pzp06d3Yvz3uXHxb9s6Px_XP6Z5G-n_gUAAP__DqeUSg) the New York Giants in thrilling fashion. ## TEA Investigating 'Reprehensible' Kirk Remarks
The Texas Education Agency (TEA) is [investigating public school teachers](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD-TsyAQxj-NdjiAIUpB8TZ2edsrnY0suhMiGdgLybe_MdX11z__fs_XZb4ARdrX_3BHx6-Q5h1riciMeab9iYVpBaZ9ZYRlw1yWVK-zltoIaYUysweK7_nUeneV3qoWnRrMYPuTPNt2czgaowcZ-n4cJIIBtCGMV6vU6K0-25bcESatMkpJJU0HweKolbIGer_IoTlJ9MQpd7wh4wtKiO_0xNwt6d5GtzE_StP_a_TU6KnW2oX0GuC7MO2HpNHTwdTo6WMWjCB-kaVdLBvkSChulG-ibCkdvG12_lEpRirnY8N6B4qfSv7bUU-nfwIAAP__yTJ_Vw) who have posted or shared "reprehensible and inappropriate content" following last week's assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University. In a Friday letter to superintendents, Education Commissioner Mike Morath said these actions could violate the Educators' Code of Ethics and [warrant sanctions](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQhp8GNiPbYBwPHrqwpWtHdNgHnGJwZLshefuKSFUfoOPd6X593_91Ha9AgfblEza05TnHcccjBywF00j7A3OhBQrtS0FwK6bs4jGNkkvFuGFCjR4ovMau9nbi3ogardBKm7bjvalXKxVMk0KNuudKwXzp9EVo0wrPe-wE1GTPMG6EEoILrhqYDV6kEEZB6x3XVcfRU4mpKSsWfEKewys-MDUubnWwayn3XLUflRwqORzH0bgpnxbnvZLD-6WSw7n6HRn6bwclpsz-JNGzHB1BYBt6AuZWSIGQ3SjdGOQMOdMOheJeyaFO1t8PCoFyfyIuG1B4E5X_9fiw8icAAP__yvuKeQ). He praised administrators who have disciplined or terminated employees who "have proliferated such vile content." "_While the exercise of free speech is a fundamental right we are all blessed to share, it does not give carte blanche authority to celebrate or sow violence against those that share differing beliefs and perspectives_ ," [Morath wrote](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGS4yAQRL8GZbgACdsEBJeQ7aUXqkYwsqaMQQWz1u7fX-mS-4BNu6u6-_Wfj_kDKFN5_IYXev5a61zw6BmZsc1U3tiZHsBUHowQN2w91mOZjTJWKie1nRNQ_p6nIflFJacH9Ppmb26c1NUNm7-aO7plXc1NT2m842STHRetxqjcOq1xIH-GKaet1kore4HV4d1o7SyMKaqbmBQm4touvCHjF_Q1f9c3tkusryH7jXnvYvwlTBAmHMdxeXbg0xQmnDTChFwjZGHCWSVMUE6YoEdhAiNIrvI_KUpMnxG4ti6pwL63ujc69VgLY2EJS_1kGTdomVA-qT27hN6hdyrAVIswYWg-7QflTP16AjxeQPnfXv7Zy29v_gYAAP__IYCTZw). Employees in [Klein ISD](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3SpCAQRZ9GMyzAvyEg2MRsNt3QQmmlS4Qpunecefst9xW-_Natc86f5_x0GDHtv90Jlj9bnhNcFIEZyozpDcS4O8a0M7g1QKE1X8uspe6FNEL1s3cYv3NXe7tIb1QNVo39aNpODqYO1mxageng0Y6t84sbu3ZY1TYsvodhe6ga7X0mjeqVkkr2jdsMPLRSpnetX-VYdRI8ci4NB2D4ONriN7-hNGs-62gD84uq9lelp0pP13U1W_7oIeS_xDndo0pPt1WlpzW4EhHEgeUQFHK-zcQRAZNA8gLOV8xfAMFQTkyOwQuCRBCBSBQ4XTmoLta_LowRabjp9tNh_A_DP0v4tvpfAAAA___4MonV) and Abilene Wylie ISD have been fired for their remarks regarding Kirk's death, while administrators in [Midland ISD](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTGOpDAQRU8DmVt2NW7aAcEmZLPphqhsF1AaY7fsUjNz-xWrvcGkVV9feu__-Vg-kBPn7TceNMnXWpZMZ0skQnXh_KYmvKFw3oQw7FRbKKdfQINV2iljl4icvpehj5PX0ZmeJjPa0d0H_XD9PoWwgn3cLZIN3o_gvdcIFrR-IjxX6nm6yrQz1hhttL3h6ugJxjiL9xj02A2aIkupN9lJ6Avbmr7Lm-otlKNP0y7yat39VwdzB_N5nrcL4aQm7kp0MGMVDok6mK9PB3MqAVMH88ExYY6KW1S-YI3qValxpCyqUiJs1FQTFDqu038Fqu4kpXJQoeRANXPe1KskFg6Y1JtLohxIYWvYGmcULlmVVYUda2JSn1w_O5ituavVAjprgvI0ODU4CurpPapxtBTBwrhq6OsUXyenxO1x2dgO5PQPXn422XuCvwEAAP__DDmvHA), Pasadena ISD, and Goose Creek ISD are reviewing posts by teachers in those districts. The American Federation of Teachers [slammed TEA's investigation](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO2zAQheHTUB0NckRKZqEijbpNm1IYkUNrYFo0xFlr9_aBAwQ5QOoHPOD7f30sH8iF99tPfNAkX7kuO52tkAgdC-8vasI3FN5vQhg3Olqs57qAAa9N0NYvCbl8L65L02pSsB1NdvRj6J0ZQrdNzpswOgqZEkFw1zHCuK69ydl6F4Zrx9P7zATrrTXW-AvmQFewNnjsUzSjcoYSSz0uspHQF7ZcvuuLjkusj65Mm8izqf6HglnBfJ7n5f76pPeoYMZDOBZSML9dCmZKnxGF665gFkL9z0j6L1G3uNVadBPMWbcaGYt-UGLUz9qk6bjhUZj0nY-7ghmGoHvIYH0yOq45aZdy0Nc1Gm2sG3pnCV1y3TGl58mlcBverNsDufxRyP-1f03wOwAA__--O5i1) as a "political witch hunt."
## 500 National Guard Troops Sent to El Paso
The Texas Military Department has [deployed 500 National Guard soldiers](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OgzAQhU8DHWhsbMCFi23osu2WaILHYMngyJ4Nye1X5ArbPelJ3_v5uc03DDEc6zfuZPnl03zQWSIxU57D8aTCYUUOx8qEy0a5LOm8zxKkbsA0Qs8OQ3zPqnb2Ds6ImqwY9GA6Bb2pN6u8d4BqIN0p7MGPg9S9kiP03eiUF3WwFwyM0EKAAN2iNzRKIYzGzi0wVArIBU655Y2YXlh8fKcn5XZJex3txvwoVfdVyamS03me7Ru3lC63ktM1p5ITZg5LpEtqgOaDaQ7kkA6MzfqL2TWcU3qURoxKAigp2o33WGfrHmeIMZT-qrLuGOInmf_319PKvwAAAP__tXN-qw) to El Paso to work with U.S. Border Patrol in securing the border with Mexico. ## Cowboys Play 1,000th Regular Season Game
The Dallas Cowboys played their 1,000th regular-season game yesterday, [beating the New York Giants](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL8GOiPbYIgLF9fQ5dor0WIvsJLBEV7Fyd-fiO4Prp7RvJn5uU93oEjH-g07On4taTqw5IjMeE50PDEzrcB0rIzgNzyzT2WetNRGSCuUmQJQfE9dHdwsg1U1OjWYwbad7G29uWDDvKDppbaDN8Yv86BAq2CG1t7aXtbkrjBplVFKKmkaWCzetFLWQBu8HKpOYiBOZ8MbMr4gL_Gdnng2Pu11dBvzI1ftV6XHSo-llCZAjPApmt75clV6vGZVelxhR3Gih4f400WhQ9AhEotOinaoTxcehWKk3F_sdQeKHxT_76Cn078BAAD__2Waeto) 40-37 with a 46-yard Brandon Aubrey field goal as time expired in overtime. Aubrey nailed a 64-yard field goal at the end of regulation to tie the game following five touchdowns in the final 12 minutes. The franchise was [founded in 1960](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOrDAQRE9jMlDbjGEcOPgJ2fx0Q9TgBiwZPLJbeLj9itXeYOMq1VO9r9f4Qh_8sf7HnSx_ljgeVHIgZkqjP07K7Fdkf6xMOG-U8hzLNCpQugZTSz069OEaH5WzEzgjK7Ky171pH9CZarNKSaP13LuuewJMz861vdaTRKUlAGDl7T0GRmopQYJucDH0VFIaja2boRcPIOc5poY3YvpgXsIVT0rNHPcq2I35nUX7T6hBqKGU0rxTXGLkCUPY4nLXhBqYcM9CDQ5DwFzfN-KVf4N685ljuoQaqmTdu_gQfO5u9rqjDz8o_pug06rvAAAA___RLXrM) by businessman Clint Murchison Jr., who hired Tex Schramm as general manager and Tom Landry as head coach. During a 20-year stretch of winning seasons beginning in 1966, the Cowboys appeared in five Super Bowls and won two. Bum Bright purchased the team in 1984 and sold it to [the current owner, Jerry Jones,](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQRp_G7iYC4p9QUKRxl223tMYwNlxhiGBufP32K-8r3G6kkY7O-f6-5heGGNL2B3cy_LPmOdFRIzFTmUP6UOWwIYe0MaH1VKrNxzIroXoQGmQ_OwzxnLvWmUU4LVsycuxHfe_EoFtvekl2UcPiROfs464f3WBXiaTGwQ4PObbBXDChZS-lkKK_4arpoaTUPd6dFWPTCXKBc7mxJ6YfrGs884fKzea9jcYzv2tzfzZqatR0HMdtr-n6NWqiBN-1UVN958LXkdlTadSEFa6QfFZ4Rzxhw50gZZAghIC1YLI-VAKP1XpkWIgScGaM8YQdHcFlACHBF5VywldOVCHsuNFFL_B8yhfTt22Lce8jxBjqcKVsO4b435x_t_fHqH8BAAD__29WluI) in 1989. The Cowboys won three Super Bowls in the 1990s under head coaches Jimmy Johnson and Barry Switzer. Since 1996, the team has not advanced beyond the divisional round in the playoffs. According to a story in the _Dallas Morning News_ last week, the [best players in Cowboys history include](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLEOmzAQQL_GbI5sJw548JCFLV07ogMfYPWwkX0N4e8rKvULup30Tqf37ud7eEOkmJYfsKHn75yHhEclZMYyxPTBynEBjmlhhGnFUqd8jINRxkrlpLZDgEjn8GiCH1VwukGvW9u6-0M9XbP6TnXhodrJTK7Dqb270UBobTdao8anwyb665hy2mqttLI3mB12Rmtn4R4m1YqHwhA5lxuvyPiFOtOZP1huU94a8ivzXsX9JUwvTH8cx22r6WLC9Jjk7ypMX_dc-BrSTML0vKIMQARVbrmkmBZ5ZcsC6VeVF-W8S63Uv60rOp9V7gQnlirzLIFIctxQmB6KfL30m-iYm-LDfkSiWJ-X-bJBpL-i_H_v_XjzJwAA__-DAJDE) quarterbacks Roger Staubach, Don Meredith, and Troy Aikman; running backs Don Perkins, Tony Dorsett, and Emmitt Smith; and wide receivers Bob Hayes, Drew Pearson, and Michael Irvin.

clean_body: The Texas Education Agency (TEA) is investigating public school teachers who have posted or shared "reprehensible and inappropriate content" following the Wednesday assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University. | | | | | | Monday, September 15, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1946, actor was born in San Saba. He is best known for playing gritty characters like U.S. Marshal Samuel Gerard in The Fugitive (1993), Harvey Dent in Batman Forever (1995), and Sheriff Ed Tom Bell in No Country for Old Men (2007). The Dallas Cowboys played their 1,000th regular-season game yesterday, the New York Giants in thrilling fashion. When is the first time you can remember watching "America's Team"? Learn about these 11 weird little hacks Costco shoppers should know from today's sponsor, . Abilene ☁️ 91/71° | Amarillo 🌥️ 90/61° | Austin ☁️ 92/73° | Brownsville 🌤️ 91/76° | Corpus Christi ☁️ 88/77° | DFW ☁️ 94/76° | El Paso ☁️ 93/66° | Houston ☁️ 91/74° | Laredo ☁️ 94/75° | Lubbock 🌥️ 87/63° | Midland 🌧️ 89/67° | San Antonio ☁️ 91/73° | Tyler ☁️ 92/71° | Waco ☁️ 93/72° Take The Flyoverwith you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | TEA Investigating 'Reprehensible' Kirk Remarks The Texas Education Agency (TEA) is who have posted or shared "reprehensible and inappropriate content" following last week's assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University. In a Friday letter to superintendents, Education Commissioner Mike Morath said these actions could violate the Educators' Code of Ethics and . He praised administrators who have disciplined or terminated employees who "have proliferated such vile content." "While the exercise of free speech is a fundamental right we are all blessed to share, it does not give carte blanche authority to celebrate or sow violence against those that share differing beliefs and perspectives ," . Employees in and Abilene Wylie ISD have been fired for their remarks regarding Kirk's death, while administrators in , Pasadena ISD, and Goose Creek ISD are reviewing posts by teachers in those districts. The American Federation of Teachers as a "political witch hunt." 500 National Guard Troops Sent to El Paso The Texas Military Department has to El Paso to work with U.S. Border Patrol in securing the border with Mexico. Some of the soldiers will work on , while the rest will be deputized under Title 8 to detain illegal border crossers. Earlier this year, the U.S. military approximately 2,000 troops to the region along with several 19-ton . Although apprehensions in the region are at a historic low, Sector Chief Walter Slosar warned that the Border Patrol isn’t backing off. "If you come here illegally, you will be arrested. You are going to be removed. You are going to be prosecuted, despite what smugglers are telling people ," . Cowboys Play 1,000th Regular Season Game The Dallas Cowboys played their 1,000th regular-season game yesterday, 40-37 with a 46-yard Brandon Aubrey field goal as time expired in overtime. Aubrey nailed a 64-yard field goal at the end of regulation to tie the game following five touchdowns in the final 12 minutes. The franchise was by businessman Clint Murchison Jr., who hired Tex Schramm as general manager and Tom Landry as head coach. During a 20-year stretch of winning seasons beginning in 1966, the Cowboys appeared in five Super Bowls and won two. Bum Bright purchased the team in 1984 and sold it to in 1989. The Cowboys won three Super Bowls in the 1990s under head coaches Jimmy Johnson and Barry Switzer. Since 1996, the team has not advanced beyond the divisional round in the playoffs. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: As I sat with Trump, I was inspired…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
Please read my heartfelt note.
| **__A Heartfelt Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik__**
---
Dear Friend,
---
As I sat with President Trump recently, I couldn’t help but feel inspired by everything that our beautiful America First movement of over 75,000,000 patriots has peacefully accomplished __together__.
---
**Our backgrounds are all different. We’re different ages, different races, and different occupations. Some of us are life-long Republicans. Some are former Democrats. Some of us have supported President Trump since 2016. Some just began supporting the movement recently.**
---
But all of us are united by a common desire to _SAVE_ our country and improve the lives of our fellow Americans.
---
We’ve faced a lot of darkness over the years.
---
_Slander, witch hunts, Election Interference, the weaponization of government, and even violence – but despite all that evil, the _good_ is what ultimately prevailed and what will continue to prevail. _
---
No matter what the Radical Left throws at us, they can never defeat us.
---
Why? Because _together_ , we are stronger than anything they could possibly imagine. We will NEVER back down and surrender our belief in putting America FIRST.
---
_It doesn't matter how much money the Democrats spend, how viciously they attack us, or what kinds of lies, witch hunts, and plots they cook up to try to derail our movement._
---
As long as we remain united, we’re unstoppable.
---
But that’s the key to everything...
---
We have to remain united. We can’t let the Democrats divide us or even worse, intimidate us into silence.
---
**Instead, we need to keep peacefully fighting like we did during the 2024 election, when President Trump was facing LIFE in prison and the very future of our country was on the ballot.**
---
_That means hitting the campaign trail and the airwaves to explain that the stakes of the midterms are higher than ever before. It means raising the funds necessary to get our message out to every last voter. And most importantly, it means we need Republican voters to turn out in the midterms at a rate never seen before._
---
Because, at the end of the day, if we let the Radical Left gain any kind of foothold in Washington, they will use it to DESTROY everything President Trump and our majorities have accomplished.
---
I know I send a lot of fundraising messages. With so much on the line, and the very future of our country hanging in the balance, I feel I have no choice but to do everything I can to help us level the playing field against the Democrats, who are raking in MILLIONS from Far Left megadonors.
---
_If you ever can’t afford to give, please don’t feel pressured to do so. The last thing I would want is for you to give beyond your means._
---
But if there’s ever a time to step up and make a grassroots donation, this is it. Our work saving America is far from over!
---
[**So please, if you can, make a grassroots contribution to help us keep up the fight to Make America Great Again no matter what the Left throws at us.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=64187c55fb5f4a5d83bf7f1b5abd7479&_e=DMJ6FHORv8N6nrI3xRO3kujBl3b95x9WJQwatMEeOPrbH-zMhSMRDoC_ZHDGyZwFPWdVxPU-txSiLHJzNAYxK8oGpViN0M64_Dw8jQr2infXfBcfVhx2TJrX3LF48j-rvzvkztmZSBj6I9P4nT3F-LUZSlELUUqUw6I2ab6fvRpGGLXZKguiuVWEW08-XFvVfxn-yBpGGxrzJgPYmbm6l4Lu7eRK_PRw0USpNe8p0mU9utnvFxN-X6jvjRrYD1R0bn5aBDrt2unOyI9hBTUja57DFGbR9GBe_BxkzGhzvk4FDafntP0W_sckn2Nf5Orb5Q4gmFHEIb1BWANJWOcuOE5rleyu8P1Ne-dI7W09DZNVIKCDvsMULuCmMqf8Of9IZe9BF7Utt2-84jtVK6xep9GsjrCQS7VfnbyS-Qt2KqGWgd3JmMcnbsSpykwIPTW9R9Cu90Uug6TzwsDb4dgcxQ2sbvEwb_XvO4T0Bl1ddrIvwMAiI-HGR0GPkQttxhS7cz1CempEOpSXSJpmo6SGJfZ5MzSd-sPEhrpH4eyOAu-_vsRsGmMhkacKGvodUUegcBFsyTbZnDLrG168CETlmxGPv_sm4zzrEDp7PuvRGHupR-5hPmUvbpQPHX017MIF)

clean_body: Please read my heartfelt note. | A Heartfelt Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik Dear Friend, As I sat with President Trump recently, I couldn’t help but feel inspired by everything that our beautiful America First movement of over 75,000,000 patriots has peacefully accomplished together. Our backgrounds are all different. We’re different ages, different races, and different occupations. Some of us are life-long Republicans. Some are former Democrats. Some of us have supported President Trump since 2016. Some just began supporting the movement recently. But all of us are united by a common desire to SAVE our country and improve the lives of our fellow Americans. We’ve faced a lot of darkness over the years. Slander, witch hunts, Election Interference, the weaponization of government, and even violence – but despite all that evil, the good is what ultimately prevailed and what will continue to prevail. No matter what the Radical Left throws at us, they can never defeat us. Why? Because together , we are stronger than anything they could possibly imagine. We will NEVER back down and surrender our belief in putting America FIRST. It doesn't matter how much money the Democrats spend, how viciously they attack us, or what kinds of lies, witch hunts, and plots they cook up to try to derail our movement. As long as we remain united, we’re unstoppable. But that’s the key to everything... We have to remain united. We can’t let the Democrats divide us or even worse, intimidate us into silence. Instead, we need to keep peacefully fighting like we did during the 2024 election, when President Trump was facing LIFE in prison and the very future of our country was on the ballot. That means hitting the campaign trail and the airwaves to explain that the stakes of the midterms are higher than ever before. It means raising the funds necessary to get our message out to every last voter. And most importantly, it means we need Republican voters to turn out in the midterms at a rate never seen before. Because, at the end of the day, if we let the Radical Left gain any kind of foothold in Washington, they will use it to DESTROY everything President Trump and our majorities have accomplished. I know I send a lot of fundraising messages. With so much on the line, and the very future of our country hanging in the balance, I feel I have no choice but to do everything I can to help us level the playing field against the Democrats, who are raking in MILLIONS from Far Left megadonors. If you ever can’t afford to give, please don’t feel pressured to do so. The last thing I would want is for you to give beyond your means. But if there’s ever a time to step up and make a grassroots donation, this is it. Our work saving America is far from over! Thank you and God Bless, Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie Kirk: A life of faith. A legacy that endures.
body:
#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/2e7c1ee5-5f6b-41f8-81ae-eeaffbbbb106?source_code=MAWCO69571&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_content=ab_test_a&utm_term=MAWCO69571]

Friend,

Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life...

He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with
truth.

With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a
generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above
all, to point people back to God.

And in the end — _Charlie gave it all._

No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he
started.

Patriot, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind
— _and the calling that now belongs to us._

WE MADE THIS TRIBUTE TO HONOR THE MAN WHO GAVE EVERYTHING... AND TO
REMIND THE WORLD THAT HIS MISSION WILL PRESS ON:

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/2e7c1ee5-5f6b-41f8-81ae-eeaffbbbb106?source_code=MAWCO69571&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_content=ab_test_a&utm_term=MAWCO69571]

WATCH OUR TRIBUTE TO CHARLIE HERE
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/2e7c1ee5-5f6b-41f8-81ae-eeaffbbbb106?source_code=MAWCO69571&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_content=ab_test_a&utm_term=MAWCO69571]

All of us will miss Charlie. _None of us will ever forget him._

For Charlie,

- The Turning Point USA Family

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=319421&trkid=910787362&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21943/6374453/259698e811240b59c269cee124a30a3675e6c252/f4ee51a5433f0d92a048da2e8cf71a8e2f6f3026). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21943/6374453/259698e811240b59c269cee124a30a3675e6c252/f4ee51a5433f0d92a048da2e8cf71a8e2f6f3026).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21943/6374453/259698e811240b59c269cee124a30a3675e6c252/f4ee51a5433f0d92a048da2e8cf71a8e2f6f3026)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: Shelby County Republican Party
subject: Some Charlie Kirk “do something” opportunities
body:
Hello Patriots,

Turning Point Action representative Gabe Guidarini will be at the Shelby County Republican Party’s monthly meeting tomorrow night, Tuesday, Sep 16, at 6:00 pm in the Fellowship Hall at Calvary United Baptist Church, 9480 County Road 25A S, Sidney, OH 45365. All of our meetings are open to like-minded members of the public. Please share this and please join us as we honor Charlie Kirk!

Also, I mentioned on FaceBook a few days ago that a friend had expressed their grief over Charlie’s assassination by donating to Turning Point USA. It was an expression of grief, but also a statement of resolve to invest in the future of our nation and to ensure Charlie’s life work continued. I thought it was such a good idea that Kim and I started a monthly recurring donation to Turning Point USA.

I got this email from Tucker Carlson this morning, encouraging the same thing, so I thought I’d share the idea again. News reports say there were over 35,000 requests to start new chapters all across the USA. They will need all the resources they can get to help set up these new Turning Point chapters.

Seldom has there been a more clear way to support the future of the nation we love, honor a conservative icon and Christian martyr, and fight the decay that has taken place in the last couple of generations. If you sense a need to “do something” to fight back at the growing acceptance of an assassination culture, and you have the financial ability, this is one clear way to make a difference.

Gabe Guidarini, our speaker tomorrow night, was in the news recently, as the Chairman of the Ohio College Republican Federation, when he and his Democrat counterpart issued a joint statement condemning the assassination of Charlie Kirk (see linked pics). That is what we should expect from every Democrat relative to Charlie’s assassination.

Unfortunately, our local Democrat Party leader chose a different path, implicitly accepting the growing assassination culture. Four hours after it was confirmed that Charlie had died, he warned the Mainstream Media not to allow Charlie’s assassination to be a “distraction” from their mission. The next day, he implied the Whitehouse and MAGA would pin the shooting on “anyone” who matched MAGA’s “predetermined profile” of the shooter. The clear implication was that it didn’t matter who actually did it. Just that it matched MAGA’s “predetermined profile” of the shooter. (see linked pics). To this point, I have seen no evidence he has condemned the shooting. Even today, his post is focused on advancing the far-left trans agenda instead of expressing compassion for an assassination victim and his family. (see linked pics) I refuse to believe these zero-remorse, zero-compassion responses are representative of the feelings of the “average” Shelby County Democrat (if there are any left) relative to Charlie Kirk’s assassination.

Locally, and nationally, patriotic, God-fearing Americans need to “do something” to push back on the rot from the left in our nation. The first response should be prayer. But then, what will you do with your “hands and feet” to make a difference in our world?

If you decide you do want to make a contribution to Turning Point USA, here is the link provided in Tucker’s email:

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/4f122b0c-53f4-4deb-b3a9-97f9ba78cdff?source_code=TPUSA15176&utm_medium=email&utm_source=housefile&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=TPUSA15176](https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/4f122b0c-53f4-4deb-b3a9-97f9ba78cdff?source_code=TPUSA15176&utm_medium=email&utm_source=housefile&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=TPUSA15176)

May God comfort and bless Charlie’s family!!!

Soli Deo Gloria...Dan

Link to referenced pics:

<https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Y3_6o2Xs0bdbSrz7_ZKk6YBP14vF-g_R/view?usp=sharing>

Additionally, here are a couple of music videos released about Charlie:

[
---
| [Amazingly beautiful!!! \- Dan Cecil](https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1B7oqbLEcQ/)[facebook.com](https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1B7oqbLEcQ/)
---](https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1B7oqbLEcQ/)

[
---
| [https://youtu.be/WCaIVY4__7o \- Dan Cecil](https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1QKCw6jagP/)[facebook.com](https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1QKCw6jagP/)
---](https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1QKCw6jagP/)
