[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ieXRoZWJhbGxvdC5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3MzQwNjI2OCwicyI6NTE1NjU2NiwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc1NzkzNzE5NSwiZXhwIjoyMDczNTEzMTk1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.V2wbzNa7jPoNNAB8-wKRH9pjNwNkopU1IN10FBU98j0?)
In the wake of the assassination of Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk last week, many takes landed on the same theme:
_" He played a character. The real man was polite and earnest with the young people in Turning Point. The character spread hate and poison, but there was a human behind it."_
It echoed 2021, after January 6th, when Fox News texts revealed that on-air stars knew the Big Lie was false--even as they begged Trump to stop the insurrection privately. They had played characters for their audiences, and people got hurt.
On _the Ezra Klein Show_ , Jon Stewart explained it perfectly when reflecting on his 2004 appearance on CNN's _Crossfire_ :
> "So, what I was complaining about on 'Crossfire' was kayfabe -- this idea that this is just theater and everybody's playing a character and nobody's a blah, blah, blah. But the other way to describe it for them is, there's an establishment, and then there's the anti-establishment -- the disrupters and the rebels. Tucker Carlson was establishment, and he tried to be a face. He was a heel. Like, Fox News, Megyn Kelly, same thing."
For decades, political media has been a performance. Faces and heels. Heroes and villains. Theatrics designed to rile up audiences while insiders wink and break bread behind the curtain. But the longer this goes on, the harder it gets to tell the difference between performance and belief--and the more it fuels real violence.
## Kayfabe: The Ultimate Commitment to the Bit
Let's start with what Kayfabe is and what it does.
"Kayfabe" comes from pro wrestling, where staged rivalries and personas are presented as real. It's carny-speak for "stay fake." Wrestlers don't admit the script, even outside the ring, because the suspension of disbelief is the point.
There are two main factions of characters in kayfabe: faces (the heroes, or "babyfaces") and heels (the villains). Faces are designed to win fan support through humility, patriotism, and determination. Heels embody narcissism, rage, and cruelty--foils for the audience to boo. Classic matches leaned on real-world anxieties to heighten drama, like Hulk Hogan, the "Real American," taking on the Iron Sheik, a caricature of Middle Eastern "villainy" during the rise of Saddam Hussein and Ayatollah Khomeini.
But kayfabe isn't just written by management--it's co-written by the crowd. Audience reaction can literally flip the script. Fans rejected a young Rocky Maivia as a bland babyface, but when he turned heel and embraced arrogance, he became "The Rock," one of the most beloved stars in history. The feedback loop between audience and performers made wrestling feel interactive, a communal suspension of disbelief.
The only time kayfabe was allowed to break was in moments of tribute (for a fallen wrestler) or when a serious in-ring injury forced reality to intrude. Otherwise, the act was airtight. The world outside the ropes was just as scripted as the matches inside them.
That's why the concept maps so neatly onto politics. Politicians, like wrestlers, play roles--faces and heels--crafted for their audiences. And, just like wrestling fans, political "audiences" shape the script by rewarding certain behaviors with cheers, boos, donations, or votes. The act doesn't work without their buy-in.
## From the Ring to the Hill
Former wrestler-turned-Minnesota Governor Jesse "The Body" Ventura often compared Congress to the ring:
> "Politics in America today is identical to pro wrestling. In front of the cameras, we all hate each other. Now I'm gonna kick my opponent's butt, I'm gonna wail him from here to high water. Yet behind the scenes, we're all friends going out to dinner."
You can see the same dynamic in long-tenured senators who spar viciously on the floor, then joke together at fundraisers.[ In 2017](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/06586fff-0ff9-4cbf-ba3e-953af39f8b6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Kamala Harris and Ted Cruz had a friendly wager over the Dodgers and Astros. [Seven years later,](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/121457e6-059e-40e2-9383-49e807e0aa71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Cruz declared Harris the "embodiment of the radical left" and blamed her for border "chaos."
So which was real--the camaraderie or the condemnation? The answer, of course, is both. It's kayfabe.
Sometimes politicians even parody it themselves. Senators Cory Booker and Orrin Hatch once joked on _Parks and Recreation_ that after hours they were in a Polynesian folk band.
## The King of the Ring
No one embodies political kayfabe more than Donald Trump. As Abraham Josephine Riesman argues in Ringmaster: Vince McMahon and the Unmaking of America, Trump modeled his swaggering, macho persona on his friend Vince McMahon, the WWE mogul.
Trump's rallies mimic wrestling events--walk-up music, dramatic set design, speeches full of riffs and call-and-response chants. His supporters cheer like fans in an arena, responding to cues. Even the assassination attempt in Butler became theater: Trump raising his fist and shouting "Fight!" like a wrestler refusing to break character.
Every issue becomes faces vs. heels. Trump the hero, Democrats the villains. Childish framing, maybe, but effective. By reducing politics to morality play, he convinces supporters that compromise is betrayal and opponents are enemies of the people.
That's why his audience loves him. They already believe politics is fake. Trump leans into it, branding himself the only authentic character in a world of liars. That opens the door to conspiracy theories--the Big Lie, QAnon--because they fit perfectly into kayfabe's universe of good vs. evil.
## Is this the Real Life or is this just Fantasy?
Fox News perfected political kayfabe after the Fairness Doctrine ended. [Its lawyers even admitted in court](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b5b2924e-19e9-4ee3-a43a-616af21a6483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Tucker Carlson wasn't delivering facts but "non-literal commentary." Yet the network presents it all with the tone of hard news, blurring entertainment and journalism.
Carlson himself illustrates the point. He [once bantered with Rachel Maddow on MSNBC](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b15c73a3-4d52-4d3a-b8f9-84749d3759da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), later railed against her nightly, and even in 2025 still goes fly-fishing with her. On-air enemies, off-air friends. Kayfabe.
[But the mask slips when private texts leak.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ccef8d52-bef3-43f2-9aa4-29ed35c460d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* On **January 4, 2021** , Tucker Carlson wrote:
_" We are very, very close to being able to ignore Trump most nights. I truly can't wait. I hate him passionately. ... I can't handle much more of this."
_ Yet on-air, he defended Trump and platformed his lies, even bringing him back for interviews in 2024.

* Sean Hannity said on his broadcast after January 6th:
_" Our election, frankly, was a train wreck. Eighty-three percent of Republicans, and millions of others, do not have faith in these results. You can't just snap your finger and hope that goes away."
_ But earlier that day, he texted Trump's chief of staff Mark Meadows:
_" Can he make a statement? Ask people to leave the Capitol."

_
* Laura Ingraham told her viewers that same night:
_" Earlier today the Capitol was under siege by people antithetical to the MAGA movement. They were likely not all Trump supporters--some reports say antifa sympathizers were sprinkled throughout the crowd."
_ Yet her text to Meadows admitted:
_" Hey Mark, the president needs to tell people in the Capitol to go home. This is hurting all of us. He is destroying his legacy."

_
* Brian Kilmeade, who pushed theories that January 6th was a false flag, wrote Meadows that afternoon:
_" Please, get him on TV. Destroying everything you have accomplished."_
* Even Trump's own son, Don Jr.--whose online persona thrives on vitriol and violent memes--texted Meadows in the middle of the chaos: _" We need an Oval address. He has to lead now. It has gone too far and gotten out of hand. He needs to condemn this shit asap."_

This is the heart of political kayfabe: in private, they acknowledge reality, but in public they never break character. The audience, however, only sees the performance. And when the performance is anger, grievance, and conspiracy, the fallout in the real world is unavoidable.
## **Stop the Madness**
The world of infotainment and kayfabe politics hasn't just blurred the lines between performance and reality -- it's lit a match in a room full of gasoline. What used to be theater for ratings now inspires real-world violence, and the consequences are piling up.
The infamous **" Pizzagate" conspiracy** is one of the clearest examples. After months of QAnon propaganda, a 28-year-old man from North Carolina drove to Comet Ping Pong in Washington, D.C. with an AR-15, determined to "save the children" from a fictitious pedophile ring supposedly run by Hillary Clinton and other Democrats. He fired shots inside the restaurant, only to discover there wasn't even a basement, let alone the underground tunnels of satanic fantasy that had been spun online.
But Pizzagate was just a prelude to something larger. The **" Big Lie" of the 2020 election** metastasized into the January 6th insurrection. Fueled nightly by Fox News kayfabe and amplified by Trump himself, thousands descended on the Capitol. Members of Congress like Barry Loudermilk even gave rioters reconnaissance-style tours the day before. On January 6th, the mob stormed the halls of Congress, explicitly hunting for Nancy Pelosi and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez -- two of the Right's most vilified "heels" -- with chants of kidnapping and violence.
The culture of demonization has also spilled over into personal attacks. After years of being cast as a villain by right-wing media, **a man broke into Speaker Pelosi 's home in San Francisco and brutally assaulted her husband, Paul Pelosi, with a hammer**. He later admitted he had been looking for Nancy to "break her kneecaps" so she'd have to be wheeled into Congress as a warning to others.
Even when the violence targets their own side, the kayfabe doesn't stop. At his rally in Butler, PA, Donald Trump narrowly survived an **assassination attempt in 2024** , taking a bullet graze to the ear. And yet -- even in that moment -- he raised his fist and yelled "fight," never breaking character, leaning deeper into the performance of indestructibility.
The violence has not been contained to Washington. **Pennsylvania Governor Ben Shapiro** and his family were targeted in a plot where an armed man tried to assassinate him while torching the Governor's Mansion in Harrisburg.
And in Minnesota, **House Speaker Melissa Hortman and her husband, Mark,** were assassinated in their own home--a targeted killing authorities have explicitly called political violence. The same gunman shot **Senator John Hoffman and his wife** in their home that same night but they miraculously survived. The gunman's manifesto was later discovered with a list of dozens of other political figures going as far away as Nebraska.
And most recently, **Charlie Kirk was assassinated during a Turning Point USA event at Utah Valley University** -- gunned down in the middle of a debate where, in grim irony, he had been painting trans people as mass shooters.
Each of these tragedies exposes the danger of politics conducted as wrestling theater. The rhetoric isn't just bluster. When you tell your followers that opponents are "traitors," "pedophiles," or "Satanic cabal members," some will believe it literally -- and act accordingly.
So this begs the question: **have the lines of fact and fiction been blurred for too long? Do we no longer just have people "playing characters" in our government anymore but genuine true believers?**
You regularly see members of Congress like Marjorie Taylor Greene who seems to truly believe the ridiculous stories she sells--about Jewish space lasers or Democrats belonging to a satanic cabal. You see Nancy Mace, once billed as a moderate, turning herself into a walking Fox News chyron, staging photos outside bathrooms to "hold the line" against the supposed invasion of trans legislators. And you see Speaker Mike Johnson confidently declare that the only reason Donald Trump would be in the Epstein Files was because he was an FBI informant working to take Epstein down--a claim so absurd that even Trump's own press secretary had to refute it.
Long-tenured members of Congress have facilitated this culture, either out of political expediency or fear of retribution from the granddaddy of them all, Donald Trump. But the true believers are pushing them out, as seen in the ousting of former Speaker Kevin McCarthy after a revolt by the MAGA wing of his caucus.
Whether or not they truly believe what they're saying, the rhetoric they engage in is the same as Trump's wrestling-esque persona: over-the-top, dramatic, and often violent. And that has real-world, dire consequences.
**The more we continue this culture of vitriolic rhetoric in politics, the more likely violent outcomes will result.**
These aren't "storylines." They're blood and bodies.
And the crowd reacts accordingly.
Jon Stewart described it best:
> "The image of Americans reflected back to us by our political and media process is false. It is us through a fun-house mirror... So why would we work together? Why would you reach across the aisle to a pumpkin-assed forehead eyeball monster? If the picture of us were accurate, of course our inability to solve problems would actually be quite sane and reasonable. Why would you work with Marxists, actively subverting our Constitution? Or racists and homophobes who see no one's humanity but their own?"
That's kayfabe. A distorted mirror. And when people mistake it for reality, they storm the ring.
### **TL;DR**
American politics has become kayfabe -- a scripted performance like professional wrestling where politicians and media figures play characters (heroes and villains) to keep audiences hooked. This theatrical style, perfected by Donald Trump and echoed by right-wing media, blurs fact and fiction to the point where violent rhetoric spills into real-world violence.
Behind the scenes, figures like Tucker Carlson and Sean Hannity admitted privately that they didn't believe their public lines about Trump or the election, but they kept playing their parts for ratings and influence. Meanwhile, true believers like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Mike Johnson push conspiracy theories as if they're gospel, fueling a culture where violence is no longer just metaphorical -- from Pizzagate to January 6th to the assassinations of figures like Charlie Kirk.
The more politics mimics wrestling theater -- over-the-top, dramatic, and villain-driven -- the more likely it will lead to bloodshed. What once was performance now risks becoming reality, with "characters" turning into zealots and kayfabe collapsing into chaos.

Yet her text to Meadows admitted: " Hey Mark, the president needs to tell people in the Capitol to go home. This is hurting all of us. He is destroying his legacy." Brian Kilmeade, who pushed theories that January 6th was a false flag, wrote Meadows that afternoon: " Please, get him on TV. Destroying everything you have accomplished." Even Trump's own son, Don Jr.--whose online persona thrives on vitriol and violent memes--texted Meadows in the middle of the chaos: " We need an Oval address. He has to lead now. It has gone too far and gotten out of hand. He needs to condemn this shit asap." This is the heart of political kayfabe: in private, they acknowledge reality, but in public they never break character. The audience, however, only sees the performance. And when the performance is anger, grievance, and conspiracy, the fallout in the real world is unavoidable. Stop the Madness The world of infotainment and kayfabe politics hasn't just blurred the lines between performance and reality -- it's lit a match in a room full of gasoline. What used to be theater for ratings now inspires real-world violence, and the consequences are piling up. The infamous " Pizzagate" conspiracy is one of the clearest examples. After months of QAnon propaganda, a 28-year-old man from North Carolina drove to Comet Ping Pong in Washington, D.C. with an AR-15, determined to "save the children" from a fictitious pedophile ring supposedly run by Hillary Clinton and other Democrats. He fired shots inside the restaurant, only to discover there wasn't even a basement, let alone the underground tunnels of satanic fantasy that had been spun online. But Pizzagate was just a prelude to something larger. The " Big Lie" of the 2020 election metastasized into the January 6th insurrection. Fueled nightly by Fox News kayfabe and amplified by Trump himself, thousands descended on the Capitol. Members of Congress like Barry Loudermilk even gave rioters reconnaissance-style tours the day before. On January 6th, the mob stormed the halls of Congress, explicitly hunting for Nancy Pelosi and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez -- two of the Right's most vilified "heels" -- with chants of kidnapping and violence. The culture of demonization has also spilled over into personal attacks. After years of being cast as a villain by right-wing media, a man broke into Speaker Pelosi 's home in San Francisco and brutally assaulted her husband, Paul Pelosi, with a hammer. He later admitted he had been looking for Nancy to "break her kneecaps" so she'd have to be wheeled into Congress as a warning to others. Even when the violence targets their own side, the kayfabe doesn't stop. At his rally in Butler, PA, Donald Trump narrowly survived an assassination attempt in 2024 , taking a bullet graze to the ear. And yet -- even in that moment -- he raised his fist and yelled "fight," never breaking character, leaning deeper into the performance of indestructibility. The violence has not been contained to Washington. Pennsylvania Governor Ben Shapiro and his family were targeted in a plot where an armed man tried to assassinate him while torching the Governor's Mansion in Harrisburg. And in Minnesota, House Speaker Melissa Hortman and her husband, Mark, were assassinated in their own home--a targeted killing authorities have explicitly called political violence. The same gunman shot Senator John Hoffman and his wife in their home that same night but they miraculously survived. The gunman's manifesto was later discovered with a list of dozens of other political figures going as far away as Nebraska. And most recently, Charlie Kirk was assassinated during a Turning Point USA event at Utah Valley University -- gunned down in the middle of a debate where, in grim irony, he had been painting trans people as mass shooters. Each of these tragedies exposes the danger of politics conducted as wrestling theater. The rhetoric isn't just bluster. When you tell your followers that opponents are "traitors," "pedophiles," or "Satanic cabal members," some will believe it literally -- and act accordingly. So this begs the question: have the lines of fact and fiction been blurred for too long? Do we no longer just have people "playing characters" in our government anymore but genuine true believers? You regularly see members of Congress like Marjorie Taylor Greene who seems to truly believe the ridiculous stories she sells--about Jewish space lasers or Democrats belonging to a satanic cabal. You see Nancy Mace, once billed as a moderate, turning herself into a walking Fox News chyron, staging photos outside bathrooms to "hold the line" against the supposed invasion of trans legislators. And you see Speaker Mike Johnson confidently declare that the only reason Donald Trump would be in the Epstein Files was because he was an FBI informant working to take Epstein down--a claim so absurd that even Trump's own press secretary had to refute it. Long-tenured members of Congress have facilitated this culture, either out of political expediency or fear of retribution from the granddaddy of them all, Donald Trump. But the true believers are pushing them out, as seen in the ousting of former Speaker Kevin McCarthy after a revolt by the MAGA wing of his caucus. Whether or not they truly believe what they're saying, the rhetoric they engage in is the same as Trump's wrestling-esque persona: over-the-top, dramatic, and often violent. And that has real-world, dire consequences. The more we continue this culture of vitriolic rhetoric in politics, the more likely violent outcomes will result. These aren't "storylines." They're blood and bodies. And the crowd reacts accordingly. Jon Stewart described it best: "The image of Americans reflected back to us by our political and media process is false. It is us through a fun-house mirror... So why would we work together? Why would you reach across the aisle to a pumpkin-assed forehead eyeball monster? If the picture of us were accurate, of course our inability to solve problems would actually be quite sane and reasonable. Why would you work with Marxists, actively subverting our Constitution? Or racists and homophobes who see no one's humanity but their own?" That's kayfabe. A distorted mirror. And when people mistake it for reality, they storm the ring. TL;DR American politics has become kayfabe -- a scripted performance like professional wrestling where politicians and media figures play characters (heroes and villains) to keep audiences hooked. This theatrical style, perfected by Donald Trump and echoed by right-wing media, blurs fact and fiction to the point where violent rhetoric spills into real-world violence. Behind the scenes, figures like Tucker Carlson and Sean Hannity admitted privately that they didn't believe their public lines about Trump or the election, but they kept playing their parts for ratings and influence. Meanwhile, true believers like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Mike Johnson push conspiracy theories as if they're gospel, fueling a culture where violence is no longer just metaphorical -- from Pizzagate to January 6th to the assassinations of figures like Charlie Kirk. The more politics mimics wrestling theater -- over-the-top, dramatic, and villain-driven -- the more likely it will lead to bloodshed. What once was performance now risks becoming reality, with "characters" turning into zealots and kayfabe collapsing into chaos. Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? What is By the Ballot?** By the Ballot is a free SubStack that features unapologetic dispatches from the New South 's next generation of Democrats. Commentary on stances, tactics, and news on the Left. We don't claim to know everything or always be right, we just want to be a part of the conversation. While there 's many different ways to power and the Right wants to take over our country by hook or by crook, we want to help Democrats help Americans by making a government for the people by the ballot. subject: Join me in signing the card for the brave airmen of the U.S. Air Force!
body:
Sign the card to thank our heroes.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/P3zVHzG~2ZMZ/c1BHK09xdGpHV0ZXdzVRZXBqRHM0T0pST3FTd2QvQTc5YVVLQ1pkL0tmMW9wM0poWWViVDIxSDg2bU9VV2grQW8xamwrWExEdENIYTFlY3hVcWtmWG9LTy9sMytHMXJtekxKMGZRNVhtVk09S0/eW5NaHB6Sjd2ZXc5cVdaTXN3THdnYnU4YS9heGp0TEI1T3IrOXNGZDFSY3ZsM3drVGxsTGlMNngwTzdpWnY1djdHaGZUOGtya1hCWDlYSms1T3RFaGdBdUplUHJBaXFOS0)

★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★
[**JOIN VANESSA LACHEY AND THANK
ALL OUR AIRMEN AND MILITARY HEROES
BEFORE THE AIR FORCE'S BIRTHDAY**](https://links.e.uso.)
| **[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/7P90hVd_qvFN/c1BHK09xdGpHV0ZXdzVRZXBqRHM0T0pST3FTd2QvQTc5YVVLQ1pkL0tmMW9wM0poWWViVDIxSDg2bU9VV2grQW8xamwrWExEdENIYTFlY3hVcWtmWG9LTy9sMytHMXJtekxKMGZRNVhtVk09S0/eW5NaHB6Sjd2ZXc5cVdaTXN3THdnYnU4YS9heGp0TEI1T3IrOXNGZDFSY3ZsM3drVGxsTGlMNngwTzdpWnY1djdHaGZUOGtya1hCWDlYSms1T3RFaGdBdUplUHJBaXFOS0)**
---
USO Supporter,
I was born on a United States Air Force base in the Philippines and watched both my dad and stepmom proudly serve in the USAF as I was growing up.
Today, as a USO Global Ambassador, I'm proud to support _**all**_ our heroes who serve across every branch of our military -- but there will still always be a special place in my heart for the United States Air Force ♥️.
**That 's why I'm hoping you'll join me ahead of the USAF's 78th birthday on Sept. 18 to give a heartfelt thank-you to all our brave airmen and service members. [Will you add your name next to mine on the USO's Air Force birthday card now to help us reach our signature goal by September 18?](https://links.e.uso.)**
**[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/7P90hVd_qvFN/c1BHK09xdGpHV0ZXdzVRZXBqRHM0T0pST3FTd2QvQTc5YVVLQ1pkL0tmMW9wM0poWWViVDIxSDg2bU9VV2grQW8xamwrWExEdENIYTFlY3hVcWtmWG9LTy9sMytHMXJtekxKMGZRNVhtVk09S0/eW5NaHB6Sjd2ZXc5cVdaTXN3THdnYnU4YS9heGp0TEI1T3IrOXNGZDFSY3ZsM3drVGxsTGlMNngwTzdpWnY1djdHaGZUOGtya1hCWDlYSms1T3RFaGdBdUplUHJBaXFOS0)**
---
Growing up in a military family made me develop a lifelong appreciation and respect for our service members -- and those who support them.
I saw firsthand how powerful it was for my parents when they heard a quick, genuine expression of thanks for their service. It not only gave them the strength to keep striving to be their best, but it also helped me appreciate the value of what our family was doing for our country.
That's why I know what a message of gratitude from military supporters like you can mean to our service members, especially at times when they're risking their lives on dangerous deployments far away from their families.
**It is the least we can do to remind those who sacrifice so much to keep us free and safe that we support them -- but it truly means so much.**
So please: **[Add your name now to help us gather 78,000 names via email and text message on our United States Air Force birthday card before Sept. 18 to thank all of our courageous heroes who serve!](https://links.e.uso.)**
**[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/7P90hVd_qvFN/c1BHK09xdGpHV0ZXdzVRZXBqRHM0T0pST3FTd2QvQTc5YVVLQ1pkL0tmMW9wM0poWWViVDIxSDg2bU9VV2grQW8xamwrWExEdENIYTFlY3hVcWtmWG9LTy9sMytHMXJtekxKMGZRNVhtVk09S0/eW5NaHB6Sjd2ZXc5cVdaTXN3THdnYnU4YS9heGp0TEI1T3IrOXNGZDFSY3ZsM3drVGxsTGlMNngwTzdpWnY1djdHaGZUOGtya1hCWDlYSms1T3RFaGdBdUplUHJBaXFOS0)**
---
Thank you for helping us deliver a powerful message to the members of our Air Force and all our Armed Forces.
With gratitude,

Vanessa Lachey

name: Erika Kirk
subject: My cries will echo around the world like a battle cry.
body:
Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever.
We will never surrender. Ever.

| [ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1261c58f67c74059bbef09727c43b006&_e=71gDUnhE0q2HE93v-yAlmucmqHzKRsPjBcE3lnG9ndmfeCmyhFyGmO7kxD9hONzNd4dSbfzxcESJGy08lha7t5NI2MeAaWPVAmdPJoth_LShGdCHOqrMrGB33v-bTN5XlNUWjDlb_svCBRV0Fnc32SwRepKLf2IUJEvrTVa6tkBeMz1RQ9NCB7X9vmCj4J528KAonWI87alufuUGDdwA8m_u6HpJTGqEO_Faev6Pkr9X0kuxLjEuSnF0kgv0C9roUMoK8Y_HXCcREmSRik9p1OUZwwwyfA2qkOnrjoZ99YPNtzQ6ol8gpDb8LjMx21hQj9SO0jV2BywvskPZwXZyBtfeagG23D9WYjwLKEtjkDPq4Yfq-w9CMvcOGlCBh17cgawuaOyJszXsLNmNkvkz01NzGilMBDwK_ouG7f0-grdnC-nIDWivve9wob_tkcMZulQbHPVqZXnrRaNY_MwikYagCDiLZAl16eyjn_kNZk7MHiQtPNLd2KuwmgH4ozi6dnG7SYIKM0aPHZJWhM11zHFCXVyC7Usq90Fd_XXaEuCC08J90-jikvmC0LSGEpvU91AlDoVwTNSZbKkqRG5TC-G70yaDYkNrdBc6zfjq62Xe92yogjE-NPnoKaWH-ueLpMxQlppq4G1mdhmCJqUCjnUm_El86WeTrgeJe3WXnm-QY1F_VZd-GGpJZvMBdF-pySl6pdH8Q6X5rnjSF-bQXA%3D%3D)
---
Peter, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. ** They didn't just try to silence a man... They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... ****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die. **_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[ **I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:** ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1261c58f67c74059bbef09727c43b006&_e=71gDUnhE0q2HE93v-yAlmucmqHzKRsPjBcE3lnG9ndmfeCmyhFyGmO7kxD9hONzNd4dSbfzxcESJGy08lha7t5NI2MeAaWPVAmdPJoth_LShGdCHOqrMrGB33v-bTN5XlNUWjDlb_svCBRV0Fnc32SwRepKLf2IUJEvrTVa6tkBeMz1RQ9NCB7X9vmCj4J528KAonWI87alufuUGDdwA8m_u6HpJTGqEO_Faev6Pkr9X0kuxLjEuSnF0kgv0C9roOOBEFprDe4w2FRmwB5cDfcIE9Ht_qtPfSKEvlq6Mj_kd19gUui3Lj0ZUfZywZoKpJhsAT8jVNAE34QlDlpHx6pwjEWrees9uauGCsFBKGXedPpJDhJkmJ_0xJqXKWYQ07-kKbcekdacnZbeQE6eHZPhzHQlcZwlWEuZHiCzHYLkd4NgwxMuLMYbwX4Ff2lPfaySU_VGmlORBniJLVZ_zq-lEKJPamrbp01SCCPU0Dn2k6NywqMjZDkD11dD4qRUSWoFZ46sCMIjv3OhmBLRhMsWQ431l5XwG-Q8Pcg6cHxO-dQM21NGN4T_eNzSdt8xJPwGgCI33iqL1iGkhFF4KnS1bvTcyVD1YoT8WQzGm3I9C4LB9CveODSHDGCuxT3tWs4pH6cFEKzsAgSVOKiCP_puFELul-c6WUt7fliFZdHvs-URVJJDgmIU-MWY1YmfWgM3ToftV2PLde48alF2anA%3D%3D)
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1261c58f67c74059bbef09727c43b006&_e=71gDUnhE0q2HE93v-yAlmucmqHzKRsPjBcE3lnG9ndmfeCmyhFyGmO7kxD9hONzNd4dSbfzxcESJGy08lha7t5NI2MeAaWPVAmdPJoth_LShGdCHOqrMrGB33v-bTN5XlNUWjDlb_svCBRV0Fnc32SwRepKLf2IUJEvrTVa6tkBeMz1RQ9NCB7X9vmCj4J528KAonWI87alufuUGDdwA8m_u6HpJTGqEO_Faev6Pkr9X0kuxLjEuSnF0kgv0C9rooFe38YrUqMT3U492D6qrz5Ja4ixbhd89MjNGfg44sC7Es4QgHtBPXwnwJt2mAG05Kyd7km_UfsCmWR5ToWPYsq_oZXL-2_9CxytZ7cbg17H6q3HkRM4fsdhEfEUUH1czwncuzyXMxLY4O74fgt6F0EkfVWRe87IUUTxIvFickqGDdoOxXVIp-qNoHk72F6CvXwd55YVHbsm0sR4p7vkC5FIoHnc2ojcs55-1MY50ilMQCZSE-7y69lKW7FCJ1r4cMmU6s6tDXQvg0KYubkTe_Aps1QeCT1w4jIVYub3zeigei8FHZC4blirZAr3pIMcA-8q7bNTM6UJC-gSkPZcn0B6f_EaMP-tCMhoxsoLFuQYZaTxkIoZYgCUmPC4bhgS68BdR-00VFQ6VNm8c9RJPV-wkgf0Dt66cHDQweWksMGEh2az6Zh3Keo8AR9EnpF08c3BME3yq--RJlIgBgGeHjg%3D%3D)
Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,

clean_body: Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. We will never surrender. Ever. | Peter, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, I need you to listen closely... Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. They didn't just try to silence a man... They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED. Not just across this country...But in me . They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die. I refuse to let that happen. And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life. Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie, Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family P.S. Charlie always said: " Never surrender." He built something bigger than himself -- and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie's vision die... 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

subject: One thing before you start your week

body:
Today is the mid-point of September and we’re a good bit behind our goals
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1823%2E791427%2EvJPhRp)
Team — I’ll keep this short since we have a busy week ahead.
I don’t love sending fundraising emails, but when you run a campaign that rejects corporate PAC money they are too important to skip out on.
In fact, email fundraising has made up over **20% of all the money** this campaign has raised so far this year. That’s a huge piece of the pie.
So: Today is the mid-point of September and we’re a good bit behind our goals ahead of the FEC filing deadline on the 30th.
One donation from you today would go a long way to helping us get back on track. And it would go a long way to helping me continue to focus on the fight against Trump and the far-right instead of sending fundraising emails.
[**Please: Chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford. Grassroots donations make or break our campaign, and I’ve always been able to rely on this team.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250915-1-180&t=2&akid=1823%2E791427%2EvJPhRp)

In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

name: Leslie Rutledge
subject: Vote, yell … but reject violence and reclaim the country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LESLIE RUTLEDGE FOR LT
body:
America has entered a dangerous moment. |
---
| | [ ](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=a98bb3ca5e&e=624a44d946)
---
| |
GUEST COLUMN:
# **Vote, yell ... but reject violence
and reclaim the country**

_by Leslie Rutledge Special to the[Arkansas Democrat-Gazette](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=09a73fdf4c&e=624a44d946)_
---
| America has entered a dangerous moment. We need a revival. Political violence is no longer an aberration; it is becoming a recurring feature of our public life. A culture of demonization is pushing the impressionable toward deadly extremes. When leaders, pundits, and even neighbors on social media insist that their opponents are "Nazis" or "existential threats," an impressionable person will eventually take that rhetoric literally. The result is as sad as it is predictable: more people--who are made in the Image of God--will die.

I was reminded of this recently when I saw a social media post by a person I know who condemned "political violence in all forms," but in the same breath equated the assassination of Charlie Kirk with what she called the "violence" of public policies that she disliked. To suggest that gunning a man down on a college campus in front of his wife and children is equivalent to a policy disagreement is to rationalize murder. And to the ears of the impressionable, rationalization can sound like encouragement.

Sadly, the last couple of years have given us too many examples: Two assassination attempts on President Donald Trump, the murder of the Minnesota House Speaker and her husband, the slaughter of the young couple coming out of the Jewish Museum, the arson at the Governor's Residence in Pennsylvania, and the Molotov cocktail attack in Colorado. And now, in Utah, the assassination of Charlie Kirk. These are not isolated incidents. This is part of a growing trend in which the radicalized are weaponized by a culture that treats politics as war.

The killing of Charlie Kirk is a tragedy--and a warning. It exposes a deeper rot in America's political culture, where disagreement too often turns into demonization. Opponents are labeled un-American or dangerous, and extreme language feeds resentment, alienation, and ultimately, violence.

Words matter. When leaders or media outlets describe entire groups as "Nazis," "fascists," or "existential threats," they normalize the idea that violence is justified. Our words, like our actions, carry consequences. Each time we trade persuasion for intimidation and fatalistic catastrophization, we hand victory to radicals who cannot win in the marketplace of ideas.

The way forward for America is clear, and it's the same way forward for every Christian: to return to the faith upon which our nation was founded, to walk in truth, and to live with love. We must pray fervently for a revival in our land.

America must reclaim a culture of accountability, civility, and responsibility. Leaders can and should debate fiercely but without dehumanizing. Media outlets must stop amplifying rage for clicks and start reporting the truth. Adults with a captive audience of young people must stop radicalizing through their own words and actions. We must all reject rhetoric that turns disagreement into hatred.

The greatest commandment is to love God, and the second is to love thy neighbor as thyself. That commandment does not disappear when neighbors disagree with us politically. It does not vanish when we feel wronged. It is in moments of anger, division, and fear that love matters most.

A couple of weeks ago, as I was walking out of an event, a person with a bullhorn and a sign was yelling at me. The right to yell at public officials in public is absolute. While I don't enjoy being yelled at, I am glad we live in a society where people are free to express their disagreements with me. As I have processed the assassination of Charlie and all of the other senseless violence we've seen in the past couple of years, the last thing this person yelled has struck me: "We're gonna vote you out."

That is how America works. We argue, we persuade, we campaign, and we vote. Americans must be free to express their ideas in the open--not be assassinated by those too weak to argue an opposing view. Charlie would have had a respectful conversation with the coward who killed him. He probably would have pointed his murderer to Christ as well. We owe it to Charlie to be willing to do the same.

The right to free speech is sacred. It was given to us by God Himself, and it requires responsibility. To protect both the safety of our citizens and the freedom of our republic, we must condemn political violence. We must also reject the reckless rhetoric that radicalizes the impressionable into committing it. We cannot let bullets replace ballots, or hate replace love. America will prevail because we are one Nation under God.
---
|
---
| |

Team,

As you may know, _MSNBC_ is splitting from _NBC_.

Many changes are expected from the network – _the first being a new name and logo._

_MSNBC_ has been a trusted outlet for decades, but with the upcoming changes, we’re not sure what to expect...

That’s exactly why we’re polling engaged local Democrats today. We need to know how former fans of _MSNBC_ feel, and we’ve selected you to represent your city.

[**So please, team, let us know how you feel about _“MS NOW”_ below:**

name: Steven Saladana, COO
subject: We Can't Let James O’Keefe Be Next . . .
body:
My name is Steven Saldana, the Chief Operating Officer for OMG.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1270334/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvWkVKekd3dEU3TQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTU/LbmNsRW04U2pnbA/qP2hpZHM9bmMzRVhJUUJQSWU1R2dscw/gaMgS_Q/s1s6edd0c4b)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1270334/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1jb28tc2VjdXJpdHktbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTU/LbmNsRW04U2pnbA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWNvby1zZWN1cml0eSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE0NzRfd3Ix/gaMgS_Q/s4v04ffe5f2)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1270334/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1jb28tc2VjdXJpdHktbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTU/LbmNsRW04U2pnbA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWNvby1zZWN1cml0eSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE0NzRfd3Ix/gaMgS_Q/s4v04ffe5f2) Dear Patriot,

Rarely will you ever hear from anyone working for O'Keefe Media Group other than James O'Keefe, but, given the circumstances, it's necessary for me to introduce myself as I have an obligation to ensure the safety of James and our team.

My name is Steven Saldana, the Chief Operating Officer for OMG.

We're all aware of Charlie Kirk's tragic death. It shook all of us.

As a man who works in the trenches of business operations, not the cloak-and-dagger world of Undercover Operations that gives life to OMG's work, Charlie's murder opened my eyes to what James has repeated publicly and privately for years . . . **his price is his life**.

Even the forboding name of James' podcast is just that: _My Price is My Life_.

James has come to terms with his fate, not out of arrogance or theatrics. He made this personal choice years ago, after never-ending threats of violence, for a simple reason: **James O'Keefe chooses not to live in fear**.

Fear is a thief. It steals our passion, our love, and drives many men into hiding. Charlie Kirk did not live in fear. He lived out loud. James does as well, relentlessly working without fear or favor to expose the corrupt.

James' fate is not determined by any means. **That's in God's hands** , and we can work together to do His will by allowing a good man to continue his work, safely and without fear of a deranged individual brutally taking his life.

[**I'm writing to ask you to join me in backing
**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1270334/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1jb28tc2VjdXJpdHktbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTU/LbmNsRW04U2pnbA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWNvby1zZWN1cml0eSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE0NzRfd3Ix/gaMgS_Q/s4v04ffe5f2)[**our security needs for James and our team at OMG.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1270334/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1jb28tc2VjdXJpdHktbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTU/LbmNsRW04U2pnbA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWNvby1zZWN1cml0eSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE0NzRfd3Ix/gaMgS_Q/s4v04ffe5f2)

Call it fate, or God's hand. Still, this morning, I received a message from a man who served with the group of veterans that kept Border Czar Tom Homan safe through Inauguration Day.

At the time, Mr. Homan faced confirmed, well-funded, and terrifying threats from the Cartels. The Biden Administration refused to provide Mr. Homan with security, and a group of special men volunteered their time and chose to place their own lives at risk to protect Tom Homan.

**Those men proved their professionalism on top of their patriotism.**

I was placed in contact with the man who led that team of veterans, Cameron Hamilton. **Cam has offered to create a security plan and procedures for a long-term security solution for James and OMG that monitors and adjusts to threats.**

At this moment, I have no idea what that budget looks like. Still, I plan on flying Cam out as soon as possible, and in the meantime, I’ve installed temporary security**solutions. We need to raise an initial $24,000**.

[**Please donate to fill that gap.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1270334/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1jb28tc2VjdXJpdHktbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTU/LbmNsRW04U2pnbA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWNvby1zZWN1cml0eSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE0NzRfd3Ix/gaMgS_Q/s4v04ffe5f2)

I want to take a moment to tell you about Cam's credentials. He served our nation for a decade, earning his place as a Navy SEAL. He continued to serve our country in emergency management and preparedness roles for the Department of State and DHS. He recently served as the Acting Director of FEMA under President Trump.

Cam’s working relationship with state and local law enforcement agencies is unsurpassed and something we will need to ensure security while controlling costs. He's an expert at small and large operations. He is **a professional who calculates every possible move on the chessboard and prepares for the outcome**.

To prepare for all outcomes, [**I'll need your support to cover the costs that go beyond armed security**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1270334/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1jb28tc2VjdXJpdHktbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTU/LbmNsRW04U2pnbA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWNvby1zZWN1cml0eSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE0NzRfd3Ix/gaMgS_Q/s4v04ffe5f2).

In speaking with the veteran who served on Homan's detail, we'll need to invest in physical security measures, operational security, as well as emergency trauma supplies that are suitable for a combat zone. I was told that under Cam's lead, the back of the SUV used to transport Mr. Homan was filled with the supplies needed for a mobile trauma room.

As much as I hate recalling the videos America collectively watched of Charlie Kirk, **his fate is the outcome we have to be prepared to prevent**.

It's an obligation that our already thin budget for investigations and staff cannot afford.

It's a sacrifice [**I'm asking you to make**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1270334/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1jb28tc2VjdXJpdHktbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTU/LbmNsRW04U2pnbA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWNvby1zZWN1cml0eSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE0NzRfd3Ix/gaMgS_Q/s4v04ffe5f2), taking into account that **James has already accepted what he's willing to sacrifice to continue working for you:** **Nothing short of his own life**.

[**Please help me ensure that he never has to make that sacrifice by donating today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1270334/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1jb28tc2VjdXJpdHktbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTU/LbmNsRW04U2pnbA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWNvby1zZWN1cml0eSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE0NzRfd3Ix/gaMgS_Q/s4v04ffe5f2)

**We already lost an amazing man; we can't risk another.**

I appreciate anything at all that you can do, as well as your time and consideration.

With Respect,
Steven Saldana
Chief Operations Officer
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. If you're able to donate, I'll add you to a special team of supporters and follow up with a security budget that follows Cam's recommendations, if you don't hear from him directly. Thank you again, and [**please donate any amount today to help build a security plan for James and OMG.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1270334/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1jb28tc2VjdXJpdHktbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTU/LbmNsRW04U2pnbA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWNvby1zZWN1cml0eSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW9tJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1tYiZhbW91bnQ9MjUmdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE0NzRfd3Ix/gaMgS_Q/s4v04ffe5f2)

---

clean_body: My name is Steven Saldana, the Chief Operating Officer for OMG. | | | | Dear Patriot, Rarely will you ever hear from anyone working for O'Keefe Media Group other than James O'Keefe, but, given the circumstances, it's necessary for me to introduce myself as I have an obligation to ensure the safety of James and our team. My name is Steven Saldana, the Chief Operating Officer for OMG. We're all aware of Charlie Kirk's tragic death. It shook all of us. As a man who works in the trenches of business operations, not the cloak-and-dagger world of Undercover Operations that gives life to OMG's work, Charlie's murder opened my eyes to what James has repeated publicly and privately for years . . . his price is his life. Even the forboding name of James' podcast is just that: My Price is My Life. James has come to terms with his fate, not out of arrogance or theatrics. He made this personal choice years ago, after never-ending threats of violence, for a simple reason: James O'Keefe chooses not to live in fear. Fear is a thief. It steals our passion, our love, and drives many men into hiding. Charlie Kirk did not live in fear. He lived out loud. James does as well, relentlessly working without fear or favor to expose the corrupt. James' fate is not determined by any means. That's in God's hands , and we can work together to do His will by allowing a good man to continue his work, safely and without fear of a deranged individual brutally taking his life. Call it fate, or God's hand. Still, this morning, I received a message from a man who served with the group of veterans that kept Border Czar Tom Homan safe through Inauguration Day. At the time, Mr. Homan faced confirmed, well-funded, and terrifying threats from the Cartels. The Biden Administration refused to provide Mr. Homan with security, and a group of special men volunteered their time and chose to place their own lives at risk to protect Tom Homan. Those men proved their professionalism on top of their patriotism. I was placed in contact with the man who led that team of veterans, Cameron Hamilton. Cam has offered to create a security plan and procedures for a long-term security solution for James and OMG that monitors and adjusts to threats. At this moment, I have no idea what that budget looks like. Still, I plan on flying Cam out as soon as possible, and in the meantime, I’ve installed temporary securitysolutions. We need to raise an initial $24,000. I want to take a moment to tell you about Cam's credentials. He served our nation for a decade, earning his place as a Navy SEAL. He continued to serve our country in emergency management and preparedness roles for the Department of State and DHS. He recently served as the Acting Director of FEMA under President Trump. Cam’s working relationship with state and local law enforcement agencies is unsurpassed and something we will need to ensure security while controlling costs. He's an expert at small and large operations. He is a professional who calculates every possible move on the chessboard and prepares for the outcome. To prepare for all outcomes, . In speaking with the veteran who served on Homan's detail, we'll need to invest in physical security measures, operational security, as well as emergency trauma supplies that are suitable for a combat zone. I was told that under Cam's lead, the back of the SUV used to transport Mr. Homan was filled with the supplies needed for a mobile trauma room. As much as I hate recalling the videos America collectively watched of Charlie Kirk, his fate is the outcome we have to be prepared to prevent. It's an obligation that our already thin budget for investigations and staff cannot afford. It's a sacrifice , taking into account that James has already accepted what he's willing to sacrifice to continue working for you: Nothing short of his own life. We already lost an amazing man; we can't risk another. I appreciate anything at all that you can do, as well as your time and consideration. With Respect, Steven Saldana Chief Operations Officer O'Keefe Media Group P.S. If you're able to donate, I'll add you to a special team of supporters and follow up with a security budget that follows Cam's recommendations, if you don't hear from him directly. Thank you again, and

name: Team Rob
subject: Rob's NEPA Rundown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob for PA]()
body:
A Tragic Week, but We Must Keep Fighting

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6805cc22f64b/robs-nepa-rundown?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | | |
---
| | Good Morning,
Rob is back in D.C. and is excited to continue fighting for all Northeastern Pennsylvanians in PA-08! Last week, Rob introduced legislation to honor Retired Colonel Robert J. Graham of Nuangola, PA, with the Medal of Honor for his extraordinary bravery during the Vietnam War. His courageous actions saved hundreds of lives and exemplify the very best of our military. Rob is proud to support our heroes who have served.
Let’s dive into this week’s Rundown ⬇️
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | Rob was back in NEPA over the weekend and went all over! He ran in the Forty Fort 10k, went to the Old Forge Italian Festival, and spent some time at the Dallas Harvest Festival. Rob loves coming home and spending time with his constituents. He will be back next weekend, and we hope to see you out and about!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | We are all deeply shocked and saddened by the assassination of Charlie Kirk. Please join us in praying for his family during this tragic time. Below is Rob’s statement on the assassination:
_Chelsea and I are horrified by the assassination of Charlie Kirk. Charlie made it a point to involve younger Americans in political discussions and promote an open dialogue.__Those who act with such horrid political violence when met with opinions different from their own are heinous and cruel.__In this time of immense tragedy and loss, our hearts go out to Charlie’s wife, children, friends, and family._
---
|
---
|
---
| | Our Volunteer of the Week is Suzie, from Wayne County. She helped with ads, door knocking, and spreading the word about Rob. Thanks for all your hard work, Suzie!
---
|

| | Portland Paige is campaigning for Congress against Rob while also seeking a second term as Mayor. clean_body: A Tragic Week, but We Must Keep Fighting | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Good Morning, Rob is back in D.C. and is excited to continue fighting for all Northeastern Pennsylvanians in PA-08! Last week, Rob introduced legislation to honor Retired Colonel Robert J. Graham of Nuangola, PA, with the Medal of Honor for his extraordinary bravery during the Vietnam War. His courageous actions saved hundreds of lives and exemplify the very best of our military. Rob is proud to support our heroes who have served. Let’s dive into this week’s Rundown ⬇️ | | | | | | | | | | | | | Rob was back in NEPA over the weekend and went all over! He ran in the Forty Fort 10k, went to the Old Forge Italian Festival, and spent some time at the Dallas Harvest Festival. Rob loves coming home and spending time with his constituents. He will be back next weekend, and we hope to see you out and about! | | | | | We are all deeply shocked and saddened by the assassination of Charlie Kirk. Please join us in praying for his family during this tragic time. Below is Rob’s statement on the assassination: Chelsea and I are horrified by the assassination of Charlie Kirk. Charlie made it a point to involve younger Americans in political discussions and promote an open dialogue.Those who act with such horrid political violence when met with opinions different from their own are heinous and cruel.In this time of immense tragedy and loss, our hearts go out to Charlie’s wife, children, friends, and family. | | | | Our Volunteer of the Week is Suzie, from Wayne County. She helped with ads, door knocking, and spreading the word about Rob. Thanks for all your hard work, Suzie! | | | Portland Paige is campaigning for Congress against Rob while also seeking a second term as Mayor. She is a political climber and far-left extremist who has backed open borders, defunding the police, and even supports taxpayer-funded sex change operations for illegal immigrants. We must stop her and her radical agenda. Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026! | | | \- Team Rob | | | | | | [Paid for by Rob for PA]() | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Rob for PA. All rights reserved.

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: You elected us to restore law and order
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Take the Immigration Voter Verify Poll

Friend,

The American people elected President Trump and Senate Republicans to restore law and order and take a sledgehammer to open border policies.

That's exactly what we've done. Border crossings are at a record low. Criminal illegals are being rounded up and deported. The rule of law is coming back to sanctuary cities.

_**[But there are way too many liberals in Washington who STILL want open borders, cartels in power, and criminal illegals on our streets.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlviktrhk3juqlb7u0gadlfokmt3l48kq4fh1a80_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjim9oj6cjh2bs)**_

If you're like me, you've had enough of it. Being fed up isn't enough -- it's time to take action.

**[Can I count on you to fill out Senate Republicans' Immigration Voter Verify Poll? It will let the loonies on the Left and the liberal politicians in Washington know exactly where you stand.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zokbeq623djk124jo3dgvf844vrmg4j0j1pjnnbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjim9oj6cjh2bs)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztg8b7un95fn8vt2hm0vui8cv61gu66aq3b8qa50_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjim9oj6cjh2bs)
You elected us to secure our border, make our country safer, and put working families first.

Now, we need your continued input to keep at it.

Thank you,

# _Monday Morning Edition:_
**Here 's what you need to know today: **
* FBI releases new evidence seeming to confirm suspect's role in Charlie Kirk murder
* Vice President JD Vance to host The Charlie Kirk Show today at noon EST
* Unhinged scumbag gets arrested after kicking over memorial for Kirk in AZ
* Ben Shapiro wrecks Bill Maher on his own show for mocking the Bible

_**Thank you for reading and supporting PolitiBrawl!**_
* * *
# New DNA evidence appears to confirm suspect's role in Kirk's murder, according to FBI
Newly revealed DNA evidence **[positively links suspect Tyler Robinson](https://substack.com/redirect/7e03682a-368f-49b4-a42a-14f8cf0e3795?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to the crime scene of Charlie Kirk's murder, according to the FBI, with FBI Director Kash Patel confirming that DNA matching the 22-year-old suspect was found on a towel that covered the murder weapon and on a screwdriver discovered in the sniper's nest on a rooftop.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7e03682a-368f-49b4-a42a-14f8cf0e3795?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Robinson wrote about his plans to kill Kirk** , leaving a note stating he had an opportunity to "take out Charlie Kirk" and was "going to take it" because of his "hatred for what Charlie stood for," according to Patel.
* **The suspect subscribed to left-wing ideology** and became more radicalized in recent years, with his family telling investigators about his political beliefs, and authorities have found evidence of text message exchanges between Robinson and a second individual.
* **Robinson is not cooperating with authorities** but was apprehended quickly in a 33-hour manhunt, which Patel praised as faster than historical cases like Luigi Mangione and the Boston Marathon bombing that took five days, while DNA analysis on the bolt-action hunting rifle used in the shooting is still ongoing.

* * *
# JD Vance to host The Charlie Kirk Show today at 12pm EST
Vice President JD Vance **[announced on Sunday](https://substack.com/redirect/7c3dd31b-02f8-456c-ae69-a485e4a54390?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that he will host an episode of "The Charlie Kirk Show" today at 12:00 p.m. ET.
"Tomorrow, I will have the honor of hosting the Charlie Kirk Show," Vance wrote on X. "Please join me as I pay tribute to my friend."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7c3dd31b-02f8-456c-ae69-a485e4a54390?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
**[Together with Golco](https://substack.com/redirect/47b82c3a-301b-4388-a18a-660c7794a110?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Will the Silver Boom Keep Rising?](https://substack.com/redirect/47b82c3a-301b-4388-a18a-660c7794a110?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/47b82c3a-301b-4388-a18a-660c7794a110?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Silver has always been critical to the green revolution--but now a powerful mix of forces is supercharging demand.
**AI + EVs = Surging Industrial Demand
** Silver is no longer just a "green tech" metal. It's now the metal of the AI era.
From boosting data center efficiency to powering EV batteries, silver's unmatched conductivity makes it indispensable. As AI expands and EV adoption accelerates, industrial demand for silver is rising at record pace.
**Central Banks Are Moving In
** In a historic first, Russia's Central Bank is stockpiling silver. Since then, prices have surged over 30% this year--outpacing gold. Could other BRICS nations follow? Some analysts even suggest silver could become "the new gold" for countries diversifying away from the U.S. dollar.
**Why Silver Could Be Undervalued
** With demand surging, supply lagging, and global use cases multiplying... silver may be one of today's most overlooked assets.
That's why tens of thousands of Americans are requesting their free copy of **The Case For Silver** --a fact-packed guide revealing:
✅ Why silver could be the dark horse of the AI revolution
✅ How green tech is fueling demand
✅ A little-known IRS-approved way to own silver tax and penalty-free
✅ How to get started in just 3 steps
✅ Plus, how to qualify for a _10% Instant Match in BONUS SILVER_
**Act Now --While Supplies Last!
**Get your free copy of _**[The Case For Silver](https://substack.com/redirect/47b82c3a-301b-4388-a18a-660c7794a110?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/47b82c3a-301b-4388-a18a-660c7794a110?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and see if you qualify for up to a 10% Instant Silver Match today.

P.S. The Silver Boom may just be beginning--don't miss your chance to get ahead.
* * *
# Man arrested after trampling Charlie Kirk memorial in Arizona
A man **[was arrested after vandalizing](https://substack.com/redirect/bc9e8e4d-e813-48a8-8d10-fbfb7b7f5be1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** a Charlie Kirk memorial outside Turning Point USA's headquarters in Arizona, Sunday afternoon.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6b8c5ceb-16ba-45b3-9146-966aeb0ab5a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **The 19-year-old suspect, Ryder Corral was arrested** for allegedly trampling the Charlie Kirk memorial outside Turning Point USA headquarters in Phoenix on Sunday, kicking over flowers, vases, and flags while Fox News cameras were rolling.
* **A mourner intervened to stop the vandalism** , with a man in a blue polo shirt physically removing Corral from the memorial and throwing him to the ground before police escorted Corral away.
* **Corral was wearing a shirt similar to Kirk's alleged assassin** , featuring a black shirt with an American flag and eagle that bore a striking resemblance to what Tyler Robinson wore when he allegedly shot and killed Kirk at Utah Valley University on Wednesday.
* **Corral faces criminal charges** including one count of criminal damage and one count of disorderly conduct and is being held at Maricopa County Jail, while Robinson, Kirk's alleged assassin, was arrested Friday after a 33-hour manhunt following Kirk's death from a single gunshot wound.

* * *
# Ben Shapiro WRECKS Bill Maher for mocking the Bible
Liberal atheist comedian Bill Maher criticized the Bible as containing "nonsense" and "wickedness" **[during a debate with Ben Shapiro](https://substack.com/redirect/299f7c33-36ff-4aab-8de2-ff00d0416a43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on "Real Time with Bill Maher: Overtime," with the atheist host arguing that if God wrote it, it should be perfect, but since it's flawed, it must have been written by people.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/571680ca-b1fe-4f6f-8f75-7faf05535632?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Shapiro argued that Western morality stems from Biblical foundations** , telling Maher that despite being a religious Jew debating an atheist, they agree on morality "87 percent" of the time because they both grew up in Western society with "several thousand years of Biblical history behind it."
* **Shapiro received unexpected audience support** when he told Maher "you can think that you hit that triple and formed your own morality, but the reality is you were born morally on third base," with the liberal Los Angeles audience erupting in laughter and applause.
* **The debate arose from discussion of Shapiro's new book "Lions and Scavengers"** which divides society into builders (lions) versus destroyers (scavengers), and included comparisons to philosopher Friedrich Nietzsche's criticisms of Judeo-Christian religion as encouraging weakness over strength.
* **Maher countered that Western morality comes from the Enlightenment rather than religion** , arguing that America's Founding Fathers weren't "particularly Christy," while Shapiro responded with the metaphor that "cut flowers die" - suggesting societies that sever themselves from their moral roots cannot sustain their values indefinitely.

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: An update on an upcoming budget bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We are careening towards the end of our state's fiscal year.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=705%2E181023%2EegVyI-)
Hey team —
It's September, football is back, and the Tigers are on track for the postseason. But that is not all that’s on my mind.
Here in Michigan, we are careening towards the end of our state's fiscal year. The next one starts in just a few weeks on October 1st, and we _have_ to pass a budget before then to literally keep the lights on.
So I wanted to check in with you and talk about what's actually going down behind the scenes.
I am all for cutting wasteful spending to ensure government works for you when you need it, and then gets out of the way when you don't. That's how I have led my department these last seven years as Secretary of State.
**But about a week ago, House Republican leadership proposed a budget that relies on inaccurate numbers and incorrect math.**
Take my department, the Department of State. The budget would force us to lay off a quarter of our workforce because it overestimates vacant positions. Because of that, _more than 400 employees_ — the people who help you renew your license, register your car, and get in and out of our branch offices quickly — would all lose their jobs.
If this budget passed, we would have to close branch offices across the state. That means longer lines and more frustration for all of you.
And here’s the thing: the money that they're cutting in our proposed budget actually would not be able to be used to fix the roads or move anywhere else in the budget because it's restricted funds, it can only be used for customer service purposes. **_It makes no sense at all to cut it._**
Now, my department has responded with a plan that would cut our budget in a way that maintains all these services _and_ contributes to funding to improve our roads and public education, because **we can cut spending and make government more efficient without hurting people.**
That's what I think we should be doing across all of government. And that's my goal. So we're gonna spend the next several weeks trying to be a part of discussions that are based on accurate estimates and result in good outcomes for our state and the people of Michigan.
I'll keep you posted as things progress, and if you have some time over the next few weeks, [reach out to your state representative](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/2080?t=2&akid=705%2E181023%2EegVyI-) and encourage them to use accurate numbers and fair estimates as we work together to build a budget that works for everyone.
**[In the meantime, can you make a contribution to our campaign so I can keep fighting for the best outcomes for Michigan as governor?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250915_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=705%2E181023%2EegVyI-)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250915_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=705%2E181023%2EegVyI-)
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250915_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=5&akid=705%2E181023%2EegVyI-)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250915_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=6&akid=705%2E181023%2EegVyI-)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250915_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=7&akid=705%2E181023%2EegVyI-)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250915_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=8&akid=705%2E181023%2EegVyI-)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250915_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=705%2E181023%2EegVyI-)
---
Thank you — and like I said, I’ll update you as we work to build a budget that works for everyone.
Let’s go.
Jocelyn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.

Ferndale, MI 48220

name: Elect Patriotic Democrats
subject: This could be a game changer for Democrats’ strategy in 2026 and beyond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
We have a historic opportunity to put the GOP on defense. Please let us explain:
#
Peter,
**Republicans in Congress have abandoned real patriotism.**
They’re allowing an all-out assault on freedoms guaranteed in our Constitution. They’re threatening to undermine the foundation of our democracy. All while letting everyday people and working families bear the brunt of their cruel, billionaire-first agenda.
**Right now, Democrats have a historic opportunity to put the GOP on defense for it.**
**[If you’re ready to join our movement to hold the GOP accountable and Elect Patriotic Democrats, please chip in $10 to become a Founding Donor today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94947?refcode=em20250915-9423&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9423%2E614464%2EWAZe97) Otherwise, please take a moment to read this longer email about why reclaiming patriotism could be a game changer for Democrats’ strategy in 2026 and beyond.**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Elect Patriotic Democrats (a project of Heartland Patriots) will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94948?refcode=em20250915-9423&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9423%2E614464%2EWAZe97) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94948?refcode=em20250915-9423&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=9423%2E614464%2EWAZe97) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94947?refcode=em20250915-9423&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9423%2E614464%2EWAZe97)
---
First, let’s define real patriotism. Because we’re not talking about nationalism, or the GOP version of faux-patriotism they’ve been parading on Fox News for decades.
**Real patriotism is investing in the common good of the American people** — for working families, not out-of-touch politicians or corporate elites. **It’s defending principles like liberty, freedom, and justice for ALL** — even people we disagree with or who live differently than we do. **And it’s resisting any threat to the voice and livelihoods of working people like you.**
**At its core, real patriotism means loving your country so much that you want to make life as good as possible for the people who live, work, and build communities here.**
You don’t have to flip through your nearest newspaper very long to see how Republicans in Congress have abandoned that idea. Instead of providing more resources for working people who are already struggling to survive, they’re actively stripping them away. Instead of supporting people to actually build and raise their families, they’re attacking reproductive freedom and sowing deep divisions in our communities.
_The GOP is making life more difficult and more expensive — and we can’t let them call that patriotism any longer._
**[Elect Patriotic Democrats is dedicated to supporting Democratic candidates who are running to fight for patriotic values that benefit people like you — right now, in 2026, and beyond. Will you become a Founding Donor by chipping in $10 or more today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94947?refcode=em20250915-9423&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9423%2E614464%2EWAZe97)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Elect Patriotic Democrats (a project of Heartland Patriots) will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94948?refcode=em20250915-9423&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=9423%2E614464%2EWAZe97) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94948?refcode=em20250915-9423&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=9423%2E614464%2EWAZe97) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94947?refcode=em20250915-9423&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9423%2E614464%2EWAZe97)
---
Now here’s why this strategy of embracing patriotism, rather than avoiding it, could be a game changer for Democrats in 2026: **When we work toward the values we mentioned above — investing in the common good, protecting fundamental freedoms, upholding our democracy, and empowering everyday people — we become stronger as individuals, as communities, and as a country.**
_Fighting FOR something will be Democrats’ best hope to turn things around and take back power for working families over the years ahead._ And while it might feel hard right now, while the GOP in DC provides us endless things to fight AGAINST, we need to start playing the long game with Democratic candidates who are ready to do this important work.
We can’t let DC Republicans divide us any further. **Starting now, with your help, we’re going to elect Democrats who will take back patriotism and save our country.**

clean_body: We have a historic opportunity to put the GOP on defense. Please let us explain: Peter, Republicans in Congress have abandoned real patriotism. They’re allowing an all-out assault on freedoms guaranteed in our Constitution. They’re threatening to undermine the foundation of our democracy. All while letting everyday people and working families bear the brunt of their cruel, billionaire-first agenda. Right now, Democrats have a historic opportunity to put the GOP on defense for it. Otherwise, please take a moment to read this longer email about why reclaiming patriotism could be a game changer for Democrats’ strategy in 2026 and beyond. If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Elect Patriotic Democrats (a project of Heartland Patriots) will process instantly: First, let’s define real patriotism. Because we’re not talking about nationalism, or the GOP version of faux-patriotism they’ve been parading on Fox News for decades. Real patriotism is investing in the common good of the American people — for working families, not out-of-touch politicians or corporate elites. It’s defending principles like liberty, freedom, and justice for ALL — even people we disagree with or who live differently than we do. And it’s resisting any threat to the voice and livelihoods of working people like you. At its core, real patriotism means loving your country so much that you want to make life as good as possible for the people who live, work, and build communities here. You don’t have to flip through your nearest newspaper very long to see how Republicans in Congress have abandoned that idea. Instead of providing more resources for working people who are already struggling to survive, they’re actively stripping them away. Instead of supporting people to actually build and raise their families, they’re attacking reproductive freedom and sowing deep divisions in our communities. The GOP is making life more difficult and more expensive — and we can’t let them call that patriotism any longer. If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Elect Patriotic Democrats (a project of Heartland Patriots) will process instantly: Now here’s why this strategy of embracing patriotism, rather than avoiding it, could be a game changer for Democrats in 2026: When we work toward the values we mentioned above — investing in the common good, protecting fundamental freedoms, upholding our democracy, and empowering everyday people — we become stronger as individuals, as communities, and as a country. Fighting FOR something will be Democrats’ best hope to turn things around and take back power for working families over the years ahead. And while it might feel hard right now, while the GOP in DC provides us endless things to fight AGAINST, we need to start playing the long game with Democratic candidates who are ready to do this important work. We can’t let DC Republicans divide us any further. Starting now, with your help, we’re going to elect Democrats who will take back patriotism and save our country. If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Elect Patriotic Democrats (a project of Heartland Patriots) will process instantly: Thank you so much, Peter. Able Dems, a leading voice for Democrats with disabilities, is proud to announce our endorsement of John Sullivan in New York’s 17th Congressional District primary! John is a cancer survivor who knows that health care is not a privilege; it’s a lifeline. That’s why he’s made protecting and expanding quality, affordable care the heart of his campaign. After incumbent Mike Lawler voted to slash Medicaid in the so-called “Big Ugly” bill, the stakes couldn’t be clearer. For people with disabilities, this isn’t a budget line - it’s an attack on human rights, basic dignity, and survival. _Our health care is on the line. Our democracy is on the line._ **Able Dems PAC is proud to back John Sullivan in NY-17.
