name: Tucker Carlson
subject: For Charlie we press on
body:
Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit"

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8f5tp4diauv89j5dpt90l75fphinvqe4um811vg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8o34c5h2bs)
---
Friend
---
I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can 't stay quiet._**Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgng68kupd98kuus143enfpcba76ea653e3gdv90_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8o34c5h2bs)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie.America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him -- but we can make sure his legacy continues on. **_We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don 't you dare quit."**_Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth.That's what the Turning Point movement was all about -- and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight.**And our task now is not only to protect what he built -- it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible. ** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right.Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn 't just start a movement... _he started a revival. _**And now, Friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision...** _Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today. _** **[Let's make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That's how we honor him best.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2g0u161bqjho78a08tij5g8qbuguu7sqe8sb8to_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8o34c5h2bs)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9gh909s6qp7rs2jg3gsmtncq0qnlgic4rea3s2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8o34c5h2bs)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We'll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6mb696qa3sn7u6u92stq02jpc0emj819kd9sdt8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8o34c5h2bs)
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zejeuk619md48q9t0ph2ocqv0addudamat5phbs0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8o34c5h2bs)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo87sgntc211ufgsuki2og2th2rf111haqq02hg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8o34c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31cjim8p34c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3dcoleiv0ie7roaa3o6livagaavpb5olvi725eg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8o34c5h2bs)_

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: For Charlie we press on
body:
Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit"

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7unb59d37h3m23n21jtdgkctq5iehus47sn94po_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8p74cjh2bs)
---
Friend
---
I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can 't stay quiet._**Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgsquo20aba493kmlnd8mci8v863q9fgqpu7blag_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8p74cjh2bs)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie.America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him -- but we can make sure his legacy continues on. **_We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don 't you dare quit."**_Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth.That's what the Turning Point movement was all about -- and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight.**And our task now is not only to protect what he built -- it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible. ** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right.Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn 't just start a movement... _he started a revival. _**And now, Friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision...** _Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today. _** **[Let's make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That's how we honor him best.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrt989v581hqkdjhsj7ai7h77ifr8tk3r9638n4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8p74cjh2bs)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znvb85d6s70pemhrecf0394oab9u00fooe7uatjg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8p74cjh2bs)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We'll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4vqunlpkol2e8bd9cnaddp4fffu2k9hnfhrk73g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjhm8p74cjh2bs)
---

I need your support.
| | | It's Senator Schumer. This is a long email -- but because of how much is at stake, _you need to know it all._

**If you can't read the whole thing, I'll cut to the chase:**

**[The GOP wants to use their majority to implement ALL of Trump's most extreme policy goals. I wish I was exaggerating, but I'm not. So please, will you chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ before tonight's mid-month deadline to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22008?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250915-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250915-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=21221%2E9716520%2EibAVN3)**

_Here are the three most important things you need to know:_

**SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE WORKING HAND-IN-HAND WITH TRUMP TO PASS HIS PLANS INTO LAW.**

Now that they have the majority, they're doing whatever it takes to cater to Trump's desires -- even if it means cutting key programs like Medicaid and Social Security!

_It gets worse:_

**EXPERTS ARE SAYING TAKING THE SENATE BACK WILL BE TOUGH.**

If we want to stop Trump's agenda, we'll NEED to take back the Senate -- but the analysts are saying it'll be an uphill battle. Factor in the Republican megadonors willing to spend hundreds of millions to keep the Senate red, and it's clear we won't have much margin for error.

_As a result:_

**WE'LL NEED ALL HANDS ON DECK TO DEFY THE ODDS AND TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY!**

It'll be a tough fight, but I know it can be done. We can only beat the odds if grassroots Democrats like you step up. **So please:**

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Need 52 supporters from Cresco
body:
---
3 Derek, You might be surprised to hear this, but the donations we receive from emails just like this one make up a vast majority of our individual contributions. And right now, these contributions are funding our work to organize against Trump’s disastrous agenda. While Trump and Republicans are redrawing congressional maps to rig elections in their favor, we’re fighting back and showing up for Democrats in red, blue, and purple states alike. We’re investing in every single state Democratic party, deploying thousands of organizers across the country, and investing seven figures in both Virginia and New Jersey ahead of their elections this year. But this work requires a massive amount of resources. That’s why it’s crucial we meet and even exceed all of our goals. And with our mid-month deadline coming up at _midnight_ , we need a massive amount of donations to set us up for success. When thousands of Democrats across the country chip in, we can reach our fundraising goals in no time to fund and expand our work to hold Trump accountable. But the truth is that not everyone chips in. That’s why we’re looking for 52 donations from Cresco today. **And you are one of the Cresco Democrats we need.** [**Can we count on you to donate $3 before our mid-month deadline tonight? Every dollar we raise right now is another door knocked, another ad placed, and another voter mobilized in areas where we need it the most.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250915_4578_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4578_22930333_bgvCQG&akid=4578%2E22930333%2EbgvCQG) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250915_4578_fr&refcode2=4578_22930333_bgvCQG&akid=4578%2E22930333%2EbgvCQG)**

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: This has no place in our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115254155/569700767/623074613?refcode=jtk1417-ot-nd1&code=jtk1417-ot-nd1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTk0MWIyYTctNDQ5Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=txxzYdX8m-WUgMfvmGzyM-QNxxl6bNkzwmRnvkEE3b0=&emci=2a8fcb2b-2790-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=5941b2a7-4492-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9329426)
---
Friend, last week's tragedy at Utah Valley has shaken us all. My heart is with Charlie Kirk's family, the students, and everyone who knew Kirk personally.
Political violence of any kind is absolutely unacceptable. No matter the ideology, it has no place in our nation – none. These actions are a betrayal of the most basic American values, especially free speech and the right to disagree peacefully.
In moments like this, we face a choice: allow grief and fear to deepen partisan divides, or come together to reject violence and reaffirm our shared commitment to democracy.
We faced this choice last July in Pennsylvania, when a gunman shot at and injured President Trump. We faced this choice in April, when the governor‘s residence was firebombed intentionally, in an attempt to injure or kill Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro and his family. We faced this choice twice in the same day this June in Minnesota, when the Speaker of the State House, her husband, and their golden retriever were all gunned down inside their own home, and when a State Senator and his wife were grievously injured by the same assassin.
President Trump has chosen. He has chosen inflaming hostility and encouraging violence upon the “Radical Left”. Ultimately, failing to lead the nation and betraying the trust of his office. By contrast, Governor Cox of Utah has shown what real leadership looks like, urging us to turn away from division and choose a path where politics doesn’t feel like rage.
And just like Governor Cox, I call on every American, in every party, to lower the temperature on our politics. Let us honor our democracy – and the lives touched by this loss – by choosing civility over chaos, and respect over hatred.
Thank you for joining me in condemning this violence.
With resolve,
Dick

clean_body: | | | Friend, last week's tragedy at Utah Valley has shaken us all. My heart is with Charlie Kirk's family, the students, and everyone who knew Kirk personally. Political violence of any kind is absolutely unacceptable. No matter the ideology, it has no place in our nation – none. These actions are a betrayal of the most basic American values, especially free speech and the right to disagree peacefully. In moments like this, we face a choice: allow grief and fear to deepen partisan divides, or come together to reject violence and reaffirm our shared commitment to democracy. We faced this choice last July in Pennsylvania, when a gunman shot at and injured President Trump. We faced this choice in April, when the governor‘s residence was firebombed intentionally, in an attempt to injure or kill Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro and his family. We faced this choice twice in the same day this June in Minnesota, when the Speaker of the State House, her husband, and their golden retriever were all gunned down inside their own home, and when a State Senator and his wife were grievously injured by the same assassin. President Trump has chosen. He has chosen inflaming hostility and encouraging violence upon the “Radical Left”. Ultimately, failing to lead the nation and betraying the trust of his office. By contrast, Governor Cox of Utah has shown what real leadership looks like, urging us to turn away from division and choose a path where politics doesn’t feel like rage. And just like Governor Cox, I call on every American, in every party, to lower the temperature on our politics. Let us honor our democracy – and the lives touched by this loss – by choosing civility over chaos, and respect over hatred. Thank you for joining me in condemning this violence. With resolve, Dick | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut Blumenthal for Connecticut 1111 Summer Street Suite 301 Stamford, CT 06905 United States

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: I’m making an important announcement tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
And I want you to be among the first to hear about it. |
#
---
Peter, Our justice system should be fair, effective, and focused on keeping our community safe while addressing the root causes of crime. That means fighting for real mental health resources, ensuring transparency in law enforcement, and expanding proven alternatives that reduce repeat offenses that hold people in a cycle of trouble. Here in Wake County, justice shouldn’t be reserved for the well-connected or only for those who can afford it. It should work for all of us. That’s why I believe it’s so important that we keep raising our voices and standing up for the policies that will make our community stronger and safer. [**And tomorrow, I’ll have some big news to share about the next step in that fight. I want you to be one of the first to hear it. We’re not quite ready to share every detail yet — but you can click here to let me know you’re in.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115254601/569701751/2106668299?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_NOA_AC_20250915_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTQxYjJhNy00NDkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R5qcRwA4XUDuiwdEjT8ZVyqEcIEWkGPfiDz_NEyyrik=&emci=555e7752-3a92-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=6141b2a7-4492-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=28008880) | [CLICK HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115254605/569701763/2106668299?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_NOA_AC_20250915_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTQxYjJhNy00NDkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R5qcRwA4XUDuiwdEjT8ZVyqEcIEWkGPfiDz_NEyyrik=&emci=555e7752-3a92-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=6141b2a7-4492-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=28008880)

name: research@voteractionproject.org
subject: Nonprofit, independent voter data verification system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
CNN: Florida, West Virginia and Missouri withdraw from bipartisan effort aimed at maintaining accurate voter rolls [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/CNN_ERIC_Withdrawl.png]
The Electronic Registration Information Center, also known as ERIC, is a nonprofit system that helps participating states keep their registration rolls accurate and up to date by analyzing voter data and sharing reports with members , in order for them to update their voter rolls, remove ineligible voters and investigate potential voter fraud.
States from Florida, West Virginia and Missouri to Alabama, Louisiana and Texas withdrew in the last few years. Virginia withdrew as well, and after the state legislature passed a bill last year to rejoin, their governor, an opponent of voting rights, vetoed the bill. Critics of the withdrawals have argued that leaving ERIC will make it harder to verify that voter rolls are up to date in each state .
We want to hear from voters in your area about this tactic. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Will states regret leaving this nonprofit, nonpartisan voter data partnership?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=091525_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=091525_1no&amount=15]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091525_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091525_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

body:
We're fighting for you, for them, for everyone | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115255358/569704328/2141984067?sourceid=1150888&utm_campaign=26emama-0905aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjUwMmIxNC00NTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=edM4x43-0WchSaxv8IRysA3wPtMDb-XKOP0d1E_c7Os=&emci=6f93df9a-cc8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9b502b14-4592-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115255363/569704332/2141984067?sourceid=1150888&utm_campaign=26emama-0905aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjUwMmIxNC00NTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=edM4x43-0WchSaxv8IRysA3wPtMDb-XKOP0d1E_c7Os=&emci=6f93df9a-cc8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9b502b14-4592-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

Abortion pills are a lifeline for millions. They save lives. They protect health. They give people control over their futures.

[**That's why extremists are determined to take them away. And that's why we refuse to let them. So, are you with us?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115255369/569704337/1824768205?sourceid=1150888&utm_campaign=26emama-0905aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjUwMmIxNC00NTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=edM4x43-0WchSaxv8IRysA3wPtMDb-XKOP0d1E_c7Os=&emci=6f93df9a-cc8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9b502b14-4592-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) | [**DEFEND MEDICATION ABORTION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115255374/569704343/1824768205?sourceid=1150888&utm_campaign=26emama-0905aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjUwMmIxNC00NTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=edM4x43-0WchSaxv8IRysA3wPtMDb-XKOP0d1E_c7Os=&emci=6f93df9a-cc8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9b502b14-4592-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237 "DEFEND MEDICATION ABORTION")
---
**This fight is about protecting the health and autonomy of millions.**
* For those living in rural areas, abortion pills are often the _only_ path to care.
* For people struggling to make ends meet, medication abortion provides a lower-cost alternative to in-clinic care that is equally safe and effective.
* For patients in every corner of the country who deserve abortion care without needing to travel, wait, or face judgment.
* For those experiencing pregnancy loss, medication abortion is often an essential part of miscarriage treatment.

[**This is who we are fighting for.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115255380/569704348/1824768205?sourceid=1150888&utm_campaign=26emama-0905aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjUwMmIxNC00NTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=edM4x43-0WchSaxv8IRysA3wPtMDb-XKOP0d1E_c7Os=&emci=6f93df9a-cc8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9b502b14-4592-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) **Their rights matter._YOUR_ rights matter.**

If you refuse to hand over your rights to politicians and extremists, fight with the Center right now.

[**Help us prepare for the next wave of legal battles and defend medication abortion before it's too late.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115255382/569704354/1824768205?sourceid=1150888&utm_campaign=26emama-0905aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjUwMmIxNC00NTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=edM4x43-0WchSaxv8IRysA3wPtMDb-XKOP0d1E_c7Os=&emci=6f93df9a-cc8d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9b502b14-4592-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

In solidarity,

Center for Reproductive Rights

clean_body: We're fighting for you, for them, for everyone | | | ---|--- Peter, Abortion pills are a lifeline for millions. They save lives. They protect health. They give people control over their futures. | "DEFEND MEDICATION ABORTION" This fight is about protecting the health and autonomy of millions. For those living in rural areas, abortion pills are often the only path to care. For people struggling to make ends meet, medication abortion provides a lower-cost alternative to in-clinic care that is equally safe and effective. For patients in every corner of the country who deserve abortion care without needing to travel, wait, or face judgment. For those experiencing pregnancy loss, medication abortion is often an essential part of miscarriage treatment. Their rights matter.YOUR rights matter. If you refuse to hand over your rights to politicians and extremists, fight with the Center right now. In solidarity, Center for Reproductive Rights "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. | | This is a people-powered movement. I say it a lot because I'm so proud that we've built this movement together without a dime of corporate PAC money. **That grassroots energy is what took us all the way to the Senate — and it's what will carry us through the critical battles ahead.** Donald Trump and his allies will stop at nothing to stack the deck for the wealthy and well-connected while silencing the voices of working families. They'll throw everything they can at us, but I believe in something stronger: the power of people standing together and building grassroots strength that billionaires and corporate special interests can't buy. * * *

subject: Why we’re setting a mid-month fundraising goal

body:
We’re aiming for $3,000 in grassroots contributions by tonight |

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues for Biden Justice Department Last-Minute January 6 Targeting
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it filed a Freedom of Information (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for records on accelerated January 6 prosecutions after Donald Trump was elected president in November 2024 (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice(No. 1:25-cv-02161)).

### [Democrat Ruben Gallego Files Legislation to Block Military Funeral Honors for Ashli Babbitt ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76602&L=36079&F=H&&hash=3c6acedfeb244262d5491e2163ba48863a5da400d4ea715a3ae4e67bbca18c8c) Breitbart In a letter to the Babbitt family posted by Judicial Watch, Lohmeier stated, “After reviewing the circumstances of Ashli’s death, and considering the information that has come forward since then, I am persuaded that the previous determination was incorrect.”

The Pentagon initially denied the Babbitt family’s request for military funeral honors for her. It stated in a letter that the circumstances preceding her death — that she was “fatally shot after having illegally entered” the Capitol — resulted in the determination that conferring the honor would “bring discredit on the Air Force.” The letter was posted by Judicial Watch, a Washington, D.C.-based conservative legal group, that lobbied for the Pentagon to provide honors to Babbitt. In its request to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, the organization cited President Trump’s clemency for more than 1,500 Jan. 6 defendants. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76602&L=36079&F=H&&hash=3c6acedfeb244262d5491e2163ba48863a5da400d4ea715a3ae4e67bbca18c8c)

### [Concerned Parents of Il., Judicial Watch win as D181 adds opt-out option for inappropriate class, library materials ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76602&L=36044&F=H&&hash=264d107a525b43512d82437f44f1ee9ee1d3602c5ad7f27f48461fd6865fa3ed) Dupage Policy Journal “By standing firm, we forced them to change, and today, parents in D181 finally have the right to shield their children from this age-inappropriate agenda,” McCloy said. “This is what happens when moms fight together for parental rights and never back down. Thank you to Judicial Watch for standing with parents and defending their rights, and to D181 for finally listening to its parents.”

With the help of Judicial Watch Senior Attorney Michael Bekesha, McCloy began pressing the district to respect her rights to opt out of exposing her child to such materials. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76602&L=36044&F=H&&hash=264d107a525b43512d82437f44f1ee9ee1d3602c5ad7f27f48461fd6865fa3ed)

U.S. Department of Justice(No. 1:25-cv-02161)). | | | Because no one is above the law! | Sep 15, 2025 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced that it filed a Freedom of Information (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for records on accelerated January 6 prosecutions after Donald Trump was elected president in November 2024 (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:25-cv-02161)). ---|--- | | | | | Over a decade after legislation was introduced in Congress to contain an epidemic of federal workers watching pornography on government computers, the nation’s Homeland Security Secretary has fired numerous employees “for consuming pornographic content during work hours while on government issued devices,” according to statement issued a few days ago by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS). ---|--- | | | | | Although the Defense Authorization Act signed by former President Biden blocks the U.S. Military’s healthcare system from providing specialized treatments to the transgender children of service members, three families are suing the Department of Defense (DOD) to reinstate the benefit, claiming they have been left with “significant” and “crushing out-of-pocket costs.” Leftist groups were outraged when the measure passed late last year and called on Biden to veto it because it bans the military’s Tricare Health Plan from covering gender-affirming care such as hormone therapy and puberty-suppressants to treat “gender dysphoria.” ---|--- | | | | | “Marwan was a high-profile international terrorist on the FBI’s Most Wanted list with a $5 million reward,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. “The operation that brought him down over a decade ago was a major event in Philippine and U.S. counterterrorism history. It’s time for transparency.” ---|--- | | | Breitbart In a letter to the Babbitt family posted by Judicial Watch, Lohmeier stated, “After reviewing the circumstances of Ashli’s death, and considering the information that has come forward since then, I am persuaded that the previous determination was incorrect.” The Pentagon initially denied the Babbitt family’s request for military funeral honors for her. It stated in a letter that the circumstances preceding her death — that she was “fatally shot after having illegally entered” the Capitol — resulted in the determination that conferring the honor would “bring discredit on the Air Force.” The letter was posted by Judicial Watch, a Washington, D.C.-based conservative legal group, that lobbied for the Pentagon to provide honors to Babbitt. In its request to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, the organization cited President Trump’s clemency for more than 1,500 Jan. 6 defendants. Dupage Policy Journal “By standing firm, we forced them to change, and today, parents in D181 finally have the right to shield their children from this age-inappropriate agenda,” McCloy said. “This is what happens when moms fight together for parental rights and never back down. Thank you to Judicial Watch for standing with parents and defending their rights, and to D181 for finally listening to its parents.” With the help of Judicial Watch Senior Attorney Michael Bekesha, McCloy began pressing the district to respect her rights to opt out of exposing her child to such materials. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Why I keep asking.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
You can make the difference.
#
I don’t mess around with something as important as representing the people of North Carolina, Peter.
Every race I’ve ever run, I’ve been in it to win — even when the odds seemed long. You’ve been there with me every time, and together, we’ve succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. **[So when I ask you to split a donation between our campaign and State Democrats Committee, it’s because your contribution could make the difference between victory and defeat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94985?refcode=em20250915-9425&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9425%2E614464%2EXGIKFY)**
**Republicans see me as the top challenger to their Senate majority.** They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win. That means national attention will be on us.
I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you.
Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend _hundreds of millions_ against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead.
**[I am asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and State Democrats Committee today because we can’t afford to leave this race up to chance — or up to Republicans’ deep-pocketed donors and their dark-money groups. We can win this race, but ONLY if we stick together. Please, give what you can today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94985?refcode=em20250915-9425&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9425%2E614464%2EXGIKFY)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94986?refcode=em20250915-9425&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9425%2E614464%2EXGIKFY) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94986?refcode=em20250915-9425&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9425%2E614464%2EXGIKFY) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94985?refcode=em20250915-9425&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9425%2E614464%2EXGIKFY)
---
I deeply appreciate all your support,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94985?refcode=em20250915-9425&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=9425%2E614464%2EXGIKFY)

This morning, I woke up and read Psalm 91:
> _He who dwells in the secret place of the Most High shall remain stable and fixed under the shadow of the Almighty. I will say of the Lord, He is my refuge and my fortress, my God; on Him I lean and rely and in Him I trust. For then He will deliver you from the snare of the fowler and from the deadly pestilence. He will cover you with His feathers, and under His wings you shall trust and find refuge. His truth and His faithfulness are a shield and a buckler._
As I read those words, my heart whispered to the Lord: _What about Charlie? Did You do all this for him? Why was he taken in the way that he was?_
And in that quiet space, I felt the reminder settle in my heart: _I believe You, Lord. I believe Your Word. I believe You are my refuge and my fortress. You are my God. I believe I can trust You. I believe You will protect me and mine. I believe You give Your angels charge over us. I don 't just believe it as rote memory--I have seen it; I have experienced it. I have known You to be faithful._
Then came another reminder: _We each have a race to run._ Charlie ran his race. Scripture tells us that every person has a time appointed--our first breath and our last are known by God. For some, it is at four years old. For others, at thirty-one. For my grandmother, it was ninety-nine. Every single day is written down before one of them comes to pass.
Charlie's days were in God's hands. And how extraordinary that Charlie's final breath was spent living his purpose--calling people to think more deeply about truth, urging a generation off the couch and showing us all how to run into the battle of ideas.
That is no small thing.
_Lord, let it be said of me, when my race is done and I take my final breath, that I too ran the race set before me --faithfully, and with purpose. Amen._

clean_body: This morning, I woke up and read Psalm 91: | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | | Sep 15 | | | | | | | | | | | | This morning, I woke up and read Psalm 91: He who dwells in the secret place of the Most High shall remain stable and fixed under the shadow of the Almighty. I will say of the Lord, He is my refuge and my fortress, my God; on Him I lean and rely and in Him I trust. For then He will deliver you from the snare of the fowler and from the deadly pestilence. He will cover you with His feathers, and under His wings you shall trust and find refuge. His truth and His faithfulness are a shield and a buckler. As I read those words, my heart whispered to the Lord: What about Charlie? Did You do all this for him? Why was he taken in the way that he was? And in that quiet space, I felt the reminder settle in my heart: I believe You, Lord. I believe Your Word. I believe You are my refuge and my fortress. You are my God. I believe I can trust You. I believe You will protect me and mine. I believe You give Your angels charge over us. I don 't just believe it as rote memory--I have seen it; I have experienced it. I have known You to be faithful. Then came another reminder: We each have a race to run. Charlie ran his race. Scripture tells us that every person has a time appointed--our first breath and our last are known by God. For some, it is at four years old. For others, at thirty-one. For my grandmother, it was ninety-nine. Every single day is written down before one of them comes to pass. Charlie's days were in God's hands. And how extraordinary that Charlie's final breath was spent living his purpose--calling people to think more deeply about truth, urging a generation off the couch and showing us all how to run into the battle of ideas. That is no small thing. Lord, let it be said of me, when my race is done and I take my final breath, that I too ran the race set before me --faithfully, and with purpose. Amen. | | ---|---|--- Stay connected: Website: Twitter: Audacy: Instagram: Facebook: This Substack is reader-supported. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Kathy Barnette Be Better America, P.O. Box 659, Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006 ? ?

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Justice, accountability, transparency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
The Trump administration is still not being honest. |
#
---
Peter, Donald Trump and his Department of Justice can claim that the Epstein files are a “hoax” all they want,**but I’m standing firm with my House colleagues in our fight for transparency.** Despite making the release of the Epstein Files a major campaign issue, Trump, his administration, and complicit Republicans in Congress are involved in a major cover-up to protect President Trump himself — who, it turns out, is all over the files. Chairman James Comer and his Oversight Committee Republicans claim they are demanding the release of the full Epstein files, and the DOJ _claims_ that it is releasing the files. **Both are patently false. And this is important. ** Comer’s investigation, as now authorized by all Republicans in the House, does _not_ include requests for: 1.) Documents explaining how and why the investigation was opened in 2004;
2.) Witness statements and interviews; and
3.) Recordings and photographs. Those are the precise categories of evidence where Donald Trump would show up in the files — which AG Pam Bondi and FBI Director Kash Patel know because they have been exhaustively reviewed. And that is why the discharge petition is so important: it requires the DOJ to turn over _all_ of the documents, not just the ones that don’t include Donald Trump. **[House Republicans are too spineless to stand up to this extremism and have enabled him to disregard our Constitution. Pitch in right now to help me stand up for our democracy:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115258700/569714535/2132766433?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250915_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWIwZWNmOS00YTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6UbgcfuCrZ4afmUyEMTnoblNCFu9aYKKIxYl5-nn-Dw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115258701/569714536/2132766433?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250915_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWIwZWNmOS00YTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6UbgcfuCrZ4afmUyEMTnoblNCFu9aYKKIxYl5-nn-Dw=)

clean_body: We’re officially halfway through the month, and this is the moment when campaigns either keep momentum rolling... or start to fall behind. | = | Peter, We’re officially halfway through the month, and this is the moment when campaigns either keep momentum rolling... or start to fall behind. = | = I’m proud of what we’ve built so far. In just a few months, we’ve earned endorsements from Rep. Susan Wild, EMILYs List, Latino Victory Fund, BOLD PAC, and local leaders from across the district. National Journal even rated Ryan Mackenzie as one of the most vulnerable Republicans seeking re-election. But endorsements and ratings alone don’t win elections — resources do. And right now, our campaign is behind on our monthly fundraising goal. = | | | = | = | = | = | = I know we can flip this district together. Gratefully, Carol * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O. Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: My cries will echo around the world like a battle cry.

We will never surrender. Ever.

Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. ** They didn't just try to silence a man... They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... ****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die. **_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[ **I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=fb4846c0d7054d3a81b7cb61078bea0b&_e=MvOu89PRYrIA_0dllJqron6bOohe2r9lmSOUhCb8UeWJ6x8LRBf5689ewtbhMhUp6BPX4ce4Wbu23ZhVNcXdl-wlrNNOEYY0Vu4PwTktaYdEusRwjWdMRNh0Nq6tHzorWIOnlqwQo9JJmbnnA7t1XYlFXtetNWvxL4F6HXqUUYG7g6bFpD2krvTcSbG0qmZTHMmV-jeLJOftIFPVU0w442_qqPUkkZ78VrYcxg51e1frzUPs0WDzNoOh399HqWD2P38Qk0-yYsLHqYWXAIn4T6pGgmULHc98dqPLZh3QoOO2KigZJFVlC1bT_-1P6fChySSPyLm9uR-43ZBi2SXi3JBUfd3a0oRWw-ybKezmLPRDO5XY2H1KilIC3MDm7uzYGuI6uEqct9D-13yt757EVk5XnRW6Rk0nD81ceFmgNBRRkHdt8qx6uVneMc0z6RX-AeRPoTvXbBV11un0P323qDRfJ4BFS6pn1eNWv4M2URdP7DC3b2BMsCXZHducHjX9cqEdHNwlspTkuyf24EC-tUty2DkSs52HjbBLlMXiyjutMQdPgbEODWq-S3NUl2EtLmhUWFhQ1eH2XoCMHiY4ABxkT7Wsis2TZgzh4eNgrj5XmFWrFt8ffwqg2VobcEBoMHocN-QjUkmZn6wbQjaBKyQSVuLWOsFpKTdpG_jYw6mvrJew5zC_1c4bu_apjClXSEQ1_uVaP5sDxKfXY_ELkQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED. We will never surrender. Ever. | Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, I need you to listen closely... Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. They didn't just try to silence a man... They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED. Not just across this country...But in me . They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die. I refuse to let that happen. And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life. Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie, Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family P.S. Charlie always said: " Never surrender." He built something bigger than himself -- and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie's vision die... 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Dexter HQ
subject: SCOTUS handed Trump another win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
The conservative-stacked Supreme Court handed Donald Trump another victory by overturning a federal judge’s ban on ICE agents conducting indiscriminate immigration-related stops in Los Angeles.
What does that mean? Armed and masked ICE agents can now racially profile people with “reasonable suspicion” in California. In short, they can stop someone based on certain factors, like if they work a specific job, look a certain way, or speak a certain language.
It’s an attack on our basic rights—and another sign that the Republican majority in Congress and on the Supreme Court won’t lift a finger to protect us from Trump’s unlawful overreach.
Trump is sending the National Guard into our cities for no justifiable reason. He’s cherry-picking anecdotes and using dog whistles to justify his ICE raids to grab media attention, frighten communities, and make himself appear strong. And it’s no coincidence that Los Angeles and Washington, D.C. are some of our most diverse cities.
These are strongman tactics by the weakest president we’ve ever seen.
Now, he’s threatening to send forces into Memphis—and other major cities like Portland could be next.
Only authoritarians threaten to turn a country’s armed forces against their own citizens.
We can take back the House and re-establish guardrails for our democracy, but we can’t do it without you. Will you help us power our campaign and stand up for our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250915_occupation_actrs]

A Democrat **billionaire** is suing me.

Stephen Cloobeck — a megadonor and candidate for governor — is suing our campaign because he doesn’t like the clothes I wear on the campaign trail.
[](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/SSiHL1IeIruvkhQkqsd57Bf-dna6RXM7ssikioSJH9IQ5hiO_-SqOKMAbqvD4jWg4DvmcynUpk6eqZMhAnD57MOkCH2ZlLSEPaPp_qUVPZPARYkgMVpZeFKSjwxEiE9zVF0o-o_vVnK_VQXnu2brvAjopcDvOHIpZjfjdzFvXHzBwoAonbRlyotoTlVeJGtJxepwIVlBIqeZavo0WFmI-ZPsioYzULbpqsZ_t65kekhzwWfLpYNwGhzgYgsXt9wYydivOz0B09rY745JWfESuCPN5KPT38j16p1BbUB5FQEja5sIrtV-W6XylLZRVfcS-hhYAFFmeRNegg4kK6fe_2wTDmYdwJbBBHH3XC-Nofs23R6UOfTwPNKXBQAgunf0K4j-A-XkalscLNTMKpaVOgTDHCLRF13qQh7_Oy3aPXrk1tTcpMvCBDU843fQd76h6Mm1HRWsuLqfmclZyIFjqItp9SvmGvDRtWyvsl_za_na_L8po2wBr2q5_G_LpVqs0u1IYI_U6nmJtPxBprBQbQDCfoyEq4X-ji3dg0EPL7hAiIv94d9NOBQ/qJC6Vky_OmuNON424wJbjzcaJwlGQ1g2/12)
This lawsuit has no merit. It’s lawfare. **But he has billions of dollars to waste on political stunts.** We can’t ignore this lawsuit. We can’t afford to spend precious time in court defending ourselves against a rich clown. We have to crush this NOW.

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: Make a gift for cleaner air today!
body:
Hi Peter,
The Trump administration is attacking our climate once again, attempting to roll back the Endangerment Finding, which gives the EPA authority to regulate climate pollution. This change will undo standards that limit pollution from cars and trucks, power plants, and other sources of climate pollution, worsening the climate crisis and increasing the risk of severe health conditions like asthma and lung cancer. Put bluntly, they are trying to roll back the legal bedrock for climate action and in doing so will make all of us sicker, our air dirtier, and leave communities facing even more climate disasters.
The deadline for public comments on Trump’s Climate Chaos Plan is coming up on September 22nd and we need your help again! Will you make a generous contribution right now so we can safeguard our future and clean air before it’s too late? [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2]
Give now [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=BJNfk6XvjK6OXN157rVvfzkfmJLarUThNiQ7VXTz+qyw6ms+YScy7JzXpFr9N6Olb+2mq8y/muiycInZTkHmkMC1rHxPO5HvfOjch+a0M7d3R3dBVJo37nBIcKrx+TlQ]
https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=BJNfk6XvjK6OXN157rVvfzkfmJLarUThNiQ7VXTz+qyw6ms+YScy7JzXpFr9N6Olb+2mq8y/muiycInZTkHmkMC1rHxPO5HvfOjch+a0M7d3R3dBVJo37nBIcKrx+TlQ [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=BJNfk6XvjK6OXN157rVvfzkfmJLarUThNiQ7VXTz+qyw6ms+YScy7JzXpFr9N6Olb+2mq8y/muiycInZTkHmkMC1rHxPO5HvfOjch+a0M7d3R3dBVJo37nBIcKrx+TlQ]
OLCV is fighting hard against the proposal to eliminate the Endangerment Finding, that authorizes the EPA to regulate climate pollution, as well as the additional proposal to roll back federal minimum vehicle standards for greenhouse gas emissions ( read more here [https://www.epa.gov/regulations-emissions-vehicles-and-engines/proposed-rule-reconsideration-2009-endangerment-finding] ). Our members alone have sent nearly 600 messages to the EPA.
But it still may not be enough. That’s why we need your gift now so we can double that number! Your support truly makes all the difference in this fight. [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2]
The clock is ticking – we need to get as many public comments against the proposal to eliminate the Endangerment Finding as we can! Can you give what you can now? [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2]
Give now [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=BJNfk6XvjK6OXN157rVvfzkfmJLarUThNiQ7VXTz+qyw6ms+YScy7JzXpFr9N6Olb+2mq8y/muiycInZTkHmkMC1rHxPO5HvfOjch+a0M7d3R3dBVJo37nBIcKrx+TlQ]
These are all attacks we’ve seen before from the fossil fuel industry: from the uphill battle to pass a climate and justice focused transportation package, to the attack on Clean Vehicle Waivers and state-level vehicle emission standards. We’ve done this before, and we can do it again, but not without you.
It’s more important than ever that Oregon continues to lead on climate. We cannot let Trump's Climate Chaos Plan win. Make your gift now to fight for clean air, before it’s too late! [https://secure.everyaction.com/rbY6SfJn4EmZpm6v2q-QSw2]
Thank you for your support,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Lindsey.png]

subject: Ciattarelli is scrambling before Election Day
body:
Hit the road, Jack |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115262616/569728354/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE924_20250915_JackHiding_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056992&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWJjNmY0My01MDkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l_UnLLWiYONcCF-Of6yJuB-oZOdd08prO44fVm_DO2c=) Peter, **Jack Ciattarelli** , the Republican nominee in New Jersey's governor race, is trying to hide his anti-abortion record from voters.

We know this playbook all too well: **Extremists try to hide their record when Election Day is coming. But EMILYs List is setting the record straight so voters know the truth.** ****[**Before I tell you more about Ciattarelli's attempts to deceive voters, will you chip in to help elect EMILYs List women and defeat anti-choice extremists?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115262617/569728355/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE924_20250915_JackHiding_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056992&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWJjNmY0My01MDkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l_UnLLWiYONcCF-Of6yJuB-oZOdd08prO44fVm_DO2c=)**** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115262618/569728356/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE924_20250915_JackHiding_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056992&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWJjNmY0My01MDkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l_UnLLWiYONcCF-Of6yJuB-oZOdd08prO44fVm_DO2c=)
---
Ciattarelli has a long record of opposing reproductive freedom. He advocated for defunding Planned Parenthood and has donated to anti-abortion politicians across the country.

Now, with the governor's race heating up, Ciattarelli is scrambling to convince voters he's "pro-choice." _But his record is hiding in plain sight._

**Meanwhile, Mikie Sherrill has never wavered as a pro-choice champion.** She's standing strong to protect reproductive rights in New Jersey, and EMILYs List is proud to stand with her.

Defeating Ciattarelli's well-funded campaign is going to take everything we've got, and we have less than two months to make sure voters know the truth about his dangerous record. I can't stress this enough: This race is not a sure thing for Democrats, and the numbers will tighten before Election Day. We absolutely _cannot_ sit this one out.
****[**Donate now to support candidates like Mikie and EMILYs List women up and down the ballot in this final critical stretch:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115262619/569728357/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE924_20250915_JackHiding_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056992&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWJjNmY0My01MDkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l_UnLLWiYONcCF-Of6yJuB-oZOdd08prO44fVm_DO2c=)****

clean_body: Hit the road, Jack | = Peter, Jack Ciattarelli , the Republican nominee in New Jersey's governor race, is trying to hide his anti-abortion record from voters. We know this playbook all too well: Extremists try to hide their record when Election Day is coming. But EMILYs List is setting the record straight so voters know the truth. **= | = Ciattarelli has a long record of opposing reproductive freedom. He advocated for defunding Planned Parenthood and has donated to anti-abortion politicians across the country. Now, with the governor's race heating up, Ciattarelli is scrambling to convince voters he's "pro-choice." But his record is hiding in plain sight. Meanwhile, Mikie Sherrill has never wavered as a pro-choice champion. She's standing strong to protect reproductive rights in New Jersey, and EMILYs List is proud to stand with her. Defeating Ciattarelli's well-funded campaign is going to take everything we've got, and we have less than two months to make sure voters know the truth about his dangerous record. I can't stress this enough: This race is not a sure thing for Democrats, and the numbers will tighten before Election Day. We absolutely cannot sit this one out. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for your support, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, Federal and Gubernatorial, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Patriot,

President Trump was just ordered to reverse the deportation of over one million illegal immigrants - listing them as under "Temporary Protected Status (TPS)".

Please take a moment to read the DHS statement:

---
| | [Read The Official DHS Statement](http://click.info.hageman4wyoming.net/?qs=d2a64bf34c1015071afd46708a0d42b9c35d8d1f4c807fb14c25837c079c36acfc5486d735cadc4fbfbf1a438f367e13b117b1c2001dc4650c9440ba1d5bcd5b)

At midnight tonight, this ruling could become permanent and irreversible.

We cannot allow one million illegal immigrants to go free.

At the time of your reading, we are currently **3,911 signatures away from our 500,000-signature** goal to reverse the ruling.

We’ll be brief.

Republicans just announced record-breaking fundraising numbers. They’re gearing up to spend big right here in Michigan because they know our state is the key to flipping the House.

Hillary is the first woman and mother to represent West Michigan in Congress, and she’s laser-focused on flipping Michigan’s three competitive seats blue and taking back the House right here at home.

name: Bryan & Reagan at Crosstabs
subject: The under-the-radar battles changing Oregon politics
body:
It's not the headlines -- it's what's happening underneath them. We uncover the moves driving Salem's biggest shifts.
[ ](http://tracking.crosstabs.studio/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MeDypBs01om43JmbFfCbHN_GPMEBJxI5xD1pnwZ2gAJGLmvvXbnBp6AP0tpIbjMP1Q8yxL41mCTvGOyFfxNpRE7cDxd07S8FSn_0VqYqElepfE6pE1E_gHcohToV6kEKIhwwIEVNIMpeVAzC7MIa7IUFwqfFo_W1y4V93-7MmGvt6LUNzm0Ma-so_E0EERhOX_20)
---
**Crosstabs Studio** takes you inside the conversations shaping Oregon's political landscape. Hosted by Reagan Knopp and Bryan Iverson, the show goes beyond surface-level headlines to deliver sharp analysis, insider context, and unfiltered discussions you won't find anywhere else. Check out our three latest episodes -- covering the toughest gas tax vote yet, a Rule 27 complaint that shook the House, and a potential Senate leadership shake-up.
---
[ ](http://tracking.crosstabs.studio/tracking/click?d=-abOFQ7LQD8WTua3CYBqYZpWY9x-AXf_MSA62ODrC7G045_QZmVyD8DIiy3Oc6-WJyTnBKArozLm8zhb69VQezl_EvA_xRxXkx_1o9o7ls4A1Q4UoE4fr8ziDz9zbQByNq8RCQyRBYYotsPI5dXQQd0mBrWLTwHIpJtRZi667X-PNlVNROIWDUHAXyTBOJAlKwKBVDFVDy1dhc--ZexpzxHx6lonmLFRGQM-G04OcETjCRzm_UjZlmYr6lmdeK909Q2) Representative Javadi - Cruising Down the Highway SEPTEMBER 03, 2025 He said it was the toughest vote he's ever had to take. Get an **in-depth view** of his thinking on **gas taxes, roads, and ODOT**. Reagan Knopp and Bryan Iverson bring you the full interview -- not just quick radio sound bites.
---
[ ](http://tracking.crosstabs.studio/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MeDypBs01om43JmbFfCbHN_9UlCBQRSKCp_wZXmZ4tonDzkmNPbSzlKX82tHUblPLLM_v68j3zk96k6mN6OGi4D0EilHbBeBZ88uPyZ8ZC6_SAHNp2WFSwh6MwMJJElzV53nWIi7HCBLZr2DQ-gCA_jXLnCU6LrZyzrF2z76TVMfPdMMg_yPVGsmF8iylAzQ5QB0) Terrible Sausage with Dirk VanderHart AUGUST 21, 2025 Reagan, Bryan, and Dirk break down the big stories in Oregon politics, including:
* The floor debate that escalated into a Rule 27 complaint
* Could there be a **shake-up in leadership** inside the Senate Democrat Caucus?

---
[ ](http://tracking.crosstabs.studio/tracking/click?d=AuKIoPCUbUS4T__vuMqXmtqEBEFpDffB189qE9w44MeDypBs01om43JmbFfCbHN_bq-eiIF4nkLQNwLpkhmysmrWlYGe0LMfJikUvC9r8shclRvCt7cy_VPP5DSYmmMnsFqDDLn69zjKfyQJyRHxaAcx96gGyThI85eo8zG8Y2pmqebSX0xY0a7vTjrV_IvBrF3wef2ehtQhOh4sgMq_yv5An4HofZjf46lr95UolQe_0) Life, Liberty, and The Pursuit of Special Session AUGUST 15, 2025 In Oregon, there's one podcast that breaks the fourth wall. Reagan Knopp and Bryan Iverson -- staffers, insiders, campaigners, and behind-the-scenes voices -- unpack the real conversations shaping Republican politics today. **Plus, we cover:**
* Which groups spent the most money lobbying -- setting a 10-year record
* Kotek warns Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill" could slash $15 billion in federal funding to Oregon

**Candidate Tracker:**

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: All of us will miss Charlie. None of us will ever forget him.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2079jaufwbt22r1o18hk10oytlak3f57hubz4damcno0b1la78lvg8q2sbaeult4gfhph2nie2wobdagu5j&__stmp=t2n28r&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2n28r&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3ykociqguqcmgxndt21pohb07kcatvndn7q22u2gnza87kf6j53kaakjo2tyaynu2u8wx3iaa721g2usl4oqa34qkx324rsqn6axi5wiac07c7m7yr8wldm8afzl7z4ugy1jqwkgx3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2n28r&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2n28r&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2n28r&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2n28r&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3ykociqguqcmgxndt21pohb07kcatvndn7q22u2gnza87kf6j53kaakjo2tyaynu2u8wx3iaa721g2usl4oqa34qkx324rsqn6axi5wiac07c7m7yr8wldm8afzl7z4ugy1jqwkgx3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2n28r&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2n28r&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
We’re grateful to everyone who took the time to respond to our survey, and today, we want to share what we heard. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115263268/569730424/651002513?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODk3ZTRjYy01MjkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=09L1t01Vw47t0uy7vDM4EQUxdcNsSyLbJXY5Oy7_Tdc=)
---
Peter,
Last week, we asked you to share what’s on your mind right now. We’re grateful to everyone who took the time to respond to our survey, and today, we want to share what we heard.
You made it clear that your top priority is protecting our democracy and defending the right to vote. You also told us you care deeply about advancing common-sense gun safety measures, standing up for immigrants, and tackling climate change.
You also talked about the challenges you’re facing and worries that weigh heavily on you, including rising costs, federal overreach, and threats to Social Security and Medicare. Many of you expressed concerns about the future of our country and the safety of your loved ones and neighbors — especially children, LGBTQ+ individuals, and immigrants.
But despite all of your fears, many of you shared messages of hope. You talked about the activism of young people, the strength of grassroots organizing, and the resilience of our communities. And you shared appreciation for Minnesota leaders who are standing up to Donald Trump and his MAGA allies.
Your responses showed us you’re ready to stand with Keith as he fights to help Minnesotans afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect. But to win these fights, we need to meet this moment together.
Our records show you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can give $75 (or $150 for couples) to support our campaign and receive a full refund from the state.
[**Will you make a fully refundable $75 contribution to help Keith stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda, uphold the rule of law, and fight for Minnesotans’ rights?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115263273/569730429/1176989868?refcode=body&amount=75&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODk3ZTRjYy01MjkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=09L1t01Vw47t0uy7vDM4EQUxdcNsSyLbJXY5Oy7_Tdc=)

clean_body: We’re grateful to everyone who took the time to respond to our survey, and today, we want to share what we heard. | = Peter, Last week, we asked you to share what’s on your mind right now. We’re grateful to everyone who took the time to respond to our survey, and today, we want to share what we heard. You made it clear that your top priority is protecting our democracy and defending the right to vote. You also told us you care deeply about advancing common-sense gun safety measures, standing up for immigrants, and tackling climate change. You also talked about the challenges you’re facing and worries that weigh heavily on you, including rising costs, federal overreach, and threats to Social Security and Medicare. Many of you expressed concerns about the future of our country and the safety of your loved ones and neighbors — especially children, LGBTQ+ individuals, and immigrants. But despite all of your fears, many of you shared messages of hope. You talked about the activism of young people, the strength of grassroots organizing, and the resilience of our communities. And you shared appreciation for Minnesota leaders who are standing up to Donald Trump and his MAGA allies. Your responses showed us you’re ready to stand with Keith as he fights to help Minnesotans afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect. But to win these fights, we need to meet this moment together. Our records show you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can give $75 (or $150 for couples) to support our campaign and receive a full refund from the state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Team Keith Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: SCOTUS came to Trump’s rescue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
“The Supreme Court has sided with the administration in almost every case that it has been called upon to review since Trump returned to the presidency in January.” | |
---
Peter, **The Supreme Court just came to Trump’s rescue... again.** A lower court recently told Trump that he couldn’t simply decide to withhold foreign aid funding that Congress had passed, and that he must comply with the appropriations process. **Trump ran to the Supreme Court, asking them to give him a pass. Now, Chief Justice John Roberts has stayed the lower court’s ruling, giving them time to rule in Trump’s favor, and giving Trump time to run down the clock.** [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQRQJ7xAsG72ZG69cAzhvl4L5snpCZ3XmhZqwfBZW9dAx6MZsIaJfL-cqpiVneMmmOXhsnK7PQskEnoYWQJFIRi9qiBCw5NefUVRW4TPC3jx7yS1HPel6Tzr3kF0Yan__fxRowcPMUZv7xTAYeCL2GMkOtXM3JYoh5D4274AnHnWDVSWB8OuIMUVpYlp2ictMHt7nb0iePh-l6T6-jy51wVOpa1beSfif965dZT5iUrV5YRMU61eNtoMwnJ1jwuO_55E8h0gGkSbr3l_4-l8BwBeMPKySFsCpG9cEwBotfWF84srdgBIxsZ4aiUeyRLr6RZrxD7ouH0YKMNvNCEf0DOF0sEZGly-GonaaPVLhUqGSQ0WP5YMs_EN-Fmz93GRqL/4jx/fxiHJ2YESs656dPQQIDimQ/h0/h001.s864sK115euto3hyudn35niszODPVsbHfuybv0qrT4k) Trump wants to keep billions of dollars from going to those who need it most because he needs to fund the tax breaks for billionaires he just signed. **But Congress approved this aid—including HIV/AIDS support, peacekeeping efforts, and the promotion of democracy overseas—and it should be spent.** [**Justice Roberts might be willing to throw Trump every bone he begs for. But there’s still time to tell the Supreme Court that we expect them to uphold checks and balances, and enforce the law. Add your name now!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQRQJ7xAsG72ZG69cAzhvl4L5snpCZ3XmhZqwfBZW9dAx6MZsIaJfL-cqpiVneMmmOXhsnK7PQskEnoYWQJFIRi9qiBCw5NefUVRW4TPC3jx7yS1HPel6Tzr3kF0Yan__fxRowcPMUZv7xTAYeCL2GMkjO4Jrq-RVPsqrLWsDXLkqZtKNoonT2SluD3Z15lKQNJsrAEDCslCkd1yvY-1jGYen5PKPKKL4VBfoGv27p2nbw_OfMwD53wECA490A2v3gVwBRABMzb2MH1GCDxWaryWgQ-o3tBwt_Sdv1fmrFq9vH_XZLrt7bNIyT4Ys1emgG-zFLol7Nm-Lgfi_7YmKH4hXroCt3JlGTWQGsKfcqUqBMZBKv5i5ZIXlAtPJIK4BH/4jx/fxiHJ2YESs656dPQQIDimQ/h1/h001.M_LJ_x7_MCervSeKghSEmGwqbuc8Sb7gyO6E7fM_b3E) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQRQJ7xAsG72ZG69cAzhvl4L5snpCZ3XmhZqwfBZW9dAx6MZsIaJfL-cqpiVneMmmOXhsnK7PQskEnoYWQJFIRi9qiBCw5NefUVRW4TPC3jx7yS1HPel6Tzr3kF0Yan__fxRowcPMUZv7xTAYeCL2GMl3HbArDF_k2RaRK4E_brWYX0ZVKy2QB5iq7fuOXJOK8c6wpOZO8up8hH1bVo2EFwBA0L48ciM8h0Inc0iXpHA9ThqDQVe9KfyZ1HP86-t5vomKMOQttcnk7e3t-CsZKukbVLF9_Kp3RuEgPMOF4FFj1W2NX54iDE6lREyDbRIr9fBGfQAWbtte0n4OwtannzhVFypl5E034iRs_0Go7Utm_94A_YuNTANY0_W0lYQZS/4jx/fxiHJ2YESs656dPQQIDimQ/h2/h001.6Y9RwYQdBp2TAgQG1tSUyrYG0S6IH-dXvbI5vwDhF4w) Reuters stated it plainly: “The Supreme Court... has sided with the administration in almost every case that it has been called upon to review since Trump returned to the presidency in January.”1 At this point, Trump knows he can run to the Supreme Court for cover for any illegal activity he wants to do. **But this case is about checks and balances—and whether the Supreme Court will hand Trump the powers the Constitution gives Congress.** Congress approved nearly $12 billion to be spent before September 30. Trump thinks he can delay and frustrate the process until it’s too late and the funding expires. **If the Supreme Court sides with Trump, they’ll approve an illegal executive rescission of Congress-approved funds.** Trump will have permission to hold back any other funds he feels like, with no accountability. [**The Supreme Court needs to know that We the People expect them to defend the Constitution, not take the power of the purse away from Congress and give it to a wannabe dictator. Add your name and demand they unfreeze foreign aid funds now!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xlBV8K-h1SPh5Rb04hGqQRQJ7xAsG72ZG69cAzhvl4L5snpCZ3XmhZqwfBZW9dAx6MZsIaJfL-cqpiVneMmmOXhsnK7PQskEnoYWQJFIRi9qiBCw5NefUVRW4TPC3jx7yS1HPel6Tzr3kF0Yan__fxRowcPMUZv7xTAYeCL2GMsI6G_IkBPvMZBb7bTffG_zKZSXe633T8bVXtkobjWaFMqxGtl6WGb9PvTCHXV-zLNrAjLvOXZ1E1ywu8i2wHE78NYjUUOsNSxfsnKFVceORs8eMSH3kBN2EcT8rjv7q9D5PfBn4ZJ09EjcR4NL_1i6nsTit3iuAVfqkInS0jkXPestVvumTprukBgKd7mP1zp8RBGU23ztOY2uOjBc-jeJLYQ82hT6ZNniGqyOoDnb2/4jx/fxiHJ2YESs656dPQQIDimQ/h3/h001.O2HIqcibI_qW41w4N6fo1vgUM-QjJq9EanOFl9TUorc) Thank you for holding the Supreme Court accountable, Morgan Stahr
