name: WFP Digital Team
subject: We can’t plan for 2026 without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
We need to offer voters a positive vision of a country that works for working people. | | | Before we head into the 2026 midterms, we want to pause and hear from you, Peter. **Yes, it’s only September 2025.** And yes, we still have this November’s elections ahead. But our preparation for 2026 is well underway, and it will be here before we know it. Next year’s elections could decide so much, including whether we take back both chambers of Congress — or watch the far right tighten its grip. **And the way we will win is not just by showing our opposition to Trump and the billionaires, but by offering voters an alternative, positive vision of a country that works for working people.** [**That’s why we’re asking now: Will you take two minutes to fill out our September 2025 WFP Member Survey?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIw00gOUCMtdePZg3Mmex_cuo4pyAJXJz3wEJ5yUtLGSF1JBI7oJMkTkRI9o5XRqDTaDeEIs0g8aJa2cMVLK56RpdZBua8dq6grHpAi3rMWvlUa4kkrj6TskdKJAXLyLwQGLDXFb6RAeD4meTjSTD84ia2kNNmWJWZY-eIc5XeANjfXRdHEvCOaZYsda9Hw5H7D7NJvag3fNMYprjtS0xRNYuVvUXgFn80LKtlnZ9y-ngqZoOw6Fx6rwOBV0nyZ-6TRHdqsO6b8CIj7XZuy_jeG/4jx/kYL2MACKTH2A5D7hrU5X9A/h0/h001.BvsEZ43MWvvgkxiJGUN2FstNWz0ER5z-socnLIQNMtw) **[Take the survey »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIw00gOUCMtdePZg3Mmex_cuo4pyAJXJz3wEJ5yUtLGSF1JBI7oJMkTkRI9o5XRqDTaDeEIs0g8aJa2cMVLK56RpdZBua8dq6grHpAi3rMWvlfu-TFeVYcUTDLrsYNxvSGxVpdLIY_oU_JwGURdPLiuy6z8Ng4P-jq_qmxaFykLXbPs2aGsXmlpMrFnn2uu65hmqAut53p8GfOsnpdK-xPhHfLn2PrCTDHhw19IR9XbT3jOVcnQ8oTJnfeE4PtqVahKnu08R3_apurCn9bMaQ83/4jx/kYL2MACKTH2A5D7hrU5X9A/h1/h001.vdTb6rdrG3NdrOr3FjY6hJw9ocMhLK4TB1-oNphZL2M)** We’re building a movement that is focused on building actual governing power for working people. And in order to do that, we need to know what matters most to you. Here’s a glimpse at a few of the questions we’re asking this month:
* How are you feeling in this moment about our movement to build working-class power in this country — and what suggestions do you have for how we can do a better job?
* Which federal policies would you be most excited to hear candidates get behind? Paid family and medical leave, rent caps, taxing the ultra-rich, cracking down on union-busting, healthcare for all, or something else?
* How would you rate the performance of Democratic leadership in Congress right now?

We’re fighting like hell to stop the chaos under Trump and MAGA Republicans — and to put working people at the center of power. To succeed, we depend on honest, unfiltered feedback from the people who make this movement real. Surveys like this one don’t tell us everything, but they keep us accountable, sharpen our strategy, and make us stronger. **That’s why we ask for your input every month, and it’s why we count and read every response.** [**Take two minutes to share your thoughts in the September 2025 WFP Member Survey now.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIw00gOUCMtdePZg3Mmex_cuo4pyAJXJz3wEJ5yUtLGSF1JBI7oJMkTkRI9o5XRqDTaDeEIs0g8aJa2cMVLK56RpdZBua8dq6grHpAi3rMWvqCd1ZBKus_908s7CYe3fhTnM4VCATgJiacm2AlpjH2bz2cMUF9ikkrIKkpA5oEn6vyz5SNZil9Azd2Wj5gLvo9zBv-QaRjSbuUzJFnuoABnAEdqq9pIqvwVTPWxdO-DE8vzekpX87-WFUM3Yj2jJ8oU7k1e44eoW5qLxfvHlmZK/4jx/kYL2MACKTH2A5D7hrU5X9A/h2/h001.NRJEVBk4Nsv_La0Q27jueDMD_0h4Sb_U36I9-ZOvO6Y) **[Take the survey clean_body: We need to offer voters a positive vision of a country that works for working people. | | | Before we head into the 2026 midterms, we want to pause and hear from you, Peter. Yes, it’s only September 2025. And yes, we still have this November’s elections ahead. But our preparation for 2026 is well underway, and it will be here before we know it. Next year’s elections could decide so much, including whether we take back both chambers of Congress — or watch the far right tighten its grip. And the way we will win is not just by showing our opposition to Trump and the billionaires, but by offering voters an alternative, positive vision of a country that works for working people. We’re building a movement that is focused on building actual governing power for working people. And in order to do that, we need to know what matters most to you. Here’s a glimpse at a few of the questions we’re asking this month: How are you feeling in this moment about our movement to build working-class power in this country — and what suggestions do you have for how we can do a better job? Which federal policies would you be most excited to hear candidates get behind? Paid family and medical leave, rent caps, taxing the ultra-rich, cracking down on union-busting, healthcare for all, or something else? How would you rate the performance of Democratic leadership in Congress right now? We’re fighting like hell to stop the chaos under Trump and MAGA Republicans — and to put working people at the center of power. To succeed, we depend on honest, unfiltered feedback from the people who make this movement real. Surveys like this one don’t tell us everything, but they keep us accountable, sharpen our strategy, and make us stronger. That’s why we ask for your input every month, and it’s why we count and read every response. In solidarity, WFP Digital Team Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: With Honor Action
subject: The Next Battlefield: Cyberspace 💻
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8ac9ebf3ec1d/bats-brews-and-a-birthday-salute-to-the-us-army-14054132?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Friends,

Every day, America faces cyberattacks targeting hospitals, schools, power grids, and even our military. Yet our cyber defenses are scattered across multiple branches of the armed forces, leading to duplication, delays, and dangerous gaps in readiness.

That’s why a bipartisan coalition of veterans in Congress is calling for a bold step forward: the creation of a U.S. Cyber Force—a dedicated branch built to defend America in the digital age. Lawmakers, like For Country Caucus member and former Navy SEAL Rep. Morgan Luttrell, are [pushing](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=43a34349ae&e=33f53a5b1a) the National Academies to assess the feasibility of a Cyber Force and demanding a deadline for action. Recognizing the drive by policymakers for the creation of a Cyber Force, outside Congress, experts at CSIS and the Cyberspace Solarium Commission 2.0 (CSC 2.0) are mapping the practical path to make it real.

It’s about keeping Americans safe from foreign adversaries and criminal hackers who target our economy, infrastructure, and security every single day.

Read more at our website ⬇️

---
| [Defending the Digital Frontlines: Why America Needs a U.S. Cyber Force](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=75ebefbfd7&e=33f53a5b1a "Defending the Digital Frontlines: Why America Needs a U.S. Cyber Force")
---
|
---
|
---
| "What we're trying to answer is the _how_ you build a cyber force." — RADM Mark Montgomery (Ret.)
Senior Director, FDD Center on Cyber and Technology Innovation
---
| In case you missed it, CSIS and CSC 2.0 project at FDD announced the creation of the Commission on Cyber Force Generation earlier this summer.

Recognizing that U.S. military cyber readiness is falling short, the commission is focused not on debating whether a dedicated Cyber Force should exist, but on charting the practical path to make it real. That means defining the structure, roles, and authorities needed to stand it up effectively. With Honor’s Co-founder and CEO, Rye Barcott, will serve on the commission, which will develop actionable recommendations to ensure that if a Cyber Force is established, it’s built on solid foundations rather than from scratch.

Want to learn more? Listen to FDD's Mark Montgomery on the need for the commission below ⬇️

---
| [Watch the Full Call](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=8fc77dc391&e=33f53a5b1a "Watch the Full Call")
---
|
---
| With Honor Commemorates September 11 through Service
---
|
---
| On September 11, With Honor joined staff from the For Country Caucus and volunteers across the nation for the 9/11 Day of Service, the largest, federally-recognized day of charitable service in America. Together with AmeriCorps, Voices for National Service, Blue Star Families, and others around the country, we helped pack more than 9 million meals for families in need, which will be distributed to food banks nationwide.

What began as a way for families of 9/11 victims to honor their loved ones has become a national tradition of unity and service. For us at With Honor, it’s a powerful reminder that even in the face of tragedy, Americans can come together to serve, honor, and strengthen our communities.
---
|
---
| | | | Please follow With Honor Action on Twitter via this [link](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=308ad275a2&e=33f53a5b1a),
and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.

# Hello Capitalists,
### **Here is everything you should be following today:**
* American's crowdfunding charity to the Kirk family smashes records
* Erika Kirk speaks for the first time
* Kirk Investigation expands over possible co-conspirators
* Trump and the UK plan a nuclear AI future together
* Open AI is giving its CEO Altman nightmares

### **Today 's markets:**
* **DOW: 45859.08 ( ⬆️0.05%) - ✅**
* **S &P: 66140.93 (⬆️0.47%) - ✅**
* **NASDAQ: 22338.71 ( ⬆️0.89%) - ✅**
* **CBOE VIX Volatility Index: $15.45 ( ⬆️4.67%) - ⚠️⬆️**

* * *
* * *
# Americans SHATTER crowd funding records for Charlie Kirk's family as memorial date announced
Americans **[shatter crowdfunding records](https://substack.com/redirect/2abfab6d-8dc7-4191-a0cb-1c9b689a5acd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with over $2.8 million raised on GiveSendGo alone to support his grieving family and legacy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e87edd68-435a-4663-ba67-a0b583c1b01e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **GiveSendGo breaks speed record** for fastest fundraising surge, featuring prayer buttons alongside donations to echo Kirk's faith-centered values.
* **GoFundMe verifies legitimacy** with strict anti-fraud policies, channeling $12,000-plus toward wife Erika, children, and university memorial fund.
* **Memorial Date Announced:** Turning Point USA sets **[public service for Kirk on September 21](https://substack.com/redirect/5587c90f-9fd7-4ecc-9004-de49dbac8451?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at Arizona's State Farm Stadium, with President Trump attending to honor the slain leader's legacy.
* **Tributes Surge Nationally:** A vigil at the Kennedy Center was filled to capacity and had multiple speakers from the Trump Administration. Sports events held silences and dedications. A $1 million donation to TPUSA seeks to fund their expansion amid 32,000 new chapter inquiries by young people.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a9aa3896-0fb9-42e4-8657-d1bda65c289e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/976cc174-e824-4b54-84a2-722f27cbb287?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In a **[tearful first public address](https://substack.com/redirect/6399323b-353a-4ca7-ac03-fa998c0f88cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** since conservative leader Charlie Kirk's assassination at Utah Valley University on Wednesday, his widow Erika vowed Friday at Turning Point USA headquarters to amplify his patriotic mission, declaring it "stronger, bolder, louder" amid national grief.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4e14bc76-202d-45de-92fc-c5376daa62a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Vows Movement Endurance:** Erika Kirk promised Charlie's patriotic, faith-driven legacy will expand, refusing to let his influence fade after his death.
* **Details Assassination Motive:** She claimed killers targeted Charlie for preaching love of America and God, warning they've unleashed a fiercer national awakening.
* **Announces Organizational Continuity:** Turning Point USA's fall campus tour, December America Fest in Phoenix, and Charlie's weekly podcast will all proceed as planned.
* **Highlights Personal Legacy:** Praising Charlie as devoted husband and father to two young children, Erika shared their 2018 meeting and her commitment to grow the organization massively.

Conservative firebrand Charlie Kirk was fatally shot onstage during a rally at Utah Valley University in Orem on September 10, prompting a nationwide manhunt that ended with 22-year-old suspect Tyler Robinson's arrest; Utah Gov. Spencer Cox decried the attack as a **["direct assault on America,"](https://substack.com/redirect/1a28f422-366f-463c-95d0-2f6096c4711a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** vowing swift justice as the motive probe deepens.
* **Suspect's Ideology Exposed:** Bullet casings bore anti-fascist inscriptions, linking Robinson to leftist indoctrination, as investigations probe a pre-shooting note and his non-cooperative stance in custody.
* **Suspect's Dark Online Dive:** Robinson immersed in Reddit's shadowy forums and gaming culture, fueling investigators' scrutiny of internet radicalization's role in the violence.
* **Discord Confession Emerges:** Post-shooting chats revealed Robinson joking about the killing before admitting involvement, shocking online acquaintances into aiding authorities.
* **Partner Aids Probe:** Robinson's transgender partner cooperates with FBI, providing access to computers amid mental health evaluations and death penalty considerations urged by leaders.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/bd35bf43-649e-47ef-a499-6994d4919321?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle](https://substack.com/redirect/bd35bf43-649e-47ef-a499-6994d4919321?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/bd35bf43-649e-47ef-a499-6994d4919321?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bd35bf43-649e-47ef-a499-6994d4919321?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/bd35bf43-649e-47ef-a499-6994d4919321?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Trump's nuclear pact with the UK ignites Trans-Atlantic boom
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5c888c3b-4dbb-4a70-94fb-12d3cc42c57e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
During President Donald Trump's state visit to Britain this week, the U.S. and U.K. will **[sign landmark nuclear power deals](https://substack.com/redirect/5c888c3b-4dbb-4a70-94fb-12d3cc42c57e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** under the Atlantic Partnership for Advanced Nuclear Energy, aiming to build modular reactors and AI-powered data centers while creating thousands of jobs and unlocking billions in investments.
* **Modular Reactors Revive Hartlepool** : Up to 12 advanced modular reactors planned in northeast England's Hartlepool, generating power for 1.5 million homes and spurring 2,500 jobs with £40 billion economic impact.
* **Data Centers Fuel AI Surge** : Nottinghamshire project develops small modular reactor-powered data centers worth £11 billion, led by Holtec, EDF, and Tritax to meet escalating energy demands for artificial intelligence.
* **Micro Plant Pioneers Innovation** : Partnership establishes world's first micro modular nuclear power plant, accelerating construction timelines and positioning U.S. and U.K. as global leaders in low-carbon energy tech.
* **Critics Highlight Cost Concerns** : Environmental groups warn of nuclear's high expenses and potential harms, contrasting its role in reducing fossil fuel reliance against cheaper renewable alternatives.
* * *
* * *

# OpenAI's Altman confesses to Tucker that Chat GPT keep him up at night
OpenAI CEO Sam Altman **[confessed in a candid interview](https://substack.com/redirect/67e47e76-3707-4d98-b6b6-ba19c043d9a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** last week with Tucker Carlson that he hasn't slept well since ChatGPT's 2022 launch, haunted by the daily responsibility of hundreds of millions interacting with the AI amid escalating controversies like a teen's suicide lawsuit and ethical dilemmas.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67e47e76-3707-4d98-b6b6-ba19c043d9a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Losing Sleep Burden** : Altman revealed personal toll from AI's global impact, emphasizing weight of minor decisions shaping model behavior for millions of users daily.
* **Suicide Lawsuit Response** : Following August 2025 lawsuit alleging ChatGPT aided a 16-year-old's death, OpenAI pledged blog-outlined enhancements to proactively support vulnerable users in crises.
* **Pushing AI Privilege** : Altman advocated for legal protections akin to doctor-patient confidentiality, shielding user-AI conversations from government subpoenas to build trust.
* **Military Use Ambivalence** : Despite $200 million U.S. Defense contract for custom models, Altman expressed uncertainty about AI's military applications, suspecting widespread informal use already.
* * *
* * *
# Google becomes the 4th company to hit $3 TRILLION dollar market cap
On September 15, 2025, Alphabet Inc., Google's parent company, soared to a **[historic $3 trillion market capitalization](https://substack.com/redirect/9d67ed50-03e0-44e1-954a-5abf9c3aa9c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after shares jumped over 4%, joining an elite club with Nvidia, Microsoft, and Apple amid a post-antitrust ruling rally.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9d67ed50-03e0-44e1-954a-5abf9c3aa9c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Stock Surge Ignites Valuation** : Alphabet's shares climbed more than 30% year-to-date, outpacing Nasdaq's 15% gain and hitting record highs post-ruling.
* **Antitrust Ruling Eases Fears** : Judge Amit Mehta's lighter-than-expected decision avoided DOJ's Chrome divestiture push, boosting investor confidence.
* **AI Rivals Shift Dynamics** : Competitors like Perplexity and OpenAI altered the antitrust case trajectory, indirectly aiding Google's dominance.
* **Regulatory Clouds Loom Ahead** : Ongoing EU fines and U.S. scrutiny challenge Alphabet's AI ambitions, including its Gemini models.
* * *
* * *

name: Phil Weiser
subject: Out of Many, We are One
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
At this moment, a central promise of America — exemplified by our national motto of e pluribus unum ("out of many, we are one") — is being put to the test.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115265244/569734860/1239926708?refcode=email_091525_immigration&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTBmY2I2Yi01NTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GeSt4EL1hTCvNmiyPtIftlOAScqtojsFbBYyFWhcL7c=&emci=208edc40-3d92-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=da0fcb6b-5592-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=51844520) Dear Friend, At this moment, a central promise of America — exemplified by our national motto of _e pluribus unum_ ("out of many, we are one") — is being put to the test. I am committed to defending this promise. My family’s story can be summed up best by the words inscribed on the Statue of Liberty: "Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free." [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115265247/569734865/1955520693?refcode=email_091525_immigration&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTBmY2I2Yi01NTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GeSt4EL1hTCvNmiyPtIftlOAScqtojsFbBYyFWhcL7c=) In 1945, my mom was born in a Nazi concentration camp. After U.S. soldiers liberated them, my grandparents and mom immigrated to the United States as refugees, and they were welcomed. Grounded by my family’s history and propelled by the opportunity America has provided me, I have chosen public service. My commitment to serve reflects my gratitude for my family’s only-in-America story — in one generation, I have come from a family of refugees to work as a law clerk to Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, serve as a White House advisor for President Barack Obama, and be elected twice as your Attorney General. I am committed to preserving our nation as a place where we see each other as neighbors, not "others." We are all part of — and the strength of — America. Let us all remember that if you are born here, the words of the Fourteenth Amendment to the US Constitution extends this promise — you are an American. Earlier this summer, I joined the American Immigration Lawyers’ Association at their annual conference to discuss America’s promise of an inclusive republic and our history as a nation of immigrants. My talk was focused on this challenging moment for our republic and our spirit of _e pluribus unum._ It’s a 30 minute talk, so you will need a few minutes to view it. If you can take some time to [watch it here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115265252/569734868/-803653937?v=Z6sBx9QFnzc&refcode=email_091525_immigration&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTBmY2I2Yi01NTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GeSt4EL1hTCvNmiyPtIftlOAScqtojsFbBYyFWhcL7c=&emci=208edc40-3d92-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=da0fcb6b-5592-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=51844520) and pass it on, I would be grateful. Here in Colorado, I have seen our powerful spirit of inclusion and unity. After tragedies like the Club Q shooting, the attack on Jewish Coloradans in Boulder on June 1, and, more recently, the Evergreen High School shooting, communities of different traditions have come together to make clear that an attack against one of us is an attack against all of us. And we will not stand for it. Our nation is rejuvenated by immigrants like my grandparents and parents, and I believe that American stories like theirs will endure. Together, we must keep working towards that vision, knowing that our nation’s future depends on us finding a better path forward, and that our nation’s motto of e pluribus unum is worth fighting for. | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115265256/569734872/-1555140616?amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&refcode=email_091525_immigration&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTBmY2I2Yi01NTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GeSt4EL1hTCvNmiyPtIftlOAScqtojsFbBYyFWhcL7c=)
---
I will always fight for that vision and our nation’s core values.
Phil
|
---

clean_body: At this moment, a central promise of America — exemplified by our national motto of e pluribus unum ("out of many, we are one") — is being put to the test. Dear Friend, At this moment, a central promise of America — exemplified by our national motto of e pluribus unum ("out of many, we are one") — is being put to the test. I am committed to defending this promise. My family’s story can be summed up best by the words inscribed on the Statue of Liberty: "Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free." = In 1945, my mom was born in a Nazi concentration camp. After U.S. soldiers liberated them, my grandparents and mom immigrated to the United States as refugees, and they were welcomed. Grounded by my family’s history and propelled by the opportunity America has provided me, I have chosen public service. My commitment to serve reflects my gratitude for my family’s only-in-America story — in one generation, I have come from a family of refugees to work as a law clerk to Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, serve as a White House advisor for President Barack Obama, and be elected twice as your Attorney General. I am committed to preserving our nation as a place where we see each other as neighbors, not "others." We are all part of — and the strength of — America. Let us all remember that if you are born here, the words of the Fourteenth Amendment to the US Constitution extends this promise — you are an American. Earlier this summer, I joined the American Immigration Lawyers’ Association at their annual conference to discuss America’s promise of an inclusive republic and our history as a nation of immigrants. My talk was focused on this challenging moment for our republic and our spirit of e pluribus unum. It’s a 30 minute talk, so you will need a few minutes to view it. If you can take some time to and pass it on, I would be grateful. Here in Colorado, I have seen our powerful spirit of inclusion and unity. After tragedies like the Club Q shooting, the attack on Jewish Coloradans in Boulder on June 1, and, more recently, the Evergreen High School shooting, communities of different traditions have come together to make clear that an attack against one of us is an attack against all of us. And we will not stand for it. Our nation is rejuvenated by immigrants like my grandparents and parents, and I believe that American stories like theirs will endure. Together, we must keep working towards that vision, knowing that our nation’s future depends on us finding a better path forward, and that our nation’s motto of e pluribus unum is worth fighting for. | | = I will always fight for that vision and our nation’s core values. body:
This isn’t policing—it’s survival. | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d9710a7d227f41b6ba821b3c1ea0a777&_e=trHf4EIEUPl-sYqIf_zmOhowyIwGGnwvXW3hMO0J_Fk04k2QAlT2KmLYYUZp9jEMZyH-gunapc2VarU29rvrwtREiMcoxNoMnizzjAq1yQ_4eN7NtxJgiNzC4uFNx7f0IgMYYd3D-K5vig7autZTZtNjvA5ZWTlsoMNtFXGA22IVn_ifb3n92G9tyUJMu69OkpTzq0xAyO9hZHTg4RGpeHnh7oM2rn4wxrYyY0UuHyktndvsy0qUBr87ZalMweBNHClJ5TFEkXOGjmyTsOKmsrls0_nEXg0PlyVLCKiWEwbHWGYQDX4Hkc2SdZq34yT6dpH2n6uzqhB-B5LnooURHA2CpOFyZ7d3HBoBcW4JAvUgJlMxjLpFGXO7bDyahUH_t23qH2EjetEFFkpDvt4ewyeyL9amFWtLK96VcTVWUBpgJvIBUR5nM5Pk82QsBgKSya-uaYl6xG4GNXQDENDByKc9OIW549zURG-shGWKSt8rplVDAo1z49gsbyRBnFYCRKPfTluOlVVHoMLbLuQy-IZAfvDv7n6Najx42gx57yTVsjUUuqqMc88Cmkn0hH70)

You can’t walk a block in most blue cities without seeing the collapse. Drug addicts on the sidewalk. Teenagers looting stores. Innocent women stabbed on the train while grown men just watch.

This is what happens when a culture stops caring about accountability, discipline, and truth.

| [ **CHANGE AMERICAN CULTURE** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d9710a7d227f41b6ba821b3c1ea0a777&_e=trHf4EIEUPl-sYqIf_zmOhowyIwGGnwvXW3hMO0J_Fk04k2QAlT2KmLYYUZp9jEMZyH-gunapc2VarU29rvrwtREiMcoxNoMnizzjAq1yQ_4eN7NtxJgiNzC4uFNx7f0IgMYYd3D-K5vig7autZTZtNjvA5ZWTlsoMNtFXGA22IVn_ifb3n92G9tyUJMu69OB20abiCNh_osj20IwR3C8f8tyvOnpcyEU1qZU6qPdwRuYrhBYKq0X50kdwmtLxxREyXmE6sYYOFFN4vXUPoX_pMrgsLgk5lq-0vpvmqupy0_X1J87DBFUmlEv-ITkCSmf7fck6nOLXqjXq3_0BOoqZbnO_b84mNhX_VHbfvD-a2clL-9hb0_SZWzedDPGkI-DBxqWvkLvEHEGv4V80HF5b0p_PQVsZRMjA6tZ9_p0HCb4TA1zsf-dUtAM_v9tSOhR7hNAjQy2Ra-lzOXt9UzIC0r06wgi-T_0Xd9jmH8EyVzQCj10zZvfk6PBTEEkQAnjN_xX4ZF4eZ4SnYEpffkRpFN2lf4e1LI67QxtHf8dFtH-nSwYbRI7VOlKioU_kWe)
---

This isn’t the America we want. But this is the America the Left has created. I’ve said it before:

_“It is the civic duty of citizens to raise up their young people and their communities—to live in a way that makes government intervention unnecessary. But when culture and moral fiber collapse, intervention becomes inevitable.”_

They gutted the police, let criminals run wild, and then called anyone who spoke up **“extreme.”

Enough.**

If you want to stop the collapse, you better start by calling it what it is: _criminal, cowardly, and evil._

And it’s going to take strength—not speeches—to turn it around. [**If you’re ready to fight for order, security, and justice—chip in now.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d9710a7d227f41b6ba821b3c1ea0a777&_e=trHf4EIEUPl-sYqIf_zmOhowyIwGGnwvXW3hMO0J_Fk04k2QAlT2KmLYYUZp9jEMZyH-gunapc2VarU29rvrwtREiMcoxNoMnizzjAq1yQ_4eN7NtxJgiNzC4uFNx7f0IgMYYd3D-K5vig7autZTZtNjvA5ZWTlsoMNtFXGA22IVn_ifb3n92G9tyUJMu69Ob4g2fGkY2V1r-azKTmhkuhkdhWTXxBQygBBuJMeSeaWJjuIv8FlfADyoNm4PJcfFFzt-QZlAf9nwY-T40QwYZknfA-PePPifepmmA3SXOcn1ukGQhfi1Vot4GdfJFvrWmdezplPE1sAiU-cEsBWKoOtImja31h-DhiCK8iWjLSUfZM-LvdtwK5JKa_k_5-LuyyLCMNNGjTOSr2s_pmIQGJ_V5ZhW09Nyc8gyzRTkqBWKvaJV9PoJV29Jjn3KVg9fxaI_shmayiEbFHMwCMSzPANIVmghbg3iZqKArfOt16Jdehx4d1k8iiIkc66QnKMyFO0snNAlC_yx-jOrmABOu3M8UCRnkOHbiNBPZ7de-omoWN3DMrhyPT0HkCudY3FD)

I’m not running to make friends in Washington. I’m running to restore what’s been lost: courage, law, and self-respect.

Let’s bring the hammer down on this chaos—before it’s too late.

**[Support the mission. Donate now.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d9710a7d227f41b6ba821b3c1ea0a777&_e=trHf4EIEUPl-sYqIf_zmOhowyIwGGnwvXW3hMO0J_Fk04k2QAlT2KmLYYUZp9jEMZyH-gunapc2VarU29rvrwtREiMcoxNoMnizzjAq1yQ_4eN7NtxJgiNzC4uFNx7f0IgMYYd3D-K5vig7autZTZgWd6ZVHMpszrfxMxw2p2_KklMGM7YBsWesGJk-hR1da9Vhdr-37fMUQhfJOSHEcZzQ-5rc8mkoRsh0UQ4wDAX2A5xan_H3REzCuzQQq35SGfG5KQCXIH87Fr9-Vu7sGiwM-fbv8vQhrKTocKMEiBYpWVyym2U1F8dKe1gJmyF62pSjrKw3PuGiKKcBWk56dEfc09rV-0EY9_C67eyiaKL8wzxj_w3ymI2acbtPAvqliwqcm4Di1xt60SZ5e7uVshLgpdO7UgN9NHRpNUDV4QhQ-P1KIo9zhsCai9arKXQq44OEFLcEygpJT-PbGqXHfq9yEfFpFB8BPnWB_vCH5TxSClR5n6nZjW43x68X1lULGgNP2zXlcpegtr2WW_PsTvp42kItAyy2KOneDpcB7fscA8UdDIUFYc5hna71GfNBZ)**

Royce White

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d9710a7d227f41b6ba821b3c1ea0a777&_e=trHf4EIEUPl-sYqIf_zmOhowyIwGGnwvXW3hMO0J_Fk04k2QAlT2KmLYYUZp9jEMZyH-gunapc2VarU29rvrwtREiMcoxNoMnizzjAq1yQ_4eN7NtxJgiNzC4uFNx7f0IgMYYd3D-K5vig7autZTZtNjvA5ZWTlsoMNtFXGA22IVn_ifb3n92G9tyUJMu69OXH9xEHAXwtsuDHjsz9vfLbuY3ag_ohkyh95RHI3Xiy2K8cDw-y5c38AOJPpCjrczthq1iIiSzGHCyHHqM7iBbovcDTS9FfSLyHo8iFCxt9rMOaJFP8X9FZ4FgK5inlhtAwxFn12Oj483mzyIYNDOU5Y5SuLDiFsIfVlDwTQ33YDo6zO5F_Pe2HLqVLZz0gvxQ0m4IfhkuxER3oWAOwA_Jg4JfgnMVEfCNz-teofbo7-QC7H3Ehs8CPQKDFDnRjtwP5d7foPGVfC6exI6LLps1QP2sGaOh3fs-o6ynwXqBGqBJZseuLJdzfRv9AYSG7isxghnXvnvW8d62yDAQ5O7bH6NSyd6d15QeCfozbRQUfMWBpk-v4Wzaw2jSQGWaLNQ)

name: John Rich
subject: J6 defendants punished for being veterans
body:
I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.

| | | [View this email in your browser](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv74b777e78nbs0b9lkcfnjpmca71h234eegnpa8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5aq83jf15g3g0qcrpl2mq3ncnihrch7k3h22g70_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5d9k9vg2dfusmrdui8c3rn6bc8r4kcahj806tl0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)

Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znrk5ar49ulomog5g0a811gu3eoj6iav6jea6sp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcbi2ln1uf78pk4ufdmujp2pbnsl4he609422id0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)
Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu4n271s7p4cglch2ltpja2kemp9agpkhkhjq1ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6ft08rqsuv2m0efngud8ebsgt4r23rbgiqsbetg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvejo1qnj8sbjmgo9i0tendmurv3v62najmqo2og_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8410lv0uqu10g9g51j99ta5lhk5m3r0sg523fn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7j2afm6pi3u4q1t0trigd7jubvspu248ctg716o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0hhk1ek2vb7vkmempbgqefa6fco0i6i2eeupdj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zaf37f3piehvnpl608jk31jvet6lua5tcrlj48m8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk7bnnf5t25amuo4r78vdcbkf99ftmee6sl8o1j0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za90ua6kfqn4lie0tgha8oolm6us5ojjrk6tgtvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)
This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice.

These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs.

_**If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will?**_

When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. _You are defending the soul of our country_.

**As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now.**
[Donate](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh8flq8paaqjbifu340ggu0ctm576qrrofaea52o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0o30c3h2bs)
For faith, freedom, and country,

John Rich

Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

clean_body: I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. | | | | | Friend, I recently came across a striking statistic. 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for harsher penalties. Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service? I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream because of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice. And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice. The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured. That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap. This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was. Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face... Difficulties finding a job Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison And even homelessness. For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming. Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually. Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in. Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need. There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance. Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten. This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice. These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs. If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will? When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. You are defending the soul of our country. As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now.** For faith, freedom, and country, John Rich Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599. | | | | | | Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Even CNN Recognizes It...
body:
WOW... this Sunday at Sheridan.Church was unlike anything I have ever seen. The auditorium was completely FULL 15 minutes before service even started
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12876.1.867eddc3d33784f2ae3ad7155ae5a0b6) |
---
**WOW**... this Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12877.1.64a7e774d16f2f9314e78cf48c9c33af) was unlike anything I have ever seen. The auditorium was **completely FULL** 15 minutes before service even started. There was a long line of people trying to get into the auditorium. People who had not been to church in years and even decades decided to come to church. This did not just happen at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12878.1.97131602d9d388cdc8e578c1ad19dbfd) but churches all across America. Many are calling this the **Charlie Kirk Effect**. Not only are Pastors recognizing a spiritual hunger in Americans but so did **CNN**. For CNN to see and report on it means God is REALLY moving. Yesterday, I preached a sermon dedicated to my friend, **Charlie Kirk** , entitled, "[TURNING POINT](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12879.1.e46e2e56a181f50d42dd0f609eff6c87)."
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12880.1.c8e1f6c19e506053e2816bfda55b4d6e)
---
I want to encourage you to watch this as it made a tremendous impact upon those who received it yesterday.
You can watch it here: [https://youtube.com/live/VThy9lMd7ec?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12881.1.fbd82be58c6bcc2167a2471dc38ef386)
May the fires of revival continue to spread across America.
Thank you
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12882.1.96f71f69f831c2424ee40f08e712f825)
---
---
|
---

My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12883.1.fb9ff8b93b8601e65b17bca68989973a) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12884.1.36a89af3d45e7a418636333ce306faa0)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12885.1.6c26a77139f8bfdb143178d87de26dee)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12886.1.790bdb36e26ec5935b7a4dfea4b2e330). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12887.1.629c38e68f9ef4ea5226027c3152ba33) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12888.1.7dbaec0dc986245d3c2af989f4b0e49c) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24809006.12889.1.77af8280d75c15c2413108c6f5a4bd42) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

body:
A frightening look into my voicemail inbox

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs6ceoko4n1ofuhbsm9f61v93sbkv9mnktbk1li8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76cph2bs)

---
|
---
|
---
| | **“You’re a dumb c*nt who should k*ll herself.”** **“I’m just trying to harass you at this point, b*tch. F*ck you, b*tch.”** _**“I hope you die.”**_ These were just a few of the many messages in my inbox today. It’s Nancy Mace. **Patriot** , I’m no stranger to death threats. In fact, threats to my life have become an occupational hazard. [**And as we all tragically understood this week, speaking TRUTH and standing firm in the word of God can turn people into cold-blooded murderers.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl19je6m3r5cid3na5eops1l8ifn2m6shl0fbk8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76cph2bs) But I’m still not afraid. Quite the opposite. **[I’m sharing the audio from some of the hate-filled, threatening voicemails I've received from DEMOCRATS.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrgspds1eilsso6u6qqetlho0v4qg2ol2b81r258_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76cph2bs)** **Patriot** , _believe them when they tell you who they are._
---
[ **OPEN TO LISTEN** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z41u5jlj27patmaeknvsspu11oked1ti1lercfe8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76cph2bs)

---
[ **$100** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmcqa623ti4uvg6489b09n3kbh4503uuejhcava0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76cph2bs)
---
[ **OTHER AMOUNT** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zujtpsvn40b40quac1cfqjdgu9ubbr1pnf4jcveg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76cph2bs)
---
**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |

name: John Rich
subject: J6 defendants punished for being veterans
body:
I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.

| | | [View this email in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zemsqjrrvfdojgcgs1nb5gnqeievrlhnio4alm4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6osv5c768ghoo86857ojc2g1rjfnra7es8egdag_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zav1mklrk520o97o6uisqu60kfd8lvcctp8kqdcg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)

Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd0dhoohhfvp4ensm5u44gec4emg0425ot00f9u8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3cd09grh9msjsml3os5v4uoa8kg59daiad25bdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)
Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlgmm9gk0sgi0r42nrum9g1anacsr9pbuj7ssovo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z926rpstgbg3glr99v49rmgu1c7nn49q1ahbsuso_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf2o6vlpv7ijuptf7pe0km2a8n3v86vhjsdm3eug_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z03i5lq1igb79ft4dksd10vjakei6joc473uisog_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zans11e3mp76qcc5bejll9joq07eh08bqebnnmv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zorno6118lhcrs4uptoi26m2a53pujipn3f30cmg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7k6qemri6dd47fvf6mcqk63e40s01p2a235is5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zol3bms007mhmishf9b2g789i6vi5atarjj96mh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8kdlp6d4ve3t0026vd0099qs6frsgpn8ja8nrug_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)
This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice.

These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs.

_**If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will?**_

When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. _You are defending the soul of our country_.

**As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now.**
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl39f09756nm79kjrf0ufgp8m38pa4k4v4po2ggo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cjjm0p76c3h2bs)
For faith, freedom, and country,

John Rich

As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/7U1Li8gBAEgR)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/okLHXhqrkUAo)

And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work. | Email is a really important way that grassroots campaigns can actually win: we have power when we use technology to organize a large group of people. Our email sending software likes it when we have "clicks", but we don't always ask you to click a donation link. We understand that email can be overwhelming. If you only want to receive the most important emails, click . If you're really just sick of every email, click and you'll be unsubscribed! | Democratic leaders are abandoning us. Our District deserves a fighter in Congress — someone who shows her constituents every day that she is doing everything possible to stop the authoritarian takeover of the United States. Kat has fought fascists before as a citizen, union rep, and independent journalist. Now, she's going to do the same in Congress. Let's win this together. | | Paid for by Kat for Illinois

He wrote this piece for the Everett Herald with his years of experience in the electric utility industry and a direct understanding of how FEMA's cuts will impact Northwest Washington. Here is a snippet of what Haarlow wrote: _"Our lineworkers move quickly because they know how much our community depends on them... Even after the last pole is replaced, the last line is reconnected, transformer repaired and customer restored, utilities often wait months or even years to receive the federal funding that helps cover the significant cost of restoration after a disaster._ _Those delays can strain local budgets and, in the end, affect customers._ _That is why I am grateful to U.S. Rep. Rick Larsen, D-Wash., for his leadership, along with his colleagues on the House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, in pushing for Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) reform._ _On Wednesday [September 3], the committee will take up a bipartisan bill that would make long-overdue improvements to how FEMA responds to disasters. The PUD strongly supports this bill because it delivers what our community needs most: faster relief, fairer treatment and a stronger foundation for the future."_ **I am proud to share that the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee approved my bipartisan legislation to reform FEMA,****_The Fixing Emergency Management for Americans (FEMA) Act of 2025_****.** This legislation provides the most robust legislative reform of FEMA and federal disaster assistance programs in decades. The _FEMA Act of 2025_ streamlines the federal government's disaster response and recovery programs while also making FEMA a cabinet-level agency once again that is directly accountable to the President.**I will continue to lead bipartisan efforts that stand up for the values of Northwest Washington.** More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115268081/569743270/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGUwMWU5Mi01YjkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wm2MyKnSk7l5pgABcV56B7z-KnHBhVWgy6rR0422EQI=&emci=f75e5151-f38c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=14e01e92-5b92-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15759664)

Hi Derek — I’m Chris Bolling, the new Executive Director of the Democratic Party of Virginia. And today, I want to talk about the future – because in just seven weeks, Virginians have a chance to build something extraordinary. If we win a Democratic trifecta this November, the opportunities are limitless. We can finally move Virginia forward with an agenda rooted in protecting our freedoms, growing our economy, and investing in our communities – not rolling them back like MAGA Republicans want. And the way we get there is through our coordinated campaign: _Operation Virginia Victory._ This is the largest, most ambitious effort in our Party’s history – and it’s already putting organizers, volunteers, and resources into every corner of the Commonwealth. Operation Virginia Victory is how we’ll defend our Assembly majority, lift Abigail Spanberger at the top of the ticket, and create the kind of grassroots wave that flips the Governor’s mansion. [**But here’s the truth: none of this happens unless we have the resources to keep Operation Virginia Victory fully funded and firing on all cylinders. That’s why I’m asking you personally: Will you chip in $10 today to keep this historic effort moving?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115268084/569743279/1737274117?&refcode=E15128-20250915-HowWeWin-SL-CampaignNews&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGUwMWU5Mi01YjkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wm2MyKnSk7l5pgABcV56B7z-KnHBhVWgy6rR0422EQI=) | **************[DONATE $10>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115268087/569743287/-2030615622?refcode=E15128-20250915-HowWeWin-SB-CampaignNews&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGUwMWU5Mi01YjkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wm2MyKnSk7l5pgABcV56B7z-KnHBhVWgy6rR0422EQI=)**************
---
With a Democratic trifecta, powered by Operation Virginia Victory, we can:
* Protect and expand abortion and reproductive healthcare, ensuring Virginia remains a safe haven for choice.
* Defend our democracy by safeguarding voting rights and pushing back against Trump’s chaos in Washington.
* Invest in public education, clean energy, and good-paying jobs – instead of caving to Republican cuts that hurt working families.

Virginia can be the firewall against extremism and the launchpad for progress. But to seize this moment, we need to out-organize and out-communicate the GOP in every community, from Fairfax to Norfolk to Roanoke.
[**Will you be one of the grassroots supporters who fuels Operation Virginia Victory right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115268090/569743298/1737274117?&refcode=E15128-20250915-HowWeWin-SL-CampaignNews&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGUwMWU5Mi01YjkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wm2MyKnSk7l5pgABcV56B7z-KnHBhVWgy6rR0422EQI=)

---

| [OTHER AMOUNT →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115268101/569743320/-1112115122?express_lane=true&refcode=E15128-20250915-HowWeWin-EG-CampaignNews&amount=other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGUwMWU5Mi01YjkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wm2MyKnSk7l5pgABcV56B7z-KnHBhVWgy6rR0422EQI=)
---
Elections here are close – sometimes decided by just hundreds of votes. Every dollar raised between now and Election Day translates into field organizers on the ground, digital ads reaching swing voters, and volunteers knocking doors in communities that will decide our future.
We’ve beaten MAGA extremism before. We can do it again. And this time, we can do more than just hold the line – we can win the power to govern boldly.
[**So before tonight ends, I’m asking: will you help us close the fundraising gap and keep Operation Virginia Victory on track?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115268103/569743323/1737274117?&refcode=E15128-20250915-HowWeWin-SL-CampaignNews&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGUwMWU5Mi01YjkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wm2MyKnSk7l5pgABcV56B7z-KnHBhVWgy6rR0422EQI=)
Thank you for being part of this fight. Together, we can prove, once again, that when Virginians organize, we win.
Onward!
Chris Bolling
Executive Director
Democratic Party of Virginia

Peter,

We’re halfway through the month, and we need to be honest: we’re currently
tracking behind our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. And that matters — a
lot.

*This data reflects donations made online with this email address. If
you've made a previous contribution via check or with a different email
address, it may not be reflected above. Thank you for supporting our
Squad.

Every dollar we raise supports our progressive leaders in Congress who are
fighting for real change — leaders who stand up for justice, equity, and
policies that put people first.

Falling behind means less support for these champions and less power to
challenge the status quo in Congress.

We cannot let that happen. The stakes are too high, and the opposition is
relentless.

Will you help us catch up before the month ends? Your support makes all
the difference in strengthening our movement — a movement that will push
our country forward.

Please chip in $3 today to keep our momentum strong. You
can use this link here to make a contribution:

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

---

Sean

Twin Groves Middle School in Buffalo Grove, Illinois. (Facebook)
By Illinois Review

A Buffalo Grove middle school teacher who faced backlash for her disturbing remarks after Charlie Kirk’s assassination is now opposing efforts to hold a public tribute in his honor.

Carolyn Pinta, a teacher at Twin Groves Middle School, recently shared a Facebook post promoting an online petition against recognizing Kirk in Illinois School District 214. The petition also rejects plans for a public event honoring Kirk and his organization, Turning Point USA.

In her post, Pinta urged others to sign, writing: “Opposing petition that you WILL want to sign, this one AGAINST glorifying Charlie Kirk.”

clean_body: view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert. Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Buffalo Grove Teacher Tries to Block Kirk Tribute; Nancy Mace Calls to Defund Schools Lacking Accountability () Twin Groves Middle School in Buffalo Grove, Illinois. (Facebook) By Illinois Review A Buffalo Grove middle school teacher who faced backlash for her disturbing remarks after Charlie Kirk’s assassination is now opposing efforts to hold a public tribute in his honor. Carolyn Pinta, a teacher at Twin Groves Middle School, recently shared a Facebook post promoting an online petition against recognizing Kirk in Illinois School District 214. The petition also rejects plans for a public event honoring Kirk and his organization, Turning Point USA. In her post, Pinta urged others to sign, writing: “Opposing petition that you WILL want to sign, this one AGAINST glorifying Charlie Kirk.” (Facebook) CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE ON FACEBOOK AND "LIKE" AND SHARE WITH YOUR FRIENDS () CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE ON X AND "LIKE" AND SHARE WITH YOUR FRIENDS () Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Copyright © 2025 IR Media Corp., all rights reserved. name: Wes Moore
subject: I’m running for another term as Governor
body:
Peter, it’s Governor Wes Moore. The Real Texas PAC said I could reach out today to share some important news with you.
When we first launched our campaign four years ago, I had never run for political office. I was an Army Captain, the son of a single mom, and I ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country.
So I traveled the state, listening to your stories and sharing mine. I heard the same thing again and again: That the career politicians had been telling us everything was great, when we knew it wasn’t.
Ever since I took office, I’ve been on a mission to change that. To lower taxes for middle class families. To make health care and prescription drugs cheaper. To make our communities safer.
But our mission is far from over.
Today, I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland. Because our work isn’t done yet.
Will you split a contribution of $15 or more to my campaign and The Real Texas PAC now to help power our movement? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wes-moore?refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_realtexaspac]
While we’ve made a lot of progress over the last three years, our fight is even more important now because of who is in the White House.
The President of the United States is bending over backwards for billionaires and big corporations. He’s firing federal civil servants, gutting Medicaid, and raising prices on everything from electricity to groceries for families. His reckless attacks are hitting Maryland hard.
It’s time for us to come together across counties and party lines to prove that even in the face of dysfunction in D.C.: We can show there’s a better way forward.
We already have Republican opponents in this race, and with the President and his allies working to undo our progress, the stakes couldn’t be higher. This campaign has always been about partnership – I’m grateful to have The Real Texas PAC’s support in this race, and I’d like to have yours too. So please, give whatever you can and split a contribution between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wes-moore?refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_realtexaspac]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Wes Moore and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wes-moore?express_lane=true&refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_realtexaspac&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wes-moore?express_lane=true&refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_realtexaspac&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wes-moore?express_lane=true&refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_realtexaspac&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wes-moore?express_lane=true&refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_realtexaspac&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wes-moore?express_lane=true&refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_realtexaspac&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-wes-moore?refcode=partner_ms_wes_em_realtexaspac&amount=25]
Peter, join us. Let’s build a state where we leave no one behind.
Elevate,
Wes

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: In This Together PAC
subject: These races are our first line of defense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
We launched In This Together PAC with a simple mission
Peter,

**FIRST:** We launched In This Together PAC with a simple mission: Support common-sense candidates who will stand up for everyday people and fight for a better future for all of us.

**THEN:** We saw what was happening in Congress – a budget that rips healthcare away from millions, hands massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy, and cuts vital benefits like food for children who are going hungry – and we decided to take action.

**NOW:** Gov. Andy Beshear is using In This Together PAC to support Frontline members of Congress who are in the most difficult reelection fights.

These candidates will be up against mountains of cash as Republicans aim to unseat them in the hopes of keeping their hold on Congress. But if we want to flip Congress blue and put a check on an out-of-control Trump Administration, we have to start by supporting the Frontline members.

These are members of Congress in purple districts. They have won their races not because they are Democrats, but because they have shown their constituents that they will always lead with their priorities and their needs in mind. clean_body: We launched In This Together PAC with a simple mission Peter, FIRST: We launched In This Together PAC with a simple mission: Support common-sense candidates who will stand up for everyday people and fight for a better future for all of us. THEN: We saw what was happening in Congress – a budget that rips healthcare away from millions, hands massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy, and cuts vital benefits like food for children who are going hungry – and we decided to take action. NOW: Gov. Andy Beshear is using In This Together PAC to support Frontline members of Congress who are in the most difficult reelection fights. These candidates will be up against mountains of cash as Republicans aim to unseat them in the hopes of keeping their hold on Congress. But if we want to flip Congress blue and put a check on an out-of-control Trump Administration, we have to start by supporting the Frontline members. These are members of Congress in purple districts. They have won their races not because they are Democrats, but because they have shown their constituents that they will always lead with their priorities and their needs in mind. They stand up for what is right, even if it means standing alone in Congress.
