According to the latest reporting from the _Cook Political Report, Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ , and _Roll Call_ , our race is still rated a true Toss-Up. National Journal’s 2026 House Power Rankings just placed Mariannette Miller-Meeks in the top 5 on the list of most vulnerable incumbents in the entire country. And the latest PPP poll shows Christina leading Miller-Meeks 43–39 in the contest for Iowa’s 1st Congressional District. These are all signs of real momentum!

Across Iowa, we’re seeing wins that would have been unthinkable just a few years ago. In January, Democrats gained a critical state Senate seat in a special election. Just last month, Catelin Drey flipped a historically GOP-held Iowa state Senate seat. And when Joni Ernst dropped out of her Senate race, she sent a clear signal that even Iowa’s entrenched political class knows the ground is shifting.

This didn’t happen by accident. Christina has spent years building trust in every corner of this district and connecting with people who are ready for a new kind of leadership. What we’re seeing now is the result of authentic engagement and a growing hunger for change.

Washington has noticed, Peter. Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her party’s elite backers are terrified of losing this seat. That's why Speaker Mike Johnson and party insiders just funneled over $7.5 million to Miller-Meeks and campaigns like hers. They will spare no expense to try to hold this seat. _This race is going to be one of the most closely watched in the nation, and every move we make will matter._

**What’s next for this campaign is more of what Christina does best: Meeting people on the campaign trail and listening to their stories. We are optimistic about a win in 2026 — the data, the energy, and the momentum are all in our favor — but optimism alone won’t win this race.**

**[It will take hard work and resources to go toe-to-toe with a national political machine pouring millions into IA-01 to stop us. This grassroots team has powered Christina from the very beginning. Now, we have to come together like never before to get the job done. That's why our team has set an ambitious $10,000 mid-month goal. Will you stand with Christina and chip in $5 or whatever you can afford before the deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115269239/569747011/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250915_MM1v2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250915_MM1v2_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0fb2dacb-5d92-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmIyZGFjYi01ZDkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qZzwmZDVxGfE6oldS0_cdaATevYBTQtfjILZ0WCoyBo=)**

Let’s keep the progress going for Democrats,

Team Bohannan

Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer and state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue.

= According to the latest reporting from the Cook Political Report, Sabato’s Crystal Ball , and Roll Call , our race is still rated a true Toss-Up. National Journal’s 2026 House Power Rankings just placed Mariannette Miller-Meeks in the top 5 on the list of most vulnerable incumbents in the entire country. And the latest PPP poll shows Christina leading Miller-Meeks 43–39 in the contest for Iowa’s 1st Congressional District. These are all signs of real momentum! Across Iowa, we’re seeing wins that would have been unthinkable just a few years ago. In January, Democrats gained a critical state Senate seat in a special election. Just last month, Catelin Drey flipped a historically GOP-held Iowa state Senate seat. And when Joni Ernst dropped out of her Senate race, she sent a clear signal that even Iowa’s entrenched political class knows the ground is shifting. This didn’t happen by accident. Christina has spent years building trust in every corner of this district and connecting with people who are ready for a new kind of leadership. What we’re seeing now is the result of authentic engagement and a growing hunger for change. Washington has noticed, Peter. Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her party’s elite backers are terrified of losing this seat. That's why Speaker Mike Johnson and party insiders just funneled over $7.5 million to Miller-Meeks and campaigns like hers. They will spare no expense to try to hold this seat. This race is going to be one of the most closely watched in the nation, and every move we make will matter. What’s next for this campaign is more of what Christina does best: Meeting people on the campaign trail and listening to their stories. We are optimistic about a win in 2026 — the data, the energy, and the momentum are all in our favor — but optimism alone won’t win this race. = Let’s keep the progress going for Democrats, Team Bohannan Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer and state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue. Chip in to support her campaign today >> | = = | PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS P.O. name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Cue the sad trombone. Radical righty Lamberth loses again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
That’s unconstitutional!
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K577PF2EP7068CDGKA13W5KG_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K577PF2EP7068CDGKA13W5KG_1)
---
| | | | Peter, Over 75 days ago, extremist MAGA Republicans in our state legislature did the unthinkable: they made a vote or official act by an elected official punishable by law. That’s right — they pushed through an unconstitutional bill that threatened to **jail elected officials simply for representing their constituents and voting their conscience**. Even Tennessee’s radical Republican Attorney General thought it was unconstitutional! But let’s be clear — this wasn’t a mistake. It was the plan. When you’re drunk on power, you think it is a crime for anyone to disagree with you. When your ideas are so unpopular, you have to try and rig the system. And while the recent jobs report unveiled the truth about the GOP’s devastating economic policies, **Willie Lamberth** clearly does not care. He is too busy pushing his own radical agenda instead of showing up to fight for working Tennesseans. But we will. We will continue to stand up for our neighbors.
We will continue to fight for the underserved.
We will continue to uphold our oath to the U.S. and Tennessee Constitutions.
Make no mistake — we cannot continue our efforts with you. **YOU made the difference here**. Your voice, your energy, your contributions are the backbone of this movement to defend democracy and protect Tennessee families. Now, it’s time to keep the pressure on. Let’s show Lamberth and his MAGA cronies that we are **NOT going away.** Chip in $75 today to shut down their extremist agenda.

body:
Here's what's happening in the Forward world...

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_78a&n=1)
---
Monday, September 15, 2025 | Peter -- **The Forward Party’s 2025 Endorsement Rollout Has Begun** The wait is over! We officially kicked off our 2025 endorsement season last week. With early voting about to begin in Virginia, we’re hitting the ground running by announcing our backing of two leaders who embody everything the Forward Party stands for in their candidacy for Virginia House of Delegates: **Kristin Farry (District 72)** and **Brandon Givens (District 11)**. Kristin and Brandon both are campaigning to reject the extremes, focus on solutions, and put people over party politics. View their endorsement announcement [here](https://www.forwardparty.com/media/blog/forward-party-endorses-kristin-farry-and-brandon-givens-for-virginia-house-of-delegates/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_78a&n=2). If you’re ready to help power this movement, step up today! The Forward Party of Virginia is hosting a virtual town hall on Monday, September 15 at 6:30 PM where you can hear from the two amazing candidates above and other Forward leaders in the commonwealth. To learn more on how to participate click [here.](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=dF4QiQthMqoFkTo-wZ3fQ1f0bH65xKznOE9sc4CWIAxnKqLkqzZ6jRgD7recwx_VeiEs5l3kohsxp5MlFjpsLvhaMg8pgCDtNNYPHgYb46g&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_78a&n=3) We’re building real momentum, and Virginia is just the start. Over the next few weeks, we’ll be rolling out MORE Forward-endorsed candidates from across the country. These are leaders who will fight for common sense, collaboration, and a future that works for everyone. 👉 Check out the growing list of endorsed candidates here:[ forwardparty.com/candidates](https://www.forwardparty.com/candidates?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_78a&n=4) There is no better time than now to get your awesome Forward merch to wear during tonight's call, upcoming events, or anywhere you want to show your Forward pride. The hoodies are running low, so grab them now before we have to restock. Click [here](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=97vo83vzLU7BnykmHxrcoxzp0pgnX_1wVzitlIaoLF8KVTpJKrHDI0wcxZUP6UyA04w5tvQ9iI2eAvH__4UcoQ30pqUiVXOrP7Xp_B7p_DLGPtd87if7cev9JgwrvDd3&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_78a&n=5) to get your merch!!
**[The Forward Party is Offering Alternatives](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=bZvvmHTNyD2YnlNuXoBSbsLLeW-HSPb8JRl9C3kXOdFZqx7mvO6xpS21bwjDhpqhILA-mnAdFGoZfA2LxVfnwJvmUKq4gpEEbJElqsnlEbHhlZ1L6_u6zincnoUFjhSj1PxcK96HHROdB36in3qojUC8p3BKUr8_vMaR8RiJ44vfJvN-gGVaFVuV1uaKlP-zAypgbcGbVVJaybjQvBQySw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_78a&n=6)** | **KOA** David Ryan of the Colorado Forward Party joins Mandy Connell on The Mandy Connell Podcast to talk about FWD Colorado and the new alternatives that Forward is bringing. **[How The North Carolina Forward Party Is Trying To Appeal To Independent Voters](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=dgqs-nNNhjQYGeupapC_Qw-ssTzAuGYnapM6XtSkDYbwW_KTJ6fst9R6de2Z-vQLDck8Tu6ZIdpCXUiMzdJWHGOMDUU9LAxTifvkYG17S6T4m67lSfov4-HvoUpkKNScjJ7gfk4MVe5LeOo_cGOV3yGspfWwO_4nnaVmYwIReHqTSXOsFXS1CNmsQu_onhVOn5Fi6D7gPFc-IZ-B5da7cyroBbe3sD2GuNT97a6Tm_M&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_78a&n=7)** | **WCNC Charlotte** Patrick Newton, chair of the NC Forward Party joins WCNC Charlotte, the local NBC affiliate, to talk about the growth of the Forward Party amidst polls opening on primary day.
**September 15 | Forward VA Candidates Virtual Town Hall
** Come meet Forward candidates for VA House of Delegates, Kristin Farry District 72 and Brandon Givens District 11, with an introduction from a new Forward affiliate, Mayor Brian Vincent of Farmville, VA. The evening will be hosted by Forward's National Political Director, Kayla Berube, who is a resident of VA herself! You don't want to miss this town hall to learn more about our candidates and how they plan to bring Forward principles into office with them. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_va_candidates_virtualtown_hall?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_78a&n=8)** **September 15 | National High School Chapter Meeting
** Are you interested in becoming a leader in your community who brings politics back to the people? If so, this is your opportunity to take initiative by creating your own Young Forwardist Chapter. Join our National High School Chapter meeting. As part of our biweekly check-ins, we will be navigating ways the national Young Forwardists committee can best support our high school chapters. Whether it's providing club meeting materials to leadership training, we are here to help. Join us! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/national_high_school_chapter_meeting_20250915?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_78a&n=9)** **September 16 | Run For Office With The Forward Party
** Have you ever thought about running for office, but wasn't sure what it really entailed or how to get started? Or maybe you have decided to run and would like a Forward Party endorsement. Join us on **Tues Sept 16th at 6:30pm ET** as we dive in to what it takes to get your name on the ballot, and how to apply for a Forward endorsement! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/run_for_office_with_forward_party2_20250916?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_78a&n=10)** **September 17 | North Shore Fall Meetup
** We’re bringing the Forward Party spirit to the North Shore, and you’re invited! This isn’t just another meetup, it’s a chance to meet fellow Bay Staters who believe politics should serve people, not parties and talk directly about Forward’s strategy for becoming Massachusetts’ true second party—one that puts human values at the center. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/north_shore_fall_meetup?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_78a&n=11)** **September 17 | NOVA FWD Social
** The NoVA Forward Party's September 2025 Social Event will be at PJ Skidoos in Fairfax on Wednesday, September 17th, starting at 7:00 PM. Forward Party members and guests will have an opportunity to socialize with each other, learn more about the Party and other opportunities to participate, all while enjoying wonderful food and drink! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/nova_fwd_social_20250917?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_78a&n=12)** **September 17 | Minnesota General Meeting

clean_body: Here's what's happening in the Forward world... | | Monday, September 15, 2025 | Peter -- The Forward Party’s 2025 Endorsement Rollout Has Begun The wait is over! We officially kicked off our 2025 endorsement season last week. With early voting about to begin in Virginia, we’re hitting the ground running by announcing our backing of two leaders who embody everything the Forward Party stands for in their candidacy for Virginia House of Delegates: Kristin Farry (District 72) and Brandon Givens (District 11). Kristin and Brandon both are campaigning to reject the extremes, focus on solutions, and put people over party politics. View their endorsement announcement . If you’re ready to help power this movement, step up today! The Forward Party of Virginia is hosting a virtual town hall on Monday, September 15 at 6:30 PM where you can hear from the two amazing candidates above and other Forward leaders in the commonwealth. To learn more on how to participate click We’re building real momentum, and Virginia is just the start. Over the next few weeks, we’ll be rolling out MORE Forward-endorsed candidates from across the country. These are leaders who will fight for common sense, collaboration, and a future that works for everyone. 👉 Check out the growing list of endorsed candidates here: There is no better time than now to get your awesome Forward merch to wear during tonight's call, upcoming events, or anywhere you want to show your Forward pride. The hoodies are running low, so grab them now before we have to restock. Click to get your merch!! | KOA David Ryan of the Colorado Forward Party joins Mandy Connell on The Mandy Connell Podcast to talk about FWD Colorado and the new alternatives that Forward is bringing. | WCNC Charlotte Patrick Newton, chair of the NC Forward Party joins WCNC Charlotte, the local NBC affiliate, to talk about the growth of the Forward Party amidst polls opening on primary day. September 15 | Forward VA Candidates Virtual Town Hall Come meet Forward candidates for VA House of Delegates, Kristin Farry District 72 and Brandon Givens District 11, with an introduction from a new Forward affiliate, Mayor Brian Vincent of Farmville, VA. The evening will be hosted by Forward's National Political Director, Kayla Berube, who is a resident of VA herself! You don't want to miss this town hall to learn more about our candidates and how they plan to bring Forward principles into office with them. September 15 | National High School Chapter Meeting Are you interested in becoming a leader in your community who brings politics back to the people? If so, this is your opportunity to take initiative by creating your own Young Forwardist Chapter. Join our National High School Chapter meeting. As part of our biweekly check-ins, we will be navigating ways the national Young Forwardists committee can best support our high school chapters. Whether it's providing club meeting materials to leadership training, we are here to help. Join us! September 16 | Run For Office With The Forward Party Have you ever thought about running for office, but wasn't sure what it really entailed or how to get started? Or maybe you have decided to run and would like a Forward Party endorsement. Join us on Tues Sept 16th at 6:30pm ET as we dive in to what it takes to get your name on the ballot, and how to apply for a Forward endorsement! September 17 | North Shore Fall Meetup We’re bringing the Forward Party spirit to the North Shore, and you’re invited! This isn’t just another meetup, it’s a chance to meet fellow Bay Staters who believe politics should serve people, not parties and talk directly about Forward’s strategy for becoming Massachusetts’ true second party—one that puts human values at the center. September 17 | NOVA FWD Social The NoVA Forward Party's September 2025 Social Event will be at PJ Skidoos in Fairfax on Wednesday, September 17th, starting at 7:00 PM. Forward Party members and guests will have an opportunity to socialize with each other, learn more about the Party and other opportunities to participate, all while enjoying wonderful food and drink! September 17 | Minnesota General Meeting Join the Minnesota Forward Party for their monthly general meeting. | NBC News | Atlantic City Focus | The Farmville Herald Copyright © 2025 Forward Party, all rights reserved. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I am respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250915-1-b&t=1&akid=10876%2E3935704%2E0qh5FS)
---
Hi there, it’s Gabby Giffords. Our final mid-month deadline of the quarter is tonight and I am respectfully asking: [**Will you contribute $3 or more to GIFFORDS PAC before midnight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250915-1-b&t=2&akid=10876%2E3935704%2E0qh5FS)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250915-1-b&t=3&akid=10876%2E3935704%2E0qh5FS)**
As someone who knows the horrors of politically-motivated violence all too well, I am working every day to make our communities safer from gun violence.
Gun violence is a uniquely American problem, but we don’t have to live like this. We have solutions.
GIFFORDS is working in states across the country to pass commonsense gun safety laws and elect leaders who will put our communities first.
But this won’t be easy.
The gun lobby has spent millions of dollars trying to block our progress. If we want to make real change happen, then we need to build the largest grassroots movement our country has ever seen.
**That’s where your donation comes in**. $3 might seem like it can do all of these things — several people have already donated to our mission by the time you read this, and it adds up quickly when we’re all chipping in.
[**So, will you contribute $3 (or more, if you can spare) so GIFFORDS PAC can reach voters across the country? Every dollar allows us to fund more ads and invest even more in the most competitive races >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250915-1-b&t=4&akid=10876%2E3935704%2E0qh5FS)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-sep25.LcBf1X&amount=3&refcode=em250915-1-b&t=23&akid=10876%2E3935704%2E0qh5FS)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-sep25.C0zaJv&refcode=em250915-1-b&t=24&akid=10876%2E3935704%2E0qh5FS)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-sep25.OgxiUJ&refcode=em250915-1-b&t=25&akid=10876%2E3935704%2E0qh5FS)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-sep25.HTMwGp&refcode=em250915-1-b&t=26&akid=10876%2E3935704%2E0qh5FS)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-sep25.fqUxQD&refcode=em250915-1-b&t=27&akid=10876%2E3935704%2E0qh5FS)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-sep25.LcBf1X&refcode=em250915-1-b&t=28&akid=10876%2E3935704%2E0qh5FS)**
---
****
With courage,
Gabby Giffords
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250915-1-b&t=29&akid=10876%2E3935704%2E0qh5FS)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=10876%2E3935704%2E0qh5FS) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: My endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
I’m reaching out today with an important message.
It’s Jane Fonda! You may know me as an actor or as a bit of a troublemaker in Washington for, well, decades. And I’m proud to still be at it.
There’s a lot of noise in politics these days, but when you find someone like my dear friend California Attorney General Rob Bonta, you pay attention.
**Rob and I have been in the climate fight together for some time now, and I can say with my whole heart he’s exactly the kind of leader I had in mind when I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: someone who listens to their community, stands up to powerful polluters, and never hesitates to put people over profits.**
His office has brought some of the most historic lawsuits against oil and gas giants to date — holding them accountable for decades long campaigns of deception that have hurt our communities.
[**But Rob’s sense of justice has put California squarely in the crosshairs of Big Oil and Donald Trump********. So now it’s our turn to have Rob’s back. Will you make a donation today to directly support his reelection campaign for California Attorney General?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250915?refcode=em20250915-1946&refcode2=1946_1088799_ITWif4&akid=1946%2E1088799%2EITWif4)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250915?refcode=em20250915-1946&amount=5&refcode2=1946_1088799_ITWif4&akid=1946%2E1088799%2EITWif4)**
When it comes to people who abuse their power and put our communities at risk, Rob doesn’t look the other way. He takes them on.
His office filed a groundbreaking lawsuit against some of the biggest oil companies in the world — ExxonMobil, Shell, Chevron, ConocoPhillips, and BP — along with the American Petroleum Institute. For decades they lied to the public, covered up the truth about climate change, and put their profits above our health and the health of our planet.
Rob is making sure these polluters finally answer for violating the law and lying to the public.
And while Trump and his MAGA allies work overtime to dismantle hard-fought solutions to the climate crisis, Rob unleashed a flurry of lawsuits over their attempts to freeze federal climate funding, halt offshore wind projects, and dismantle California’s environmental safeguards.
**That’s what makes him different: As Attorney General, Rob isn’t just calling out Donald Trump and Big Oil — he’s dragging them into places where they can finally be held accountable.**
But no one, not me, not even someone as fearless as Rob can do this work alone. It will take all of us rolling up our sleeves, joining the fight, and chipping in what we can to protect this seat from whoever Republicans throw into this race.
[**I’m asking again because this race truly matters for the future of our country: Will you join me in supporting Attorney General Rob Bonta by making your very own donation to his reelection campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250915?refcode=em20250915-1946&refcode2=1946_1088799_ITWif4&akid=1946%2E1088799%2EITWif4)
Your donation, along with contributions like it from people all over the country, is how we will defend this critical seat and chip away at Trump’s dangerous agenda once and for all.
Thank you so much for being a part of this movement.
With gratitude,
Xx Jane Fonda
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250915?refcode=em20250915-1946&refcode2=1946_1088799_ITWif4&akid=1946%2E1088799%2EITWif4)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em250915&t=1&refcode2=1946_1088799_ITWif4&akid=1946%2E1088799%2EITWif4)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1946%2E1088799%2EITWif4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1946%2E1088799%2EITWif4)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)
PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642

# [I Won't Be Lectured About Political Violence by the Modern Republican Party](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=173687900&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczNjg3OTAwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTc5NjE4OTQsImV4cCI6MTc2MDU1Mzg5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.D_KZKHUjdqV_sG0l17vNMTnRG1WJqZ1vGuLnxFk7OUw)
### Not from the people who mocked Melissa Hortman's murder, incited an insurrection, and turned tragedy into a weapon.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Sep 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=173687900&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczNjg3OTAwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1Nzk2MTg5NCwiZXhwIjoxNzYwNTUzODk0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0egeuyKRE-3PFzW5e1h7maSOBzu_x5BRmr2o_4TmTUQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=173687900&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczNjg3OTAwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTc5NjE4OTQsImV4cCI6MTc2MDU1Mzg5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.D_KZKHUjdqV_sG0l17vNMTnRG1WJqZ1vGuLnxFk7OUw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack..QYUpzx6x5A4LyDsuRgSKjj-QsP0EQo1lUmPIuzw7L5o?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/i-wont-be-lectured-about-political?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I've done my best this past week to contain the rage I'm feeling. I'm angry about Charlie Kirk's assassination and the impact it's having on our country. It was an attack on all Americans--whether you agreed with him or not.
But what's made me even angrier is watching the MAGA machine hijack this tragedy.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/3d2d565f-c605-4e6f-9adc-ba19ba34f797?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/3d2d565f-c605-4e6f-9adc-ba19ba34f797?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If Kirk's mission was truly about free speech, what we've seen from the right since his death is the opposite. It's become about doxxing, silencing, and vilifying anyone who dares to dissent--even people simply acknowledging that he was divisive. Let's be real: Kirk himself would have admitted as much. Yet people claiming to champion free expression now declare any uncomfortable truth as "disrespectful" or "dangerous."
That's the biggest takeaway from the past week of MAGA behavior: they're for free speech until it's aimed at them. Then it's "make this person famous," post their workplace, swarm their mentions, send threats. This isn't grieving. This isn't honoring anyone. It's weaponizing a murder to stir up more hate, fear, and violence.
Since Kirk's assassination, historically Black colleges have faced bomb threats and lockdowns. The DNC in Washington received multiple threats. Democratic leaders have had to cancel events over credible threats. Celebrating someone's murder is vile. Weaponizing it to incite more hate and violence is somehow worse.
And we're ignoring the bigger issue: America is a powder keg. Disaffected young men are diving into internet rabbit holes, getting radicalized, and snapping. That's the root of what happened here--not "the left," not even MAGA alone, but a generation lost to rage, guns, and nihilism.
Whether the shooter leaned left or right doesn't matter. The pipeline is the same: lonely men, radicalized online, armed to the teeth, aiming at soft targets. That's the disease. And it could be treated--if we had a functioning political system.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/3d2d565f-c605-4e6f-9adc-ba19ba34f797?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/3d2d565f-c605-4e6f-9adc-ba19ba34f797?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I went on NewsNation last night and a conservative pundit claimed the shooter shared the ideology of Democratic leaders. I called bullshit. If you're resorting to murder to win a political argument you share zero ideology with me. None. And unlike the right, every Democratic leader and influencer has condemned this violence--unequivocally.
Meanwhile, Republicans are cherry-picking a handful of people cheering Kirk's death online and pretending that represents the entire left. It doesn't. Democrats are trying to keep the country from tearing itself apart. Republicans? Doing the exact opposite.
Yes, they're hosting vigils for Kirk--which is good. But the rhetoric pouring out alongside them is toxic. Trump calling people like me "scum." Nancy Mace and many others spread anti-trans rumors before police even identified the shooter. Laura Loomer sending threats to me and my son. Steve Bannon declaring war on Democrats. None of this is random--it's the result of a Republican Party led by people who care more about rage-baiting Americans than solving problems.
What America needs now is unity. Trump could have used this moment to bring people together--to stand with victims of political violence across party lines, call a summit, calm the nation. Not only would it have been the right thing to do, it would have been good politics. But he won't. He can't. Division is the strategy.
Instead, the GOP is letting grifters like Laura Loomer and Nick Fuentes--both of whom were attacking Kirk and calling him a "fascist" before his murder--set the national tone. They can't even acknowledge the pain this country is in, let alone offer hope. People are scared to go to school, to work, to live. And still, we do nothing.
And then Republicans want to lecture Democrats about rhetoric? No thanks. Not from the same crowd that laughed off the attack on Nancy Pelosi's husband, mocked Melissa Hortman's murder, stood silent while Trump incited an insurrection and pardoned cop beaters, and shrugged when Governor Whitmer was almost kidnapped or when an arsonist nearly burned down Governor Shapiro's home.
I believe all of us have a responsibility to do better, but I won't be lectured by them--and neither should you.
Stand tall. Keep fighting.

Not from the people who mocked Melissa Hortman's murder, incited an insurrection, and turned tragedy into a weapon. | | | Sep 15 | | | | | | | | | | | | I've done my best this past week to contain the rage I'm feeling. I'm angry about Charlie Kirk's assassination and the impact it's having on our country. It was an attack on all Americans--whether you agreed with him or not. But what's made me even angrier is watching the MAGA machine hijack this tragedy. If Kirk's mission was truly about free speech, what we've seen from the right since his death is the opposite. It's become about doxxing, silencing, and vilifying anyone who dares to dissent--even people simply acknowledging that he was divisive. Let's be real: Kirk himself would have admitted as much. Yet people claiming to champion free expression now declare any uncomfortable truth as "disrespectful" or "dangerous." That's the biggest takeaway from the past week of MAGA behavior: they're for free speech until it's aimed at them. Then it's "make this person famous," post their workplace, swarm their mentions, send threats. This isn't grieving. This isn't honoring anyone. It's weaponizing a murder to stir up more hate, fear, and violence. Since Kirk's assassination, historically Black colleges have faced bomb threats and lockdowns. The DNC in Washington received multiple threats. Democratic leaders have had to cancel events over credible threats. Celebrating someone's murder is vile. Weaponizing it to incite more hate and violence is somehow worse. And we're ignoring the bigger issue: America is a powder keg. Disaffected young men are diving into internet rabbit holes, getting radicalized, and snapping. That's the root of what happened here--not "the left," not even MAGA alone, but a generation lost to rage, guns, and nihilism. Whether the shooter leaned left or right doesn't matter. The pipeline is the same: lonely men, radicalized online, armed to the teeth, aiming at soft targets. That's the disease. And it could be treated--if we had a functioning political system. I went on NewsNation last night and a conservative pundit claimed the shooter shared the ideology of Democratic leaders. I called bullshit. If you're resorting to murder to win a political argument you share zero ideology with me. None. And unlike the right, every Democratic leader and influencer has condemned this violence--unequivocally. Meanwhile, Republicans are cherry-picking a handful of people cheering Kirk's death online and pretending that represents the entire left. It doesn't. Democrats are trying to keep the country from tearing itself apart. Republicans? Doing the exact opposite. Yes, they're hosting vigils for Kirk--which is good. But the rhetoric pouring out alongside them is toxic. Trump calling people like me "scum." Nancy Mace and many others spread anti-trans rumors before police even identified the shooter. Laura Loomer sending threats to me and my son. Steve Bannon declaring war on Democrats. None of this is random--it's the result of a Republican Party led by people who care more about rage-baiting Americans than solving problems. What America needs now is unity. Not only would it have been the right thing to do, it would have been good politics. But he won't. He can't. Division is the strategy. Instead, the GOP is letting grifters like Laura Loomer and Nick Fuentes--both of whom were attacking Kirk and calling him a "fascist" before his murder--set the national tone. They can't even acknowledge the pain this country is in, let alone offer hope. People are scared to go to school, to work, to live. And still, we do nothing. And then Republicans want to lecture Democrats about rhetoric? No thanks. Not from the same crowd that laughed off the attack on Nancy Pelosi's husband, mocked Melissa Hortman's murder, stood silent while Trump incited an insurrection and pardoned cop beaters, and shrugged when Governor Whitmer was almost kidnapped or when an arsonist nearly burned down Governor Shapiro's home. I believe all of us have a responsibility to do better, but I won't be lectured by them--and neither should you. Stand tall. Keep fighting. name: Michael Bennet
subject: Four freedoms we all deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-bennet [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-bennet]
The freedom to rise, the freedom to learn, the freedom from violence, and the freedom to govern ourselves.
I believe that every American is entitled to those four fundamental freedoms. Those values are what have guided my work in public service.
Here’s how we can achieve these freedoms right here in Colorado:
By ensuring Colorado families can afford healthcare, childcare, and housing; by fighting childhood poverty; and by building an economy that works for everyone, not just those at the top, we can achieve the freedom to rise.
By modernizing our education system to set our kids up for success, no matter what zip code they are born into, and paying our educators what they deserve, we can achieve the freedom to learn.
By partnering with local law enforcement and communities to keep Coloradans safe, fighting the opioid epidemic, and combating the extremism that flourishes on social media, we can achieve freedom from violence.
By protecting Coloradans' voting rights, keeping the government out of our bedrooms and doctors' offices, and reforming our electoral system so the people, not dark money, have the most power, we can achieve the freedom to govern ourselves.
Achieving these goals in the political climate we are living through right now may feel impossible, but I know fighting for what is fundamental will always be worth it.
That’s why I’m running for Governor. Working together, right here at home, we can truly achieve these fundamental freedoms and provide the rest of the country with the hopeful and optimistic vision we desperately need.
I can’t and wouldn’t want to do this without you by our side. Will you chip in $25, split between Tim Kaine's Common Ground PAC and myself, to fuel this campaign and help us build a better future for us all? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-bennet]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-bennet?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-bennet?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-bennet?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-bennet]
Thank you,
Michael

Peter,

I know it’s hard -- especially now -- but I want you to try something with me.

I want you to imagine a tomorrow where discourse is respectful again, where we listen, debate, and find common ground without tearing each other down.

Imagine a tomorrow where our democracy truly reflects the voices of the people -- where communities come together to shape the future we share.

Imagine a tomorrow where every American has quality health care they can count on, and the peace of mind knowing their home and financial future is still secure.

And imagine a tomorrow where clean energy powers thriving communities, creating good-paying jobs while preserving a healthy planet for the next generation.

That’s the future I believe in. And it’s not just a dream -- it’s a choice we can make together. So I ask you to imagine this with me, and then consider what that future is worth to you.

**[This September 30th deadline is our chance to show that people-powered campaigns like ours can carry that vision into reality. clean_body: | = = Peter, I know it’s hard -- especially now -- but I want you to try something with me. I want you to imagine a tomorrow where discourse is respectful again, where we listen, debate, and find common ground without tearing each other down. Imagine a tomorrow where our democracy truly reflects the voices of the people -- where communities come together to shape the future we share. Imagine a tomorrow where every American has quality health care they can count on, and the peace of mind knowing their home and financial future is still secure. And imagine a tomorrow where clean energy powers thriving communities, creating good-paying jobs while preserving a healthy planet for the next generation. That’s the future I believe in. And it’s not just a dream -- it’s a choice we can make together. So I ask you to imagine this with me, and then consider what that future is worth to you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Sincerely, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

| Peter,
Republican activists across Massachusetts are holding more vigils for Charlie Kirk this week, and the MassGOP will continue to promote them. If you have news about a vigil that hasn't been featured yet, please reach out to [mark@massgop.com](mailto:mark@massgop.com) to add yours to our next update or submit details on our [Events Page](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001myVMYE4IH99t-_gz979U4qawP1EA4_kmjo_eNW3A4s_jg6XO2sSxSMBHtst1QGxQZWNjFoNf3KllEf5nD-29-33gMEmENIiZ3HfzHBZ5NQsIOIXhvclT6WYWNZVZWBBjEFwSEBl1AC7LK-lvYaOo2NWA7OrqRuof&c=L5qGDt22KDT6zp9ekD2KHMOnthRgmJw9RSooRAq0yYQqNRy4YeGdIA==&ch=XgIbwFTpEhFomXF3uby09nPQUqXru2WHergOmtNyyfgGK-JAVm-9bw==).
Additionally, we extend our thanks to Turning Point USA and their representative Angelina for speaking at the MassGOP's Unity Rally this past Saturday.

name: Team Dunn
subject: Let’s keep the momentum!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
Stand with Reagan Dunn for a more accountable King County | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=427fa7821e&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fb8eb3cf8304/lets-keep-the-momentum?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=8ab4ead851&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friend,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing because something big just happened -- and we need your help to make sure it leads to lasting change. The Seattle Times editorial board recently published a recognition of Councilmember Reagan Dunn's work, acknowledging him for _" deserving credit for pushing accountability at King County."_ This is a powerful validation that Reagan is doing the hard work. He's holding systems accountable, demanding fiscal responsibility, and fighting to ensure that every taxpayer dollar is tracked and spent wisely.
_**[Click here to read the full](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=6ba20342a5&e=77eef70c61)[ article](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=2b9e175277&e=77eef70c61)[ about Reagan's work.](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=828b047ead&e=77eef70c61)**_
**But recognition alone is not enough.** To keep this momentum going -- and make sure we don't slide backwards -- Reagan needs a robust campaign to re-elect him. That means resources: staff, outreach, communications, legal compliance, and more.

That's where **you** come in. Can I count on you to [make a contribution](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=1ad1b5f634&e=77eef70c61) to Reagan Dunn's re-election campaign today? Whether it's $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can manage, every dollar helps ensure accountability, transparency, and strong public service in King County.

Here's how your support matters:
* **Amplifies Reagan 's message** so more people know he's the candidate fighting for accountability.
* **Helps counter opponents** who don't share the same commitment to responsible governance.
* **Secures the infrastructure** Reagan needs now -- phone banks, canvassing literature, public events -- to win this race.

If you believe that King County deserves leadership that doesn't just talk about accountability but _delivers_ it, please [chip in today](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=c7b8dfd3a1&e=77eef70c61)! Your financial support ensures Reagan can keep fighting the good fight. **\---------------
[Contribute here!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=9dae24a162&e=77eef70c61)
\---------------- ** Thank you for your support! Reagan Dunn

---

That means resources: staff, outreach, communications, legal compliance, and more. That's where you come in. Can I count on you to to Reagan Dunn's re-election campaign today? Whether it's $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can manage, every dollar helps ensure accountability, transparency, and strong public service in King County. Here's how your support matters: Amplifies Reagan 's message so more people know he's the candidate fighting for accountability. Helps counter opponents who don't share the same commitment to responsible governance. Secures the infrastructure Reagan needs now -- phone banks, canvassing literature, public events -- to win this race. If you believe that King County deserves leadership that doesn't just talk about accountability but delivers it, please ! Your financial support ensures Reagan can keep fighting the good fight. \--------------- \---------------- ** Thank you for your support! Reagan Dunn | | | | Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn P.O. Box 40417 Bellevue, WA 98015 Email: mailto:info@reagandunn.com | |

name: James Talarico for Texas
subject: Will you personally endorse James for Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
We just launched our campaign to take back Texas’ U.S. Senate seat, and it’s critical that we demonstrate the depth of grassroots enthusiasm for our movement in these early days.
That includes building a list of personal endorsers who support James and believe we can flip Texas.
[**Can you add your name to personally endorse James for the U.S. Senate today? It may seem like a small action, but it speaks volumes about the strength of our campaign.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/659?c0=em-250915-personalendorse.gbV9ER&source=em250915-1&refcode2=38.1347274.jkIPGl&t=1&akid=38%2E1347274%2EjkIPGl)
Look, we know our opponents will have the backing of the Washington establishment, well-funded super PACs, and the very same billionaires who have rigged the status quo against working people.
But James is not for sale, and he’s never going to be. He’s the only member of the Texas Legislature who has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money.
**Because he believes that power comes from the people.**
Winning this race won’t be easy. It will require all of us. That’s why James is committed to building a true grassroots campaign from day one. Your support is part of that.
[**Please add your name to personally endorse James Talarico for the U.S. Senate. It would mean a lot to him and show everyone that our movement is ready for the challenges ahead.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/659?c0=em-250915-personalendorse.gbV9ER&source=em250915-1&refcode2=38.1347274.jkIPGl&t=2&akid=38%2E1347274%2EjkIPGl)
Thank you in advance,
Team Talarico

body:
Haley needs your help to win in Michigan and flip the Senate for Democrats

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=826%2E49239%2EVpyKbS)

---
Hi, null, it's Sam here – Haley's campaign manager.
I wanted to share our new **State of the Race Memo** – and also ask you to[ chip in $5 to help us hit our urgent $150,000 mid-month goal by midnight tonight. We're still falling short, so we'd truly appreciate anything you can give. ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5849?t=3&akid=826%2E49239%2EVpyKbS)

Here's the memo:
| | **Memo:** Battleground Michigan's Open Senate Seat
**Candidate:** Democrat Haley Stevens
**Date:** September 15th, 2025
**For:**[ null null ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5849?t=4&akid=826%2E49239%2EVpyKbS)
---
* In 2018, **Haley Stevens flipped a battleground House seat from red to blue and delivered the majority back to Democrats.** She knows how to win tough races, and she's not afraid of a fight. But she needs your help to keep Michigan blue and win back the Senate.

---
* It's almost certain: **Senate control will come down to Michigan**. That's why _The Washington Post_ named Michigan one of the top four races to watch and _The Hill_ listed Michigan as one of the top Senate seats most likely to flip.

---
* **Haley is statistically tied with her Trump-endorsed Republican opponent among independent voters** – which is why _The Cook Political Report_ has ranked this race a pure "Toss Up."

---
* GOP megadonors will be spending BIG in Michigan. **A right-wing super PAC already raised $5 million, and last year, Republicans spent nearly $80 million to help MAGA Mike Rogers try and buy a Senate seat in MI.** Thankfully, Rogers lost. But now he's running again – and there may be even more money backing him this time.

---
This is a critical moment in our campaign, null. There's so much at stake, and it's vital that we have the resources to fight back against the GOP money machine.
That's why I'm asking: **[Will you rush $5 before the midnight deadline to help us reach our $150,000 mid-month goal? Every dollar will help Haley win in Michigan and flip the Senate for Democrats.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5849?t=5&akid=826%2E49239%2EVpyKbS)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5848?t=6&akid=826%2E49239%2EVpyKbS)
---
Thank you so much,

Sam
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5902?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=826%2E49239%2EVpyKbS) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5847?t=8&akid=826%2E49239%2EVpyKbS)

Thank you,
Haley

body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=992cdedd35bb487abd22e11551ffba6c&_e=VIignK1X9FKbwaCZzbDg0RYva5xUxEfKqY7w8R8rPHGTG54TJsqc7W1zxAw4ZO-Je7OtQHtIGAA1iOUrCmqMaFiLgTcsiOdetE1VvtTcUJjGA__4qyrGGqPnRcHDMkO26J8yGVQAnkDBSSAxm0hiM-vOl5vj9JPGiYbLwy92ivNs9dLuP9FD7G1ucNkWCv99MMqwv_6CMkBZi5VCZbpJ4ZJlrZcHeudPIBaKDcutCz8n9cnjhj4i4tr2dBvxK7XhZv6jMtEkE-KPXsc0ZPuK6DD3M7XEor8SG769nEZQjTmXTs3GoRWWo-DlSE12-YiiIBvdJyqRvA_DaJ516YdfwIIp-fLLydqrqiVo3UmockhLUZojCEvU18_n_M2cF8ut-oE1MQ6bDgoau45ddYQRiaJ5_vUQdJlWyNdrSbNFGD99KzMbZIDOsVg3fRqcjibxwZukNYcTmGKN2vsAFNIqqQR2eF-7AZuDTi6KI_NBxtTUgkdxQmCaf_b2xK0OOaQ8UPgymFvFDYudDfeYkFj4zTX7qBwXzyZi8z79kyDG2qGOMS8KGTjT4uC23SoAm1Mk6HrfVAXgZUOEf8ozVV3qI20XJHZfRpGisQW_h5Sk4hQA4YsedGdAbUrrwHg12Rgz1XC2l0FgErfZT9WhFOykUg%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=992cdedd35bb487abd22e11551ffba6c&_e=VIignK1X9FKbwaCZzbDg0RYva5xUxEfKqY7w8R8rPHGTG54TJsqc7W1zxAw4ZO-Je7OtQHtIGAA1iOUrCmqMaFiLgTcsiOdetE1VvtTcUJjGA__4qyrGGqPnRcHDMkO26J8yGVQAnkDBSSAxm0hiM-vOl5vj9JPGiYbLwy92ivNs9dLuP9FD7G1ucNkWCv99MMqwv_6CMkBZi5VCZbpJ4dnbqswnq6kF3P2gfmz00dZ7g71MA_wyaM2aIyS9BJ4S1GQ3HlUNTZvSpQW4S20oNFsZkJQNkpzdDyRZ34_-5CmegsvDyzJ6AcZkp6-0eNnAzwxxzXR4_XvjAxFDxhTdbCdRAyeEFGsRGQe8DAyB4raeNVI3wc39XOFGZ2HlNiF8KnrRTNab-9U2kQPN3UsPE6veo44x_qcSBmE3sz_20BTpk7L_7XMmPCIPWUiZ3acsrIa4P-dDKELlhJi9QyeI7psi4prv2L90FhcTJ0J3QnyWVw1hzzxrpbqijdsQTt5x7kmtrEjo57f5LZSA9xGNs0feOLY9KMI4apwxmSMZPKtxzhyCODvEYsJsRJBYDk4xrOoa9Sx7dO3_wcOFkNC6QCxcO2LALrxGwUjyyJ9EffzK9bz8ZmhhYfIaCpiilQ_Vv698XUVEvbpytonzEIvJ9w%3D%3D)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=992cdedd35bb487abd22e11551ffba6c&_e=VIignK1X9FKbwaCZzbDg0RYva5xUxEfKqY7w8R8rPHGTG54TJsqc7W1zxAw4ZO-Je7OtQHtIGAA1iOUrCmqMaFiLgTcsiOdetE1VvtTcUJjGA__4qyrGGqPnRcHDMkO26J8yGVQAnkDBSSAxm0hiM-vOl5vj9JPGiYbLwy92ivNs9dLuP9FD7G1ucNkWCv99MMqwv_6CMkBZi5VCZbpJ4eMMAoNctjHt69FQ5AAcH2C5pHlMwKcuewGYDwWKb0zrH1ZhVkziPxE_ODVzUh3VSzTENuj61rgHeqii30952WUnPO3vZnCkpcIpz7QtSiLCkxmHjjZYxQfZ1vMGUDvYAdri5dvsWcgxnmuYrwAoL1E1MJf0_4_VG4GeEwoWvOfzoi6QFniB7PQmnZOPVQlzLz5qc9q30RtdXUFV6inDHVXZyC50Eme5qJRwVYK85QpxwyHzQP3OYXmSr53fRadg71pHRzD1O7Id-YsmVelMy_MdgJUavpHM1TUS3-pCZyMzxTjE5K9t0-B8x1uN9kcz7EHSrliLh3GMokmocPFbh5VgzIxGct6Oxx-z7a8fZ7-2bsU4uxJAfiF2gJqW6uC8_K4KRFmYrTxBQaNXFWe2fTdv49iBT84nzRO-K7bARjOLDRmC_s_NOVMCgSNFW-Hzcg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Friend, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more...** And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

| | Peter,
---
We're living in the midst of difficult and divisive times. The godless, secular society that's been pushed on us on for decades has failed us. It's time to honor the values that make America strong, and made America great. That’s why I just introduced the _In God We Trust Act_ —legislation that would require the national motto to be displayed on every federal building in the United States. This isn’t a new idea. _“In God We Trust”_ goes all the way back to President Lincoln. In 1956, during the rise of godless communism, Congress officially made it our national motto. It’s a reminder that God is the ultimate source of any liberty and prosperity. But somewhere along the way, Washington forgot. Instead of honoring faith and freedom, federal buildings are covered in woke propaganda. That needs to change.
---
| |

name: Anika Page
subject: Now More Than Ever, We Must Reach the Next Generation
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msla2025-12849996?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good morning Friend,
The past week has been a sobering reminder of how fragile our culture can feel. In the wake of tragedy, it is clearer than ever that we must be intentional about reaching our young people—equipping them to think critically, act with courage, and stand firm in defense of American principles. That is exactly why we created the **Mississippi Leadership Academy.** This completely **free program** invests in high school and college students, giving them the knowledge and skills to become effective change agents in our state. We want them to leave not only with leadership experience, but also with the confidence to defend the values of freedom, faith, and free markets.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2022b8dfb1&e=5703353baa)
---
_Apply by clicking on the photo above!_
| **Why Your Student Should Join:**
* Just **two Saturdays** (one per month)
* **Volunteer hours signed off** (ideal for college/scholarship applications)
* **Unmatched access** to statewide leaders, legislators, and coalition partners
* **Proven results:** 35% of past students have gone on to intern with leaders like the State Auditor and Attorney General
* **Completely free** to apply and participate

America will remain strong as long as we pass these principles to the next generation. That begins here in Mississippi—with your son, daughter, or grandchild. Applications close very soon, and we only have a few spots left. Please don’t let your student miss this opportunity.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Good morning Friend, The past week has been a sobering reminder of how fragile our culture can feel. In the wake of tragedy, it is clearer than ever that we must be intentional about reaching our young people—equipping them to think critically, act with courage, and stand firm in defense of American principles. That is exactly why we created the Mississippi Leadership Academy. This completely free program invests in high school and college students, giving them the knowledge and skills to become effective change agents in our state. We want them to leave not only with leadership experience, but also with the confidence to defend the values of freedom, faith, and free markets. | Apply by clicking on the photo above! | Why Your Student Should Join: Just two Saturdays (one per month) Volunteer hours signed off (ideal for college/scholarship applications) Unmatched access to statewide leaders, legislators, and coalition partners Proven results: 35% of past students have gone on to intern with leaders like the State Auditor and Attorney General Completely free to apply and participate America will remain strong as long as we pass these principles to the next generation. That begins here in Mississippi—with your son, daughter, or grandchild. Applications close very soon, and we only have a few spots left. Please don’t let your student miss this opportunity. | "Apply now!" | Thank you for standing with us as we prepare the next generation of leaders. | | Warmest wishes, Anika Page Director of Operations | | |

body:
| | |
**** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39nsSfQmGl1-n75GcF1au1lu-hGBR9gnfQtYqYHpon1N-J6s1eb8Gt0p9dYfL1RgemFW2FaEn051BmIfbvg9hiGPsJggMJSFiv-94Y5yefSuHteHkhhzDoaa5AyyFm-Ce35M-ZtTzK_rjlGck3pCzJCVuk6n_aQ5dj5hGDoAo7q2202KnkI8jkX-a4U9XnLaHLv32jJtMPrX8RvNSDngI32i7v08uQaGuUoetUEaWGgpGC96-EOcfxsLDBLZbhUs6MUNO4EioEGvNOtUtHZB2TuftFzn6E4NkjFR0IyV0mWxPv0Wn5vpi8ldBoAYeU1wBlnZwZXwx0N4bC38rQlVOoxDO1giPduU35neaZZGOObEA/4jx/rHXJq64yRw-qKsleMYTi-Q/h0/h001.I7P0POct8f2yfumTDHnHi5gn88Jd9uiS4_9YhPKzWT8)
Our nation is at a crossroads, and local leaders like you can safeguard democracy where it matters most—right at home. Step into the arena and help shape school boards, city councils, and county commissions. Peter, this is your moment. Start with our first [Local Democracy Project virtual training](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39nsSfQmGl1-n75GcF1au1lu-hGBR9gnfQtYqYHpon1N-J6s1eb8Gt0p9dYfL1RgemFW2FaEn051BmIfbvg9hiGPsJggMJSFiv-94Y5yefSuCA9NeTxVhIqpzquoDnP27O1r1iqBPMfZPk2Rwda_pVKnxgyfrBZdlY3VHQUDtJ5FcgFUEXeuZzrHkgJHEQ8ERQnxEoW7fIPBdrMT9rQop8Nk9fIdbogDwveDbZ_j-Klip3pSYIgJLSSKyRYSlsLcX8LpqcbuqJCRM25iyFExGAH0q-t4SVyYNwzK7PDqMJG0-bV5AjVFQncsUhUjXw_hkUZG4k7uFMTCvsq9Rvksqc0r_Qss4_wbkheQ3tKuOoJvQ/4jx/rHXJq64yRw-qKsleMYTi-Q/h1/h001.dXWMOb1tbjpqj4APN16uPgBwLxSURO3Vbil5sMULOGk)—your roadmap to running a successful campaign. [**Training #1: Understanding What it Takes to Run**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39nsSfQmGl1-n75GcF1au1lu-hGBR9gnfQtYqYHpon1N-J6s1eb8Gt0p9dYfL1RgemFW2FaEn051BmIfbvg9hiGPsJggMJSFiv-94Y5yefSuDwkJrTucYyHGE_ASWIZMSRP7E9yzd08FgiOrQOd7zYt9sUCfithlU3H0_8yKKkafiAeMQw2bJkSBcySwo5ijNQZUoNfnPugKrzRlYVhRXzbF1HnsmrcK3oZX3vmbXsU2Rjimu8vV0Zkok4kTYTMOLh_7ODrf9Q-HTGaX5ohfQhRsBDKtV032c_1WOwHEvIQoqMg5T0EIZxQXTEBPT5EnBrIeBM60xMV4K6CPv9Z_jt8j9v2quwKp7kkuJ9Fu05iaw/4jx/rHXJq64yRw-qKsleMYTi-Q/h2/h001.XRteYXRSAwrUrhoSzqZOWNbNT4WtNEupTY-cnLcai6g)
[**September 17 | 6:00–7:00 PM PT**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39nsSfQmGl1-n75GcF1au1lu-hGBR9gnfQtYqYHpon1N-J6s1eb8Gt0p9dYfL1RgemFW2FaEn051BmIfbvg9hiGPsJggMJSFiv-94Y5yefSuNO4JebLxy9eEwJfb6Rby2SiMcG-Ro-6JM6YXs2EAQYmiHC2rGJz6CWN1yqUzjF6_JKKEUzSyAbdJb5dD05kYB1szCHM0U9MeRRvvuNptLjzU-fZbgpTBRs-GQsWBW4wXQht6y0GeUC8_aB0F6B_MvXDGwMEgtPbLGqeax3iDECE_XR--vRV3Iy_hb8RIBJkhxGXH-R2PBWXpkJYHKrTgNjXwNxHCWPcsg1KIpdjscJ_Kr0YBLbBMBuY3VdGCXimpQ/4jx/rHXJq64yRw-qKsleMYTi-Q/h3/h001.IIM5uzGPLsXLCcRkBSDGGsey0cHGVPUIh9SMze_J0d0) Get real-world strategies on fundraising, field organizing, and building a winning platform from featured speakers: Derek Marshall and Chris Ochoa. Derek Marshall is the founder of the Local Democracy Project and has a rich history as a campaigner for Bernie Sanders and a former congressional candidate. With his extensive experience in grassroots organizing, Derek is dedicated to empowering everyday citizens to take charge of their political futures. Chris Ochoa is a passionate community advocate and the first Democratic Latino elected to the Hesperia City Council. He actively engages with the High Desert Progressive Democrats and the San Bernardino County Democratic Central Committee. With a solid educational foundation and a commitment to public service, he knows how to engage effectively with voters. Together, they embody the spirit of local leadership and change. [Join us on September 17 at 6pm PT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39nsSfQmGl1-n75GcF1au1lu-hGBR9gnfQtYqYHpon1N-J6s1eb8Gt0p9dYfL1RgemFW2FaEn051BmIfbvg9hiGPsJggMJSFiv-94Y5yefSuK6RsIVlSt1WRj9nANHU2aIV5BkrwuT_5qRaZvOTPwqE_Xu6e7x8yPNz5RKQNlPrXT7mw8VIMVQfrcMIfUU1g-7f_ZYL14KpwdYH3h4-wZobLqOGpeQzB1xbaQa0lMNoC-e9MqgQLv1hWEQXy13R88VXWS1ZyxnwWvpPe6-dxlzTNZKE4lDgIlJcMuzLMCgPIxIYfbPhOPkzWRMxb9UREBDzA3y--QHCqBaohmONFaXTxqqaFBGZhn_LYbkMc65OPg/4jx/rHXJq64yRw-qKsleMYTi-Q/h4/h001.4mOe61AGBvECmN2BZu0PXWdM9f3avUn9zVdLAB0og2w) to learn from their experiences and insights! Take the first step. Sign up now.
Local Democracy Project

Chris Ochoa is a passionate community advocate and the first Democratic Latino elected to the Hesperia City Council. He actively engages with the High Desert Progressive Democrats and the San Bernardino County Democratic Central Committee. With a solid educational foundation and a commitment to public service, he knows how to engage effectively with voters. Together, they embody the spirit of local leadership and change. to learn from their experiences and insights! Take the first step. Sign up now. Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. I may not be able to predict what’s to come, but I do know one thing. If we stand together, we can rise above this. This administration isn’t forever, and we have the ability to push back.

Eric

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I made a difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
It’s a bold step, but we can’t be timid right now.
#
Peter, I just met with my senior team, and at the end of the meeting, I made a big decision:
**_I told my team to place a massive new ad buy across New Jersey — earlier than we originally planned for._**
Peter, I’m going to explain why we took this step, but if you support our decision to be bigger and bolder in our fight to defeat MAGA extremism here in New Jersey, **[I hope you’ll split a few dollars between my team and State Democrats Committee to help close our budget gap and fund this new ad buy →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94470?refcode=em20250915-9426&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9426%2E614464%2EHQStNd)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94470?refcode=em20250915-9426&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9426%2E614464%2EHQStNd)**
Here’s why we made this choice:
Jack Ciattarelli just made a massive investment in his own TV ads. $2,000,000 to be exact – and you can bet he’ll spend every dollar he can attacking me.
But we also know that when voters learn the truth about who I am, what I stand for, and how my vision for New Jersey differs from Ciattarelli’s, I earn their support.
**And we know that, with the polls this tight and the stakes so incredibly high, we can’t afford to let Ciattarelli’s attacks go unanswered. Now is the time for us to think big and fight back.**
This is how we do it, Peter. We’re going to get our message out everywhere. We’re going to make sure every voter knows the truth. And we’re going to do every damn thing within our power to win this fight for New Jersey’s future — and stop a MAGA lackey who takes marching orders from Trump from becoming our next governor.
**[Peter, to be candid with you, I made this choice because I believe that our grassroots team will come through the way you always have and help us power this campaign to victory. To close our budget gap and fund this big ad buy, we’ve set a goal of 100 online donations before midnight tonight. If you could step up and split a contribution between my campaign and State Democrats Committee, I would be incredibly grateful.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94470?refcode=em20250915-9426&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9426%2E614464%2EHQStNd)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94471?refcode=em20250915-9426&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9426%2E614464%2EHQStNd) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94471?refcode=em20250915-9426&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9426%2E614464%2EHQStNd) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94471?refcode=em20250915-9426&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9426%2E614464%2EHQStNd) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94471?refcode=em20250915-9426&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9426%2E614464%2EHQStNd) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94471?refcode=em20250915-9426&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9426%2E614464%2EHQStNd) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94471?refcode=em20250915-9426&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9426%2E614464%2EHQStNd) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94470?refcode=em20250915-9426&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9426%2E614464%2EHQStNd)

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: This message is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
_Peter, this is Mazie. Below is a message from my colleague Sen. Jon Ossoff, who is running for re-election in Georgia. Please read his message below._
* * *
Peter — Normally, when I write you, I like it to be different from most of the political emails you get. I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, and the surreal experience of working in the Senate at this singular and disturbing moment in American history. This email is different. It's more direct. I am reaching out this morning with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close. Here's why: Right now, Trump’s MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record. **It is not normal for the GOP to be up on the airwaves and online with this kind of attack this far out from the election. It’s because they know Georgia is key. They know I’m strong. And they need to knock me down.** _Will we let them?_ We knew these attacks were coming. But we’re facing _more_ outside spending, _earlier_ than we had expected — which means we’re going to have to ramp up our fundraising in order to fight back and set the record straight. We will fight back. And we _will_ win. But I can’t do it alone. I really need your help right now. **[Can I count on you to split a contribution to my reelection campaign and Mazie Hirono today before our mid-month fundraising deadline? Thanks in advance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115274959/569764027/-1575711862?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_MMG_AC_20250915_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGFkNjJjYy02OTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jEUGznbLjkEOD3dXV9Ovy33IPB114B3vCfvNvF4QqLc=)** | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115274960/569764028/-1575711862?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_MMG_AC_20250915_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGFkNjJjYy02OTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jEUGznbLjkEOD3dXV9Ovy33IPB114B3vCfvNvF4QqLc=)

name: Mike
subject: Working Families Can't Do It Alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
and they shouldn't have to.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9b2d4d44bbbf/working-families-cant-do-it-alone?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | Hi Peter,
It doesn’t matter where I go, people across Wisconsin are saying the same thing: **it’s getting harder to get by.** And they’re not wrong:
* **Prices keep climbing.** Inflation in the Midwest hit its highest level of the year last month; grocery staples like meat, produce, and eggs are all up.

* **Housing is out of reach.** Home prices have been rising faster than incomes for years, leaving too many families priced out of the market.

* **Families have no cushion.** More than half of households say they couldn’t cover an unexpected expense like a car repair or medical bill without serious strain.

Yet the burden of keeping this country moving forward keeps falling on the same people: **workers and small business owners.** We pay more in taxes, higher prices, and face more uncertainty, while those who benefit the most from our economy are asked to do the least.And my opponent? He’s happy to collect his paycheck and protect the status quo instead of fighting for us.I believe Wisconsin deserves better. We need leaders who will:
* **Ease the burden of rising costs** on families, not make excuses for them.

* **Make housing more affordable** so homeownership isn’t just for the wealthy.

* **Hold the wealthiest and biggest corporations accountable** so the responsibility of keeping this country going isn’t carried only by workers and small businesses.

This campaign is about responsibility and fairness, creating a Wisconsin where hard work is rewarded and families can thrive.Together, we can build a Wisconsin where hard work is rewarded. A Wisconsin that works for everyone, not just a select few.

---
| | Thank you,
Mike Van Someren
---
| | Want to know more? Want to help elect people that actually want to work for you? Go to [www.mikevansomeren.com](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=aef5aec9e6&e=356c0699dd) to donate and learn more.

You can [update your preferences](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=31c9df9df4&e=356c0699dd&c=0c5398fe77) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=31c9df9df4&t=b&e=356c0699dd&c=0c5398fe77).

clean_body: and they shouldn't have to. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hi Peter, It doesn’t matter where I go, people across Wisconsin are saying the same thing: it’s getting harder to get by. And they’re not wrong: Prices keep climbing. Inflation in the Midwest hit its highest level of the year last month; grocery staples like meat, produce, and eggs are all up. Housing is out of reach. Home prices have been rising faster than incomes for years, leaving too many families priced out of the market. Families have no cushion. More than half of households say they couldn’t cover an unexpected expense like a car repair or medical bill without serious strain. Yet the burden of keeping this country moving forward keeps falling on the same people: workers and small business owners. We pay more in taxes, higher prices, and face more uncertainty, while those who benefit the most from our economy are asked to do the least.And my opponent? He’s happy to collect his paycheck and protect the status quo instead of fighting for us.I believe Wisconsin deserves better. We need leaders who will: Ease the burden of rising costs on families, not make excuses for them. Make housing more affordable so homeownership isn’t just for the wealthy. Hold the wealthiest and biggest corporations accountable so the responsibility of keeping this country going isn’t carried only by workers and small businesses. This campaign is about responsibility and fairness, creating a Wisconsin where hard work is rewarded and families can thrive.Together, we can build a Wisconsin where hard work is rewarded. A Wisconsin that works for everyone, not just a select few. | | Thank you, Mike Van Someren | | Want to know more? Want to help elect people that actually want to work for you? Go to to donate and learn more. | | | | | | Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Mike Van Someren for WI, All rights reserved.
