name: Troy Downing
subject: My campaign could be over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
If I don’t get help tonight, it’s all but over.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)I'm staring defeat in the face.
As a combat veteran, Christian, husband, and father, I thought I could count on fellow Patriots like you to stand with me against the radical Left. But it hasn’t panned out like I hoped.
**I'm Troy Downing, a freshman GOP Congressman fighting to put America First.**
Our House Majority hangs by a thread – just a few seats separate us from the Democrats' socialist agenda.
I'm facing a brutal truth: the September mid-month deadline is here, and my campaign could be over if we fail to meet our goal. Democrats are waiting to pounce with their massive cash advantage.
_We can't let them see weakness now._
I'm not asking for a bailout or a massive donation. **[I just need a small contribution from patriots like you to keep my campaign alive:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._7HSJHQ)**[ SEND A CARE PACKAGE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Without your help, I'll be forced to surrender this critical House seat to the radical Left. But if you chip in right now, you’ll help deliver a victory over the Democrats' agenda.
We’re not just aiming to win an election– We’re in this for our country's future.
[So please, will you make a small contribution to help a combat veteran take down the Democrat machine?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-QF4ZATrCg)
Your support is my last line of defense.
God Bless You and God Bless America,
Troy Downing | |

name: Team Jayapal
subject: $12,000 in 24 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We know it sounds ambitious. But that’s exactly the energy we need right now.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250915-5430-footer&t=1&akid=5430%2E420207%2EZue8LO)
Peter,
Today we’re kicking off our mid-month goal – and **we need to raise $12,000 by our deadline at midnight tomorrow night.**
[**We know it sounds ambitious – but if everyone reading this email pitched in $3, we’d hit our goal in no time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250915-1?refcode=em20250915-5430&amount=3&refcode2=5430_420207_Zue8LO&akid=5430%2E420207%2EZue8LO)
Here’s why this goal is so important:
1. **Showing our strength.** A flood of grassroots donations on our next FEC report will seriously spook the corporate lobbyists and MAGA extremists we’re up against and prove that we’re not losing steam – we’re only going to keep getting stronger and stronger.

2. **Maximizing your impact.** Not only does your contribution go toward re-electing Pramila and fueling her work for this movement, but it also supports organizing across the country to elect progressive leaders and build our movement to push back on right-wing extremism.

3. **Standing with a leader who has the back of poor and working people.** Since day one, Pramila has never accepted a _dime_ from corporate lobbyists. Other members of Congress are beholden to special interests – not Pramila. That’s why she’s going all out for Medicare for All, dignity for all workers, LGBTQ+ equality, a livable planet, and more.

[**Peter, are you ready to chip in $3 or whatever you can to help us hit this goal?** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250915-1?refcode=em20250915-5430&amount=3&refcode2=5430_420207_Zue8LO&akid=5430%2E420207%2EZue8LO)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250915-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250915-5430&refcode2=5430_420207_Zue8LO&akid=5430%2E420207%2EZue8LO)**
Let’s start this mid-month series off on a good note together. The bold, ambitious actions we take today set the stage for next year’s midterms. MAGA is watching and desperate to see us fail – let’s not give them the satisfaction.
Thank you for being a part of this movement.
– Jayapal HQ
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250915-5430-footer&t=2&refcode2=5430_420207_Zue8LO&akid=5430%2E420207%2EZue8LO)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: No More Kings via Our Revolution
subject: Trump is sending the military into MORE cities.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1011&refcode=email-20250915_v&akid=9381%2E5885482%2Eu7GPBH ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

First Trump sent in the national guard to LA, then DC – and now he says
Memphis is next.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?source=email-20250915&t=1061&akid=9381%2E5885482%2Eu7GPBH ]Headline: Trump says he will send national guard to Democratic-run
Memphis

Let’s be clear: this is Trump deploying the military onto the streets of
our cities to scare us into submission. He claims it’s about stopping
crime. We know better.

That’s why, on October 18, Our Revolution and our allies are organizing
another MASSIVE No Kings Day of Protest. In June, our movement helped turn
out 5 million people for the first No Kings Day event. This time, we need
it to be bigger.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250915nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9381%2E5885482%2Eu7GPBH ]Our team is working overtime to organize peaceful, powerful grassroots
events across America – but organizing transformative grassroots
resistance at this scale isn't easy – or cheap. Can you chip in $25, or
whatever you can, to help Our Revolution make this No Kings Day impossible
to ignore?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250915nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9381%2E5885482%2Eu7GPBH ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250915nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9381%2E5885482%2Eu7GPBH ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250915nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9381%2E5885482%2Eu7GPBH ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250915nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9381%2E5885482%2Eu7GPBH ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250915nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9381%2E5885482%2Eu7GPBH ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250915nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9381%2E5885482%2Eu7GPBH ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

It’s not hypothetical anymore. Authoritarianism is here. We’re talking
about armed soldiers outside our schools, workplaces, and grocery stores,
marching through neighborhoods, and setting up checkpoints along city
blocks.

It’s terrifying – but we cannot let fear win. Which is why on October 18
we will come together shoulder to shoulder to show Trump the massive
resistance to his authoritarian takeover.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?source=email-20250915&t=1060&akid=9381%2E5885482%2Eu7GPBH ]Graphic Photo from the first No Kings Protest

No Kings Day is about putting the power BACK in the people’s hands, not in
Trump’s. If we stand together, we can build a wall of people too strong,
too united, and too full of courage for any strongman to break.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250915nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9381%2E5885482%2Eu7GPBH ]Will you donate today to help us stand up to Trump’s takeover and make No
Kings Day a turning point? Your contribution will provide protest
materials like signs and banners, strengthen our rapid response teams,
help train grassroots organizers nationwide, and amplify our message in
the press, online, and on the streets.

We can’t let Trump’s authoritarianism define who we are. Not in Memphis,
not in DC, not anywhere. If you believe in freedom, in democracy, in
PEOPLE—not kings—add your support now. Let’s make history, together.

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis, First Trump sent in the national guard to LA, then DC – and now he says Memphis is next. [ ]Headline: Trump says he will send national guard to Democratic-run Memphis Let’s be clear: this is Trump deploying the military onto the streets of our cities to scare us into submission. He claims it’s about stopping crime. We know better. That’s why, on October 18, Our Revolution and our allies are organizing another MASSIVE No Kings Day of Protest. In June, our movement helped turn out 5 million people for the first No Kings Day event. This time, we need it to be bigger. [ ]Our team is working overtime to organize peaceful, powerful grassroots events across America – but organizing transformative grassroots resistance at this scale isn't easy – or cheap. Can you chip in $25, or whatever you can, to help Our Revolution make this No Kings Day impossible to ignore? If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT It’s not hypothetical anymore. Authoritarianism is here. We’re talking about armed soldiers outside our schools, workplaces, and grocery stores, marching through neighborhoods, and setting up checkpoints along city blocks. It’s terrifying – but we cannot let fear win. Which is why on October 18 we will come together shoulder to shoulder to show Trump the massive resistance to his authoritarian takeover. Peter, I'm fighting like hell to elect Abigail Spanberger this November, and here's why:
_She's got the background and the backbone to thrive as Virginia's next Governor._ The two of us are cut from the same cloth — a couple of working moms who entered public service to get stuff done.
But I know full well what it's like to have your opponents lie about who you are, and that's the position Abigail is in right now.
The other side is slinging one attack at her after another — trying every trick in the book to knock her down.
_Well, aren't we going to have her back?_

name: Colin Allred
subject: Here are the facts

body:
I want you to know the facts around the state of our race
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f93340a-1ebe-4307-8415-73c89d07e51b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c5a2709-dba2-4ac5-90a8-93cfe8887cb0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, right now we are up against our $100,000 mid-month fundraising goal, so I want you to know the facts around the state of our race to convince you and help us close the gap: – Last year, I outran the presidential ticket by nearly 200,000 votes in Texas.

– This time, not one but three polls show me ahead of my potential MAGA opponent.

– When Republicans get nervous about losing competitive seats like this one, they spend BIG. They spent over $117 MILLION to defeat me last year.

– And I rely on grassroots donors like you to fund my campaign, not corporate PAC money.

[Hitting every goal we set is what enables my campaign to remain competitive and win this race. So when I say we're still $20,000 short of our mid-month fundraising goal, I'm counting on grassroots donors like you to close the gap. Will you help me do that and finally flip Texas blue by chipping in a split donation of $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40a564a9-082e-4d3b-9ca7-78869c965c84/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc7263693-24cf-4bfe-81b1-89d509f4424e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=47de66a150ab458693af715becefab4e&_e=Dkyce7MVTeNioqzK8OpbHfHgK0OntRMfSkDd4QhT83d1GLSepx_vyh9aM07alizlXI6oGY2zn3VNuWJb08GK9OnxMruS3BluokvYwI4NYu1xLErMVCBmRn_4QcKa4PDNelF_LS85Ck020JaPZApWfnJCXS8XvpYpvDbal0XsjXd4_PDJkbpjpZiS2d-K2UppP8SX-8PmqHzoGwAlibqkvrMLsG1cHR2MDNUHwWav72HeqEXoL0EKgheulVOpqEjiq-_ZOCq9alaBeUrcalT6MeawPUgLbHR1fjlw751peI-gWo46PZ36lujM7jdV5xRRz6Q40OPSd586woi0D4qa5fqRh0eEG44kGHpKqsccVaWpL6NO0_NZZvXsss8nWgKFR9zOtOq3Lwqd7W5LSDcQb4hCTPr1ZuwO65GsBfCNjYbE07URNKD-6yzZU5naEl1GFHWrOlCGbiacHbQ6cJlnCN37_uUv2wfJbMuybHk-cDILuYHCmCXvwUL5uP5Zpy5HBWuWWvjrp12GfqNkB-OvD6DmM9mz__594-ADgN_bUq2XWIzKHkox_Ptlc7GCCBGg7_4do85pgZbjXAKS0YZn2dQ_hXZT6dssq8ahsDh7ShBArU107KL5BckK8TpZKc6csfRO3RWFpqP2SxerD9Ram8dOtthTWskzrcapY7hz6Bs%3D)
---
Peter,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=47de66a150ab458693af715becefab4e&_e=Dkyce7MVTeNioqzK8OpbHfHgK0OntRMfSkDd4QhT83d1GLSepx_vyh9aM07alizlXI6oGY2zn3VNuWJb08GK9OnxMruS3BluokvYwI4NYu1xLErMVCBmRn_4QcKa4PDNelF_LS85Ck020JaPZApWfnJCXS8XvpYpvDbal0XsjXd4_PDJkbpjpZiS2d-K2UppP8SX-8PmqHzoGwAlibqkvrMLsG1cHR2MDNUHwWav72EAWpvIDsp9LQJ3tLz6vndqu5wDqvPFJ1hD-Z5appYjs9Pfaop9mNuSxFtVL18NvI3tWTRYMNCMl_tIfKpCawPEG_Ojm6tE1EdFMiN7AnoHWMjrWxSt84NjGrcN01uP93krzGjyT9133PxK-mLRHI3Sq60o8JcELkGx2KwgrDNMC-8kvodFrJTWFRXJcuWjmXZwFyLgvLkTjYETci2ETLug4mfEiZgRg4z_7SOed1SOUSUszm9VR2r0Ui1B-bE7Z6jq_X626JopETj3JdnKKrN5cuXT0P3iv09t1cVlXcW4Uk1eCN9WM1KnpgAD-Rob_O_oSjfMi0xJHfwIAaRw4zpHcxYhHQUA3U4w9rFxqffocnzE3MLeDtG7x_9wPJ54YEy557JkpwUOR49MZ60RiEGgwwCWeds1QgYBxxeu88q3i12zDkje9b13EMuaKWIfa7E%3D)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=47de66a150ab458693af715becefab4e&_e=Dkyce7MVTeNioqzK8OpbHfHgK0OntRMfSkDd4QhT83d1GLSepx_vyh9aM07alizlXI6oGY2zn3VNuWJb08GK9OnxMruS3BluokvYwI4NYu1xLErMVCBmRn_4QcKa4PDNelF_LS85Ck020JaPZApWfnJCXS8XvpYpvDbal0XsjXd4_PDJkbpjpZiS2d-K2UppP8SX-8PmqHzoGwAlibqkvrMLsG1cHR2MDNUHwWav72EGKbhnnINHqcsFOq9XWy3xfCAFto4WGKvTqXN9xM6yOJBzRwKH4ugr_Pz50_ZCrJfZZ7JGH88uVipvTarQ3H16qJwbZmT1CkR2d3qlxmLflT7pgGLirniEwKoe55BSTLUU6IK297LNo-wzt792xf6y2l6SVYnIGQ4kzhQ8TUnMncRK7-fQazBaPtnwFM7dvsJ1YDx3PhGkmLPRUt_1MeXT0ROipTyDlAW8lOm9c5BIjEr3Qw1wFw0NhSQAj6tovCRHf7AtC05GzfjZHp2wA0DLGWOAA71W_OsbcMfdwknPWkJbkhyezaw7WhVLq7-3OPJLTY263mIgRTLIXZoeFYOsjdC6LyS_F_drsIw4PRs4H6j85bEkEsb7g16BbQBWgf6GRmSBlEOw4rF_DE1eJpPo2x107LqKa944mjCjksuW-MXH9rjC9FPaVdToR-LgCqs%3D)

clean_body: Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Peter, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more...** And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Heidi Hall
subject: RFK Jr.'s stance on medicine (and Flouride!) is unacceptable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250915_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250915_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Friend,
RFK Jr. is completely unqualified to be the Secretary of Health and Human Services.
By pushing vaccine conspiracies and claiming that the fluoride in our water is "industrial waste," he is actively threatening Americans' health.
When I worked for the EPA, it was my job to protect our land and water by stopping the dumping of toxic chemical waste, so I know what industrial waste actually is.
Along the U.S.-Mexico border, polluted water and other environmental factors caused by heavy industrialization and improper dumping saw birth defects like anencephaly, babies being born without a brain or skull, rise in nearby towns.
Friend, the job of the HHS is important, and the secretary can't be someone whose only medical experience is founding an anti-vaccine advocacy group.
During RFK Jr.'s confirmation, only one Republican voted against his appointment—the rest voted how Trump told them to.
We deserve leaders who are unafraid to stand up to the President and put people over politics.
Our opponent, Kevin Kiley, has a history of being a doormat for Donald Trump, and it's time for a change.
Friend, will you please contribute what you can to our people-powered movement and help us take on the toxic politicization that's plaguing D.C. and hurting our communities? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250915_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20250915_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]

Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250915_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
In solidarity,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250915_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250915_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress

Grass Valley, CA 95945

Grass Valley, CA 95945

name: GOP Voter Verification
subject: Obama’s back — and he’s targeting YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
They’re calling it a “knockout punch” to President Trump — here’s the plan. |
Fellow American?

A report hit our desk, and the headline stopped me cold:

[](http://links.gopnrsc.com/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=92a2f49f8fad49bc877a85ba7520c9d2&_e=CWv-Tan_0qHcSrl-U1ECvYwPV5mYTEgbb6cvG2fSpAdUHrHqQWGsjV0ZKCRnGnkLy_3SmIaL7TKdnQMp2bLCUHNxBxulwqjgV1brAN4sLfj-LWIMedZ1wpBUPXY1QGD5l4uLmxGZTo4v9xaOsH0nEUlgGNhWrZjtOtRaCe1NIKyiWZWwN6dOVkSOhJCbcjwiLblqsrGlVJu8x5QZZcX_jP9LJFsvTn3tk0yU77mwgivcs7sf1Bu6w38A0StXGZiGY7b9P9J9acEe8q0XSKI0NNTaYL86eKaXZDYyPmyHCsbOk7KXxWWNayUXsc2ZurSTttpePRwqDltNPUQVwkXzlRBKU-cyNBOF7R_N9ZMl1G6YUi60-PiB-VNGD5Qw2wmSLOQhwVGpYqm8e3Yr4eQS7jX3Ksp0CiUJhupKHpKRyS3anmx-xhbZdhablrc2c1PMoKk7QH83nvTH1mb86a7D4XWLXIYV4jR-JO50VD67faIA38l1FPZMK-xU37K36nrLJSrT8vUEahFVT0IDMNvFKuHrpCPqnQPLr9cqSjGfgzKyFo9dRgDDm9Blkk5rnDVm2E82fC7alvK6U2l6vryG2fH6GkPnVKWwTy1FU7AiCeDlXt2P77HxJ2ibMrrCTUDazUZR3D66HvvtSaLqhckDMP6oYmiQpo1PAluUuEh4Q4QWdmKr4cbEVAKIrw8T1YmDZ5qaFn5Q9nUyRcjKOYqwQ-IpG46s_nhurU3ScoXBH95zBgeP6v79RSsubv_8t7RDdicDYzHWtZ0cXludnwhUVssbhoyq9TFg2R7vBlYA4LWFMRS1zBAk0TZHRbw9tQLZmIv9RrYQ0AxZgGa11cLVkQ%3D%3D)

Barack Obama is stepping back into politics to take on President Trump and flip the Senate. If we ignore this, we do it at our own peril.

I’ve prepared a short memo for you on **Obama’s latest threat to MAGA** — and how we can beat him.

name: Gov. Ron DeSantis
subject: [VIDEO] I’d like to talk about Charlie Kirk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC)
body:
My sadness has been overcome with anger. | | |
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk had an infectious spirit. The energy he brought to every event was off the charts. He was a force for good, with a beautiful wife and young kids. He was just 31. _And now he's gone._ **I joined Jesse Watters on Fox News to talk about Charlie’s legacy, and here’s what I told him:**[**My sadness at hearing the news has been overcome with anger.**](http://links.email.ronpac.com/s/c/Yd9Aon3xz3OpaPNU3Xm8Nalo2qHpretuR3zn3eVSgDLNl69Ik_8rtQdw6-_NRV2FAEWmRGxhqwTOsAFV4Tj3hSieljUyme5-XuylTtnZ4QjtKlCwIa1NZioL1_vpKbmF89iLVTIlJyOSFmzTyIjjRAiJdFkSLKHlP1VZ1WbsJ_nttwtESjht1Pgz5Wu7hmAhEL1FCRusVlYpwH-EKS1qMdj12w-YZes-6yazdNk-0BdGIozxb6uKPqkQy2ljq0gmvIR9MVEJR5_B0waHf5s-xV-s76RmHyKh4XHVuyblR4SwMBXuQozPKPkkl61ov6G0vosJ7fLH0Vfo0puTF5xkoyEARZE_D4gGi5-VWqTs2ntb-XxFiUdKSvPqqp2PymDd3Zc2JQUg6t7kuHdemIkZQ6piHna0cjj86KMWl83PoZ6jmAxT5oT2RkujXg/-mmm4YtBnbq-Ha82t5lbkXQe9QuQrzth/12)Charlie was assassinated—murdered for political purposes—because he dared to bring truth to hostile ground. He didn’t play it safe in a red district. He went where the fight was hottest—college campuses. And he didn’t back down. He told students: “Ask me tough questions. I’ll be respectful and civil—but I’m going to tell you what I believe.” That took guts. That’s leadership. That’s what this country needs more of. Now we face a wound that strikes at the heart of the Republic. If we cannot disagree safely, we cannot be free. Republican government cannot endure where violence replaces debate. This didn't come out of nowhere. The intolerance on campuses has been building for years. We’ve seen it—speakers shouted down, students attacked. But this? This was a sniper. This was the most extreme we’ve ever seen. And it demands consequences. **Charlie left a legacy—but he also left a challenge.** Charlie knew he was going into the lion’s den. He probably got threats almost every time he went. But he went anyway. Now it’s our turn to defend the right to speak. To disagree. To have the courage to stand for our principles. That’s how we honor him. Thank you,
---
---
Gov. Ron DeSantis
---
| | |
---
| |
---

| P.O. Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 |

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: Defending against attacks on science
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Did you know that I am an engineer?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115276478/569769436/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YThhZmY5MC02ZTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X_L21tWI0V1uB2kfB301WUJ9h6zhXYB2LWEFQidnt_w=&emci=09716d94-3c92-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8a8aff90-6e92-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek: Did you know that before I was a Representative in the House, I taught high school chemistry? That I’m also an engineer?
While there may not seem to be a connection between these jobs, I can tell you this: My STEM education has been instrumental to my career as a public servant, from knowing how to look at data, to rejecting misinformation, to questioning one’s own biases.
**But as you read this, President Trump, RFK Jr, and so many others in this administration are firing scientists and wiping out programs, including slashing the U.S. National Institutes of Health's budget in half and defunding the National Science Foundation. All with the help of congressional Republicans. **
Now more than ever, we need more solution-oriented, logic- and data-based approaches to setting policy and passing laws that will help families in Pennsylvania and across the region. I'm doing my part.

Most recently, I started the **BIOTech Caucus** to raise awareness of the strength in all-things-biology of other countries - and our country’s very real risk of falling behind - and to promote solutions that make us stronger economically and improve our national security.
**I’m committed to defending the principles of inquiry and truth in the House, but I can't do it alone.[Ahead of my mid-month deadline tonight, can I count on you to chip in $5 to ensure I can fight for evidence-based change?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115276485/569769445/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1163-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YThhZmY5MC02ZTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X_L21tWI0V1uB2kfB301WUJ9h6zhXYB2LWEFQidnt_w=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115276491/569769453/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1163-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YThhZmY5MC02ZTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X_L21tWI0V1uB2kfB301WUJ9h6zhXYB2LWEFQidnt_w=)

Thank you,

Chrissy

Devon, PA 19333

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/006a5df2-0839-4574-8d32-055f5b35ad37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**[By Robert Sterling](https://substack.com/redirect/d1972492-f5af-497c-83e2-abe6677fe053?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
### (Warning: long rant)
My liberal friends are completely oblivious about how radicalizing the last week has been for tens of millions of normal Americans.
Zero clue. I'm not talking about people who are "online"; I mean regular, everyday Americans. "Normies." People who scroll through Facebook posts and Instagram reels from the Dutch Bros drive thru line. Political moderates who have water cooler chats about Mahomes touchdowns and Bon Jovi concerts, not Twitter threads or Rachel Maddow monologues.
Millions of them. Tens of millions. They're logging on, they're engaging, and they're furious. And I'll be candid: They blame you guys. They blame the left.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVjYXBpdGFsaXN0bWFnLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ieIsNXj3jViuT1jucu-401C9Pm8_3ALFhDAPZsYTzds?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=173666643)
Regardless of whether you believe it to be justified, they think you're the bad guys here. And they are reacting accordingly. I can already hear some of you racing toward the comments to start screeching in moral indignation, so I'm going to be blunt: Shut up and listen to what I'm telling you. Your movement will lose any semblance of relevance if you don't develop some small measure of self-awareness, and--absent someone force-feeding you bitter medicine--you guys collectively lack the humility to do this on your own.
Here are the facts:
**Fact 1.** Tens of millions of Americans started the week seeing a 23-year-old blonde woman--a young woman in whom virtually every parent watching pictured their own daughter--stabbed in the neck by a career criminal. These people then found out the murderer had been released from jail 14 times over.
**Fact 2.** Two days later, tens of millions of Americans watched a video of Charlie Kirk get murdered speaking to college students. Millions of these people knew who Charlie was; millions of them didn't. Upon seeing the video, however, these normal Americans from across the land and across the political spectrum agreed that he was the victim of a terrible, fundamentally unjustifiable crime, and their hearts broke in sympathy for his family. Good people who had never even heard the name Charlie Kirk before wept.
**Fact 3.** Immediately after seeing the footage of a peaceful young man get shot in the neck, these same people logged onto Facebook and Instagram (remember, we are talking about regular Americans, not perpetually online Twitter or Bluesky users) and saw some of their local nurses, school teachers, college administrators, and retail workers celebrating this horrific crime. Not just defending it, but cheering it.
These are all facts. You may not like the implications of these facts, and we can certainly debate the underlying causes thereof, but, indisputably, they are nevertheless factual statements.
_**(Piece continues below)**_
* * *
# EV Partners
We are a boutique advisory firm providing M&A and capital-markets advisory, strategic consulting, fractional CFO services, and executive coaching.
EVP's clients are some of the world's most forward-thinking startups, SMBs, midmarket companies, and investment funds.
We would love to work with you and create value for your organization. **[Contact us and let's talk.](https://substack.com/redirect/b0e62edc-7da8-4668-bc21-80c68ef121e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b0e62edc-7da8-4668-bc21-80c68ef121e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/b0e62edc-7da8-4668-bc21-80c68ef121e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
Here's what it means for you, the Democrats reading this: These normal, middle-of-the-road, non-political citizens just become politically active. They realized that politics cares about them, even if they don't particularly care about politics. After watching Iryna Zarutska and Charlie Kirk both bleed out from the neck, they think their lives and the physical safety of their families--the bedrock of human society, the foundation of Maslow's hierarchy of needs--depend on political activation, whether they desire it or not.
These people are now sprinting--not jogging, not walking, but racing--to the right. Because they blame you guys for everything that just happened. When they see footage of Decarlos Brown stabbing a Ukrainian refugee to death, they don't see just one demon-possessed man. They picture every university administrator, HR bureaucrat, and DEI apparatchik that ever lectured them about systemic racism, the "carceral state," or the need to release violent crime suspects without bail in the name of social justice.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVjYXBpdGFsaXN0bWFnLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ieIsNXj3jViuT1jucu-401C9Pm8_3ALFhDAPZsYTzds?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=173666643)
They then think back to conversations they've had with their cop friends--their buddy from high school who quit the force after getting tired of being called a racist, their friend at the local YMCA who vents about having to release career criminals because Soros-funded prosecutors aren't willing to file charges--and they realize everything the left has told them over the last five years has been utter bullshit. And they blame you. Because, even if you count yourself as a moderate Democrat, your party supported the district attorneys, city council members, and mayors that let fictitious concerns about mental health and racial justice supersede very real concerns for their family's safety.
When these Americans see blood erupt from the side of Charlie Kirk's neck, they don't see just a martyred political activist. They think of every extreme leftist they've ever met who (1) calls anyone to the right of Hillary Clinton a fascist and (2) constantly jokes--"jokes"--about punching Nazis and "bashing the fash." They realize that there really do exist people who wish to see them dead for their moderately conservative political beliefs, their Christian faith, and even the color of their skin. They ask themselves if the violence visited upon Charlie might one day show up on their own doorstep. And they blame you. Because, even if you're just a center-of-the-road liberal, you lacked the courage to police your own ranks.
You let modern-day Maoist red guards run loose across every facet of society, and what started with social-media struggle sessions has now turned to 30-06 bullet holes. When these Americans log onto social media and see their neighbors justifying, celebrating, glorifying murder, they realize that some who walk among them are soulless ghouls at best, literally demon-possessed at worst.
These people--whether they faithfully attend church every Sunday or only attend with relatives once a year, on Christmas Eve--start talking about things like spiritual warfare. They implicitly understand that no normal human casually celebrates the mortal demise of a peaceful person. And they blame you. Because, even if you condemned Charlie Kirk's murder, they probably haven't seen you condemn those in your own movement who cheered it on. They view you as complicit in allowing heartless fellow travelers to celebrate death, and it repulses them.
For all of these situations, what has your response been? Nothing but bullshit. In response to Iryna Zarutska bleeding out on the floor of a train, you post bullshit statistics about reductions in reported crime, when everyone who's ever been to a major urban center in the last decade knows that actual crime has skyrocketed, only for victims not to waste their time reporting it to cops that don't have the manpower to respond and prosecutors that seek to downgrade as many felonies as possible to misdemeanor citations.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVjYXBpdGFsaXN0bWFnLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ieIsNXj3jViuT1jucu-401C9Pm8_3ALFhDAPZsYTzds?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=173666643)
In response to a 31-year-old man taking a bullet to the neck in front of his family, you post nothing but bullshit whataboutism. > "What about January 6th?" (Honest answer: After you let Liz Cheney spend two years operating a star chamber in the House, combined with countless other failed attempts at "lawfare" against Trump, no one cares anymore.) > "What about Mike Lee making a dumb joke on Twitter about some guy in a mask in Minnesota?" (No one outside of Utah, DC, or Twitter knows who Mike Lee even is.) > "What about Paul Pelosi?" (That's not comparable to Charlie Kirk getting shot, and we all know it. And, again, Paul who?) > "What about regulations on assault rifles?" (That's not going to get you very far when one of these killers used a knife and the other one used a common hunting rifle.)
In response to teachers, healthcare workers, and thousands of other liberals cheering on Charlie's murder, it's nothing but more bullshit and misdirection. > "It's not THAT many people celebrating!" (Yes, it is. Everyone has seen it on their Facebook and Instagram feeds.) > "I thought you guys didn't support cancel culture." (We don't cancel people over their opinions; we're more than happy to see people lose their jobs--especially their taxpayer-funded jobs--for actively cheering on murder, though.
If you can't see the difference, that's your own shortcoming.) All bullshit. Not even smart bullshit, but stale, mid-grade, low-IQ bullshit. Ordinary Americans see right through it, and they don't like how it smells.
You probably don't like hearing this. But you need to hear it. Because I'm right, and, as you reflect on this, you know I'm right. The ranks of my political movement gained millions of righteously angry new members this week. We have a mandate to ensure these crimes never happen again, and that's exactly what we are now going to do. If you want to keep a seat at the table as we do so, you'd better clean house and start policing your own.
* * *

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Support Delia’s Equal Tax Act →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

While working people struggle to pay increasingly higher prices for food,
healthcare, education, housing, and other costs of living, the rich just
keep getting richer.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250915-signup-equaltaxact?source=em20250915-37024&akid=37024%2E1203867%2E-RIyqJ ]A post on X from More Perfect Union (@MorePerfectUS) reads: 'The 400
richest people in the U.S. are now worth a record $6.6 trillion after
getting $1.2 trillion richer over the past year.'

According to Forbes, “the wealthiest people in America have never been
wealthier,” while 86 percent of U.S. adults say they’re stressed about
grocery costs, and the federal minimum wage remains stuck at a measly
$7.25 an hour.

This isn’t an accident: this is the result of millionaire- and
billionaire-megadonors and corporations pouring unlimited amounts of money
into our elections, so their beneficiaries on both sides of the aisle in
Congress will cut taxes for the rich at the expense of the rest of us.

We have three words: Tax. The. Rich.

And that’s exactly what Justice Democrats’ Rep. Delia Ramirez just
introduced legislation to do.

Her bill, the Equal Tax Act, would make the tax code more equitable,
taxing investment income at the same rate as labor income while closing
loopholes used by the wealthy to avoid paying their fair share.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250915-signup-equaltaxact?source=em20250915-37024&akid=37024%2E1203867%2E-RIyqJ ]Every Democratic member of Congress should sign onto this legislation.
Will you add your name to our petition to build a groundswell of public
support for the Equal Tax Act now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250915-signup-equaltaxact?source=em20250915-37024&akid=37024%2E1203867%2E-RIyqJ ]Add Your Name

Income inequality is out of control in this country. Let’s demand that
those in power tackle it by making the wealthiest few finally pay their
fair share.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250915-37024-footer&t=1002&refcode2=37024_1203867_-RIyqJ&akid=37024%2E1203867%2E-RIyqJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=37024%2E1203867%2E-RIyqJ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Help Flip New York Red
body:
The Empire State is on the front line in our fight to Save America

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAY/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, I’m going to say what the corrupt media Democrats won’t.
**[New York is on the front line in our fight to Save America](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAY/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
It breaks my heart that, under one-party Democrat rule, **New York has become unrecognizable.**
Streets once bustling with families and small businesses are now overrun by _violent criminals_ and ___illegal aliens_ _._ Even _radical pro-terrorist extremists_ are occupying our college campuses, spitting in the faces of Jewish students and chanting for the destruction of America.
You don’t have to take my word for it: Over 630,000 residents left New York between 2020 and 2023, because of failed Democrat policies pricing them out while making their streets less and less safe.
It is a tragedy but it’s exactly what Democrat Governor Kathy Hochul and the Democrat Party want.
The good news is that we can end this madness. In 2022, Lee Zeldin came within just 7 points of becoming the Governor of New York.
**That’s the closest a Republican has come to winning the governorship in decades.**
And all the reasons that New Yorkers almost handed him a victory have only gotten worse:
* Thousands of illegal migrants flooded our cities.
* Crime has skyrocketed.
* New Yorkers are waking up to see illegal immigrant shelters popping up in their neighborhoods overnight.
* Many young people believe they’ll never be able to make it on their own if they don’t move somewhere with a lower cost of living.

New Yorkers don’t want to fear for their children’s safety because woke liberal DA’s let criminals free. They don’t want their children to move across state lines just so they can afford to support young families.
**_[I’m launching the Flip NY Red Fund, because I refuse to let the radical Left destroy the state I love without a fight](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAY/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
We need to build our war chest NOW if we’re going to take back the governorship so that we can _**support law enforcement rather than protect illegal migrants**_ , _**make our once proud cities safe again**_ , and work with President Trump to _**deliver an economy that will provide ALL Americans with the opportunity to achieve the American Dream**_.
But my team and I can’t do it alone. We need support and resources from across the country to help us lay the foundation for victory.
**_[That’s why I am humbly asking you to please rush whatever you can spare today to the Flip NY Red Fund to help us break the hold radical Democrats have on New York](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAY/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
****Patriot, if we can save the Empire State, we can save America.
[FLIP NY RED](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAY/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I appreciate the support of every patriot who stands with me now in the fight for New York and our nation.
_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAY/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAY/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjM1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| | |

|

---

name: Leslie Mehta
subject: An update from the trail
disclaimer_text:
Paid For By
Leslie Mehta for Delegate
body:
Hi Peter,

We've been busy pounding the pavement, knocking on doors and talking to our neighbors about how our government can help them. My shoes are worn, my feet are tired, and my throat is sore, but I don't care.

Because the only way I can be the representative you deserve is to talk to as many of you as I can.

Here's a taste of what we've been up to on the trail:

Recently, I was joined by Del. Dan Helmer to knock on doors with our fantastic volunteers. We're knocking 400+ doors a week and having great conversations! A huge thank you to Amanda Pohl, Chesterfield Clerk of Court, for hosting our launch.

I also visited the apprenticeship school for the Plumber and Steamfitters Local 10, reaffirming my commitment to stand for our workers by repealing ”right to work,” increasing protections and pay, and increasing the visibility of apprenticeship programs like these.

And my mom and I had an amazing time with the Chesterfield County Democratic Committee celebrating our Chesterfield champion, Mark Warner, and auctioning off some beautifully painted pumpkins!

With only a few days until Early Vote begins, we’re out and about! I hope that I knock on your door or see you at an event, but if I don't, you can still reach out and let me know at lesliemehta@lesliemehta.com how we can make government work better for you once we reach Richmond.

I know you're busy, so if you want to quickly give me an idea of what's important to you, click one of the buttons below to let us know that's the issue that concerns you the most.

Strengthening our Economy [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfcpolleconomy?refcode2=econ]
Protecting Affordable Healthcare [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfcpollhealthcare?refcode2=health]
Investing in Education [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfcpolleducation?refcode2=edu]

If you'd like to help the campaign further, please chip in whatever you can [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfcwhyleslie?refcode2=chipintxt] , or you can volunteer to knock doors on Saturdays [https://www.mobilize.us/spanbergerforgovernor/event/812903/] .

Thank you as always for the support - please know I will never take it for granted.

Leslie

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfcwhyleslie?refcode2=txtfooterbtn]

Paid For By
Leslie Mehta for Delegate
PO Box 1721
Midlothian, VA 23113
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/qilL9Kv-dUyGV2oDr4ABqg2?unsubscribedata=YHQeRMXXpm6vuusvtmWZwsL81lph5Q8nrJ3DTibM2dPZGaWXA9rO38O4Rw6enrm8dreqWHXxqrJlCgnHAZycf9xVCooxk5HDgun23N6F49Cdxbe1huCrFMaaKfVxG%2Bm%2BQKfFfyI7eBQytmxneSoLa1S9oQny3ufS1C7u8PPAtEdejUuOGkQe5mNRNOY1EP4fAQQBbdIbMiD8ehh92jK1GjCGPGw2eYp2PAtkH0g0uSAwg16yhXZ7Q7fd%2Fxr6F%2FfpyrqAiCKT6yUuFKuzfdkZSgauSNCUrPkQ%2BcGRq7xtVc0XTsW1vqGB7dcNlFBQY1Jy8N%2BFjRh6Tmheo0op1j7RDU6WLSPoO3OC7DdFaOB99PS%2B%2B2Ny2UMyFM0QQMfgW8osC9rRmZ9ccv73Mf4ULlQoBlLeJyPlRPSxbGH%2FTPzvxxn8IB9t%2FTVYreGl2xk64s34 .
You can also click here to donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfcwhyleslie?refcode2=txtfooter] .

name: Wes Moore HQ
subject: We’ve got merch, Peter
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=627%2E1086043%2E675U1E)
We’ve got a great, brand-new lineup of merch, Peter!
**Check it out ⤵️**
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/373?t=2&akid=627%2E1086043%2E675U1E)**
We’ve got a classic campaign shirt. We’ve got a bumper sticker to show where you stand (no matter how you drive). There’s even a ballcap to hide your bad hair day — even if you have no hair — we’ve got it all.
As Republicans get ready for the 2026 election, we’re ready to double down on our effort to reelect Wes. This means we need you to show your support.
With our merch on, you’re representing a grassroots team that Leaves No One Behind. **[Peter, check out our store to get your Wes Moore for Maryland merch today.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/373?t=3&akid=627%2E1086043%2E675U1E)**
**[Check out the Store »](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/373?t=4&akid=627%2E1086043%2E675U1E)**
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Moore

BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is how you win a swing state:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Join me in this campaign.
Derek — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. _Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years._
It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community and the commitment to stand for the rights that people hold dear.
**I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere.**
As a U.S. Senator, I will protect our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care _more_ affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy.
And I’ll never stop listening to what _the people_ need from me and meeting them where they are.
I believe that this is how you win a swing state, Derek. And I _know_ that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina.
**[I’m asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and Adam Schiff because _right now_ is when we can build the momentum to win. Chip in $10 today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=abs-em-cooper25.jpppXU&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250915_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=8975%2E5257348%2EdXZ_WJ)**

clean_body: | Join me in this campaign. Derek — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years. It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community and the commitment to stand for the rights that people hold dear. I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere. As a U.S. Senator, I will protect our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care more affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. And I’ll never stop listening to what the people need from me and meeting them where they are. I believe that this is how you win a swing state, Derek. And I know that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Roy Cooper will go through immediately: | | | Grateful to have you with me, Roy Cooper | | 150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433. body:
Election Day is approaching!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_sep_call_remind&n=1)

| Join us Tonight September 15th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u9pL5MpT6VqtFQJKvKaK-Pv0usEvJWAodng1xp_Fl6hl2CdSPB3JPxJiFZLsBSsc6WQ2RTEo6kiNcYGKrK3lZ1Y&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_sep_call_remind&n=2) Election day is less than 2 months away. If you haven't researched the people running in your area, this is a great time to do it. There's still time to support a candidate you like or to mount a write in campaign of your own. Our communities and media are forgetting that all politics is local and these races are the foundation of our whole political system. Let's make this foundation a little stronger this year by getting involved in our communities. Maybe if we regularly saw examples of neighbors working though their disagreements through the political process, our national conversation could emulate that. Join our call Monday to share what you'd like to see.
### **2025 Elections**
We have endorsed candidates for races across the state, and more are on the way, we hope to tell you about them tonight. Check out the link below for current and past endorsed candidates. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741uzABh1W1uH2xRkdqrl5MmdduHYqLYJPChLV9rtPhvKsj5wshbg8fI0_4jcVHS2lzfw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_sep_call_remind&n=3 "Endorsed Candidates") [Endorsed Candidates](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741uzABh1W1uH2xRkdqrl5MmdduHYqLYJPChLV9rtPhvKsj5wshbg8fI0_4jcVHS2lzfw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_sep_call_remind&n=3)

name: Becky Edwards
subject: Reflect, Not React: The Path Forward
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOVERNING GROUP PAC
body:
The path to civility and dignity starts with us.

| | | | | [|
---](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=b834902abb&e=6484bb6dd5)
| | | | | | Friends,
This has been a heartbreaking week for Utah. The shocking violence on the campus of UVU and the tragic loss of life, has shaken us all. No family, no community, no state should ever face such a moment.
In the face of this grief, peacebuilders and community leaders from across Utah stood together at the Capitol to declare: violence has no place here. Among them, our founder Becky Edwards reminded us of what is at stake and what is possible:
“Let’s reflect before we act. Let’s lead with dignity. And let’s show, starting here in Utah, that civility is not weakness—it is the very strength that protects both our communities and our democracy.”
Becky’s call to action was clear: our democracy only thrives when we choose listening over retaliation, respect over outrage, and dignity over division. That is the heart of Governing Group’s mission.
We believe the path forward begins at the local level, with leaders who can win elections by focusing on substance, community, and solutions. With your support, we can equip more candidates to run campaigns built on respect, not rhetoric, and ensure they succeed.
[_You can watch Becky’s full remarks from the press conference here:_](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=7ec2e4458a&e=6484bb6dd5)
You can also explore resources for building peace and reducing polarization at [www.turntoward.us](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=2ba687d621&e=6484bb6dd5).
This work requires all of us. Every reflection, every conversation, and every time spent serving others helps change our trajectory.
Together, we can make Utah a model of civility in action, and show the nation that our communities are strongest when we turn toward each other.
With hope and determination,Governing Group

---
| [DONATE](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=a48f135c1b&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
|
---
| |

# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40148%2E3422442%2ElIGj6-)
Tonight is our mid-month fundraising deadline, Peter, and we’re still short of our $10,000 goal.
**[Can you chip in to help us make up the difference?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250915_1_ak?refcode=em20250915-40148&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40148_3422442_lIGj6-&akid=40148%2E3422442%2ElIGj6-)**

This goal is critical to the success of our campaign. **Katie Porter is the Democratic frontrunner** , but staying in the lead will take serious resources.
Our opponents are already coming after us. If another candidate launches attack ads—or if a new challenger jumps into the race—we need to be ready to respond and reach more voters right away.
That’s why hitting this $10,000 goal tonight matters. Every contribution helps us keep our edge and build a campaign that has what it takes to win.
**[If just a small number of people reading this email chip in, we’ll reach $10,000 in no time. Can you donate $5 before midnight to help us get there?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250915_1_ak?refcode=em20250915-40148&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40148_3422442_lIGj6-&akid=40148%2E3422442%2ElIGj6-)**

Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

name: Mary Trump
subject: $5 can help us elect Democrats in all 50 states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Friend, I founded the Democracy Defense Fund on a simple, urgent principle: **to serve as a bulwark against authoritarianism by investing in key races across the country, from the U.S. Senate down to state legislative seats.** In an age where billionaires like Elon Musk are ready to stuff millions of dollars into Republican candidates’ coffers, our work ensures that strong candidates who actually represent working Americans can not only keep up with mind-boggling amounts of dark money spending, but prevail against it. We coordinate directly with candidates like Seth Moulton and help them offset campaign costs, like running ads or sending campaign literature, while amplifying their campaign to a national audience. **We know that when Democrats work together and support one another, we win. That’s why I’m reaching out today:** [**With 2025 gubernatorial and state legislative races coming to a head this November, and next year’s midterms just around the corner, we’re fighting to get candidates like Seth Moulton the support they need to win their races and get us one step closer to taking back Washington. If you’re with us, can you split a contribution between our organization and Seth Moulton today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115278500/569776394/-204460493?refcode=250915_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjk1YmVlMC03MzkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5sRevYIBd_XJ0egKS9HmGJfr0IYBW1Bk_-jS0q_gug=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115278501/569776395/-204460493?refcode=250915_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjk1YmVlMC03MzkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5sRevYIBd_XJ0egKS9HmGJfr0IYBW1Bk_-jS0q_gug=) We know that the political world moves fast, and next November will be here before we know it. That’s why in addition to securing our anti-Trump regime bulwark in state legislatures across the country, we’re building our war chest so that we can be ready to support midterm candidates like Seth Moulton the second they need help. [**If you’re ready to multiply your donation and ensure that the Democracy Defense Fund can support Democratic candidates across the country ahead of 2026, split a contribution between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton so we can get to work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115278502/569776396/-204460493?refcode=250915_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjk1YmVlMC03MzkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5sRevYIBd_XJ0egKS9HmGJfr0IYBW1Bk_-jS0q_gug=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115278503/569776397/-204460493?refcode=250915_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjk1YmVlMC03MzkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5sRevYIBd_XJ0egKS9HmGJfr0IYBW1Bk_-jS0q_gug=) Thanks for helping us make a national impact, friend. Dr. Mary L. Trump
Founder, Democracy Defense Fund [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115278504/569776398/-204460493?refcode=250915_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjk1YmVlMC03MzkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5sRevYIBd_XJ0egKS9HmGJfr0IYBW1Bk_-jS0q_gug=)

clean_body: | Friend, I founded the Democracy Defense Fund on a simple, urgent principle: to serve as a bulwark against authoritarianism by investing in key races across the country, from the U.S. Senate down to state legislative seats. In an age where billionaires like Elon Musk are ready to stuff millions of dollars into Republican candidates’ coffers, our work ensures that strong candidates who actually represent working Americans can not only keep up with mind-boggling amounts of dark money spending, but prevail against it. We coordinate directly with candidates like Seth Moulton and help them offset campaign costs, like running ads or sending campaign literature, while amplifying their campaign to a national audience. We know that when Democrats work together and support one another, we win. That’s why I’m reaching out today: = = We know that the political world moves fast, and next November will be here before we know it. That’s why in addition to securing our anti-Trump regime bulwark in state legislatures across the country, we’re building our war chest so that we can be ready to support midterm candidates like Seth Moulton the second they need help. = = Thanks for helping us make a national impact, friend. Dr. Mary L. Trump Founder, Democracy Defense Fund = [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Hispanic Heritage Month: Joy, History, and Pride
body:
Our Story Is Richer Together

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=fa37cc7ed6&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=be6203dfc0&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | Dear Peter,**As Hispanic Heritage Month begins, we come together** to celebrate the rich history, vibrant culture, and lasting contributions of the Latino community to our nation’s story.**Here in Los Angeles, that story is alive every day** —in the music and art that shape our neighborhoods, in the family-owned businesses that anchor our economy, and in the generations of Latino leaders, workers, and dreamers who have helped build Los Angeles into the city we love.**Hispanic Heritage Month is a time to honor those legacies, but also to lift up the joy, resilience, and creativity that continue to shape our future**. From the very names of our cities to traditional cuisine, from street festivals to the classroom, the Latino community reminds us that diversity is not just something to respect—it’s something to celebrate.**I’m proud to represent a community where so many cultures and histories intersect.** Our differences make us stronger, and our shared values bind us together.**Thank you for being part of this vision for a district—and a country—that honors every community and celebrates every contribution.**
---
| | **Con todo corazón,
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=cf3915e55c&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

---

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Epstein Files
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files?
_Did anyone really think the sexual predator president who used to party with Jeffrey Epstein was going to release the Epstein files?_
Instead, he’s been busy taking away your health care to cut taxes for the rich and threatening to strip Americans of their citizenship and send them to foreign prisons.
We were told Donald Trump’s new GOP cared about working people.
But you can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes.
You can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund school lunch programs that help feed little boys and girls whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge.
Let me tell you what it’s been like in Washington these last seven months.
The leaders of Georgia’s clinics and hospitals and nursing homes, caregivers for seniors and the disabled, nurses, teachers, food pantry directors — they all came to us and pleaded with Georgia's representatives in Congress: don’t do this. Don’t devastate health care. Don’t abandon seniors. Don’t starve kids.
Sen. Warnock and I listened. We fought that bill, and we voted No.
We put Georgia first.
But every Republican member of Congress who is supposed to represent Georgia put loyalty to Trump over loyalty to our state.
***
That brings me to the 2026 election.
_2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule._
And here in Georgia, I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up for reelection in a state Trump won.
I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat.
_There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured the Democratic majority four years ago._
This is a moment of struggle for the very substance of our Republic. This descent into one-man rule must be stopped.
[**If you share my outrage at this unprecedented corruption and abuse of power — and if you are determined to WIN — please split a donation between my campaign and Ruben Gallego today. This is the most important Senate race in the country, and I can’t win without you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em250915-1-30&t=1&akid=3971%2E734936%2EVElLer)
[DONATE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em250915-1-30&t=2&akid=3971%2E734936%2EVElLer)
Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining.
And come next November, we will raise it higher.
In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption.
Thank you for your support.
\- Jon

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Instead, he’s been busy taking away your health care to cut taxes for the rich and threatening to strip Americans of their citizenship and send them to foreign prisons. We were told Donald Trump’s new GOP cared about working people. But you can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes. You can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund school lunch programs that help feed little boys and girls whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge. Let me tell you what it’s been like in Washington these last seven months. The leaders of Georgia’s clinics and hospitals and nursing homes, caregivers for seniors and the disabled, nurses, teachers, food pantry directors — they all came to us and pleaded with Georgia's representatives in Congress: don’t do this. Don’t devastate health care. Don’t abandon seniors. Don’t starve kids. Sen. Warnock and I listened. We fought that bill, and we voted No. We put Georgia first. But every Republican member of Congress who is supposed to represent Georgia put loyalty to Trump over loyalty to our state. That brings me to the 2026 election. 2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule. And here in Georgia, I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up for reelection in a state Trump won. I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat. There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured the Democratic majority four years ago. This is a moment of struggle for the very substance of our Republic. This descent into one-man rule must be stopped. Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining. And come next November, we will raise it higher. In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption. Thank you for your support. \- Jon Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: MAGA's way to crackdown on nonprofits they disagree with?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=091525_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=091525_2&amount=25]
We've got to let you know, Team, that a bill that would give President Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes passed in the U.S. House of Representatives last Congress and is sure to come up again.
The bill, last known as H.R. 9495, would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons.
“ Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will .” “ A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin.
Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House once and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress now that opponents of voting rights have total control of our government. That's why we need to start working now to prevent this bill from ever becoming law.
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights? We need every supporter of voting rights with us >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=091525_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091525_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091525_2&amount=20]

name: Team Joe Lombardo
subject: Re-Elect Governor Joe Lombardo
body:
Let’s Get the Job Done
| | | | | [](https://xfumircbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011rF2txmoVHnX9u5M4DekEtP6H3G1256iOlsXIyWOPyWSISi0MYsiRjVC37Q6hmiNjopJ9xe5eZTHSNZu367OQUIVaaMkcDgds5omyQhhEE8riG__S8V1HZWo6RDUnC8RTWvfkB7f76VJ3RgXgmKmUkskeuCom1kLNeFdm9Qe6R2axVsGZF_IBaycNZBfCUBnkVjeAPJKsXhjOlA0wV2B9i0GrCss0KK5&c=LGtlL1kuD-mJdWHvRcZQ0U4VYmjaHaiTyU1CxZT6AsRvJdHgiqPAcg==&ch=dayInsasJV0ESMB3GKyq35oGy0ycggd3MzqU6LT-hePdVjfVfn9MSg==)
---
| Peter,
---
| When Governor Joe Lombardo was elected in 2022, he made a promise to Nevadans that he would lead with integrity, keep our neighborhoods safe, and protect the Nevada way of life.
We elected Joe because our state deserved more than another self-serving politician. We needed a leader who dedicated his life to serving our state and would never turn his back on us.
---
| | [](https://xfumircbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011rF2txmoVHnX9u5M4DekEtP6H3G1256iOlsXIyWOPyWSISi0MYsiRjVC37Q6hmiNYGzS9MMfbC6OizdJ0Zn_spxHWALeFag7YvpV1yylf7zQAMm7M9crtMxk1bG7X1gz-tt3LMXV2FbXDxfR3xxjULzo5Bty1U9kV5rMgaryigi5daYO2jm32DzGdufZfzis&c=LGtlL1kuD-mJdWHvRcZQ0U4VYmjaHaiTyU1CxZT6AsRvJdHgiqPAcg==&ch=dayInsasJV0ESMB3GKyq35oGy0ycggd3MzqU6LT-hePdVjfVfn9MSg==)
---
| We've accomplished a great deal in only three years, but now is the time to finish the job.
Thanks to Governor Lombardo's work, our streets are safer, our economy is thriving, students and teachers have more support in the classroom, and Carson City is back to working for the people. He pushed back against radical leftist policies, vetoing over 160 bills that were California-style liberal policies.
Since he was the only Republican last cycle to beat an incumbent, the Left has this race a top target.
Nevada is a prime example of strong leadership done right; and the Radical Left knows it. They are working day and night to recruit candidates that support DEI policies, higher taxes, and their woke agenda. The left will pour millions into this race and, if successful, will return to unchecked single party rule in Nevada.
Just like last cycle, this race will come down to organized grassroots efforts across the state--knocking doors, making calls, turning out voters, and building the energy we need to carry Joe Lombardo to victory again. This is why we need your support to keep Nevada on the right path and help Governor Joe Lombardo continue to get sh*t done.

---
