clean_body: Let’s Get the Job Done | | | | | == | Peter, | When Governor Joe Lombardo was elected in 2022, he made a promise to Nevadans that he would lead with integrity, keep our neighborhoods safe, and protect the Nevada way of life. We elected Joe because our state deserved more than another self-serving politician. We needed a leader who dedicated his life to serving our state and would never turn his back on us. | | == | We've accomplished a great deal in only three years, but now is the time to finish the job. Thanks to Governor Lombardo's work, our streets are safer, our economy is thriving, students and teachers have more support in the classroom, and Carson City is back to working for the people. He pushed back against radical leftist policies, vetoing over 160 bills that were California-style liberal policies. Since he was the only Republican last cycle to beat an incumbent, the Left has this race a top target. Nevada is a prime example of strong leadership done right; and the Radical Left knows it. They are working day and night to recruit candidates that support DEI policies, higher taxes, and their woke agenda. The left will pour millions into this race and, if successful, will return to unchecked single party rule in Nevada. Just like last cycle, this race will come down to organized grassroots efforts across the state--knocking doors, making calls, turning out voters, and building the energy we need to carry Joe Lombardo to victory again. This is why we need your support to keep Nevada on the right path and help Governor Joe Lombardo continue to get sh*t done. | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | For Nevada, Team Joe Lombardo P.S. For campaign updates and more information, please visit == to learn more about how you can get involved. | | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | | | Lombardo for Governor | P.O. Box 371176 | Las Vegas, NV 89137 US | |

body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Movements are built one relationship at a time, and right now, every voice matters.
And on World Democracy Day of all days (ironic, isn’t it?) we’re reminded just how fragile democracy feels.
Between Donald Trump expanding his election-rigging agenda, to RFK Jr. spreading dangerous lies about vaccines, to the CDC in utter turmoil and the National Guard illegally deployed in DC... Peter, our democracy is under attack and the stakes have never been higher.
That’s why we built Politivist Action PAC and Movement for Freedom: to organize, raise up leaders, and fight for justice, not powermongering. And that’s why hearing from you is essential to our movement.
Take our short survey and tell us what inspires you, what scares you, and what keeps you going. Your answers will shape this movement. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/U7Dja63SZEObKS3XNsmyJw2]
TAKE OUR SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/U7Dja63SZEObKS3XNsmyJw2]

DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250915_democracyday_act]
Let’s keep building. Together.
In solidarity,
Movement for Freedom

| | _Koslow Calls Blakeman Budget Request a Political Charade_
---
| | **Nassau County, NY —** Today, former prosecutor, current Nassau County Legislator, and Nassau County Executive candidate Seth Koslow stood up for Nassau County tax-payers against Blakeman’s political charade of a budget request. “Bruce Blakeman is playing politics with our taxpayer money,” **Said Seth Koslow** “This budget request from his administration is nothing more than lip service—a political charade aimed at undermining lawmakers who are trying to make a real difference in this county. Including frivolous, one-off line items in departments that are in desperate need of meaningful investment is an embarrassment.”“I’m calling on Bruce Blakeman to act in good faith, stop the extremist D.C.-style politics, and start investing seriously in our county’s departments and resources. It’s time to be the leader he claims to be and finally address the problems he has ignored for the past four years”

---
| | **A bout Seth Koslow** _Seth Koslow is not a typical politician. He’s a lifelong Nassau County resident, dad, coach, and former prosecutor._
_Born and raised in Baldwin, Seth grew up watching his father achieve the Nassau County Dream, starting a small CPA business from their home and expanding it into a thriving practice that provided Seth and his siblings with the opportunity to attend college and build their own futures._
_Now, Seth is running for Nassau County Executive because taxes are too high, the county wastes too much money, and regular folks are paying the price._

---

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: We are required to report what we’ve raised after our next deadline:
body:
---
Derek, We’re nearly halfway through September, which means we’re rapidly approaching our most important end-of-quarter fundraising deadline so far this year. When the month is over, we’ll be required to report how much we’ve raised. The DNC _must_ report a big number. Here’s why it matters: Trump wants to undermine our democratic rights and values. He’s asked Republicans to redraw congressional maps to give themselves more seats. He’s threatening to end voting by mail. And instead of standing up for Americans everywhere, he’s counting on Democrats completely giving up. Now is our chance to prove that we won’t. If everyone reading this email pitched in $3 to the DNC today, we’d send a powerful message: _Democrats are standing united._ But not everyone chips in, which is why we are hoping all Democrats who understand the stakes of this deadline and this moment will make a contribution today. Any amount makes a difference. [**So we’re asking: Can you chip in $3 to the DNC before tomorrow’s mid-month deadline?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250915_4580_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4580_22930333_trct-v&akid=4580%2E22930333%2Etrct-v) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250915_4580_fr&refcode2=4580_22930333_trct-v&akid=4580%2E22930333%2Etrct-v)**

subject: What my 2025 Governor's race means for the 2026 midterms
body:
Our race has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation's history. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115280303/569782494/-1888791436?&refcode=E15226-20250915-SpanbergerSplit-Image-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjQ0NGFhY2QtN2E5Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rDJ_k3xZ8CppxEJQb46ubMH_tRqfIOD8ueQJQJt2KF8=) Peter, I don't just want to win this November — **I want to win big.** Because as Democrats, the bigger we win in Virginia in 2025, the louder a message we'll send about the 2026 midterms. Voters are furious about the chaos coming out of Washington, and our race has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation's history. _And can I be honest for a minute?_ That's a lot of weight on my shoulders. Friend,

It’s time to get loud. Louder than ever.

The people trying to tear this country apart want us quiet. They want us timid.

They want us to back down.

But that’s not who we are.

This movement is built on strength, conviction, and voices that refuse to be silenced. It’s like a great symphony—every instrument, every note, every voice matters. And right now, we need to raise the volume together.

That’s why **tonight’s mid-month deadline** is so critical. It’s not just about numbers on a page—it’s about momentum, energy, and proving that we’re only getting stronger.

clean_body: We’re not going to shrink back. We’re not going to go silent. We’re not going to back down. | Friend, It’s time to get loud. Louder than ever. The people trying to tear this country apart want us quiet. They want us timid. They want us to back down. But that’s not who we are. This movement is built on strength, conviction, and voices that refuse to be silenced. It’s like a great symphony—every instrument, every note, every voice matters. And right now, we need to raise the volume together. That’s why tonight’s mid-month deadline is so critical. It’s not just about numbers on a page—it’s about momentum, energy, and proving that we’re only getting stronger. We can’t slow down now. We can’t pull back. This is the moment to stand tall, fight harder, and make our voices impossible to ignore. We’re not going to shrink back. We’re not going to go silent. We’re not going to back down. It’s time to get loud. Louder than ever. Thank you! Marty O’Donnell Republican for NV-03 | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans. Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems. He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC. Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families. As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government. | PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

| | [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge) and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)

**Cliff 's Note:** _Hey Ampers, this is the livestream/summary of a great convo with David Shuster, Dem oppo researcher & GW prof, Brett Di Resta, and myself. We didn't share it last week b/c the Charlie Kirk news broke towards the end. Yet, what we discussed--from Epstein to Putin over Poland--is still incredibly relevant. So we're sending it out now._
### **Take Advantage of[our 15% off Sale on a Paid Subscription to Blue Amp While it Lasts!](https://substack.com/redirect/31464d78-9abe-44ac-b422-51dea226286b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[I Want 15% Off Now!](https://substack.com/redirect/162704e2-8c99-498d-a23a-f290ee90b44f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7abcf9fb-41fe-4f99-83fc-5686c4205bc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The livestream kicked off with Cliff being Cliff--half battery warning, half flamethrower, and fully unfiltered.
The Virginia election over-performance by Dems, which added a crucial seat to their congressional total and garnered them more power to take on professional-son-porn-monitor and Donald-Trump-squeeze-toy, Mike Johnson, wasn't just a local win.
This was a flashing neon sign: [Americans are pissed at Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/a70d958d-545b-4e3e-bd24-b8d005490444?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And they're showing it at the ballot box.
But woven into these cheers was the fabric of a deeper, darker subplot. This includes the Epstein files, the health rumors, and the GOP's panic over [whether their glazed-carrot Creator has the stamina left](https://substack.com/redirect/189eeb94-7a16-4888-824f-0932cc180bde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to stagger through to 2025.
Spoiler: he really doesn't seem to.
Then the discussion turned to the Putin problem. While Trump plays man-servant to his favorite shirtless shit-kabob, Russia's testing boundaries with Poland.
Cliff reminded us that this isn't a drill--it's the "salami slice" strategy totalitarians always run. The difference between FDR and Trump? FDR beat fascists. Trump would be on his knees begging them for table scraps.
Hell, if this were Yalta, Trump would've just given Stalin the keys to the Oval Office, our Pacific strategy, his lunch money, Tiffany, some nukes and maybe begged him for a spanking.
The bigger theory on the table was brutal but logical: Trump's usefulness has expired. He's sick, sloppy, and pinned down by Epstein baggage.
Enter J.D. Vance--[the Christianist crusader with the Founders Fund cheerleader squad](https://substack.com/redirect/2f2d0a70-392c-4e1e-a2b3-d22535ffe365?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--ready to be the new front man for the fickle, flaccid fascists.
As David pointed out, Putin gets an obedient surrogate, [billionaires get their pet](https://substack.com/redirect/45f84794-0153-4b73-ae1a-d50c18c71f38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and Republicans can finally distance themselves from the pervy old man with the corrupted cankles.
It's the worst episode of _Succession_ imaginable, but it tracks.
Democrats, meanwhile, actually got good news: special elections in Virginia and Arizona are setting up the numbers for a discharge petition in the House that could finally force the release of Epstein files.
Brett talked a bit about this and how it could change Washington.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.5QtFm44cSk9mxkVrxRqt7EfDnQYt1tvzOuy6P9htq_k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=173291699)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/74c6383f-8c06-4676-b5b0-2cb93a6b1575?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Even better, Tom Massie doesn't like him some Donald Trump.
Cliff noted Thomas Massie is openly bucking Trump, Rand Paul is bizarrely lobbing verbal grenades at J.D. Vance, and Marjorie Taylor Greene looks like she had Kremlin talking points translated into GED every time she speaks.
Republicans call it strategy. [Normal people call it selling out your country.](https://substack.com/redirect/78a4d57d-5d80-4380-b56b-b12724b78295?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And through it all, Cliff hammered home the lesson Democrats still struggle to learn: stop being the stiff kid in the corner explaining policy papers. **Be the happy warrior.** Mock the hypocrisy. Laugh while you gut these thugs politically.
Gavin Newsom gets it. Gretchen Whitmer flashes it. Jasmine Crockett has it in spades. You can defend democracy and still throw elbows with a smile. Because if Dems keep showing up like Al Gore in a debate hall while Trumpworld shows up like Hulk Hogan in a wrestling ring, we'll lose the crowd--and the country.

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: They’re underestimating us…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC

Peter,

_When I first stepped off the football field and into the political arena to run for U.S Senate, people said I didn 't stand a chance._

The media laughed at me. Democrats spent millions of dollars trying to shut my campaign down. Every liberal group in America piled on.

_They didn 't just want to beat me... they wanted to humiliate me. To send a message: outsiders like me don't belong in Washington._

But I had one thing they didn't: **YOU**.

**We fought like a team --yard by yard, dollar by dollar, grassroots supporter by grassroots supporter--and we won--not barely, but by a landslide.**

Now, I'm running for Governor. I refuse to let the Fake News Media and Left try to slow my campaign down.

That's why I'm reaching out to you today, because they aren't only doubting me. They're doubting our America First Movement.

[**_I’m kindly asking you to help me out again by chipping in just $5. Together, we can show the Left that they should NEVER underestimate us._**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7592bb1be84b4d2684f897d962798d9f&_e=x6oA3FBqfdee9WDihJBFFlfPWGJ0JHqFvADyEo75uFV20QhW_09SxDR12Hc9lsBMRBmj3m8HeC1gJD02KCXIF2epHhKaXKyU2Z-HOsA6LlWUwOzwEe7qxfn9Da_aX6oUPq1Gmyz9_bGGk2Jfwc_vrdq1WlW5ESpP14lC0BCGzUJhSCxL6iJVzXShFmXCQpQnGBYGxg1RkQsky4JcteodjdUhFk3wXD7hGJJzOrh7cJmreP0ZNfCHw-eidvmXjsnyU10QVzcAH3H9r-6Gqpm_iaLqZ5mVycBa8I9xa4q48P1qSfofR-jUs_CTuNfGflJBcVWrx9vRa_BYbutx_UlSN-Ws6uV9IKV_TtrDMlrjlvKa5CR_jxDnffgCwtdl-wDZ7mCPdWehw_Wy1O7qdc9htay5S82p3OlqPAzt0NOorl18YsHAQXKcoKKeNf9PkAj13JWViI5tl7qsldScKUfn4F5Ts4cOeW6y2n-o5xOAMxWYULeVItRdnB6_Opi7URL_P6Fvi5SRLt7cbB7PkYuWYKvu-pUlLAhH_-ScbaXdHVHDKLTTbLGu8D9satTnImyu)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=7592bb1be84b4d2684f897d962798d9f&_e=x6oA3FBqfdee9WDihJBFFlfPWGJ0JHqFvADyEo75uFV20QhW_09SxDR12Hc9lsBMRBmj3m8HeC1gJD02KCXIF2epHhKaXKyU2Z-HOsA6LlWUwOzwEe7qxfn9Da_aX6oUPq1Gmyz9_bGGk2Jfwc_vrdq1WlW5ESpP14lC0BCGzUJhSCxL6iJVzXShFmXCQpQnzMUvOY4uYEehkgj12b5U-rfbUtdqavcBXPaSYydEdgUXuGAW82fYd8x_k11pWysvAKJnX3pRYoVh0dQyLfEYrFLRwbUJdyiy6k3FUWQrju3f1UlwaSvnGTH665RpKBI-8maJnNZ2GW2-CRbjuDFkLb2PljB7gyqzWkgSxOWO4hEJST2psXmuTb-59Uim0iIkan6zzXBQfSzrAyvXRCkDs5r-Tcwnm9jaVlQPjNjT5H6G3rllS5je0fCoi3uC9dl-84hlPO7IegcKz3Bo9RBxmmrNgzhnuEE9AIXLx-VhdT6-2n2HOIoNQLvEdKRW-4Uf97vpw2etji4qYVw-nJExikEaiRAoMtiThrCSdxpZArtakkcoumdeTfKPRMQ2eMkj)

| Hey Peter, if you live in FL-10, you might see me or my team out knocking doors in your neighborhood!

You might be asking yourself, why are we knocking on doors in neighborhoods in September of an off year? The answer is simple: **We're knocking doors for democracy all year round!**
[](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/ifVPjoQ9eFzbpgnNc8xu2Q~~/AAPPABA~/3FT5IvKCWkY0PF1VfvzTbghkZ04dMX_m1CZCggrsCve7Hbcs7rYsH4-BkkxUgTU1KAmfSwwe6CZZUnl4H4JdEQ0YWySVOBhV2jK8O8Yj54R-Z9Eb03UxMavZhbrfkbnzG0IjtJUQjdlVbAgFfZArM_ei1eb_zWCzm71P0G2qdyRptSEM9RPKrQJ-degj6PetuziaiWUGATZGdbex1p6JPvw7LUCHlH-D5U-xt6UWsCdHME8ybD_Zv_u4quUIDe5T-Ub2TcQHgtBnyg3yLOm42xSW4kp0byrQSXGYToHzTrErt6sZEK0yUy0HdIWUWWkCuZBayLydsBqykEBYM15yiGDciz3SzV3poiDjNx0Mtms~)
**To continue this important work, we need your help. A donation today will ensure that we can maintain our presence in the community and increase our impact.** [**_Will you pitch in $27 to help support our year-round organizing efforts on the ground here in Florida? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/ifVPjoQ9eFzbpgnNc8xu2Q~~/AAPPABA~/3FT5IvKCWkY0PF1VfvzTbghkZ04dMX_m1CZCggrsCve7Hbcs7rYsH4-BkkxUgTU1KAmfSwwe6CZZUnl4H4JdEQ0YWySVOBhV2jK8O8Yj54R-Z9Eb03UxMavZhbrfkbnzG0IjtJUQjdlVbAgFfZArM_ei1eb_zWCzm71P0G2qdyRptSEM9RPKrQJ-degj6PetuziaiWUGATZGdbex1p6JPvw7LUCHlH-D5U-xt6UWsCdHME8ybD_Zv_u4quUIDe5T-Ub2TcQHgtBnyg3yLOm42xSW4kp0byrQSXGYToHzTrErt6sZEK0yUy0HdIWUWWkCuZBayLydsBqykEBYM15yiGDciz3SzV3poiDjNx0Mtms~)

This isn't your typical campaign effort that ramps up a few months before Election Day. Our organizing never stops because we believe in transformational, not transactional, organizing.

What does that mean? It means we’re not just asking for a vote every two years. We're committed to being in the community year-round, constantly engaging and supporting downballot candidates.

Because it's not just about me or my seat, it's about all of us. Our campaign is about ensuring that every voice is heard, especially the voices of the poor, working class, and young people.

This summer, we took a major step forward by hiring _30 organizing fellows_ , ranging from high school to college age. Our Democracy Summer fellowship just ended – and already, we’ve hired 6 new fellows for the fall. They're on the ground right now... but their success depends on our ability to keep this program thriving and expanding.

**Every donation, no matter the size, will help us build and sustain this year-round organizing program. Your contribution will directly fund training, resources, and support for our fellows, equipping them to drive meaningful change in our communities.**

[**_Can I count on you to support our mission? Together, we can make a lasting impact. >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/ifVPjoQ9eFzbpgnNc8xu2Q~~/AAPPABA~/3FT5IvKCWkY0PF1VfvzTbghkZ04dMX_m1CZCggrsCve7Hbcs7rYsH4-BkkxUgTU1KAmfSwwe6CZZUnl4H4JdEQ0YWySVOBhV2jK8O8Yj54R-Z9Eb03UxMavZhbrfkbnzG0IjtJUQjdlVbAgFfZArM_ei1eb_zWCzm71P0G2qdyRptSEM9RPKrQJ-degj6PetuziaiWUGATZGdbex1p6JPvw7LUCHlH-D5U-xt6UWsCdHME8ybD_Zv_u4quUIDe5T-Ub2TcQHgtBnyg3yLOm42xSW4kp0byrQSXGYToHzTrErt6sZEK0yUy0HdIWUWWkCuZBayLydsBqykEBYM15yiGDciz3SzV3poiDjNx0Mtms~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/599MAULdNjR2fnhCWr1obw~~/AAPPABA~/DO8-MlqNX3g8TQgbVw_2c7eYCAFtYXbfh_O2guzbKvEf5eLW2thwz4vXxOcCshsn1fQ1Ts8Z4N1BoccrdUw0VWdsVDMRL5dGI0k_iLaHW8g3ZVZa9bnIW5jKZunKrwyRQdd5_MDsfkwFkL2GNtEpNeoJO3aTPB5wAC45KX5OeHEsACbZ1GoOBa0bkL272Pqg9VgUlTTb5llhz5dwuCUfxtbl0Y_NhhLukyGrBwcUGxXiGzw53e7Q0BiJ7FsT01lxfH9GYB-ofRweBv_Wabp4g2RVtUKZQ--4klSb5d1FLU5DXs2nzOrLsSAYe42yfn1276ZByXBXHu5QwpWN63mOjOFeo2MKXP1J2ypmZqWYEvbJtXZHzmfJu-9wb0cfOjIw)

clean_body: | ~ | Hey Peter, if you live in FL-10, you might see me or my team out knocking doors in your neighborhood! You might be asking yourself, why are we knocking on doors in neighborhoods in September of an off year? The answer is simple: We're knocking doors for democracy all year round! ~ To continue this important work, we need your help. A donation today will ensure that we can maintain our presence in the community and increase our impact. ~ This isn't your typical campaign effort that ramps up a few months before Election Day. Our organizing never stops because we believe in transformational, not transactional, organizing. What does that mean? It means we’re not just asking for a vote every two years. We're committed to being in the community year-round, constantly engaging and supporting downballot candidates. Because it's not just about me or my seat, it's about all of us. Our campaign is about ensuring that every voice is heard, especially the voices of the poor, working class, and young people. This summer, we took a major step forward by hiring 30 organizing fellows , ranging from high school to college age. Our Democracy Summer fellowship just ended – and already, we’ve hired 6 new fellows for the fall. They're on the ground right now... but their success depends on our ability to keep this program thriving and expanding. Every donation, no matter the size, will help us build and sustain this year-round organizing program. Your contribution will directly fund training, resources, and support for our fellows, equipping them to drive meaningful change in our communities. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Thank you for standing with us. In solidarity, Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today? | ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. Seniors are watching Republicans threaten to slash vital social programs. Our communities are living under constant fear with ICE raids ramping up and MAGA lawmakers pushing even more extreme policies **Make no mistake, friend – MAGA Republicans aren’t just enabling the chaos. clean_body: | = = Hi there, it’s Ro Khanna. I’ve spent years pushing for economic empowerment for working-class families, and the coming midterm calls for bold action to defend their dignity and future. Republicans have just gutted Medicaid and SNAP by nearly a trillion dollars, slashing the very programs that sustain elders and families as costs continue to rise. Seniors are watching Republicans threaten to slash vital social programs. Our communities are living under constant fear with ICE raids ramping up and MAGA lawmakers pushing even more extreme policies Make no mistake, friend – MAGA Republicans aren’t just enabling the chaos. They’re locking arms with it. That’s why I’m supporting Randy Villegas, who’s running in California’s 22nd District – one of the most competitive House races in the country. Thanks to redistricting, 2026 could be our best shot in years to flip this seat blue. And flipping it would bring us one step closer to winning back the House – our last real check on Trump and MAGA Republicans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Ro Khanna | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. body:
This is going to be a major test. Peter,

subject: re: Sonia Sotomayor’s SCATHING dissent >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Signature spots dwindling fast
| **Justice Sotomayor just received a STANDING OVATION on Stephen Colbert after SLAMMING the MAGA SCOTUS majority:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93951?t=6&akid=21243%2E878179%2EjEx58O) Sonia Sotomayor has been on the frontlines of the fight against Trump — from rebuking the immunity decision to standing up for reproductive rights!

[**As one of the few defenders of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. ONLY 15 SPOTS LEFT: SIGN YOUR NAME NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93951?t=7&akid=21243%2E878179%2EjEx58O) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93951?t=8&akid=21243%2E878179%2EjEx58O)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s increasingly extremist agenda and unconstitutional power grab.**

Your scathing dissent against the MAGA Justices’ immunity decision was historic, and you haven’t backed down even a little bit since then.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93951?t=9&akid=21243%2E878179%2EjEx58O) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93951?t=10&akid=21243%2E878179%2EjEx58O)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21243%2E878179%2EjEx58O). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21243%2E878179%2EjEx58O).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21243%2E878179%2EjEx58O) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=21243%2E878179%2EjEx58O). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21243%2E878179%2EjEx58O)
---

**Here at PolitiBrawl, we are going to help carry Charlie Kirk 's torch forward with everything we've got. **
Now is the time to fight for the spirit of this country or lose everything. We plan to fight with facts, peaceful discourse, and by inspiring others to stand with us against evil.
Thank you sincerely to each and every PolitiBrawl reader for supporting us in our mission.
\- The PolitiBrawl Editors

I walked around D.C. the Friday after Charlie Kirk was shot down by a radicalized coward and **[I wanted to talk to people about something I noticed...](https://substack.com/redirect/dc3c9064-c4a9-4b63-88cc-1858068484f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Conservatives were getting together to sing, pray, and peacefully remember and honor Charlie Kirk, instead of rioting, burning/looting buildings, and getting violent.
Why are conservatives peaceful after tragedy on our side and not acting out like Antifa, BLM or the LA anti-ICE rioters on the left?
People seemed very uncomfortable when confronted by this question. **[Watch their responses here:](https://substack.com/redirect/dc3c9064-c4a9-4b63-88cc-1858068484f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# FBI investigating possible accomplices in Charlie Kirk hit
The FBI is investigating whether the Charlie Kirk's **[assassin had accomplices](https://substack.com/redirect/5a5c1f8d-f526-4b64-9b95-dd9e7e7fa6ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , with Deputy Director Dan Bongino telling Fox News that they are looking into possible "aiding and abetting, whether it be financial or someone who knew the specifics of it and failed to report that," adding, "not going to be a stone left unturned."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1dcf2928-5e55-4f60-a37b-562730c2f8ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Video evidence was crucial in cracking the case** , Bongino said, showing the gunman leaping from a rooftop after the fatal shot with the gun either in his backpack or on him, providing "a significant portion of the forensic evidence" that helped solve the case.
* **The suspect had expressed violent intentions beforehand and became increasingly radicalized** , with family and coworkers telling investigators he had grown "more political and withdrawn" leading up to the attack, with Bongino saying "this ideology had infected him and had taken over."
* **The attack was clearly ideologically motivated** , according to Bongino, who noted that Kirk "sadly and tragically gave his life underneath a sign asking people to challenge his ideas, the very essence of our constitutional republic," while praising the FBI's 33-hour response time in apprehending the suspect.

* * *
# NJ surgeon who allegedly celebrated Charlie Kirk's death resigns - Nurse who took a stand vindicated
A New Jersey surgeon resigned Tuesday after allegedly celebrating the assassination of Charlie Kirk, while a nurse who was suspended for confronting the doctor about his remarks has been reinstated, **[Englewood Health told The NY Post](https://substack.com/redirect/a8b5e263-ab84-4870-b42f-ca18f81025b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Dr. Matthew Jung resigned from Englewood Health** after allegedly "cheering" Charlie Kirk's murder in front of the hospital's nurses' station moments after news of the assassination broke on Wednesday.
* **Nurse Lexi Kuenzle confronted Jung** about how someone whose job is saving lives could celebrate a death, then posted about the incident on social media, leading to her initial suspension by the hospital.

* **Kuenzle has been reinstated** with the hospital stating she is "expected to work her scheduled shifts" and clarifying that she "was never fired" and "will not miss any pay as part of our review of this matter."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/03c32308-c734-4e01-9345-46e9c998e910?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Kuenzle filed a lawsuit** in Bergen County Superior Court against the hospital, Jung, and others, claiming she was wrongly suspended, while the hospital says it's "committed to providing a safe and respectful environment for all."

"Why are conservatives praying and singing today instead of rioting like the left does?" | | | Sep 15 | | | | | | | | | | | | Here at PolitiBrawl, we are going to help carry Charlie Kirk 's torch forward with everything we've got. Now is the time to fight for the spirit of this country or lose everything. We plan to fight with facts, peaceful discourse, and by inspiring others to stand with us against evil. Thank you sincerely to each and every PolitiBrawl reader for supporting us in our mission. \- The PolitiBrawl Editors I walked around D.C. the Friday after Charlie Kirk was shot down by a radicalized coward and Conservatives were getting together to sing, pray, and peacefully remember and honor Charlie Kirk, instead of rioting, burning/looting buildings, and getting violent. Why are conservatives peaceful after tragedy on our side and not acting out like Antifa, BLM or the LA anti-ICE rioters on the left? People seemed very uncomfortable when confronted by this question. Do you know why conservatives aren't rioting like the left after the targeted killing of Charlie Kirk ? FBI investigating possible accomplices in Charlie Kirk hit The FBI is investigating whether the Charlie Kirk's , with Deputy Director Dan Bongino telling Fox News that they are looking into possible "aiding and abetting, whether it be financial or someone who knew the specifics of it and failed to report that," adding, "not going to be a stone left unturned." Video evidence was crucial in cracking the case , Bongino said, showing the gunman leaping from a rooftop after the fatal shot with the gun either in his backpack or on him, providing "a significant portion of the forensic evidence" that helped solve the case. The suspect had expressed violent intentions beforehand and became increasingly radicalized , with family and coworkers telling investigators he had grown "more political and withdrawn" leading up to the attack, with Bongino saying "this ideology had infected him and had taken over." The attack was clearly ideologically motivated , according to Bongino, who noted that Kirk "sadly and tragically gave his life underneath a sign asking people to challenge his ideas, the very essence of our constitutional republic," while praising the FBI's 33-hour response time in apprehending the suspect. NJ surgeon who allegedly celebrated Charlie Kirk's death resigns - Nurse who took a stand vindicated A New Jersey surgeon resigned Tuesday after allegedly celebrating the assassination of Charlie Kirk, while a nurse who was suspended for confronting the doctor about his remarks has been reinstated, Dr. Matthew Jung resigned from Englewood Health after allegedly "cheering" Charlie Kirk's murder in front of the hospital's nurses' station moments after news of the assassination broke on Wednesday. Nurse Lexi Kuenzle confronted Jung about how someone whose job is saving lives could celebrate a death, then posted about the incident on social media, leading to her initial suspension by the hospital. Kuenzle has been reinstated with the hospital stating she is "expected to work her scheduled shifts" and clarifying that she "was never fired" and "will not miss any pay as part of our review of this matter." | | ---|---|--- Kuenzle filed a lawsuit in Bergen County Superior Court against the hospital, Jung, and others, claiming she was wrongly suspended, while the hospital says it's "committed to providing a safe and respectful environment for all." **3 →** That’s how many seats Democrats need to win in order to flip the House. But there’s no path for us to do that unless we keep this must-hold seat in Oregon blue.
**26 →** Out of hundreds of Members of Congress, that’s how many Democrats in the House are considered the most vulnerable members up for re-election. Janelle’s one of them.

This will be another competitive race, but with your help, we know we have what it takes to defend this seat and keep Janelle fighting for Oregon in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks so much, Team Bynum | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, . | Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress Janelle Bynum For Congress 10121 SE Sunnyside Road #300 Clackamas, OR 97015 United States

name: AOC
subject: We don't have to live like this anymore.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We can make a new world.
#
I grew up in a working-class family.
My mom cleaned houses and my dad worked to build a small business. My parents worked themselves to the bone so that my brother and I could just have a shot.
And for a moment there, it looked like we were going to make it: we had a home, bills were a little less stressful to pay, and I was doing well in school. What may have looked like a modest life to others was a dream come true for us.
But suddenly, when I was a teenager, my dad was diagnosed with a rare form of cancer. He passed away in September of 2008, just as the economy crashed in the Great Recession and millions of jobs across this country vanished.
It felt like the world of our family fell apart as the larger world was falling apart too.
Overnight, my mom was left to figure out how to provide for two kids by herself, put them through school, keep our house, pay off my dad's medical bills — all on a house cleaner salary.
That's how I became a waitress. Because it was millions of innocent working families who paid the price, while the billionaires and thieves who defrauded our financial system got off richer than ever before. **And not a single one of them went to jail**.
And you know what?
**_That_ is the story that Republicans mock — not just mine, but all of ours — when they say a waitress or working person is unqualified to serve in Congress**.
I tell this story not because it is special, but because of how _common_ it is.
While the details may differ, so many of us know what it feels like for life to be one bad day, one bad piece of news, one major setback from everything feeling like it's going to fall apart.
**We don't have to live like this anymore**.
We can make a new world, a better country, where we can fight for the dignity of all people.
And it looks like **living wages**.
It looks like **stable housing**.
It looks like **guaranteed health care**.
And it looks like **respect for all of our differences** , no matter who we are or where we come from.
That means that we must choose to out-organize the oligarchy. We will and must do away with the power of big money.
And that is why, even as a waitress with a long shot campaign, I decided that **I would never take money from lobbyists or corporations — and I never will**.
[Will you make a $5 contribution right now to help us fight for progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250915.d3hqWu&refcode=em20250915-9757-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9757%2E2526796%2EFdMpP9)
Every donation helps us mobilize, organize, and fight for the working class in the places that need it most.
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250915?refcode=em20250915-9757-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=2&refcode2=9757_2526796_FdMpP9&akid=9757%2E2526796%2EFdMpP9)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250915-9757-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=3&akid=9757%2E2526796%2EFdMpP9)**

---|---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Kirsten
subject: Donald Trump doesn’t want you to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Hi, The work in the Senate doesn’t stop – even in these tough times.**This month alone, I’ve been:**
* Fighting to protect Social Security and Medicare from Trump’s privatization schemes
* Pushing to lower health care and prescription drug costs for working families
* Working to expand SNAP and child care support, because no parent should have to choose between paying the bills and feeding their kids

**I’m proud of this work — but I’ll be honest with you: passing bold reforms with Trump and Republicans in control is nearly impossible.** That’s why we need to **flip the Senate in 2026,** because only then can we rebuild our democracy for working people, protect our freedoms and make life more affordable for families everywhere. **[**_Chip in $5, $10, $20 or whatever you’re able to give ahead of our mid-September fundraising deadline tonight at midnight to help us build the movement we need to flip the Senate. _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115282076/569788643/246949951?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.15_September_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODlmNTEwNS04MDkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKLuWt8IeAarllmuh2ydnhBDpdhGLv2CmJyDxZevP8Q=)** | | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115282077/569788644/246949951?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.15_September_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODlmNTEwNS04MDkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKLuWt8IeAarllmuh2ydnhBDpdhGLv2CmJyDxZevP8Q=)

Mid-September is a critical checkpoint. Grassroots donors like you are the reason we can fight back and compete in every single state.
I’ve seen what happens when people underestimate us. They say we can’t defend democracy while lowering healthcare costs. They say we can’t protect reproductive rights and win close elections.
Trump and his GOP allies want us to get tired. They want us to sit this one out. But we’ve proven them wrong before — and with your support, we’ll prove them wrong again.

# [without my husband](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=173707120&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczNzA3MTIwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTc5NzQ2OTgsImV4cCI6MTc2MDU2NjY5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JrPeSIfE7QFbI4fScQ5Pooe7zo38Fc-1h5nQ-fi0n5s)
### a poem of grief
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Sep 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=173707120&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczNzA3MTIwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1Nzk3NDY5OCwiZXhwIjoxNzYwNTY2Njk4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IT1U-kUMNstKgZyW-8ZF1oA8_u5Xk5I0WmmTDafTrRk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---

without my husband, at the center of my life and soul is an open wound, empty, raw, like the flesh that's left when a tooth is gone, sore and tender and yearning, improperly exposed, vulnerable, wanting, abject, inconsolable.

on a quiet afternoon, on the computer outside on a sunny day, working - because the only solace left to me is work, there is no sanctuary, no safe haven, no blessed comfort in my husband's arms and presence anymore - and I start to feel almost contentment, almost peace

and that gentling stillness brings me to the truth at the center of my life, which is this woundedness, this heaviness, this utterly dismembered pain

and the birds still sing, and the breeze sways the branches of the trees, and the sun is on the grass and the bees visit the yellow dandelions and the plane flies overhead

and none of it matters, my tears start to fall without my noticing

the truth of the core of my life is loss

and I know through my faith I am taught patience, and I am counseled perseverance, and I am told to speak the truth and uplift humanity and care for the vulnerable and bring justice to the oppressed

and if that is what my life is and can be, I say alhamdulillah, may Allah use me for good -

always

and still

the tears fall

without my noticing

and I don't know when

they'll ever stop

name: VoteVets
subject: It’s still the guns
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Weapons of war have no place in civilian hands, on our streets, in our communities.
#
We’re Veterans. We were trained to use rifles, pistols, machine guns. We carried them into war. Many of us own guns of our own.
We can tell you this, without doubt — the guns are the problem. Weapons of war have no place in civilian hands, on our streets, or in our communities. We have to take meaningful action to stop dangerous weapons from falling into the hands of dangerous people.
For twenty years, VoteVets has been working to build a political movement that takes meaningful action on gun violence. We are unapologetic about it, and we’re going to keep doing it for as long as it takes.
That takes a lot of time, a lot of effort, a lot of people, and a lot of money. And we’re not going to apologize for this, either: We need your support to fight tooth and nail to take these weapons of war off of our streets for good.
[**Please. Donate to VoteVets and back our mission. We can’t do this without your help. Any amount helps, because it all adds up when tons of people are chipping in.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sep25.qP0qt0&refcode=em250915-1-120&t=1&akid=34613%2E3013755%2E0dwbFm)

name: John Rich
subject: J6 defendants PUNISHED for being veterans
body:
I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24268752/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvR1pKdVU0NWNwdA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTU/LbmNsYmdCU2FyeQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM0WkxTN0FRY1lXOGFscw/gaMiRuA/sape8e0efa4)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Patriot,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate $10](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $35](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $1,000](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate Any Amount](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice.

These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs.

_**If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will?**_

When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. _You are defending the soul of our country_.

**As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now.**
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
For faith, freedom, and country,

John Rich

Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team Ossoff
subject: falling short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter—
We are reaching out on behalf of Jon Ossoff with an important request to make a contribution to his reelection campaign ahead of our mid-month deadline at midnight.
We won’t sugarcoat it: There's been a dramatic slowdown in our fundraising this month and we’re in danger of falling short of our mid-month goal.
Look at this chart from ActBlue:
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250915-1-f&t=1&akid=768%2E5691347%2EufHlb1)
You can see the trend — our fundraising is going the wrong way and the timing is not great at all. As far-right groups flood the airwaves with millions of dollars worth of attacks on Jon’s record, we need the resources to respond and set the record straight.
Now, we’re never going to try to fool you with fake goals or beg you to chip in because “the sky is falling.” _It’s not,_ and that’s not how we do things.
But we will tell you that individual, small-dollar donations make up the vast majority of our fundraising and we can’t afford to slow down while the GOP is ramping up.
That's why we're reaching out. We need your support now to close the gap and crush our mid-month fundraising goal before the deadline tonight.
[**If reelecting Jon Ossoff and giving Democrats a chance to flip the Senate is worth $5 to you, please make that donation to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250915-1-f&t=2&akid=768%2E5691347%2EufHlb1)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250915-1-f&t=3&akid=768%2E5691347%2EufHlb1)**
Thank you in advance for contributing. We are hoping for lots of donations to make up for the recent shortfall.
\- Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. clean_body: Peter— We are reaching out on behalf of Jon Ossoff with an important request to make a contribution to his reelection campaign ahead of our mid-month deadline at midnight. We won’t sugarcoat it: There's been a dramatic slowdown in our fundraising this month and we’re in danger of falling short of our mid-month goal. Look at this chart from ActBlue: You can see the trend — our fundraising is going the wrong way and the timing is not great at all. As far-right groups flood the airwaves with millions of dollars worth of attacks on Jon’s record, we need the resources to respond and set the record straight. Now, we’re never going to try to fool you with fake goals or beg you to chip in because “the sky is falling.” It’s not, and that’s not how we do things. But we will tell you that individual, small-dollar donations make up the vast majority of our fundraising and we can’t afford to slow down while the GOP is ramping up. That's why we're reaching out. We need your support now to close the gap and crush our mid-month fundraising goal before the deadline tonight. Thank you in advance for contributing. We are hoping for lots of donations to make up for the recent shortfall. \- Team Ossoff Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate

body:
I’m running to defend democracy
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115282626/569790529/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDA5ZTJjZS04MjkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d3MA-CO4tfdkH_aUbyU3eL_cfypaBpEzPFqBopfgzhg=)
Hi, it’s Congressman Robert Garcia, the top-ranking Democrat on the House Oversight Committee.
I need to level with you.
Because of California’s redistricting, I’ll be running for re-election in a brand new 42nd Congressional District. It’s tougher, it’s more competitive, and Republicans are already eyeing it as one of their best chances to flip a seat in California.
**That’s why I set an ambitious goal: $4,200 in grassroots contributions before midnight tonight. If we can hit that mark, we’ll prove we have the strength to take on whatever Republicans throw at us in CA-42.**
Dozens of grassroots supporters have already rushed to help me reach this goal, but with just a few hours left until the deadline, **I’m just under 25 donations short.** I know these mid-month deadlines might not seem important, but they’re how we show the GOP we’re serious. And I can’t do it without you.
**[So I’m asking: Can you chip in $10, $25, or $42 right now to help us close the gap before the deadline? Every donation matters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115282627/569790530/789508428?refcode=250915_RG_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDA5ZTJjZS04MjkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d3MA-CO4tfdkH_aUbyU3eL_cfypaBpEzPFqBopfgzhg=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115282628/569790531/-309737922?refcode=250915_RG_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDA5ZTJjZS04MjkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d3MA-CO4tfdkH_aUbyU3eL_cfypaBpEzPFqBopfgzhg=)
Together, we can protect this seat, keep California blue, and flip the House. But it starts tonight.
Thank you for standing with me,
Robert

name: Powered by People
subject: This won’t be the last time we prove them wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
We’re halfway through the month, and our end-of-quarter deadline is fast approaching. We need to stay on track — not just to meet our goals, but to keep building the grassroots movement that Texas deserves.
Right now, we’re facing a serious challenge: Attorney General Ken Paxton is using the full weight of his office to come after us with politically motivated, baseless legal attacks.
It’s already costing us more than _$300,000 in legal fees_ — money that should be going to registering voters, organizing volunteers, and turning out Texans in every part of the state.
**That’s what this is really about: power. Ken Paxton knows we’re effective. He knows we’re organizing at a scale that threatens the status quo — and he’s trying to drain our resources so we can’t keep doing this work.**
But we’re not going anywhere.
[**Will you chip in now to help us fight back and stay on track this month? Every dollar you give helps power the grassroots organizing we need to win in 2026 and beyond.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250915.QJQc-Q&refcode=ema20250915-240354&t=2&akid=240354%2E444211%2ECw1edD)

This isn’t the first time we’ve been underestimated — and it won’t be the last time we prove them wrong.
Thank you,
Team Powered by People

---
Friend, Charlie Kirk didn't just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end -- _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Friend, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind -- _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything ... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**

name: Chris Pappas
subject: It all comes down to right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I need you with me.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2371%2E582294%2EbfDyVR)
This is going to be a short email — but what I’m about to say is still really important.
Our mid-month fundraising deadline is **TONIGHT** at **MIDNIGHT.** We still need to reach 20,000 individual donors to keep this campaign on the right track and prove the strength of our movement.
[**If you’re willing to help me defend this Senate seat — and our Granite State values — can you donate $5 before midnight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250915_2_mm?refcode=em20250915-2371&amount=5&refcode2=2371_582294_bfDyVR&akid=2371%2E582294%2EbfDyVR)
With gratitude,
Chris Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250915-2?t=2&refcode2=2371_582294_bfDyVR&akid=2371%2E582294%2EbfDyVR)**

This means I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to power this campaign. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **** ** ** ** ** ******************** **** When these numbers go public, I want Colorado to see that we're building something special together. name: Brad Finstad
subject: Minnesota Democrats have picked their guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, The Minnesota Democrat establishment has made their choice: they’re lining up behind my liberal opponent to take me down.
They can’t stand my record of fighting for southern Minnesota families, rural communities, and the conservative values that have traditionally made our state strong. So they’ve picked a loyal, liberal foot soldier to do their bidding in Washington.
Here’s the truth: when the Democrat machine rallies around a candidate, it means one thing— _**big money from national Democrats is about to flood into this race.**_ My _leftist opponent won’t be working for you_. He’ll be working for Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and the liberal elites who want to raise your taxes, crush family farms with regulations, and put the government in charge of every part of your life. I’ve always been willing to stand up to the Left, to protect our farmers, defend our values, and fight for common sense in Washington. But if we don’t match their resources, we risk being drowned out by their attacks. This is where you come in. Can I count on you to chip in today to help me be prepared to fight the Democrat establishment and their hand-picked candidate? Every dollar you give makes sure our conservative message reaches voters across southern Minnesota.

---

| Let’s show the democrat machine that southern Minnesota won’t be bought and sold by their big coastal elite donors. Thank you,
Brad Finstad

name: Team Sherrod
subject: who is fighting for Ohio's working families in the Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Sherrod never planned to run for office again, Peter.

But when he saw what was happening in our country – politicians in Washington siding with billionaires and corporate interests, costs rising for working families, health care being ripped away – he knew he couldn’t stay on the sidelines.

There’s simply too much at stake for Ohio families.

Our battleground race is going to be one of the most competitive in the country, and to win, Sherrod needs supporters like you to step up from the very start. [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115283778/569794711/-1150512723?refcode=EM_F_250912Sherrod_N_TSB_90DO_9_NG_N_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGMzMDViNy04NzkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J4o0-FshJhhZp_C9fL9_Jyzw7dlC7bQomr_VkhTsDac=)
This race isn’t about left or right. It’s about whether Ohio workers have someone in the Senate fighting for them. Right now, no one is.

Workers are more productive than ever, but wages are flat, costs are skyrocketing – and corporate special interests keep rigging the system.

Sherrod couldn’t stand by and watch. Not while regular people were getting hurt. He’s getting back in the ring because he believes in the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do.

clean_body: Sherrod never planned to run for office again, Peter. But when he saw what was happening in our country – politicians in Washington siding with billionaires and corporate interests, costs rising for working families, health care being ripped away – he knew he couldn’t stay on the sidelines. There’s simply too much at stake for Ohio families. Our battleground race is going to be one of the most competitive in the country, and to win, Sherrod needs supporters like you to step up from the very start. = = This race isn’t about left or right. It’s about whether Ohio workers have someone in the Senate fighting for them. Right now, no one is. Workers are more productive than ever, but wages are flat, costs are skyrocketing – and corporate special interests keep rigging the system. Sherrod couldn’t stand by and watch. Not while regular people were getting hurt. He’s getting back in the ring because he believes in the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Shontel Brown and Sherrod Brown: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you. – Team Sherrod Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Jena Griswold
subject: A reminder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
Peter,
Today is the International Day of Democracy — a day to remember the deep value of our democracy and to recognize the fight we’re up against to protect it.
Right now, our democracy is under threat. Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are working overtime to undermine elections, spread lies, and silence the voices of everyday Americans. The stakes could not be higher.
But here’s the truth: democracy doesn’t protect itself. It depends on all of us — standing together, raising our voices, and fighting to ensure that every American can participate in free and fair elections.
As Colorado’s Secretary of State, I’ve worked to make our elections both secure and accessible. From expanding vote centers and ballot drop boxes to protecting election workers from threats, I know what it takes to safeguard democracy when it’s under attack. And as Attorney General, I’ll never back down from defending our rights and freedoms.
On this International Day of Democracy, I’m asking for your help. Can you chip in today to fuel our fight to protect democracy here in Colorado and across the country? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg?&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg?&amount=25&express_lane=true]

Together, we can make sure our democracy endures.
With gratitude,
Jena

subject: Balance of power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman

body:
Can you help us finish strong?

| |

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Hitting the ground running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Hey there, Peter — the start of session has been a busy one, so I wanted to pass along this update. **But before I dive in, I wanted to ask: Will you pitch in today and make sure your name is on our report of grassroots supporters this month?** **Here’s a secure link you can use** : **[secure.actblue.com/donate/ya-em-sep25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115284510/569797128/1289792659?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250915_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY2ZjNjZi04OTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=40cFUR7ztNYe2D7QZy_rZhkj6bXkgzDvfXoMYD8uTus=)** We started these voting weeks in DC with our foot on the gas: Mike Johnson tried to make Americans forget about the Epstein files before our summer recess last month, _but it didn’t work._ We began the month by inviting survivors of Epstein’s abuse to testify before members of Congress and they’ve made it clear: the files need to be released fully and abusers need to be held accountable. Republicans may try to shove this under the rug,**but I won’t rest until justice is served.** Just before we got back, I returned to the Eloy Detention Center to talk with detainees about the conditions in the facility. Detainees, many of whom are being held there without having been charged with a crime, are reporting racist and inhumane treatment by ICE staff, and disgusting conditions that have led to illness and disease. Worst of all, sick people are experiencing extreme negligence, like Yari Rodriguez Marquez, who is currently battling leukemia and has lost over 55 pounds during her imprisonment. She has yet to see the doctors she needs to see to fight this disease. I’m doing everything I can to stand up to Trump’s extremism and this authoritarian administration. Which means that there will be _even more eyes_ on our next public fundraising report — right-wing groups looking to expand Republicans’ historically narrow majority in the House are looking for any sign of weakness. **That’s why we need the strongest report possible, Peter. It’s not about how much we raise, but how many people are willing to step up. Can I count on you today?** **Here’s a link to make a contribution:** **[secure.actblue.com/donate/ya-em-sep25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115284511/569797129/1289792659?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250915_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY2ZjNjZi04OTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=40cFUR7ztNYe2D7QZy_rZhkj6bXkgzDvfXoMYD8uTus=)** Thank you for your continued support, Yassamin Ansari

* * *
Yassamin Ansari for Congress
PO Box 13524
Phoenix, AZ 85002
United States ****[yassaminforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115284512/569797130/1625509068?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250915_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY2ZjNjZi04OTkyLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=40cFUR7ztNYe2D7QZy_rZhkj6bXkgzDvfXoMYD8uTus=&emci=36617014-6092-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a8f6f3cf-8992-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=45157234) ** | [info@yassaminforcongress.com](mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com)** | **Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.**

name: Team McBride
subject: Before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Time is running out.
#
Our mid-month fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight, and we’re asking you to [**donate to help us reach our $34,000 goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250915?refcode=em20250915-2338&refcode2=2338_21716_DLElKr&akid=2338%2E21716%2EDLElKr)
Here’s why:
1️⃣ **Our FEC fundraising deadline is on September 30.** In just a few weeks, Sarah will be legally required to publicly report our fundraising numbers. If we post a strong report, it’ll show national Republicans that people in Delaware and across the country have her back.
2️⃣ **Our average email donation is just around $18.** Sarah relies on grassroots donations to keep her focused on fighting for us in Congress, holding this administration accountable, and helping take back the House — not stuck on the phone dialing for dollars.
3️⃣ **Time is running out to reach our goal.** We have just a few hours left, and right now we’re still $9,000 behind.
That's why we're asking: [**If you’re in a position to do so, can you pitch in $18 or even $1 to support Sarah and help us reach our goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250915?refcode=em20250915-2338&amount=18&refcode2=2338_21716_DLElKr&akid=2338%2E21716%2EDLElKr)
**[Donate $18 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250915?amount=18&refcode=em20250915-2338&refcode2=2338_21716_DLElKr&akid=2338%2E21716%2EDLElKr)**
**[Donate other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250915?refcode=em20250915-2338&refcode2=2338_21716_DLElKr&akid=2338%2E21716%2EDLElKr)**
Thank you!
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250915-1&t=1&refcode2=2338_21716_DLElKr&akid=2338%2E21716%2EDLElKr)**

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Following up
body:
Did you see Wendy's email, friend?

| |
---
Friend, did you see this? Our mid-month fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight, and we're on track to fall short by nearly $4,000. Our end-of-quarter deadline is barely two weeks away, friend. If we start falling behind now, we may not have time to catch up.
