body:
Here’s the state of Marlene’s race to defeat David Schweikert:

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115284631/569797485/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.15_State-of-the-Race_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTcxNDQ5YzgtOGE5Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tpN_vR5hh3OrF8X4WR5udmbNRun8aLheVqD8CXfFU1Q=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115284632/569797486/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.15_State-of-the-Race_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTcxNDQ5YzgtOGE5Mi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tpN_vR5hh3OrF8X4WR5udmbNRun8aLheVqD8CXfFU1Q=) Team, Can you spare just one minute for an update on the state of Marlene’s race to unseat spineless Republican David Schweikert? Here’s where we’re at:
1. **The _Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee_ calls AZ-01 a “top district in play.”** We’re closer than ever before to unseating Schweikert once and for all.

2. **The _Cook Political Report_ ranks this race as a “toss-up”** — and with Trump hijacking congressional maps across the country, our race is a **_MUST-WIN_**.

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: Soros-backed prosecutor is persecuting my husband
body:
My husband saved a life and now he’s facing life in prison | | | That’s not the momentum we want heading into a busy spring in the courtroom.
---
| | Dear Friend,I’m so sad and angry right now. After over a decade of service to his country, my police officer husband is facing politically motivated prosecution while saving the life of an innocent person.We’ve been so strong and hopeful but tonight, this little device on my husband’s ankle broke me.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d62031c84a5640eab32a936d26115deb&_e=aHnCBiC_pcInZ6diqAtDDgAWQyU9CpJyo2xbylrB7TI0UuRxtvXguAQEIQK8LculdH1UpQ51OOMk358KX1mVZFWbaC1snlP75qxM7n9CkvAkl_xQAFD96Bv5l9jHtdKJSpyrRR_Yz3KBI6pFoQkWuNWE2caqW42ZDon_mAP-IPh8vtMj5M2fcSVJpFpGqm3DRePdgMRXF0xD0XUFR4YmgIZJHYf07sXTi5J7wwI61Rm1J3amV1icSzWrkgk6ToXeX2ek3pjP4YLe1NqpxxP0wuaCRmMyIeThPl8otz9htNZ_0asxP8yF8aEORfTHy-thr4cQ7s9f-EMsFcht7h0crI8PfsyjhALUt67THhyHCw7crZ2JE_rz9idY4glsyw23DvPomZ4kFNx9ZBi3nj-M-u6UFyT-Na8Usyke_iU3p2AFGlGLlukDKqQhYqRHfCF6RHCJCnwib4IpqUsUvpg0tMZJ_ROnlQ5AtRjgQSA4BL7QNEB3ZiCIHweyUN0HkwM7fkxQaL7WyJ8PVWMcorl91cDSUyKbAXap_88ReMbMoD6JitGoHVExsG7VBH7bBCvTb_sMTsPcpKI1oq3paiEVigvxDSDeNTyCYMz4VWZtxmYenmILIf-xK3TJ5oAbq4J2grzdBfSd0EwNA1fAVNcMGMmcSb4n_RK6V6E4DXQ8yu8mjAzBHKeFdNDzDzIsFXU5)
---
I'm sorry for getting ahead of myself, but it’s been so hard, and I don’t know what else to do as a Soros-backed prosecutor is persecuting my husband for saving the life of a fellow officer. [**Friend, will you help my husband get his life back?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d62031c84a5640eab32a936d26115deb&_e=aHnCBiC_pcInZ6diqAtDDgAWQyU9CpJyo2xbylrB7TI0UuRxtvXguAQEIQK8LculdH1UpQ51OOMk358KX1mVZFWbaC1snlP75qxM7n9CkvAkl_xQAFD96Bv5l9jHtdKJSpyrRR_Yz3KBI6pFoQkWuNWE2caqW42ZDon_mAP-IPh8vtMj5M2fcSVJpFpGqm3DRePdgMRXF0xD0XUFR4YmgIZJHYf07sXTi5J7wwI61RmeBWzWfISFaTBPyBZCTk8Bhbmo7q90Wiqi3h8UffpSv3BZBn8_CY69gofDadpiNR47JDoHflkNuofkfaXOLy6imVlpjCfv6ifXh6SZzlJl7Tqq1EXfOepDXoEwjBmfDg9AuaaTPGxNq64EleBRT55Ppy-vXRehrwma9OsLfVE18l3dsWUHioLBpQB0VDHPpVsFh53E23r2U5vs71gv-3glk_Q7nRHhg73nOl1mGoqWptQjHpUqpluRXI9mDUAHc4KyQx7oLhLz-tRkGmPtAJSUw9MkaiaC_bwJlOKBYnzAeWzFxrR34NCJuxSFBmGGlt-fyjE1PCpO2p_ysDY947nSwJBTOLpFqiV6efN7iFUdyhP85G0_al4Frr58UZ5Hmx9ViHHx50mwdpuUC1cWX5yQEx0Ezf4P3LqjA0bQKnwqSM2CoDKk061LYPtNDATDQWNg5x30nz8yVnMqNND4E5w0) It all started when Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, responded to a shoplifting call. The suspect’s resistance quickly turned into a violent attack on the officers – putting Brad’s partner's life at risk.Brad did the only thing a good officer could do and shot the violent criminal.It's episodes like this that make me worried to death when Brad is late coming home. I cried myself sick when I heard what happened that day, but I was so thankful they were alive.And yet I know the danger our families and communities would be in if Brad and other good officers weren't willing to risk their lives.That’s why I was completely shocked when we heard Brad was being charged with murder! But then we found out the prosecutor was New Mexico’s radical Soros-backed Attorney General Raul Torrez, who used to work in the Obama administration.**This isn’t about justice – this is a political attack.** Friend, it only got worse from there.In February, Brad was wrongly convicted at a circus trial. Not only were two jurors removed and replaced without reason, but one of the jurors they kept was a radical BLM activist who hid their bias during jury selection!Honestly, I don’t know how we would’ve faced the attacks from the anti-cop mob if it wasn’t for Jason Johnson at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). When LELDF heard about Brad’s fight for justice, they reached out and offered to help fund his legal defense.I thank God every day for bringing us hope in such a dark time.But friend, LELDF is a non-profit organization so the only way they can help good officers under attack, like Brad, is through the support of patriots like you. [**Which is why I must ask...will you make an emergency gift to LELDF, so Brad has the necessary funds to win this fight?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d62031c84a5640eab32a936d26115deb&_e=aHnCBiC_pcInZ6diqAtDDgAWQyU9CpJyo2xbylrB7TI0UuRxtvXguAQEIQK8LculdH1UpQ51OOMk358KX1mVZFWbaC1snlP75qxM7n9CkvAkl_xQAFD96Bv5l9jHtdKJSpyrRR_Yz3KBI6pFoQkWuNWE2caqW42ZDon_mAP-IPh8vtMj5M2fcSVJpFpGqm3DRePdgMRXF0xD0XUFR4YmgIZJHYf07sXTi5J7wwI61RkemsoPza3VLL75OH5MweMblRuzmtDZ1-5cBaO0G-8i89Kb_SrfBvlI2BIme1QyQ_VW6AHmZpjF_OZugTlZEfMBYwrcKQml1L5D75v6IvIw4Zj6hQzZNiBbFMxvWBoiDMg-GB8OuGcB1sfOCmSC2qS9F865nyjbDdSa4h71KGDpBHvvGvT6Fb59C4y6bE9i5OSEshlc0imr1Pc0ep1VRLsbmtmyYMMpAbQhVr2hx5jr07LAm74byvWhdjoU7OhrVV03yICtbjnqK0R14cHfcwvXRlfoKgjQQADiEOS93wXnJixWOYL-o9JPYgwpD_xiJ5je8gDSzZTcZR8X2nxuPdZdVWT8VRtVGFEPCE4L3QTtRaDqniIzM8CAAfpimjbfK_Qiu2oobz0yu1cJRvGulJXWLNpm7BO8aFI4YzggfexD8elrM4JsFIsdh3Nj73v3rpj-7ZkEooG6vc6j0uIn8RGZ) Right now, Brad must wait, shackled to an ankle monitor, until the judge decides on **September 19th** if he gets a chance at a fair trial...which would be another hefty sum. Don’t get me wrong, I’m so grateful Brad is home and no longer sitting in prison, but dealing with his ankle monitor has been tough; the kids begging Dad to go swimming with them, the awkward stares in public, seeing him struggle with it to work out or do other activities... The other day, Brad walked to the back of our property to make sure one of the dog's bowls had water and to fill up the hummingbird feeders...then he gets a call from SCRAM, the people that monitor his ankle monitor, saying he is out of boundaries.OUR. OWN. PROPERTY?!?It really got to him and seeing him upset breaks my heart. All of the crap he has gone through, that our family has gone through, and will continue to deal with for who knows how long...All because one lowlife criminal chose to put two officers in danger.Because one corrupt politician decided he needed political gain.I can’t let them ruin our lives...but I know I can’t win this for him on my own.**[Please, if you are able, send your best possible donation to LELDF to help Brad win this battle before it’s too late.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d62031c84a5640eab32a936d26115deb&_e=aHnCBiC_pcInZ6diqAtDDgAWQyU9CpJyo2xbylrB7TI0UuRxtvXguAQEIQK8LculdH1UpQ51OOMk358KX1mVZFWbaC1snlP75qxM7n9CkvAkl_xQAFD96Bv5l9jHtdKJSpyrRR_Yz3KBI6pFoQkWuNWE2caqW42ZDon_mAP-IPh8vtMj5M2fcSVJpFpGqm3DRePdgMRXF0xD0XUFR4YmgIZJHYf07sXTi5J7wwI61Rmydk3S2M-6Rlbzy2LPDUyRQ8JU6bo4qpknGyKavdxdStlZid2CaqCL8yCPO8UErYluoHs9r5iDvZ9vdU0LQdllwft6SrCWa99KTrdWQFhIQe39pxRmVcGnyBgSPGoaLPGgI-B7p08kueNc3rsgpXhTaOPQf7WEY3eM5cFDqCOJ3auOsjfphS81prKlIynRkQknVHDlaDy1gmcHRSEaysHNB0xGqkOxacl6wJS1aX1oGeXwRrPaRAMcEsofRaDxfApJR7hUd3dK-BQv8-sYXFURdBPeVliV4t0wxWFEMkl-Nexie5AnHv-rvkGZEuYI8pTMlFs9Z-oCOsZIwjYkQsurOcockaUOJnJ3XQ4s3MvlqNTLfLPkA5SGSpKEL40hrxu9LUc7j9sxLLSlDKpqIhoij_bVza_qD1w2UCr_5yqUhL8-C_5mYNpA-JcVkNeRgwVw6XHORNj448GE0Ys6eH_f)** Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for all of the love and support. You all have no idea how much it means to us.Thank you, thank you, thank you!Lacy Lunsford
---
P.S. My husband, Officer Brad Lunsford, is waiting for a judge to grant him a new trial after a BLM activist infiltrated the jury at his trial in February. This political prosecution from a Soros-backed Attorney General has been a heavy burden on our family. **[Please, if you are able, donate $35 or more to LELDF as they help fund Brad’s legal defense.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d62031c84a5640eab32a936d26115deb&_e=aHnCBiC_pcInZ6diqAtDDm-QqrYlWI1IS1Ng446bLA9mQL3hnZFpQs7oq96Pg8pqdRf80kKOO5lvgoT_JHkGnZc0bHzocQZarLsWt_B8NndQ2m9m4MNHuFznyT6bnMqcmLgudUB4K9L1PzZ6ZcNXMyWwnWSx6GjFV27lArntQtCxJrUdvL23adxrY7bi-rt0w0gQNOr-X88d3YbNmvuyMvsGyOG8-k_TFNeHOBWyhabfmdXfjpUstcbjSErpbxVEmsjaPZwyu_AAbsGqGNwTSX5jBrBf3dipK3IeuGREfH7Fth2zQFBWl8Eb1vuuBQ1k-UyAXHtCUsQgk7L1coNqt15Jqr8o4wHUKE_Y2WMJnP5vFVREE-iC0a2PVQpAh8pyBMpOpLpuCH0Mjlt9d4IK7ZnuII4D-KSJZ_DOnyinBfiP0HMm08Q3h7BL0NuOMARMFDGu8TAlVZ2rOsMzK7zkK8GHj0LY_Nb_AyUiZnpFC9YHI9nBE4N5D47H11JTIdVYcfEyBrSdaxwwQdEbGKRCK3FPvOyWzMfJNMo6K_ny4oaSC_53niwNJPSKAamYXPODnILZ0gvmhwd0M_4SrNDjSy-r4GpNQQ0rSjxnP3oXI17GN9LHrcoK0wVOgmIhkdL9vmrmNdO1wDFlkdx-5rb0mrLVLA4uICPwIknljTV-3kicC8lin7kDvH1ZrcpM2CYHHGW9JUKcgCqgzBkobvPZEgI7xAeFuKt9jBt44mHbbTJY-kdcT2Ve17gZu33973ThyovECKQBOm8UPJqDvAmLTtch5VLvxtlu1FMibNdax5jIlQjC0JskZOJZhOEB7Ya5-_xfOj4eoP_hJdmtdGqaZ75l5O7p84ZDKssixrjE6r4kh8q_RMOCEw8wRWa2LOnlMMwYILC7OSYOlkw5p1paK76v4-qHpgTYmYawHw36gcZMHrppS39wTHSm4qELr0MGSwZHnn3fq4eQVFDDZsf7u_Ln9XckfajOtMBJD5sgR6JuSC_xHxev5LqJLmfDUmb55pejnExDA7uMXZxkIunv4qSpcbjm3Qp17-uQrgHNJ0BRjALCm5lSbYuQo_kBm2mgIbGOT0h317IMYpP5IS40NZ7B2blcbAWUAU2ZJQDO8_iYpeczl4yzvZ3WHAtJ80Wl1mWa2EST10GSbAw2SCHmq_jqCvsJnC22HkpsuExIV8ZAVyRqZGAZzUHrn262D4SWsw9mGFDTkaQFwqBEdwO9FYXzFNN_n7HYC7WqMCVWL9hPIU6oqwHLqTD-RMwAZ9zEdLk_4bDt3JWBXJAmmgR8WrpxxH3uGFcnDJN8_4UG7m__phVLqkjHpkSxXbrwk1ElO6JCC9M75I4zFr1TZT7A3Zg6RE39e8p6AgkQXvVzhJ2SK8DhK5msaZp5iZLr7avJj1t7xHigCM9MFE2c8pqczGI4pBZf4sP3fB5ty-dWWq16T9_NPd8EiMl_yvsJOTHH_F-CqibZ8EXxpv3-Lzi3KRqWLDSnyBz0LrdIYkhJOsbsJeJnMj7UZF90zUiUr_MdHlaWvCo2jYUwE3mTecmQVtpf3a44Z4ZBWlOWZI-DL_8%3D)** Thank you for your prayers and financial support!

clean_body: My husband saved a life and now he’s facing life in prison | | | That’s not the momentum we want heading into a busy spring in the courtroom. | | Dear Friend,I’m so sad and angry right now. After over a decade of service to his country, my police officer husband is facing politically motivated prosecution while saving the life of an innocent person.We’ve been so strong and hopeful but tonight, this little device on my husband’s ankle broke me. I'm sorry for getting ahead of myself, but it’s been so hard, and I don’t know what else to do as a Soros-backed prosecutor is persecuting my husband for saving the life of a fellow officer. It all started when Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, responded to a shoplifting call. The suspect’s resistance quickly turned into a violent attack on the officers – putting Brad’s partner's life at risk.Brad did the only thing a good officer could do and shot the violent criminal.It's episodes like this that make me worried to death when Brad is late coming home. I cried myself sick when I heard what happened that day, but I was so thankful they were alive.And yet I know the danger our families and communities would be in if Brad and other good officers weren't willing to risk their lives.That’s why I was completely shocked when we heard Brad was being charged with murder! But then we found out the prosecutor was New Mexico’s radical Soros-backed Attorney General Raul Torrez, who used to work in the Obama administration.This isn’t about justice – this is a political attack. Friend, it only got worse from there.In February, Brad was wrongly convicted at a circus trial. Not only were two jurors removed and replaced without reason, but one of the jurors they kept was a radical BLM activist who hid their bias during jury selection!Honestly, I don’t know how we would’ve faced the attacks from the anti-cop mob if it wasn’t for Jason Johnson at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). When LELDF heard about Brad’s fight for justice, they reached out and offered to help fund his legal defense.I thank God every day for bringing us hope in such a dark time.But friend, LELDF is a non-profit organization so the only way they can help good officers under attack, like Brad, is through the support of patriots like you. Right now, Brad must wait, shackled to an ankle monitor, until the judge decides on September 19th if he gets a chance at a fair trial...which would be another hefty sum. Don’t get me wrong, I’m so grateful Brad is home and no longer sitting in prison, but dealing with his ankle monitor has been tough; the kids begging Dad to go swimming with them, the awkward stares in public, seeing him struggle with it to work out or do other activities... The other day, Brad walked to the back of our property to make sure one of the dog's bowls had water and to fill up the hummingbird feeders...then he gets a call from SCRAM, the people that monitor his ankle monitor, saying he is out of boundaries.OUR. OWN. PROPERTY?!?It really got to him and seeing him upset breaks my heart. All of the crap he has gone through, that our family has gone through, and will continue to deal with for who knows how long...All because one lowlife criminal chose to put two officers in danger.Because one corrupt politician decided he needed political gain.I can’t let them ruin our lives...but I know I can’t win this for him on my own. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for all of the love and support. You all have no idea how much it means to us.Thank you, thank you, thank you!Lacy Lunsford P.S. My husband, Officer Brad Lunsford, is waiting for a judge to grant him a new trial after a BLM activist infiltrated the jury at his trial in February. This political prosecution from a Soros-backed Attorney General has been a heavy burden on our family. Thank you for your prayers and financial support! | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 |

# [#]
It's Team Ruiz,

We're still short of our goal, and this couldn't be happening at a worse time. In a few weeks, our fundraising numbers will be completely open to the public — and the fact that we're already falling behind our projections sends the wrong message.

Here's the thing: if everyone reading this just pitched in $5, we would blow our fundraising goals out of the water.

So here are five reasons you should pitch in $5 right now:

→ Dr. Ruiz is fighting an anti-science administration that puts politics over public health.
→ He's speaking out to support the CDC and joining federal health workers in calling for Secretary Kennedy’s resignation.
→ He's holding DHS accountable for dangerous federal oversight of immigration detention centers.
→ He's supporting workers displaced by Trump's tariffs that have caused slowing job growth and higher unemployment rates.
→ He's fighting for our environment by expanding public lands with Chuckwalla National Park.

Dr. Ruiz stands up for Californians, but he can't do this work without your grassroots support to compete with Republican attacks.

Will you rush $5 or any amount right now to meet our projection so we can protect this seat and keep Dr. Ruiz fighting for our state? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-sep25?amount=5]

Thanks,

Team Ruiz

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

clean_body: Please open this email before midnight. | Peter, some people want you to believe that the only way to improve our country is by dragging our people backward. Slashing food assistance. Gutting health care. Stripping away rights. I say that they couldn’t be more wrong. We don’t make this nation better by giving more to a few and making things worse for the many. We don’t create a better path by revoking the rights Americans hold dear. I am ready to defend those rights, Peter — and to stand up for democracy against those who would prefer to hold power at any price. = | = Thank you, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. Peter, Charlie Kirk didn't just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end -- _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Peter, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind -- _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything ... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**

name: Tobias Read
subject: Ballots are becoming political chess pieces
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250915em-mmfr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250915em-mmfr]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250915em-mmfr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250915em-mmfr]
Hi friends, it’s Secretary of State Tobias Read.
As Oregon’s Secretary of State, I see firsthand how vulnerable our elections can be—not just to foreign sabotage but to domestic power plays from the top.
First, federal interference can lead to centralized mandates that override local protocols.
Then, election workers face threats, both virtual and physical, that jeopardize their safety.
Lastly, without local autonomy, ballots become political chess pieces.
That’s why I’m committed to making Oregon a national leader in election security and integrity—from the ballot drop box to the courthouse.
Will you join me? We have a major fundraising goal coming at midnight tonight, so please make a contribution of any amount to to help me defend our democracy from authoritarianism. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250915em-mmfr]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250915em-mmfr]
Thank you for standing with democracy.
—Tobias Read, Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

Portland, OR 97242
United States

### **[Want more unfiltered conversations with voices like Grant Hermes? Become a paid subscriber to support Endless Urgency](https://substack.com/redirect/eb071469-dad2-4a1a-94d8-8ac05bec40d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 👇**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/eb071469-dad2-4a1a-94d8-8ac05bec40d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
Today's live was intense. I went in fired up--and stayed that way. My friend and guest **Grant Hermes** joined me to unpack the absolutely unhinged things J.D. Vance said while hosting Charlie Kirk's show. We dug deep into the hypocrisy, the escalation of right-wing rhetoric, and the coordinated smear campaigns that are putting real people in danger. If you care about truth, safety, and holding power to account, this episode is for you.
* **01:13** -- I open with a raw and unscripted rant about the dangerous claims J.D. Vance made, including his false accusations that the left is solely responsible for political violence.
* **4:18** -- Grant and I break down the actual stats on political violence--including what the FBI and data from January 2024 tell us--and why Vance's claims are pure projection.
* **10:56** -- We discuss the terrifying changes happening inside the FBI under Kash Patel, including politicization, botched manhunts, and extremist dog whistles.
* **22:00** -- I share the full story of Laura Loomer's threats against me and my son, and why this is a perfect example of how Trump's inner circle empowers extremists.
* **33:02** -- We close with a clear-eyed warning about the growing culture of right-wing doxxing and cancel campaigns, and why everyone needs to be smart about how we respond.

**[If you found this episode important, powerful, or clarifying--become a paid subscriber today. You help us build the studio, support our team with living wages, and expand what Endless Urgency can do. Don't sit this one out. Your voice, your attention, and your support are essential right now.](https://substack.com/redirect/eb071469-dad2-4a1a-94d8-8ac05bec40d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Deb Haaland
subject: It’s getting late, so I’ll keep this quick

body:
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4448%2E400544%2EiwLoNV)
It's getting late, so I’ll keep this quick:
My team let me know that we’re still a bit short of reaching our goal of bringing in 10,000 grassroots donations before midnight.
_I’ll be honest — we can’t afford to miss this benchmark._
Our campaign is gearing up to publicly report our fundraising totals **for the last time this year** in just a few weeks, _and everyone —_ _including National Republicans eying this race — will be watching to see if we have the grassroots power it’ll take to win._
**Reaching our goal of 10,000 donations by midnight will keep us on track to post the strongest report possible, and show just how powerful the grassroots campaign we are building _REALLY_ is — but we’re running out of time.**
**[That’s why I am personally reaching out to you: Can you rush a donation of any amount before our deadline at midnight? If everyone reading this email chipped in — even just $1 — we’d hit our goal!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250915_2_mm?refcode=em20250915-4448&refcode2=4448_400544_iwLoNV&akid=4448%2E400544%2EiwLoNV)**

— 💛 Deb

name: David Hogg
subject: Charlie
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We have got to make this stop.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250915-1&t=1&akid=2657%2E587540%2EmWe6nq)
The assassination of Charlie Kirk is a reminder of the imminent threat that having so many guns in our society poses to all of us on a daily basis.
Not only to us, but even more so to our freedom and our democracy.
No matter how much I or you completely disagreed with Charlie, violence like this is not the answer. In a democracy, disagreements are addressed at the ballot box, not with bullets.
We are living in an incredibly divided and dangerous time in our nation's history. While we may not know what will bring us out of this dark moment, if history teaches us anything, it's that countries are never brought together through inflicting violence on our fellow citizens.
I know Charlie's family, children, friends, and loved ones are grief-stricken at this moment. There are too many Americans who know that grief all too well. Too many parents who dropped their kids off at school, and never got to take them home. Too many people who've lost their friends to gun violence. Over the years, I have seen that grief on the faces of parents whose children never made it to graduation, widowed fiances who never made it down the aisle, and new Americans whose American dream turned into a nightmare. That grief knows no political bounds, and I do not wish it on anyone, no matter my political disagreements with them.
I hope that we use our collective grief, be it mourning Charlie or mourning the almost 50,000 Americans we lose each year to gun-related deaths, to do something. Even if that action is small, it could save one life — a life that is an entire world to their loved ones. If we continue to divide, people will continue to die. I will not stand for that. I believe we can change course. We can live in a country where we are free from the grief of gun deaths and free from the fear that at any moment you or someone you know could be killed.
With compassion and resolve,
David
